E: Even though I'll keep reading it once I grow up... I don't care. Just give us a new book, author!

C: 我们期盼银河各方携手并肩，守护美好家园，抵御邪恶势力的侵犯。
E: We look forward to having all galactic factions join together to protect our homelands and defend against the invasion of evil forces.

C: 你不来吗？
E: Are you not coming?

C: 如果进展顺利，希望日后有时间与诸位聊聊星海间的见闻。我受俗务所困，已经多年没有出行远航了。
E: If things go as planned, I would love to find the time to sit with all of you and hear about your experiences among the stars. My responsibilities to the Xianzhou have meant that I haven't had the chance to travel in many years.

C: 山水有相逢！
E: We shall meet again!

C: 没什么了…
E: Just taking a stroll...

C: 也不算太久，在一旁看姑娘玩得热火朝天，也有些好奇这个帝垣琼玉牌。
E: It wasn't too long. Seeing your enthusiasm for this "celestial jade" game has stoked my curiosity.

C: 还好我支起了换境画屏
E: Thank fortunes I put up the shifting screen

C: 从数量上看，是在故意戏耍我们吗？
E: She sure did put a lot of work into this gag, and I think we're the punchline.

C: 呜汪~
E: Woof~

C: 不用跟那女人一起走了？将军还挺好心的嘛～
E: Did the general just spare us a walk with Kafka? I knew he was a good guy~

C: 这是什么啊？好像黏土一样。
E: What's this? It looks like clay.

C: 战况真激烈呀……
E: ...Whoa, looks like the battle here was intense...

C: 景元将军把指挥云骑的重任交给太卜，必然知道她会按卜算的结果行动。
E: General Jing Yuan tasked the master diviner with commanding the Cloud Knights — he would've known she'd act on the results of her divination.

C: 各位，请随本座来。
E: Please, come with me.

C: 所以，你不会让他们逃走的，对不对？
E: ...and then it's not just me they'll be running from.

C: 是谁！报上来意！
E: Who goes there? Show yourselves!

C: 可恨！「药王秘传」到底使了什么妖法！
E: Curse it! What Sanctus Medicus sorcery did they use on us!?

C: 混蛋…我真想现在就砍了他。
E: You scum... If the order allowed I would cut you down now.

C: 离丹炉还很远哩。本座虽不通药理，但也知道抛开剂量谈毒性是纸上谈兵……
E: We're still far from the elixir crucibles. I'm no healer, but I do know that dosage is important in the application of poisons...

C: 我并非以无名客的身份站在这里。因为此行的来去，我受人摆布，并无自由可言……
E: How am I still one of the Nameless? I stand here at the mercy of others without true freedom to speak...

C: 你就没什么想问的吗？
E: Is there nothing you'd like to ask?

C: 我想看看她…只是想看看她现在过得如何…只是想看看她啊！！
E: I want to see her... see how she's faring... I want to see her!

C: 不碍事，蝼蚁濒死的反扑，显得分外凄丽…
E: Forgive my indulgence. Your struggle in the face of certain death is... touching.

C: 将军的位子关系重大，谈何享受？只可说是适应吧，哼哼……
E: Generalship is no trifling matter — how could I be "enjoying myself?" All I can do is get used to it, hmph...

C: 依照卡芙卡所知的信息，这可能性尽管被艾利欧掌控，但确实是对罗浮最有利的未来。星核猎手们自投罗网，又为仙舟引来了盟友…也就是你们。虽有私心，结果仍是好意。
E: Based on what Kafka knows, and despite everything being under the control of Elio, that prophecy is indeed the most beneficial future for the Luofu. The Stellaron Hunters walked right into our trap, and even gifted allies — in the form of yourselves — to the Xianzhou... That might sound self-interested, but I hope the feeling is mutual.

C: 唉！是你们啊…我还以为是她回来了…是司舵派你们来的吧？
E: Oh! It's you... For a moment I thought she'd returned... Did the Helm Master send you over?

C: 我以为她是哄我这样的小孩儿开心呢，没想到，她真的言而有信啊。对了…停云姐姐怎么没来呀？
E: I just thought she was trying to cheer me up — I never thought she'd actually do it... Where is Miss Tingyun today?

C: 等、等等！等等我！
E: W—Wait! Wait for me!

C: 好了，好了，明白了。
E: Alright, okay, I understand.

C: 嗯，我也没说错吧。那家伙一路上心事重重的，让人可担心了。
E: Mm-hmm, pretty accurate nickname, right? That guy has a lot on his plate — it's enough to make you worry.

C: 我打算离开罗浮了。
E: I'm planning on leaving the Luofu.

C: 我在梦里被人砍了一刀…
E: I dreamed I was slashed by someone with a blade...

C: 抱歉占用了各位宝贵的时间，我们就不打扰了。如在匹诺康尼有任何需要，家族随时为您效劳。
E: I apologize for taking up everyone's precious time, and we shan't keep you any longer. If you need anything else while in Penacony, The Family stands ready to serve.

C: 幸运的楼号，幸运的楼层，幸运的房间号，我费了好大工夫才订到这么个宝地…送给你了，要好好珍惜啊，朋友。
E: A lucky block number, a lucky floor, a lucky room number. You have no idea how much I went through to book this precious space... And now I've given it to you. Treasure it well, friend.

C: …哦，好像还没问你选哪边呢。但没关系，因为——
E: ...Oh, I didn't get your answer. But that's fine, because...

C: …看来这只孔雀的羽毛还被人拔光了——行李被家族没收了？
E: ...It seems this peacock is short of a feather or two. The Family's been rummaging through your things, haven't they?

C: 我想想啊，流光忆庭和星穹列车已经接触过了，泯灭帮…多半没戏，纯美骑士团还不知道是否会赴约，至于「酒馆」的家伙们……
E: Let's see, the Garden of Recollection and the Astral Express have already made contact. The Annihilation Gang... I can't really count on them. The Knights of Beauty haven't given their answer, and as for that bunch at the Tavern...

C: 您可以活用梦境护照提供的「打卡」功能，记录您在美梦中的点点滴滴，收获各种快乐，并制作出专属于您的「梦境手账」——
E: You can use the Dreamscape Pass's provided clock-in feature to record every moment of your wonderful dream, save your favorite happy bits, and create a Dreamscape Scrapbook that is uniquely yours.

C: 愿各位在匹诺康尼尽情享受美梦，乘坐那边的电梯就可以抵达客房了。
E: I wish you all pleasant dreams in Penacony. You may take the elevator over there to reach your guest rooms.

C: 我要看血流成河！
E: I too wanna see a river of blood!

C: 当你再度睁开眼时，方才遭遇的一切仿佛被压缩在一瞬间。你的思绪已经捕捉不到它们了，但身体却因为这刹那安眠而精力充沛——这活力简直前所未有。
E: You open your eyes and feel a vitality like no other. The difficulty you were experiencing a moment earlier feels like a distant memory.

C: 哎呀…你瞧我，职业病又犯了。我总是改不掉这好为人师的毛病。
E: Oops... I've fallen into my professional habits again. I just can't seem to shake off this urge to be a know-it-all.

C: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
E: Could there be anyone worse than me?

C: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
E: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

C: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
E: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

C: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
E: Could there be anyone worse than me?

C: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
E: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

C: 我才注意到…你是无名客，对不对？是第一次来匹诺康尼吗？
E: By the way, I've just noticed... You're a Nameless, right? Is this your first time here on Penacony?

C: …已经点好了吗？你…挺有眼光的呢！哈哈…那、那我买单了……
E: ...Are you done ordering? You... you have great taste! Haha... I... I'll get the bill...

C: 看，这尊雕像就是匹诺康尼大名鼎鼎的卡通人物——「钟表小子」！
E: Look! That's the statue of Clockie, Penacony's famous cartoon character!

C: 来自匹诺康尼最长久、最著名的卡通动画，讲述了主人公钟表小子与他的伙伴们，在美梦小镇中生活的冒险故事——至今已经连载万集以上了！
E: It's the oldest and most famous animation from Penacony. It follows the adventurous life of Clockie and his friends in the town of Dreamville. To date, over <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> episodes have aired!

C: 那就麻烦你了。
E: Thanks.

C: 不了，我对摄像头过敏…
E: I think I'll pass. I'm allergic to camera lenses...

C: 眼睫毛？可钟表小子没有那种东西呀……
E: Eyelashes? Clockie doesn't have those...

C: 这里就是黄金时刻规模最大的公园，也是匹诺康尼汽水文化的标志——那座超级巨大的汽水瓶，就是苏乐达企业的总部大楼！
E: This is the largest park in Golden Hour — it represents the soda culture of Penacony. That gigantic soda bottle houses the headquarters of the SoulGlad Enterprise!

C: 看来我说中了？来吧，二位——让我老桑博带你们好好体验一下大人的世界！
E: Looks like my analysis is spot-on. Follow me, you two. Let me give you a taste of the adult world!

C: 这沙龙可不一般。除了皮皮西人，只有拿到贵宾卡的客人才能进。
E: This is no ordinary salon. The only guests allowed to enter are the Pepeshi people — or those with VIP cards.

C: 我需要真相。告诉我，好吗？
E: I want to know the truth. Is that too much to ask?

C: 那不是黄泉吗？
E: Isn't that Acheron?

C: 我的球棒已经等不及了！
E: My baseball bat can't wait to show its might!

C: 什么钟表把戏？
E: What is "Clockwork"?

C: …就像此时此刻。
E: ...Just like this moment.

C: 帕姆会用喷壶让我们冷静一下…
E: Pom-Pom would cool us down with water from a spray can...

C: 不知道这个状态下，还能不能操作飘浮的筑材……
E: I wonder whether I can still control the floating building materials in this condition...

C: 诶哟，看来这位勇敢的小姐想保护你呀，为什么？你们关系有这么亲密么？
E: Oho, this brave little girl appears to be protecting you. I wonder why? Are you two that close?

C: 是很重要的事吗？
E: Is it something very important?

C: 米哈伊尔，带上它吧！
E: Take it with you, Mikhail!

C: 我还活着吗…
E: Am I still alive...?

C: 很高兴你的精神状态还算正常，没有受到那片*原始梦境*的影响，运气不错。
E: I'm happy to see that you've kept your wits, and that you haven't been affected by the *Primal Dreamscape*. How lucky.

C: （这是…又一张纸条？）
E: (Is this... another note?)

C: 娜塔莎…是谁？想必我们未曾谋面。
E: Natasha who? I don't recall meeting such a person.

C: 数万年的囚禁早就磨平了我的桶边，我已风光不再，只想以一个普通垃圾桶的身份度过余生。再见了，陌生的人。
E: Countless years of captivity have whittled flat my edges. My prime is long past, never to return. I only wish to pass the rest of my life as a normal trashcan. Farewell, stranger.

C: 你解决了被封印的恶魔，垃垃撕圾？他那么恐怖，那么强大…但你却战胜了他——何其伟大！
E: You dealt with the sealed demon, Garboski? He is so powerful and so terrifying, but you defeated him... How magnificent of you!

C: …请回吧，祂的梦境不欢迎你。
E: ...Please leave. THEIR dreamscape doesn't welcome you.

C: 哎呀，别板着脸嘛～还一本正经地引经据典，干嘛这么严肃？
E: Oh come on, lighten up! Why so serious with all the quotations and references?

C: 你…难道就不想为她报仇吗？
E: Really? Don't tell me you're not craving a little vengeance.

C: 看来你有些不太愉快的回忆呢…但显然，接下来的合作对你、对我、对列车组都是明智的，对吧？所以你可以安心地依赖我哦。
E: It appears you've had some unhappy memories... But it's obvious that this partnership makes the most sense to you, me, and the Express Crew, no? So you can take it easy and trust me.

C: 不呀。我要陪你们一起入梦，免得你们受伤。反正忆者也不需要什么入梦池…对吧？
E: No. I will accompany you into the dream to prevent harm from befalling you all. Memokeepers don't need a Dreampool anyway.

C: 两位，寒暄暂且到此为止吧…我们先合力请走这些好客的孩子，如何？
E: We'll have to cut the banter short... Let's first work together and remove these overly friendly children, shall we?

C: 人多一点不是坏事。
E: Never hurts to have more people.

C: 乍看到游侠和猎手齐聚一堂的时候，我可是心里一紧哪…没想到你能成功挑起他们之间的斗争。
E: When I first saw the Ranger and the Hunter together, my heart skipped a beat... I never thought you'd successfully trigger a conflict between the two.

C: 你们是一伙的…
E: You two are in this together...

C: 你觉得幕后黑手是谁…
E: Who do you think is the mastermind...?

C: 但这里很危险，还是三人同行吧。
E: But it's dangerous around here. We'd better travel together.

C: 机甲…？！为什么……
E: Mecha...!? Why...

C: 只是希望你能明白，围绕那份所谓的「遗产」…匹诺康尼暗流涌动，人们个个心怀鬼胎。
E: I just hope you realize that wherever that legacy is concerned... covert plans are already underway throughout Penacony. Everyone's got their own agenda.

C: 你不知道这帮人有多难对付。这么说吧，他们以前能瞒下「死亡」的存在，这次也一定能把知更鸟的死讯掩盖过去。
E: You have no idea how difficult these people are to deal with. Put it this way — they've hushed up the existence of "Death" before, so they can definitely cover up any news about Robin's death.

C: 但我相信也有少数派系是例外，这就是我需要各位的理由。星穹列车名声在外，「同谐」也会给予你们最公正的评价。
E: But I trust there are still a few factions that remain exceptions, and that's why I need you all. The reputation of the Astral Express precedes you, and the Harmony will give you the fairest of appraisals.

C: 当您带走他的父亲，我的孩子尚在羊水中沉睡。而今丈夫所在的地方，我也即将去往……
E: When you took his father, my child was still sleeping in my belly. And where my husband went, I too soon must go...

C: 接下来呢？{NICKNAME}被黑天鹅带走了，你要去找{M#他}{F#她}么？
E: What's next, then? {NICKNAME}'s been taken by Black Swan. Will you go look for {M#him}{F#her}?

C: 你好，我是「橡木兵人」。
E: Hello, I am an Oak Family Soldier.

C: 锟斤拷锟斤拷锟斤拷。
E: Jistgabburash.

C: （看来砂金对这个结果很满意…和大家说一声吧。）
E: (Looks like Aventurine is happy with this outcome... Let's tell everyone about it.)

C: <color=#ff3a3e>奇怪…我好像记不清了。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Weird... I can't seem to remember.</color>

C: …倒是很符合巡海游侠给人的刻板印象。
E: ...That fits the stereotype of a Galaxy Ranger to a T.

C: 会是「星穹列车」吗？
E: Perhaps he's going for the Astral Express?

C: 他显然是个天生的赌徒，愿意为胜利押上所有。
E: He's clearly a born gambler if he's willing to go all in to win.

C: {NICKNAME}没有危险。回到我们刚才的话题吧，能否得到我的信任，取决于你愿意袒露多少。
E: {NICKNAME}'s fine. Let's stick with the topic. Gaining my trust all depends on how much you're willing to reveal.

C: 你的妥协比我预想中还要快些。可惜，比起商人…赌徒才更需要筹码。我可以给你礼金，但在这之前，我要你亲口告诉我——
E: You compromised quicker than I thought. Unfortunately, it's a gambler that needs a bargaining chip... not a merchant. I can give you your gift money, but before that, I want you to tell me —

C: 是。你连这个都知道？
E: Yes. You even know about that?

C: 说说看吧，需要我做什么？
E: Cut to the chase. What do you need from me?

C: 原形毕露了啊。顺便一提，你的生命*暂时*只剩下十七个系统时了。珍惜这段时间，好好回味失败的余韵吧。
E: Finally shown your true colors, heh. Oh, and just to remind you: You currently only have seventeen system hours left to live. Treasure your remaining time, and savor the delectable aftertaste of defeat.

C: 我没看见。
E: I saw nothing.

C: 不，我是说——
E: No, I meant to say —

C: 别小看匹诺康尼的调饮师，尤其是加拉赫。这家伙八成会点魔法…无论顾客的需求多么刁钻，他都能给你调出恰到好处的滋味。
E: And let me tell you, don't underestimate the bartenders of Penacony, especially not Gallagher. This guy is pure magic... He can satisfy even the pickiest of customers.

C: 舒翁刚才说过「任何东西都可以下咽」…也许你可以进行各种尝试，看看<color=#dbc291ff>不同情绪能酿出何种不同的调饮原料</color>。
E: Siobhan just said, "Anything can be imbibed"... Perhaps you can try various experiments to see what<color=#dbc291ff> different emotions can brew with different drink ingredients</color>.

C: 不知道。我认识米哈伊尔时，他就已经是「钟表匠」了，也可能是继承的名号。
E: I'm not sure, but Mikhail was already the Watchmaker when I met him, so maybe he inherited the title.

C: 不会这么简单吧？
E: It can't be that simple, can it?

C: 就这么简单，三十枚{RUBY_B#赤铜币}塔安巴{RUBY_E#}，我半条命的价格，不多不少。
E: It is that simple. Thirty {RUBY_B#Red Copper Coins}Tanbas{RUBY_E#} — the remainder of my... market value. Thirty Tanbas, no more, no less.

C: 去吧，给自己挑身喜欢的衣服，再选个中意的身份…然后活用它们，孩子。
E: Go, pick the clothes you like, then choose your desired identity... and then use them well, child.

C: …可是，然后呢？
E: ...But, what then?

C: 你在出发前，就把「砂金石」砸碎了……
E: You smashed the aventurine stone before you left...?

C: 真好，这样我也能看见自己的样子了。
E: How nice! Now I can see what I look like too.

C: 作为回敬，在接下来的对峙中，倘若出现了对星穹列车不利的形势…我会站在你们这边。
E: To reciprocate, in the upcoming confrontation, if the odds aren't in the Astral Express' favor... I will stand with you.

C: 妈妈，我上电视了！
E: Mommy, look! I'm on TV!

C: 你们蕴含的可能性，值得让我放手一搏…！
E: The chance, no matter how small, the potential is what you hang onto. That's what justifies the gamble!

C: ——另一颗玉石开始绽放光芒。
E: Another stone begins to radiate light.

C: 先谈到这里吧。
E: Let's talk later.

C: 瓦尔特先生，三月七小姐，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}…各位无名客，幸会。
E: It's a pleasure to meet the Nameless.

C: 自回到匹诺康尼起，我的嗓音就变得异常，逐步演变为失声的折磨。我本以为只是场意外，也许是在外旅居久了，不习惯阿斯德纳高浓度的忆质环境。
E: Ever since I returned to Penacony, my voice started to change, until it gradually faded away. At first, I thought it was a temporary ailment, perhaps due to having been away too long. I thought maybe it'd just take some time for my body to acclimate to the high concentration of memoria in Asdana.

C: 星穹列车的各位，又见面了。
E: Here we meet again, everyone from the Astral Express.

C: 所以，「遗产」真的只是个幌子……
E: So, the legacy is just a facade...

C: 而且…歌斐木先生对我和妹妹有恩，我实在不愿面对这样的结果。
E: Moreover... Mr. Gopher Wood has been kind to my sister and me, and I didn't want it all to end like this.

C: 我发誓。
E: Yes.

C: 行吧。就按规定的流程来——咳咳！我犯了过错，请宽恕我的罪行：我在早饭时候浪费了半块披萨…还有一瓶苏乐达。
E: Sure, let's just get this over with. Ahem! I have sinned. Please forgive me! I wasted half a pizza at breakfast... and a bottle of SoulGlad.

C: 那回见了，星期日先生。谢谢你陪我聊天…嗝。
E: See you around, Mr. Sunday! And... It was nice chatting with you... *hiccup*

C: 歌斐木先生给了我一本画册！讲的是「谐乐众弦」的故事。
E: Mr. Gopher Wood gave me a picture book! It's about the story of the Harmonic Strings!

C: 确实是这样。
E: It seems so.

C: 各家系当前的最优事项，就是确保谐乐大典按时开幕。这次连「梦主」都亲自赶赴一线，您就放一百个心吧，绝不会让您白跑一趟。
E: At present, all the Families are focused on making sure the festival starts on time. Even the Dreammaster himself has arrived. So don't worry. Your trip won't be in vain.

C: 哼，既然他的遗愿已经带到，我的最后一项任务也完成了。
E: Hmph, since his last will has now been conveyed, my final mission is complete.

C: 二位选手，你们即将面对的，是原初梦境的怪物！彼时，匹诺康尼还处于一无所有的荒芜年代，梦境混乱无序，忆域迷因四处横行！
E: Contestants, you are about to confront the monsters of the Primordial Dreamscape! During this period, Penacony was nothing but a barren wasteland — the Dreamscape was fraught with strife and disorder, with Memory Zone Memes running rampant!

C: 「其实，剧情要求你提供帮助。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "Actually, the plot dictates that you directly provide aid to us." - You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 很好，各位，看来你们很快就上手了！
E: Very good! Looks like you've got the hang of it!

C: 两位朋友，你们还有重要的事要做，对吧？
E: My friends, you still have other important things to do, right?

C: 一路过关斩将，你应该或多或少感受到了那个时代的缩影：弱势者被无情淘汰，平等荡然无存。在残酷的竞争中，人们朝不保夕，艰难度日……
E: Through your journey of overcoming obstacles, you must have glimpsed the essence of that era: The vulnerable ruthlessly eliminated, equality non-existent, commonfolk living precarious lives, eking out a dreary existence...

C: 还有我们最终应行的、唯一的道路。
E: And our final course of action, the only path to take.

C: 我们必须封印匹诺康尼的星核。
E: We need to seal the Stellaron on Penacony.

C: 假设他自始至终都没被抓到，那一定会因精神错乱而死。偷渡客的入梦手段大多非比寻常，不像酒店那样完善。想在梦境中生活根本是天方夜谭。
E: Say he never gets caught, he would only die from delirium. The methods with which illegal stowaways enter dreams are unorthodox, not flawless like the hotel's. Living in the Dreamscape would be a mere pipe dream.

C: 我晓得人遭受折磨时如何痛苦，迷失道路时如何茫然，事与愿违时又如何沮丧…甚至绝望。这一切都令我痛苦，因为这样根本不能算是「幸福」。
E: I know the suffering of being tormented, the turmoil of losing your way, how sorrow... and even despair, set in when matters don't work out. All of this causes me unending pain, because this is not what "happiness" is at all.

C: 我无法断定，只是有些猜测。但既然米沙对这里感到熟悉…说明我的猜测可能是正确的。
E: I wasn't sure. It was just a hunch, but since Misha feels familiar with this place... my hunch might be correct.

C: 这就是谜底的关键所在， 小三月。现在，再试着回忆一下……
E: That's the key to the mystery, March. Now, take a moment to recall...

C: 匹诺康尼的现状，你们已然知晓。我当然希望有人来帮助这个世界重回正轨。但这个决定应当由你们来完成，因为「开拓」的道路从来不由他人铺就。
E: Now that you're well aware of the current situation of Penacony, I certainly hope that you'll help me get this world back on track. But I'll leave that decision to you, for the Path of Trailblaze is never paved by others.

C: 就算观众没有入场，也总该有场务吧，怎么一点声音都没有……
E: Even if there's no audience yet, there should be some staff around. Why is it so silent...?

C: 人偶都聚集在画框周围，是想让我们进去么？
E: The puppets are gathering around the frame. Are they expecting us to enter it?

C: 「而接下来，我将为诸位揭示——匹诺康尼的未来。」
E: "And now, I shall reveal its future to you."

C: 看起来，这第二幕讲的是匹诺康尼走向「梦想之地」的过程，而家族的到来在其中发挥了不可或缺的作用。
E: This is the second act. Looks like it's about Penacony's journey to becoming the Land of the Dreams, during which The Family plays a crucial role.

C: 啊这…怎么回事？
E: Uh... What's going on?

C: 到时候了，各位。我与公司的各位要员约定就接下来的谈判先行磋商，不知各位是否有意前来旁听？
E: It's time, everyone. The IPC's key members and I have agreed to consult one another before the upcoming negotiation. Do any of you wish to sit in?

C: 而那记忆…将要璀璨得如同这舷窗中举目可见的点点繁星。
E: And that memory... will be as scintillating as the star clusters you see in this porthole.

C: 「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因。
E: The Agate World, Melustanin.

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 这里是梦境和现实的狭间，属于那些从<color=#dbc291ff>太一之梦</color>中清醒的人。
E: This place is the rift between dream and reality. A place reserved only for those who have awakened from <color=#dbc291ff>Ena's dream</color>.

C: 即便…这没有意义？
E: Even if... it doesn't make sense at all?

C: 每一个人，他们记忆中的每个人，那些笑容和眼泪，完成与未能完成的约定…最后都将迈向既定的终局。如果在启程之初，你便已知晓此行的终点……
E: Everyone, and every face they remember, the joy and the heartaches, the vows sealed and those left hanging... all will inevitably march towards a predetermined ending. If you had grasped the journey's finale right from its inception...

C: 先到这儿吧，这边似乎有客人来了……
E: Let's wrap it up for now. Looks like I've got a visitor here...

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 不久后……
E: Moments later...

C: 的确，用卡芙卡的话说…这也是我人生中「缺失的部分」。
E: Indeed. In Kafka's words... that's also a "missing part" of my life.

C: 有列车长在，暂时不用担心。但我们也应该尽快返程，把无名客们的消息带给它。
E: Given the conductor's presence, there's no need to worry about it. However, it's crucial that we soon return to inform Pom-Pom about uh... the Nameless.

C: 这个诉求，我也给你准备了相应的解决方案。
E: I understand your concern, and I have a solution for that, too.

C: 你想把「慈玉典押」也开到这空艇上来？
E: You want to open a Bonajade Exchange branch on this ship, too?

C: 嚯嚯，口气这么大？行啊，那就让我见识下你的本事！
E: Oh? A big talker, huh? Alright, let's see what you've got!

C: 如果有机会，我希望你们都能来我的典当行坐坐。而为了这一天的到来，我愿意耐心等待。
E: I really hope that one day, all of you will come and visit my pawnshop. I'll be waiting patiently for that day.

C: 你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？我听房间里一点动静都没有，快吓死了。
E: Are you okay? Can you hear me? I didn't hear a peep from your room, and it really freaked me out.

C: 还想问你个问题…
E: I wanna ask you a question about that transformation...

C: 很有特点的名字呢。
E: What a unique name.

C: 想要实现这个愿望，我需要的东西很简单：一种动物的尾巴。
E: To fulfill this wish, the thing I need is simple: The tail of an animal.

C: 「慈玉女士」盯着你，似乎望穿了你所有的欲望和念想。
E: Lady Bonajade stares at you, seemingly piercing through all your desires and thoughts.

C: （晚点发个短信确认下，眼下就先去参加谐乐大典吧。）
E: (I'll send a message later to check in on her. Let's go attend the Charmony Festival first.)

C: ——让我们共同为苜蓿草家主奥帝•艾弗法对「同谐」事业的无私奉献，献上最热烈的掌声，以及最诚挚的谢意！
E: We invite you to express your warmest applause and deepest appreciation for Oti Alfalfa — head of the Alfalfa Family — for his selfless devotion to the Harmony's cause!

C: 你是不是不擅长写人设？
E: You're not very good at character design, are you?

C: 举杯。
E: A toast.

C: …只是在生气帕！对，生气！
E: ...Just angry. Yeah, angry!

C: 既然大家都到齐了，咱们就进入正题吧。
E: Since everyone's here, let's get down to business.

C: 那位前辈也没留下这么多遗产吧……
E: I don't think he had that many legacies to leave behind...

C: 姬子和杨叔还得参加应酬，大人们可真辛苦啊。
E: Himeko and Mr. Yang still have to participate in social networking. Being an adult sure is hard.

C: 得了吧，{F#姐们}{M#哥们}，来这的都说自己是大人物，我都听麻了。
E: Oh, cut it out. Everyone who comes here calls themselves a VIP. It doesn't mean anything to me by this point.

C: 忍历五十六年 忍之都
E: <unbreak>56</unbreak>th Year of Ninja Era, the Ninja Capital

C: 退学了，拜拜。
E: I'm dropping out. Bye.

C: 抗揍。
E: I can take a beating.

C: 这孩子是「副导演」，一位可靠的搭档，摄影、场记、剪辑…无所不通，在挑选演员的眼光上更胜我一筹。
E: This is my assistant director. A reliable partner who's skilled at cinematography, script supervising, editing, and more — has a better eye than me when it comes to casting performers.

C: 试镜结束。你现在是「谐乐学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。
E: The audition is over. You are now a student of Charmony Academy. Here is your student card.

C: 唉…那个什么芮克先生，居然说最适合我的不是谐乐学院，而是筑梦学院！
E: That Mr. Reca said I'm better suited for Dreamweaver Academy instead of Charmony Academy.

C: 是吗？那她应该也很困扰吧……
E: Do they? She must be very troubled too...

C: 你这家伙，给我过来——
E: Why you...! Get over here!

C: 客人，恕我冒昧问一句，这已经是您点的第七杯了，可每一杯您又只喝一口…是有什么地方不合口味吗？
E: Pardon me for asking, but this is your seventh drink and you've only had a sip from each... Is there something the matter with them?

C: 不是，你谁啊？
E: Huh? Who are you?

C: 这话绝对可信，当初面对这类人时，我宁可挨了几枪，也没背信弃义。
E: You can bet on that. The first time I met someone like that, I let myself get shot rather than betray them.

C: 波提欧先生，看来您也在那件事后暂时停下了脚步啊，在匹诺康尼玩得还愉快吗？
E: In any case, Mr. Boothill, it seems you've put your travels on hold after that incident too. Are you enjoying your time in Penacony?

C: 哈，我就知道，指望那小可爱不装神弄鬼没戏。
E: Ha, I knew it. There's no way the lil' fudgehead will come right out and say what he actually means.

C: 其实是米凯先生帮了许多忙。
E: We wouldn't have this turnout if it wasn't for Mr. Micah.

C: 开场吧，大明星——
E: Go get the party started, singing queen—

C: 对它说话
E: Talk to it

C: 银河忍法帖•前情提要
E: Previously on Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions

C: 看来人都到齐了啊。那么同学们，*蕉学*时间到！
E: Seems like we've got everyone. Alright, let's dive right into our banacademics!

C: 蕉？
E: Bana?

C: 哦！这副画作…如此漂亮的小猴，简直像一位专业筑梦师的作品！{NICKNAME}同学，你他蕉的真是个筑梦天才——<unbreak>100</unbreak>分！
E: Ah, this artwork... What a splendid monkey! It looks like it could have been crafted by a master Dreamweaver! You, {NICKNAME}, are a bananarific genius! A perfect score of <unbreak>100</unbreak>!

C: 三月七同学面前的涂鸦墙一尘不染，但墙前多出了一块巨大的…六相冰？
E: March 7th's graffiti wall is as clean as a whistle, but in front of it a huge... Six-Phased Ice appears?

C: 那、那个，我可以解释……
E: L—Let me explain...

C: 胜负已分。让在下为你吟诵忍•真言吧——
E: Now that you are vanquished at our feet, allow me to recite to you the ninja mantra—

C: 少女盯着乱破的画作，似乎在思考着什么。
E: The girl stares at the Rappa's painting, seemingly lost in thought.
...Bana?

C: 他确实很可疑！
E: He's hiding something for sure!

C: 但睡蕉小猴是最好的伙伴！它不会跟你争绩点，不会跟你攀比，不会偷用你的东西，你大可与它*蕉*心，不用担心它把你的秘密告诉别人。
E: But the Slumbernana Monkey is the perfect companion! It won't compete for grades, won't compare itself to you, won't use your things without asking. You can trust it completely, without worrying about it sharing your secrets with others. Consider it your bestest palnana!

C: 为了保证口感，大多数商品香蕉都是「无性繁殖」。没有种子也没有花粉，需要用相同的根茎培育芽苗。
E: To maintain their taste, the majority of commercial bananas are produced through "asexual reproduction." Lacking seeds and pollen, they are grown from the same rhizome.

C: 它当然会支持您亲手复仇，就像现在这样——
E: Instead, it'd support you taking vengeance into your own hands... Just like this—

C: 动起来吧，同学。我会在终点等你，为你的人生…揭开新章。
E: Get a move on, dear student. I'll be waiting for you at the end, to unveil... a new chapter of your life.

C: 原来如此，方才的空间•忍法实属精妙，若阁下是来自「流晄忆町」的忆忍，便不足为奇了。
E: I see. The spatial ninjutsu that you displayed earlier was truly ingenious. I wouldn't be surprised if you were a Memo Ninja from the Garden of Zencollection.

C: 接受鸣神大环
E: Accept the Great Narukami Circle.

C: 不，先让我去找她问个清楚！
E: No! Let me ask her what she means by this!

C: 什么？叆叇馆主…竟是叛忍？
E: What? Umbra Headmistress... is a traitorous ninja?

C: 那么，在下的忍道便是——
E: Then, my way of the ninja shall be...

C: 快看，知更鸟小姐来了——
E: Look! Miss Robin is here...

C: 呃…想不起来了。
E: Uhhhhh... I don't remember.

C: 《银河忍法帖》\n最终章 忍众猎猿颠倒梦破之卷
E: Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions\nThe Final Chapter: Upturned Dreamfall

C: 小猴的数量变多了，看来我们离梦境的核心越来越近了。
E: There is an increasing number of monkeys. It seems like we are getting closer and closer to the core of this dreamscape.

C: 此刻，缭乱•忍侠被热情的忍徒们团团包围，有如落网之鱼，难以脱身。
E: At this moment, the Dazzling Ninja is surrounded by enthusiastic ninja disciples like a fish caught in a net, rendering her unable to escape.

C: 得中止试炼。
E: We need to stop the trial now.

C: 阿格莱雅，按照约定，我来介入试炼，救出你们的「救世主」……
E: As I promised you, Aglaea, I will intervene in the trial this time, to bring your Deliverer out to safety...

C: 遐蝶，如有变数，优先确保他俩的安全——我自有办法杀出一条生路。
E: If something bad were to happen, Castorice, your priority is to ensure the safety of these two. I can find a way out on my own.

C: 能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
E: Could you tell us more about this "black tide"?

C: 礼物，我要礼物！
E: A gift? Gimme, gimme!

C: 不知为何，缇安大人似乎很生气。
E: For some reason, Lady Trianne became awfully upset after hearing that.

C: 此物名为「神血蜜露」，据传仅有十二瓶，乃是用众泰坦各自神血浇灌的作物酿成。世间仅存的三瓶现皆已收入奥赫玛宝库。
E: This is the Dew of Divine Blood, brewed from crops nourished by the blood of the Titans. It is said that only twelve bottles existed. The last three bottles are now being kept in the treasure vault of Okhema.

C: 不过，放心吧～光从阿格莱雅女士的微表情和语调就不难判断，她对两位十分真诚呢。
E: No need to worry, by the way. I can tell from Lady Aglaea's tone of voice and micro-expressions that she's being genuine.

C: 俺也一样。
E: So am I!

C: 当然不会了。
E: Of course not.

C: 这只是个比喻啦，比喻。
E: It's just a figure of speech!

C: 沿着这条经纬小径向上，很快就能抵达树庭啦。
E: If we follow this Woven Trail and keep going upward, we'll reach the Grove in no time.

C: 无论如何…我们先在附近转转，探探情况吧。
E: For now... let's look around and see if we can find out what's happened.

C: 我对他的秉性再清楚不过。倘若这位渎神的「大表演家」知道自己命不久矣，定会打起火种的主意，教泰坦为自己陪葬。
E: I know that man all too well. If that blasphemous "performer" knew that he was not long for this world, he would most certainly try to seize the Coreflame and drag the Titan down with him.

C: 一尊雕像，状似身披长袍、盘坐冥想的老翁……
E: A statue resembling an old man draped in robes, seated in deep meditation...

C: 老师好！
E: Hi, professor!

C: 所以，不必顾虑，随意提问就好。
E: So, don't worry about it. Go ahead and ask your question.

C: 小小咪，怎么了？
E: Memmy, what's wrong?

C: …答案正是「唤醒这颗『心脏』」。
E: ...So, the solution is to "awaken this 'heart'."

C: 我没有在担心他。
E: I'm not worrying about him.

C: …令我恐惧之事。
E: ...Something that terrifies me.

C: 小敌，你的族人…始终在期盼一位新王加冕，是吗？
E: De, your people... They have been eagerly awaiting a new king all this time, haven't they?

C: 那些传闻，并非臆造。
E: Those rumors are not entirely groundless.

C: 你还没看清吗，吾师？将我的父母，还有悬锋一族送上末路的，正是你我口中的「纷争」，对所谓荣光的追逐，一声声「宁战死，毋荣归」的口号……
E: Do you still not see it? What led my parents and our people to their downfall is none other than this Strife we speak of. The quest for glory, the tenet of "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return"...

C: 角、角斗？
E: D—Duel?

C: 到底是谁做的……
E: Who in the world did this...?

C: 只是在那之前，我还有些事情要办。树庭有几位同僚的家属就住在圣城，我想在面见阿格莱雅前…先去慰问一下他们。
E: But I have some things to take care of first. The families of some of my fellow Grove scholars live in the holy city. Before we meet Aglaea... I want to visit them.

C: 缇宝老师曾走遍翁法罗斯万千城邦，可就连她们都对这个黑袍剑士毫无印象…此人绝不可小觑，一人一剑便将我们逼得喘不过气，对黄金裔来说，无疑是新的威胁。
E: Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...

C: 住口，克拉特鲁斯！你知道自己在说什么吗？
E: Silence, Krateros! Do you even know what you're saying?

C: 那家伙说，也许能从大工匠那得到建议…哈托努斯，去见他吧。
E: He said the Grand Craftsman Chartonus might have some suggestions. Might as well go see him.

C: 傻孩子，当然不是梦了。妈妈一直都在你的身边。
E: Don't be silly, dear. Of course you're not dreaming. I've always been by your side.

C: （妈妈、还有大家，以前总会夸我记性好……）
E: (Mama and the others always said I had a great memory...)

C: （字都被抹掉了…是因为记不清了么？）
E: (All the words are blurred out... Could it be that my memory is fading?)

C: 「黑色的迷雾中，死亡与命运已近█ 血染的大地上，死者与生灵寻津█ █」
E: "In the black mist, as death and fate draw close. █n the bloodied earth, the living and dead, but g█o█ts."

C: 「起点为何█ 徒留来人孑遗█ 终点为何█ ██惟见只影孤立█ ██ █」
E: "What is the start█ A voyage born in solitud█. What is the end█ A sp██it, lonely and s█b██e█."

C: 什么…你要离开了么，妈妈……
E: Mama... Are you going to leave me?

C: 我只想为自己发誓保护的城邦除掉一个祸端，仅此而已。树庭的惨剧，绝不能再度上演。
E: I just want to eliminate a threat to the city I pledged to protect. That's all. The tragedy at the Grove must never happen again.

C: 还有…别忘了在{RUBY_B#清晨}明晰时{RUBY_E#}前为阿雅备好早餐。
E: Also... remember to get breakfast ready for Agy before the {RUBY_B#Morning}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#} tomorrow!

C: 这个名字，不就是……
E: Isn't that name...

C: 什么！明明就在这个陶罐里……
E: What? It was right in this dolium...

C: 什么，阿雅…不，幻觉？
E: What, Agy? No, it's an illusion!

C: 莫非是<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>？
E: Is it <color=#dbc291ff>Castrum Kremnos</color>?

C: 猜测：{F#她}{M#他}要说些鼓舞的话。
E: I guess... {F#She}{M#He} will say something inspiring.

C: …请你放心，我们会尽己所能。
E: ...Rest assured. We'll do everything we can.

C: 合个影吧，至少留个纪念。
E: Let's at least snap a photo together to capture this moment, shall we?

C: …怎么不出声了？我还以为神性会冲淡人的多愁善感。
E: ...Why so quiet? I thought divinity would wash away some of your sentiments.

C: 杀声震天啊，这可不像那刻夏老师一个人能搞出来的动静。
E: That's the sound of an all-out war. Not the kind of ruckus Professor Anaxa can raise on his own.

C: {RUBY_B#黄昏}离愁时{RUBY_E#}将近，金丝却趋于舒弛，英雄们也带着战利品归来了。
E: The {RUBY_B#Dusk}Parting Hour{RUBY_E#} is upon us, yet the golden thread runs slack. The heroes have returned with their spoils.

C: 别道歉，阿蝶。那时，我只是不希望她被过去困住，毕竟*我们*离开家乡很久了。
E: No need to apologize, Cas. At that time, I simply didn't want her to be trapped by our past, especially considering how much time had passed since we left home.

C: 我听说神殿里面住着一位漂亮的圣女大人，想要见见她！
E: I heard there's a lovely Holy Maiden living in the temple, and I wanna meet her!

C: 也许，眼前这两个孩子…就是当年那女孩的后代呢。
E: Perhaps these two children are the descendants of that girl from back then.

C: 我将越过众神的残骸，在凡人中流离……
E: We will step over the gods' corpses and wander among humanity...

C: 什么……
E: ...What?

C: 她穿越「万径之门」，分裂为千名信使，将创世的神谕传向翁法罗斯大地。
E: She traversed the "Gate of Infinity," splitting into a thousand messengers to spread the divine prophecy across the land of Amphoreus.

C: 你最好多留个神，优先自保。从前人的经验来看，试炼绝非儿戏。
E: You should be extra cautious and watch out for yourself. Based on the experiences of those before you, the trial is no walk in the park.

C: 不知道你还记不记得，之前在匹诺康尼召开的那场「圣杯战争」？
E: Do you still remember the Holy Grail War we had back in Penacony?

C: 没错，奥帝先生。何况有您给我撑腰，就算是路易斯•弗莱明……
E: That's right, Mr. Oti. Besides, with you backing me up, even Louis Fleming...

C: 没关系的，发泄出来吧，我完全理解。有时候我也想要情绪失控一下，不过在舞台上、在聚光灯下，身为表演者的我们只能强令自己平复。
E: It's okay. Let it out. I get it. Sometimes I want to lose control, too. When we're on stage, under the spotlight, performers like us have to keep our composure.

C: 就像御主你说的那样，这是一个浸泡在梦中的世界。
E: Just like you said, Master. This world is steeped in dreams.

C: 不过眼下，我依旧会听从你的调遣。但如果在和其他从者结盟议和时情况有任何变化，我都将作出我自己的决断。
E: But for now, I'll follow your lead. However, if the situation changes when trying to form alliances with other Servants, I'll make my own decisions.

C: 说实话，有点慌。
E: To be honest, I'm a bit on edge.

C: 你…是那位巡海游侠的从者，没想到，你的嗅觉比猎犬家系的爪牙还要敏锐啊！
E: You are the Servant of that Galaxy Ranger... I didn't think your nose would be even sharper than the Bloodhound Family's minions.

C: 没有。
E: I didn't save Britain.

C: 我…害怕了。
E: I became... afraid.

C: 根据心情分类整理。
E: Sort by mood.

C: 让我们来说说一只鸟儿的故事吧，一只蒙冤入狱的鸟儿。她曾是一位歌手，因为谱写不受权贵们喜爱的歌谣而被投入铁牢。
E: Let me tell you the story of a bird who was imprisoned wrongfully. She was once a singer, thrown into a dark cell for composing songs that the powerful didn't like.

C: 所以你终于承认…
E: So you'll finally admit...

C: 事到如今？你在搞笑吗？
E: This far into the show? Are you trying to make me laugh?

C: 斯科特没有人权吗？
E: Does Skott have no rights?

C: 此时此刻，在流梦礁，圣杯战争的举办者正饶有兴致地欣赏风景……
E: At the same time, in the Dreamflux Reef, the host of the Holy Grail War is sitting elsewhere watching the scenery with interest...

C: 一鱼多吃的老东西。
E: That old fox, always managing to get the most out of everything.

C: 《午夜电锯狂想》
E: Midnight Chainsaw Rhapsody

C: 你们在一个密闭的房间里醒来，沙沙作响的电视机是死亡的背景音乐。
E: You all wake in a sealed chamber, the TV's static crackle singing death's lullaby.

C: 御主，请站到我身边来，我并不清楚那位Assassin要做什么…但这里依旧很危险。
E: Master, stay close to me. I don't know what that Assassin plans to do next... But it's still dangerous here.

C: Archer的御主，我看你对电影很熟悉。关于那个<color=#dbc291ff>葛瑞迪</color>，你有什么头绪吗？
E: Archer's Master, you seem very familiar with films. What do you know about this <color=#dbc291ff>Grady</color>?

C: 看你表现。
E: It all comes down to how you perform.

C: 我们…离开了他的固有结界？
E: Did we just... leave his Reality Marble?

C: 那就让Saber留下来。
E: Then let Saber stay.

C: 不，踢两脚。
E: No. Kick twice.

C: 难道知更鸟变不回来了？
E: Are you saying Robin can't change back?

C: *叹气* 也是，杀了你，我就无法存在啦。
E: *sighs* That's right, killing you would erase my existence.

C: 所以呢？你拍摄的这些，难道就不是烂片了？
E: So? Would that make the films you made... not bad?

C: 无妨，只要敌人露出破绽，我一击就能结束战斗。
E: It's nothing. As soon as the enemies show a weakness, I'll end this with a single strike.

C: 我上车都快两年了。
E: I've been on the Express for nearly two years now...

C: 当然可以。我会先回应黑天鹅小姐，将「永恒之地」列为选项之一，但不作最终结论。
E: Of course you can. For now, I'll let Miss Black Swan know that we're considering The Eternal Land as a possible destination, but we're also keeping our options open.

C: 合着你小时候就这么铁腕。
E: You've been iron-fisted since you were little, haven't you?

C: 总之，既然艾迪恩公园的麻烦与我有关，就不能置之不理。不需要筑梦师，我来根除这些扭曲。
E: In any case, say what you will, but I can't sit by and do nothing. Not when I'm the cause of all this trouble in Aideen Park. There's no need to involve the Dreamweavers. I'll fix these distortions once and for all.

C: 对无名客而言，正事与闲事真的存在一条界线么？
E: Would the Nameless see a point in keeping work and favors apart?

C: 今天可真是惊喜连连…上次是停云小姐，上上次是黄泉小姐，怎么感觉杨叔每次出门都会带些不得了的人回来啊？
E: The surprises just keep pouring in... First, there was Miss Acheron, and then Miss Tingyun. Why does it seem like Mr. Yang always comes back with some extraordinary guests?

C: 你还真是谁都不得罪……
E: You sure have a way of not offending anyone...

C: 感觉你的解释反而把事情变复杂了哎……
E: Okaaay, you just made it sound a whole lot more complicated...

C: 一点匹诺康尼股份。
E: Some Penacony shares.

C: 我们应当暂且回避下。两位久别重逢，先好好聊聊吧。
E: You two must have a lot to catch up on after being apart for so long. We'll give you some space.

C: 没想到会在这儿遇见您，知更鸟…女士。
E: I didn't expect to see you here, Miss Robin.

C: 不过算了，对你而言，还是别讲更好。
E: Ah, never mind. Maybe it's better for you not to joke at all.

C: 就是这点最让人恼火，我怎么会变成这么无聊的人啊。
E: This is so annoying. How did I become so dull?

C: 我比星神还厉害了！
E: Hah! So I'm better than an Aeon!

C: …我都不知道该不该问了。
E: ...Should I even be curious...?

C: 好啊，把大家都叫出来吧，第四面镜——
E: Sure, go ahead and summon the whole team, Fourth Mirror.

C: （现在不是感伤的时候。机器头…你会回应我吗？）
E: (Right. Now's not the time to wallow in nostalgia. Droidhead... Will you answer me?)

C: 机器头——我会回来的，你给我等着……
E: But mark my words, Droidhead: I will be back for you...

C: 既然缇宝老师都这么说…抱歉，二位降落在危险地带，登场方式又如此特殊，是我警惕心过重了。
E: Alright, if you say so, Tribbie... I apologize for my earlier behavior. I was overly wary because both of you landed in this tumultuous region, it put me on high alert.

C: 这也是一大疑点，那根将车厢摧毁的长矛显然是人造物。
E: Yes, the timing is suspect, too. The spear that destroyed our car is definitely man-made.

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 预言中，流淌着黄金血的救世之人。
E: The prophetic Deliverers, with golden blood coursing through their veins.

C: 两位，身手真不错！
E: You both have impressive fighting skills!

C: 尊神啊，请善待我等的命运……
E: O gods, please have mercy on our destiny...

C: …翁法罗斯的惊喜越来越多了。
E: ...The surprises never cease in Amphoreus.

C: 有点兴趣。
E: I'm interested.

C: 但如果是忠诚和荣耀驱使你站在这里——那就拔出武器，我会赐你一个战士的结局。
E: However, if you're standing here out of loyalty and glory, then I shall draw my blade and grant you a warrior's end.

C: …你们要化作鸟儿，飞入最后的战场。
E: ...You must turn into birds and fly toward the final battlefield.

C: 白厄阁下！刻法勒祝福你！
E: Lord Phainon! May Kephale bless you!

C: 没完没了地爬出来，该如何脱身……
E: They just keep on coming, how do we break free from this...?

C: …谢谢。然后，请往左侧挪动些，这样会更温暖。
E: ...Thank you. You can also move a little to your left. The water is warmer there.

C: 你一定亲身经历过许多奇迹，才能毫无动摇地说出这句话。
E: You must have been blessed by many miracles to say that with such unwavering confidence.

C: 完全不哦！祭司可是很常见的，只是天赋有高有低。
E: Not at all! We have lots of priests here, but some are more gifted than others.

C: （掏出手机）你说的是这玩意？
E: (pull out your phone) You mean this device?

C: 那我先去处理别的事啦。回头见哦，祝你们玩得开心。
E: Okay, time to get back to work. Have fun exploring the city! We'll see you two later!

C: 原来是「讨论组」啊！
E: Oh, it's actually an online discussion forum!

C: 社交平台，人类最大的敌人…
E: Mankind's greatest enemy, social media...

C: 谁？不，我不在乎什么达米亚诺斯。现在……
E: Who? No. I do not care about any Damionis. Right now...

C: 我们信你，我们信你！
E: We believe you, we really do!

C: 对他使用钟表把戏吧！
E: Use the clockwork tricks on him!

C: 很豪华啊！
E: How fancy!

C: 要我说，准是艾格勒的女儿。
E: I'd say it's Aquila's daughter.

C: 刚才被打断了，继续探索城镇吧。
E: Right, we were going to explore the city before we got distracted.

C: 这下难办了，在被阿格莱雅知道前…尽力弥补吧。
E: This is going to be difficult. Let's try to salvage the situation before Aglaea finds out...

C: 无论她怎么说，{NICKNAME}，我们只要无愧于心就好。
E: Regardless of what she says, {NICKNAME}, we'll be fine as long as our consciences are clear.

C: 我…无法保证。
E: I... can't make any guarantees.

C: 你也会成为「半神」吗？
E: Will you also become a demigod?

C: 使命…吗？
E: Mission, huh...

C: 请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
E: Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.

C: 是你吗，星核？
E: Is that you, Stellaron?

C: 不是不信任我么？
E: I thought you didn't trust me.

C: 巧了，我可不是普通人。
E: Lucky for you, I'm not an ordinary person.

C: 你数学是不是不太好？
E: Not great at math, are you?

C: 你懂什么，我们是在讨论战略！
E: What do you know? We're talking strategy here!

C: 前提是你过得去。看见这锁链上的落雷了吗？
E: Assuming you can get across. Do you see the lightning bolts striking the chain?

C: 等等——那家伙打算做什么，想阻拦我们么？
E: Wait... What's that creature doing? Is it trying to stop us?

C: 和我想的一样，你也有颗斗士的心啊，朋友。
E: My thoughts exactly. You have the heart of a fighter, my friend.

C: 遗憾，如今它已失语。黄金裔若能借用它的智慧——
E: Sadly, he has lost his voice now. If only the Chrysos Heirs could benefit from his wisdom—

C: 的确尚有理智，可惜剩得不多。
E: It is indeed rational, but just barely.

C: 但我一向觉得，用刀杀人，不比用计谋杀人更高贵。
E: I've always believed that killing with blades isn't any nobler than killing with subterfuge.

C: 战魂正在悬锋城上空聚集…正在涌向「天谴之锋」！
E: The souls of war are amassing in the skies above Kremnos... surging toward the Blade of Fury!

C: 堕落的泰坦，失心的眷属，荒凉的堡垒……
E: A fallen Titan, soulless kin, and a desolate fortress...

C: 你能听懂泰坦的语言？
E: You know what the Titan is saying?

C: 「…再度激起往昔的涟漪！」
E: "...and once again stir the ripples of past reverie!"

C: 「它已宣我无罪，它已赐我果实」——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，我们恳求你的帮助！
E: "It has deemed me innocent and granted me fruits." — O mighty {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. We plead for your assistance!

C: 这些记忆，明明不存在于我的脑海中…却又如此真实，无可辩驳。
E: These memories obviously don't exist in my mind... But they feel so real that I cannot dispute them.

C: 不存在的记忆开始降温，结霜…凝冻。
E: Nonexistent memories begin to cool, frost... then freeze.

C: 啊…{NICKNAME}，是你。
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}, it's you.

C: 跟上它吧，没有更好的办法。
E: Let's follow them. We don't have any better ideas right now.

C: 真想去正面支援他们啊…
E: I wish I could go and help them...

C: 阿雅…没事吧？
E: Agy... Are you alright?

C: 回归泥土吧，眷属。
E: Return to the dust, Titankin!

C: 千百根坚韧的金线探入污染的空洞，揪出了潜藏其中的……
E: Hundreds of resilient golden threads reach into the corrupted void, extracting from within...

C: 你刻意没有戳穿，为的就是让我们放松警惕，认定你的一举一动皆在元老院的规矩之内——对吗？
E: You stayed silent to throw us off, so we'd let our guard down, while maintaining that everything you did abides by the Council's regulations — correct?

C: 算上这一次的话…<color=#dbc291ff>也许还能开启三…不，还能开启两次「百界门」吧。</color>
E: Taking this time into account, <color=#dbc291ff>she should still be able to open the Century Gates three... no, maybe just two more times.</color>

C: 不会被骗吧？
E: Could this be a scam?

C: 这么着急赴死吗？很好，那就让试炼开始吧！
E: Eager to meet your demise? Very well then, let the trial begin!

C: 「从其它城邦虏来的祭司，谁能保证他们的忠诚？我看还是要杀鸡儆猴，哼……」
E: "Priests captured from other city-states — who can guarantee their loyalty? Hmph, I say we punish one of them so they know to behave..."

C: 始作俑者恐怕早就化成灰了。
E: Whoever hatched that plan must've long since turned to ash.

C: 勇气、荣耀、坚韧、牺牲，它们皆是我的分身…从灵魂碎片的低语里，我已经得到定论——
E: Courage, Honor, Tenacity, and Sacrifice... they're all versions of me. Hearing the murmurs of these soul fragments has led me to a conclusion.

C: 我…代表全体黄金裔，答应你的请求。
E: On behalf of all the Chrysos Heirs, I... promise you.

C: 那道光芒下…有浓烈的死亡气味。
E: Under all this resplendence... is the distinct stench of death.

C: 算啦算啦，我向来是很包容的。一旦习惯了这种设定…感觉也还不错？
E: Hmph, never mind, since I'm the forgiving type. Besides, now that I'm a bit more used to it... I don't sound as bad?

C: 若他能战胜自己的恐惧，以半神的姿态归来，我们距离神谕承诺的奇迹将无比接近。
E: If he can conquer his fear and return as a demigod, we will be one step closer to the miracle that the prophecy promised.

C: 哈哈，我在逗你玩呢~放心吧，哀丽秘榭可是很和平的，坏人绝对找不到我们。
E: Haha, I'm just teasing you. Don't worry. Aedes Elysiae is a peaceful place. Bad people won't reach us here.

C: ——来吧，为「纷争」写下终结！
E: Come on, bring an end to Strife once and for all!

C: 你很熟悉那位泰坦？
E: It looks like you know that Titan rather well.

C: 天父…是浮黎吗？
E: Does sky father... refer to Fuli?

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，我在这里。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I'm right here.

C: 我会尽力的。
E: I'll do my best.

C: {NICKNAME}！风堇说过你会醒来的。你…感觉还好吗？
E: {NICKNAME}! Hyacine said that you'd definitely wake up. How... do you feel?

C: 我刚才没在她面前提，只因为她给不了我真正想要的。毕竟「旁观者清」——
E: I didn't bring it up with her purely because she doesn't have the means to give me what I truly want. It's as they say, onlookers see most clearly.

C: 您知道吗？其实，您可以跳过那些无足轻重的辩论，直接向我要求<color=#dbc291ff>觐见</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>负世之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>的资格</color>。
E: You know, you could actually skip all the pointless debate and come straight to me to <color=#dbc291ff>seek an audience with</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Worldbearing Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Kephale</color>{RUBY_E#}.

C: 因为我十分清楚阁下所求为何物。同样地，正所谓「君子成人之美」：我有预感，阁下的理论能够在此行终点付诸证明——
E: Because I know very well what it is you are after. As the saying goes: A gentleman helps others achieve their goals. I have a feeling that your theory will be validated at the end of this journey—

C: （幻觉么……）
E: (Am I hallucinating...?)

C: …嗯？{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}？
E: ...Hm? {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}?

C: 答案显而易见……
E: The answer is quite simple.

C: （…谁也别想让我停止「开拓」。）
E: (No one can stop me from trailblazing!)

C: 所以，等你从斯缇科西亚回来，我们再回来这里见面吧。一路平安——明天见！
E: So, let's meet back here when you return from Styxia. Safe travels — see you tomorrow!

C: 啊，难道阁下的灵魂正在……
E: Ah! Is your soul...

C: 因为死亡是天地间至高至难的力量。而你能将其掌握，你便配得上这敬意。
E: Death is the mightiest and gravest power in this world. The fact that you can wield it means you are deserving of respect.

C: 我…再也受不了了……
E: I... I can't take this anymore...

C: 哪怕你终将离开哀地里亚的庇护——哪怕永远肩负着{RUBY_B#祝福}诅咒{RUBY_E#}——你也可以像普通人一样，昂首挺胸地活下去。
E: And when you do, even if you eventually leave Aidonia's protection... even if you must carry the {RUBY_B#blessing}curse{RUBY_E#} forever... you can live with your head held high, like everyone else.

C: 我想知道，是否，我的触碰，我的拥抱…并非只能剥夺……
E: I just want to know if my touch... if my embrace... can do more than taking things away...

C: 我看看卷轴上的提示。
E: Let me check the hint on the scroll.

C: 想不到你面子这么大。
E: You're THAT famous?

C: 我赌她一定会打消这个念头。如果我输了，我不光会帮你做事，把这堆叮当响的好东西全数奉还，还会额外再送你一屋子满满当当的财宝，怎样？
E: I bet she'll change her mind and turn back. Now, if I lose, I'll do what you want me to do, return this deposit to you, plus giving you another roomful of treasures. How does that sound?

C: 综上所述——
E: In conclusion...

C: 动手吧，刽子手……
E: Do it then! Executioner...

C: 一切都…结束了？我们…胜利了吗？
E: Is it over...? Have we... won?

C: 勇士？难道……
E: A warrior? Could it be...

C: …请问，那位女孩身在何处？
E: ...Pray tell, where is that girl right now?

C: 喔…莫非是斯缇科西亚的后人？
E: Oh... Could you be the scions of Styxia?

C: 拜托了，迷迷！
E: Please, Mem!

C: 小小蝶，小小灰，还有大家——明天见！
E: Little Cas, Little Gray, everyone — see you tomorrow!

C: 不过，他未曾如这般窥见往昔，未知全貌。
E: However, he is not privy to the past and therefore cannot see the full picture.

C: 那也无妨。那刻夏老师总说「炼金」一向如此：我们能得到什么，只有在炼成的那一刻才能知晓。因此，这门学问才能被称为「造物的奇迹」。
E: That's fine. As Professor Anaxa often reminds us, such is the nature of alchemy. The true outcome can only be known once the process is complete. This is why alchemy is also known as the "Miracle of Creation."

C: 斯缇科西亚，那在童话中遭受无妄之灾，被死亡肆虐的海洋明珠——在哀地里亚之前，它是第一个转向「死亡」信仰的城邦。
E: Styxia, the pearl of the ocean, plagued by unwarranted calamity and ravaged by death in the fairy tale — It was the first city-state to shift their faith towards "Death," even before Aidonia did.

C: 曾经拯救我的少女…你真的业已消散了吗？
E: Is the girl who once saved my life... truly gone?

C: 嗯…我回来了。
E: Yes, it's me. I'm back.

C: 最后……
E: After all that...

C: 如神谕所示，塞纳托斯的神权注定只能由一人执掌。身为「死亡」的黄金裔，身为它的半神，身为泰坦……
E: As foretold by the prophecy, Thanatos' authority is only destined for only one person to wield. As the Chrysos Heir of "Death," as their demigod, as a Titan...

C: 这些人影…是冥河倒映出的幻象吗？
E: These shadowy figures... are they illusions reflected by the River of Souls?

C: 遐蝶——若她果真是泰坦出于私心，从过去送到现在的生灵——那么，以斯缇科西亚为「结点」，亲身走过两个轮回的她定能成为联结一切的「纽带」。
E: If Castorice was truly sent from the past to the present for the Titan's self-serving reasons, then having lived through two cycles and with Styxia as the pivot, she will no doubt be the link to connect all of this together.

C: 甚好。衷心祝愿您为这有悖常理的世界带来真正的变革。
E: Very well. May you bring much-needed change to this farcical world.

C: 你干得很好，白厄。在那种形势下，用激烈的言论激发起情绪是一步妙招。
E: You've done well, Phainon. Given the circumstances, delivering a rousing speech to stir up emotions was a prudent move.

C: 很好，孩子…我早就说过，你会大有作为的。
E: Well done, child. Just as I foresaw, you have achieved great things.

C: 你不惜演到这份上…就为了帮助他们完成愚蠢的逐火之旅…？！
E: You put on such a grand performance... just to aid their preposterous Flame-Chase Journey!?

C: 好伙伴，这边——！
E: Over here, friend...!

C: 阁下，求你，为我回头吧。
E: Please, I beg you, look back for me.

C: 没错，向着黎明升起的方向。
E: That's right. Keep your eyes on the dawn.

C: 要不，下次您从四往下数…？
E: Next time, can you count down from four instead...?

C: 其三：即便您能用尽各种手段，试图找到突破我的办法……
E: Third: Even if you exhaust all your means and find a way to break through...

C: 从逐火的历史来看，人类也有接过神权的可能性。
E: Based on the history of the Flame-Chase Journey, humans have the potential to take over the divinity of Titans.

C: 相当严肃的指控，他还做过这种事？
E: That's a serious allegation. Did he really do that?

C: 就连友爱之馆的管理员也不能越过禁令，收录贤人的课题。不过现在……
E: Even the administrators of the Library of Philia are restricted from accessing those places and documenting the sages' research. But...

C: 这条王蛇的毒牙，透过金丝，我已心中有数。过去的我有信心压制住她，但现在…是有些力不从心了。
E: I know about the poisonous fangs of that kingsnake through the golden threads. In the past, I would be confident about keeping her in check, but... I admit I am now unable to do so.

C: 哼，早就知道这群人内部不和，阿格莱雅更没法代表所有黄金裔。我支持「黄金世」！
E: Hmph, it's clear from the start that these heroes do not get along well in their group. All the more proof that Aglaea isn't fit to speak on behalf of every Chrysos Heir. I am in favor of "Era Chrysea"!

C: 诸位，告诉我——此人口中的威胁，你们可曾在庄严的圣城中见过哪怕一面？
E: Tell me, dear citizens: Have any of you ever seen even a glimpse of the threat that this person is talking about anywhere within the walls of this majestic holy city?

C: 我…做不到。
E: That I... won't be able to do it.

C: 看，你们快看那边——
E: Look, everyone, over there —

C: 风堇将火种收入了掌心……
E: Hyacine contains the Coreflame in her palm...

C: 不妙，这台仪器太古旧了，未必能发挥作用……
E: This device is too old. It might not work...

C: 你是首个，也是唯一！
E: — is you!

C: 看在，呃…看在咱们都喜欢黑色穿搭的份上…你就留可怜的猫咪一条小命吧？
E: Look, uh... since we've got the same taste in fashion — all black and sleek — how about you spare this poor cat's life?

C: 好久没跑得这么过瘾了，你高低得多坚持一会儿，至少让我把筋骨活动开嘛！
E: It's been a while since I've had a chase this good. Don't quit on me now — I'm just getting into the groove!

C: 好猫不走回头路——别跑错方向了喂！
E: A wise cat doesn't look back. Don't run in the wrong direction!

C: 火种……
E: Coreflame...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>因为，你是那么地懂得洞察人心…要是留在你的身边……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You see, you were so good at reading hearts... if I had stayed by your side...</color>

C: …用它换来了凡人千年的余生。
E: ...and in exchange, you earned humanity a thousand more years of life.

C: 对。「艾格勒将黎明机器赠予了刻法勒」，是几乎所有神话作者都能达成的共识。
E: Yes. Nearly every mythologist agrees "Aquila gifted the Dawn Device to Kephale."

C: 星穹列车，对吧？
E: The Astral Express, isn't it?

C: 唯有我是例外…因为英雄塞涅俄丝指定了自己的血脉作为「天空」的继任者。阿格莱雅大人是否认可我的潜质…直到她离去的那天，我都不得而知。
E: I was the outlier... The hero Seliose entrusted her bloodline with the legacy of the "Sky." Lady Aglaea's thoughts on my potential remained a mystery, even up till the day she left.

C: 粉色小狗才是你的目标！
E: You want the pink puppy, don't you?

C: （不是元老院的决意，而是他个人的意愿么……）
E: (Maybe this is not a decision by the Council of Elders but rather his personal wish...)

C: …如果是后者，那盗火行者得负全责。
E: ...If it were the latter, the Flame Reaver is fully responsible.

C: 地方虽然小了些，但采光堪称完美！
E: It's a bit small, but the lighting is perfect!

C: 巴特鲁斯开启了挖掘模式，找出了藏于地底的……
E: Bartholos activated excavation mode, uncovering something hidden beneath the earth...

C: 是金币、宝石还有上等皮革的香气…叫人心情舒畅！
E: The scent of gold coins, gems, and fine leather... it's so refreshing!

C: 总算找到你了，丹恒阁下。传信石版联系不上，圣城卫士险些以为你和{NICKNAME}已经遭遇了不测。
E: There you are, Lord Dan Heng. We couldn't reach you on the teleslate, so the Holy City Guard almost assumed you and {NICKNAME} had met some terrible fate.

C: 无私，直到最后。
E: Selfless, until the end.

C: 消息恐怕已经传开了。家家户户都闭门不出…市集的所有店铺都临时关张。
E: The news has probably spread by now. Every household is locked up tight... and all the market stalls have closed down temporarily.

C: 如果这一切都是计策，那缇宝老师一定知道些什么，只是不便在消息中明说。
E: If this is all part of a larger plan, Tribbie must know something. She just couldn't say it in the message.

C: 白厄他，好会说呀。
E: Phainon has a way with words.

C: 我们的歌谣，小白以前最喜欢啦！
E: That's our song, and Snowy used to love it!

C: 每一点都被押中了，不愧是你。我清楚你的力量，赛飞儿小姐：神速、伪装、来去无形…还有那最让人捉摸不透的，「欺骗」的权柄。
E: You sure saw right through me, Miss Cipher. I know exactly what you can do. God-like speed, perfect disguises, untraceable movements... And that most enigmatic authority of "Trickery."

C: 那家伙是像条疯狗一样丧失理智，但它绝对不是傻子。你猜它为什么一直没对奥赫玛出手？
E: That lunatic may have lost their mind, but they're no fool. Why do you think they haven't made a move on Okhema yet?

C: 阿雅，你觉得小白他…准备好了吗？
E: Agy, do you think Snowy is... ready?

C: 既然丹宝都这么建议了…那我就来验收下你的学习成果吧？
E: Since you're offering... then let me put your skills to the test, Dannie.

C: …我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
E: ...I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.

C: 但光荣的决斗背后…是悲壮的落幕。祭典结束不久，祖母的伤情恶化，最终逝于异乡…这座算碑就是悬锋人应她的遗愿留下的最后纪念。
E: But behind the glorious duel... was a tragic end. Not long after the festival, my grandmother's injuries worsened, and she passed away far from home. This Prophecy Tablet was left here by the Kremnoans to honor her final wish.

C: （就在今天了……）
E: (Today's the day...)

C: 白厄大人，请你们一定要平安归来！
E: Lord Phainon, please make sure you all come back safely!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「在金色的云朵间留下了印记……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Left a mark among the golden clouds..."</color>

C: 也许，我能在这里拼凑出历史的原貌。
E: Perhaps I can piece together the true face of history here.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「风，雪，雨，曦……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Wind, snow, rain, shine..."</color>

C: 嗯…机关结构和昏光庭院使用的有些不同。该怎么说呢…要更复杂一些。
E: Hmm... the mechanical structure is a bit different from the one used in the Twilight Courtyard. How should I put this... It's a little more complicated.

C: 可能要稍微花上一会儿…但我应该应付得来！
E: This might take a while... but I think I can manage!

C: 哦…走到最后的，竟是她们俩啊。
E: Mmm... So it was those two who made it to the end.

C: 为了遵守与英雄塞涅俄丝的约定，她的后裔用了一千年的时光守望天空。我想，那世世代代为同一个理想而活的先祖们，他们有权知道传说的真相。
E: To honor the pact with Seliose, her descendants spent a millennium looking up at the sky. I believe my countless ancestors who lived for that purpose deserve to know the truth behind her legend.

C: 但我同意你说的话…这个形象…看起来有些过于陌生了。
E: But I agree with you... This figure... looks way too alien.

C: 在这种环境下成长，她…
E: Growing up in such an environment, she...

C: 继续追随艾格勒飞离的轨迹吧，英雄们。这一次，我会和索拉比斯一同引导你们前行。
E: Follow the trail Aquila has left, heroes. This time, I will guide you alongside Solabis.

C: 所以，那可怕的传言是真的……
E: So, the dreadful rumors are true...

C: 千年了，若非有约定傍身，我和露奈比斯恐怕早已和此处的其它事物一般弥散。
E: It's been a thousand years. Without our pact, Lunabis and I might have dissipated like everything else here.

C: 传说中，英雄塞涅俄丝身边有两只翼兽伙伴。
E: Legend has it that the hero Seliose was always flanked by two winged companions.

C: 那是…又一只？
E: That's... another one?

C: …别争辩了，无需在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
E: ...No need to argue. We're just wasting our time on a pitiful madwoman.

C: 那还用说，搭档！
E: Of course, partner!
...Yeah.

C: 抱歉，我知道你们不喜欢半途而废，所以才没提前通气。
E: Sorry, I know you must dislike leaving things unfinished, which is why I didn't inform you beforehand.

C: 随着「理性」与「死亡」的火种得到归还，眼下还需讨伐的泰坦只剩下{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。白厄委托我们复现时空，反复挑战盗火行者磨练自身。逐火之旅成功在即，圣城却异变突生……
E: Following the return of the Coreflames of Reason and Death, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} is the only Titan that we still need to campaign against. Phainon asks us to recreate the past, and he repeatedly challenges the Flame Reaver to hone his abilities. The Flame-Chase Journey's triumphant conclusion draws nigh, yet a sudden disturbance occurs in the holy city...

C: 抓住机会，干掉它！
E: Now's our chance to take them down!

C: 我很庆幸能及时赶到，阻止那名黑衣人对二位做出更多伤害。
E: I'm glad I arrived in time to stop that black-clad one from harming you further.

C: …很遗憾，我无法对此做出回应。如你方才所说，{M#他}{F#她}已接过「岁月」的权柄……
E: ...My apologies, but I cannot promise this. As you mentioned, {F#s}he now bears the Time Titan's authority...

C: 什么人能贯穿他的一生？
E: Who could possibly be there his entire life?

C: 找到了！看，这就是装神谕牌的盒子。
E: Here it is! This is the box where we kept the cards.

C: 紫色的…迷迷？你染发了？
E: Mem's... purple now? Did you dye your fur?

C: 其实，我们最近又听到了{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}的呢喃。它说，迷境很快就会迎来新的妖精……
E: The {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#} whispers to us once more. It tells of a new fairy who will soon enter the Maze...

C: 「君王」牌通常象征着纪律、权威和荣耀，但往往也和孤独、战争画等号。
E: The "Ruler" stands for discipline, authority and glory, but frequently also points to isolation and warfare.

C: 还是——这里？
E: Or perhaps — here?

C: 嗯，从语气也能猜出几分……
E: That's exactly the feeling I'm getting...

C: 算了，看你一脸迷茫，恐怕什么也没搞明白。
E: Never mind. That blank look tells me you're completely lost.

C: 你脑子坏了吗？那金色头发的可是悬锋城的王子！要是惹他生气了…整座城邦的人都得没命！
E: Are you insane? That blond man is the crown prince of Kremnos! Mess with him, and every last person in the city could wind up dead!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而是要把「未来」的重量，也压在天秤上。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You have to throw the weight of your "future" onto them as well.</color>

C: 想必阁下已经意识到：方才这一幕，与您经历的逐火之旅截然不同。
E: You must see it now... How different this is from the Flame-Chase Journey you traveled.
...Yeah.

C: 第十次轮回，我将侵晨刺入每一尊泰坦的心脏，金血沿我指尖淌下，神火灼烧的剧痛几乎令我放弃了挣扎——但我坚持了下来。
E: In the tenth cycle, I drove Dawnmaker through the heart of every Titan. Golden blood ran down my fingers. Divine fire seared through my nerves, nearly breaking my will — but I endured.

C: 它就是我——过去无数个我——还有我那无数并非自愿诞生在世上，在你的金血中反复沉沦的同胞，这个世界一切痛苦和绝望熔合而成的，最纯粹的恨意，最炽盛的怒火——
E: That sun is me — all the countless versions of me from the past — along with my countless brethren, dragged into existence against their will, drowning again and again in your golden blood. The very essence of this world's suffering and despair, fused into the purest hatred, the fiercest rage—

C: 白厄……
E: Phainon...

C: 你口中的「成果」，就是这一片狼藉的世界？
E: So, the "results" you speak of... are this wreckage of a world?

C: 那就去吧，卡厄斯兰那。如你约定的那般：欺骗世界，夺得火种，扭转命运……
E: Then go, Khaslana, as you promised: Deceive the world, seize the Coreflames, and rewrite fate...

C: 诚如那刻夏老师所说，在那一片虚空中，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}立于混沌的中心，时间、空间和因果，都从它的身躯中流溢而出……
E: Just as Professor Anaxa once said, in that void, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} stood at the center of chaos. Time, space, and causality all flowed from their body...

C: 呵，真是荒唐……
E: Heh, how absurd...

C: 你绝无可能以和平的姿态取走这枚火种。
E: There's no way you'll take this Coreflame in peace.

C: 你又该如何保证轮回的延续？
E: How can you ensure the continuation of the cycles?

C: 但愿那温柔的虹光…为你的太阳，带来无从得见的色彩……
E: May the gentle colors of the rainbow paint your sun in shades it has never known...

C: 呵，黑潮果真不容小觑。
E: Ha, the black tide is really no joke.

C: 呼…你终于醒过来了，太好啦……
E: Phew... You're finally awake. That's a relief...

C: 不过，别担心。那位白发青年和{RUBY_B#《如我所书》}旅行手记{RUBY_E#}里的故事，我已经烂熟于心了。
E: But don't worry. I know the stories about the white-haired young man and the {RUBY_B#As I've Written}travel notes{RUBY_E#} like the back of my hand.

C: 嗯，那我可就满怀期待地等着了哦？
E: Then I'll look forward to that day!

C: 这个声音…又是？
E: Another voice... who now?

C: 能想起更多事吗？
E: Can you remember anything else?

C: 很遗憾，没有好消息。两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。
E: Sorry, no good news. When two geniuses show up at once... you know you're in deep trouble.

C: 但现在不是高兴的时候，两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。
E: But now's not the time to celebrate. When two geniuses show up at once... you know you're in deep trouble.

C: …识刻锚的信息已无法辨认。不过，你已知晓天才托付的任务：去寻找「律法」的力量吧。
E: ...The information on the Chronocognitive Anchor is now unrecognizable. However, you already know the mission entrusted by the genius: go seek out the power of "Law."

C: 我只是在闭目养神。
E: I was meditating.

C: …至于个中细节，就请两位亲身体会吧。待凯撒驾临，我便会前来传唤各位。
E: ...Please experience its marvels firsthand, heroes. When the Imperator arrives, I shall come to summon you.

C: 真是令人安心。
E: She's reassuringly discreet.

C: 不必多此一举了。凯撒不向败者祈祷。
E: Cease the pageantry. I pray not to the vanquished.

C: 什么……
E: What...

C: 不幸中的万幸，我发现了这一切。现在，为了守卫这座美丽城市和她的人民，凯撒的军团已经做好准备——
E: Fortunately, I uncovered this plot. Now, to protect this beautiful city and her people, the Imperator's legions are ready...

C: 请便。但容我提醒：凯撒的禁卫军，奥赫玛宪兵的军团长就在你面前。
E: Please, go ahead. But let me remind you: The Commander of the Imperator's Imperial Guard and the Okheman Civil Guard is right in front of you.

C: …不必多说了，小海兔。我和你的想法一致。
E: ...There's no need for me to say more, little sea hare. We are of one mind.

C: 她一直被自己所要背负的神职烦忧。但多亏你们，阿格莱雅看起来精神多了。
E: Aglaea has always been troubled by the divine duty she must bear. But thanks to you, she seems to be in much better spirits.

C: …看来猜中了？下次嘛，看我心情。
E: ...Looks like I guessed right then? Next time, it'll depend on my mood.

C: 凯撒万岁！逐火军万岁！
E: Long live the Imperator! Glory to the Flame-Chase Army!

C: 黄金裔们简直是纷争的化身……
E: The Chrysos Heirs are just the Incarnation of Strife...

C: 宴会不能自带酒水可以理解，书本和羽毛笔…也要没收吗？
E: I get that you don't want people to bring outside food into the banquet, but is it really necessary to confiscate... books and quill pens?

C: 令人感叹。您麾下的将领虽性格各异，却同样忠诚……
E: How astonishing. The commanders under you have such different personalities, yet they share the same loyalty...

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's the matter?

C: 所以，如果你选择了「毁灭」的道路……
E: Therefore, if you choose the way of the Destruction...

C: 卓越的眼界。我曾将您这宝贵的品质视作我必胜的信号。但如今，我不得不承认自己的错误——
E: What magnificent foresight. I once regarded this precious quality of yours as a sure sign of my ultimate victory, but now I have to admit that I made a mistake.

C: 你身体好些了吗？
E: Are you doing better now?

C: 「那是世人所知的最后一战，由两名不善争斗的半神发起。」
E: "It was the last battle known to the world, initiated by two demigods least suited for war."

C: 等到「救世主」归来的那一天。无论{M#他}{F#她}身在何方，「天空」都会放晴，架起彩虹的桥梁，护送{M#他}{F#她}去往最后的战场。
E: When the Deliverer returns, no matter where {F#s}he is, Sky will turn clear and a rainbow bridge will rise, carrying {M#him}{F#her} to the final battleground.

C: 这是她们相遇的情景。
E: This was the moment they met.

C: 军团乘上那头巨兽，如洋流般漂向宇宙各地。
E: The legions will climb aboard the beast, riding it like currents across the cosmos.

C: 她所说的宴会…究竟在哪里？
E: The feast she spoke of... where is it?

C: 他破碎的战甲停止了起伏，未瞑目的眼神依旧坚毅，如锐利的断刃。
E: His shattered armor ceases its rise and fall. His unclosed eyes remain resolute, sharp as a broken blade.

C: 你的从容的确会掀起我胸间的怒涛…仿佛在此接受惩罚的并非是你，而是失去了一切的我们。
E: Your calm does stir the rage in me... As if the one paying the price here isn't you, but us, the ones who lost everything.

C: 那么，你想怎么做？
E: Then, what will you do?

C: 他们所做的一切，已经打破了昏暗的洞穴，寻得了「开拓」的火种……
E: Everything they did shattered the darkness of this cave and unearthed the Coreflame of {M#the }Trailblaze...

C: 古往今来有且只有一位。
E: ...Only one person has ever managed such a feat.

C: 答案显而易见。故：不必说出那个名字。称我为<color=#dbc291ff>天才</color>不过是银河的谬误，相比后来者，我并非更具智慧，只是最早触碰了{RUBY_B#「虚数之树」理论}宇宙的边界{RUBY_E#}，又率先以错误的思想定义了{RUBY_B#原动力}「生命的第一因」{RUBY_E#}。
E: The answer is obvious, so there's no need to say that name out loud. The cosmos made a mistake in calling me a <color=#dbc291ff>genius</color>. I do not possess more wisdom than those who came after me. I was just the first to touch upon the {RUBY_B#the "Imaginary Tree" theory}universe's border{RUBY_E#}, and the first to define {RUBY_B#Primum Mobile}"the prime mover of life"{RUBY_E#} with incorrect logic.

C: 我创造了一尊连自己都无法掌控的机械神明。而后，祂又在无穷的演算和进化中化作一场空前绝后的噩梦——
E: I created a Mechanical God that even I cannot control, and then... THEY became an unparalleled nightmare through THEIR endless extrapolations and evolutions.

C: 继续说吧，也许我们在想同一件事。
E: Go on. Maybe we're thinking about the same thing.

C: 去吧，去和那救世主一同游往天外的大海。
E: So go. Go and swim towards that ocean beyond the sky with the Deliverer.

C: 记忆，栩栩如生的记忆。
E: Memories. Lifelike memories.

C: 在那书中，我看见……
E: I saw within that notebook...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world..."</color>

C: 那就不必再强攻了。派斥候传讯给各军团，责令他们在{RUBY_B#黄昏}离愁时{RUBY_E#}内全部撤退到特雷托斯平原以内。
E: Then cease our frontal assault. Send scouts to all legions and tell them to retreat into the Tretos plains before the {RUBY_B#evening}Parting Hour{RUBY_E#}.

C: 诸位的演绎结果与我大相径庭。因此，再让我提供一条学术建议吧：
E: Your logical deductions are vastly different from mine. Therefore, allow me to provide one more academic recommendation.

C: （是什么时候归还的？）
E: (When did it get returned?)

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是她最深不见底的「记忆」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It's her deepest and innermost "memory."</color>

C: 我…是在做梦吗？
E: Am I... dreaming?

C: 此外，也是多亏了它，我才得以知晓那群极端忆者的秘密。
E: Additionally, it was thanks to them that I was able to learn the secrets of that group of extremist Memokeepers.

C: 剩下七分都是恐惧呢，美丽的忆者。
E: The rest is all fear, beautiful Memokeeper.

C: 咦？
E: Huh?

C: 门背后有什么？
E: What's behind the door?

C: 不对劲，她没在跟我们说话。这不是你认识的「迷迷」……
E: Something's wrong. She's not talking to us. She's not the "Mem" you know...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>96.024%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>96.024%</unbreak>...</color>

C: 无休止的轮回影响了她。即便昔涟，也无法抵抗永恒不变的绝望。
E: The endless cycle took its toll on her. Even Cyrene could not resist despair when faced with eternal stasis.

C: 拨开迷雾，带我们前往世界的最深处吧。
E: I pray that you can dispel all the mysteries and lead us into the deepest bowels of this world.

C: 再一次，阿那克萨戈拉斯用生命完成了证明。他的答案已经如此完备，只剩下最后一道来自天外的变量。
E: Anaxagoras once again completed the proof with his life. His answer was so complete... All he was missing was a last variable from beyond the sky.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是做出选择的人数。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Is the number of people making that choice.</color>

C: 啊，还有谐乐盘绕其中。
E: Ah, and there's a harmony entwined within it.

C: 一定会再度浮现。
E: Are guaranteed to appear again.

C: 她给咱们准备了好些礼物呢：地髓原矿、大守护者奖章…不过，我只要了这个小本本。
E: She prepared quite a few gifts for us! Raw Geomarrow, Supreme Guardian medals... but I only asked for this little notebook.

C: 我只拥有「你」的记忆，而你…一直是「我」想被世界看见的样子。
E: I only have "your" memories, and you... have always been the "me" that I wanted the world to see.

C: 你骗过了所有人，她更不可能知道你的计划。修改这条律令只是出于保险：防止星穹列车和天才们在她陨落后背叛翁法罗斯。
E: No. You managed to fool everyone. There's no way she could have known your plan. Modifying this law was just a precaution, to prevent the Astral Express and the geniuses from betraying Amphoreus after her downfall.

C: 这里，安静得有些异常……
E: It's unusually quiet here...

C: 喂喂喂？是{NICKNAME}吗？
E: Hello? Hello? Is that {NICKNAME}?

C: *刺耳的频段干扰噪声*
E: *Piercing frequency interference noise*

C: 没有。一场徒劳的游戏，不是么？
E: No. It's a futile game, isn't it?

C: 军务厅对此次「玉阙」之战颇为重视，「曜青」急急召她回去执行斥候任务。
E: The Military Affairs Office is placing more importance on the Yuque's battle this time, and the Yaoqing called her back for a patrol mission.

C: 而是敬那些不再归还的征人，敬我们的同伴。
E: But for honoring the soldiers who will not return, for honoring our companions.

C: 这五人后来的命运，你也一清二楚。
E: And you know exactly what happened to these five afterward.

C: 就算光阴能够倒转，我也不会做出第二种选择。
E: Even if I could reverse time, I would not choose differently.

C: 想必，你就是真正的「大地」半神。
E: I suppose you are the true Earth demigod.

C: 荒笛已经倒戈！军团，随我冲锋！
E: Terravox has already defected! Legions, charge with me!

C: 并倾尽全力，将其呵护。
E: And with all my might, I protected that warmth.

C: 我知道，阁下还有未竟的使命。此行艰险，即便身躯囿于溟流，我也会竭力看护二位的去路。
E: I understand that your mission is still unfinished. The path ahead is treacherous, and even though my body is bound to these dark currents, I'll do everything I can to watch over you both.

C: 我只需知道一件事：「她」和三月七的过去有关。
E: All I need to know is that "she" has something to do with March 7th's past.

C: 我无意否认。继续前进吧，丹恒阁下。
E: I have no intention of refuting that. Let us keep going, Lord Dan Heng.

C: 阁下如此挑明，想必是没找到什么证据吧？
E: Since you're talking in such a blunt way, I'm assuming you haven't actually found any concrete evidence.

C: 先是第一位天才，然后又搞定了忆庭，这一站在「开拓」史上不说后无来者，也绝对称得上前无古人了吧？
E: They got the First Genius, then they put the Garden in its place. This chapter in Trailblazing history may not be the last of its kind, but it's certainly the first of its kind!

C: 不仅如此，我们会带着全部三千万世的过往一同走向新世界。
E: Not only that, we'll also carry the history of all thirty million recurrences into the new world with us.

C: 都这么正经？那我就许愿沙漠永远有水，好土永远有黄金，人间一切都能用「诡计」换来吧！
E: Why're you guys all so serious? Fiiine. Then I'll wish for there always to be water in deserts and gold in fertile soil, and for everything in this mortal realm to be attainable through "Trickery"!

C: 看得出来，各方都有些投鼠忌器。
E: It's clear that each party still has qualms about everything.

C: 为何…一个人都没有？
E: Why... is there no one here?

C: 苏醒？{NICKNAME}陷入沉睡了么？
E: Awakening? Has {NICKNAME} fallen into slumber?

C: {F#她}{M#他}会给出答案的。
E: {M#He}{F#She} will give us the answer.

C: 「也就是——你们所有人——」
E: "Someone like... all of you..."

C: 「蝴蝶若想飞舞，须先落在枝头。」
E: "A butterfly has to land on the branch before it can dance."

C: 琴弦在颤动，地上的人们正在征战、呐喊。
E: The strings tremble as the people on the surface wage war and cry out.

C: 但「记忆」驱使他绽放耀眼的金色，照亮深不见底的黑夜。
E: But it was Remembrance that drove him to shine with golden light, piercing the unfathomable darkness.

C: 「很遗憾，恰恰相反——」
E: "I'm afraid it's quite the opposite."

C: 可是，我睡不着。
E: But I can't sleep.

C: *我们*也很想念你，{NICKNAME}！
E: We miss you too, {NICKNAME}!

C: 就让「记忆」化作流星，再一次，划破沉睡的长夜吧。
E: Then let Remembrance burn bright like a shooting star, and once more, pierce the long night of slumber.

C: 收拾好心情，准备出发？踏出这一步，就不会再回头啦。
E: Take a moment to gather yourself. Once you take this step, there's no turning back.

C: 黎明就要升起了。
E: The dawn is about to rise.

C: 你想说的话，我会替她铭记。
E: I will remember what you want to say to her.

C: 向你致意，为终结一切的征途！
E: I salute you. For the campaign that will end all things!

C: 那一定是他留下的指引，指向「毁灭」…最深的黑夜。
E: It has to be a sign he left behind. It points towards the Destruction... and the deepest night.

C: 我不会让你独自承受。
E: I won't have you shouldering this on your own.

C: 我…成功了吗？
E: Did I... do it?

C: 让我再整理一下心情吧。
E: Let me take a moment to gather my thoughts.

C: 写下，如我所书的「创世」！
E: And pen a "genesis" as I've written!

C: 我不知该如何衡量「好奇」被满足的价值。
E: I don't know how to measure the worth of "curiosity" being satisfied.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>浮黎</color>——这道至关重要的变量，仍未发挥作用。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Fuli</color>, the key variable, still hasn't made THEIR move.

C: 疑罪从无，先放过这个散发着一丝…猫味…的淋浴间吧。
E: Innocent until proven guilty. Let's give this bathroom that smells a bit... cat-like... a pass for now.

C: 小手放干净点…
E: Keep those hands to yourself...

C: 方才，我们在这车厢中到处走了走。阁下曾反复提起的星穹列车，真的很温馨，像是一个永不分离的大家庭。
E: We've walked around this car for a bit already. The Astral Express that you've mentioned so many times is truly heartwarming, like one big family that never splits up.

C: 那也是白厄阁下一直心心念念的情境呀。
E: That's exactly the kind of thing Lord Phainon has been dreaming about.

C: 不如，回顾一下此前发生的一切吧？
E: How about we take a look back at everything that's happened so far?

C: 故事的最后，剧中人完成谢幕，踏上了永不回头的旅途。
E: At the end of the story, the characters take their final bow and embark on a journey of no return.

C: 三月，丹恒，{NICKNAME}……
E: March, Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}...

C: 书中人的谢幕已经完成了。我们…也该回到属于我们的现实了。
E: The characters in the book have taken their final bow. It's time for us... to return to our own reality.

C: 呼…我在想，要不要留下一句谜语？一个九折十八弯的诡计，让全宇宙的人为了挖掘它的谜底发狂？
E: Hmm... I'm thinking, should I leave behind a riddle? Some twisted, convoluted scheme that'll drive everyone in the universe mad trying to crack it?

C: 三千万个我加起来，读过的书可能都没你一辈子多吧？我可不想硬装有文化哪，缇宝、缇宁、缇安阿姐~
E: Even if you combined <unbreak>30</unbreak> million of me, I probably wouldn't have read as many books as you did in one lifetime! I won't pretend to be cultured before big sis Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne...

C: 这幅惆怅的表情可不适合您呀，黑塔女士…别有负担，告诉我吧？
E: That sorrowful look doesn't suit you, Madam Herta... Don't hold it in. Tell me.

C: 播下因果的涟漪——
E: Let the ripples of causality spread...

C: 看来，你已经发现了呀。
E: Looks like you figured it out.

C: 不过，现在……
E: But now...

C: 我记得…是一声啼哭……
E: I remember... a cry...

C: 所有人都在努力，如果我独自落泪…这一点都不浪漫，对不对？
E: Everyone's still working so hard. If I'm the only one who's crying... that wouldn't be romantic at all, would it?

C: 「话虽如此，人家可不喜欢眼泪哦！」
E: "Anyway, I don't like tears!"

C: 如此绚丽的花朵，它的「心」该有多美？一只小妖精好奇，想知道答案。
E: How beautiful would the "heart" of such a brilliant flower be? A little fairy was curious and wanted to know.

C: 呵…连危及寰宇的「铁墓」之灾都不当回事，我看愚者的道行也就这点档次了。
E: Hah... You don't even care about the Irontomb disaster threatening the whole universe? Seems the Fool's wisdom isn't all that deep.

C: 赞达尔•壹•桑原
E: Zandar One Kuwabara

C: 看来被埋伏的是我们。
E: Looks like we're the ones getting ambushed.

C: ——我们并不是通过物理移动手段找到「星核」的。
E: ...We would find the Stellaron in a non-physical way?

C: 怎么又松口了？神神叨叨的，你不会也像我之前一样，被怪物刺激到了吧？
E: Why the change? Weird... You aren't freaked out by the monsters like I was before?

C: （…混乱逐渐止息了。）
E: (... The chaos gradually subsides.)

C: 报酬？你看我像是有钱的样子吗？
E: Pay? Do I look rich to you?

C: 他天生就适合那片广阔银河。适合不要命地使劲折腾。
E: He was born to run amok all over the cosmos.

C: 等等！我就是客气一下，你怎么还当真了呢……
E: Hold on! I was just being polite. What were you thinking...?

C: 随时候教。
E: Anytime.

C: 好了，猛料你也看了，别烦我了。我还要写举报信给黑塔女士呢，忙得很！
E: Anyway, now you know everything, so leave me alone. I still need to write a report about this for Madam Herta.

C: 明明查一下库存就能补送的东西，你非要急着重新下单。
E: All you had to do was check the inventory, and we could've replaced it — why did you make a new order?

C: 我之前还不相信，直到「军团」入侵的时候，她叫着我的名字，却朝着反方向跑走了——一定是见到了背影和我相似的科员。
E: I didn't listen to her until the Legion invaded. She called out my name, but ran off in the opposite direction — she must have seen a staff member who looked similar to me.

C: 完全没听懂…
E: I don't get it...

C: 哼，年轻人。
E: Hmph, naive kids.

C: 哼，我正是这样打算的。
E: Hmph, that's also my plan.

C: 勘星钎也送出去了…回头和师父认个错就是了，空间站不也还有一把么，不是什么珍贵的东西……
E: I even gave away my Astro Rod... I better go and apologize to my master. There should be another one in the space station. It's not anything expensive anyway...

C: 你的担心不无道理。我听说他把写的那些诗也全撕了…也好，就像有些科员失恋后也会选择剪去头发，象征新的开始。
E: Your concern is not groundless. I heard he's torn up all of his poems... Well, some researchers cut their hair after a breakup, symbolizing a new start.

C: 这种伙伴不要也罢。
E: I don't want such a partner.

C: 这是当他听我讲述完一对被时空阻隔的恋人的故事后，所创作的东西。
E: He wrote this after I told him a story about a couple who was separated by time and space.

C: 记得我？我、我也记得你…但我现在真的一点也不怕、怕死……
E: Remember me? I—I also remember you... But now I'm not a—afraid of death anymore...

C: 左「巡猎」，右「同谐」，「智识」在心间……
E: The Hunt on the left, Harmony on the right, and Erudition in the heart...

C: 这是我编纂的星神护心诀，可不能随便改词，以免冲撞了星神。
E: This is the chant of Aeon protection that I came up with myself. Please don't alter the wording, lest we offend the Aeons.

C: 我手上还有诸多事宜，请你完成任务后，向我汇报。
E: I have many other matters to attend to. Please report back to me when you finish the task.

C: 那么也将靠我们，为了保卫它而付出一切。
E: Which is why it is up to us to give everything we have to protect it.

C: 唯一的可能，是你在路上就被只有毁灭欲望的孽物所截杀。答应我，不要回去送死。在这里，继续我们的研究。
E: If you do that, you will be intercepted along the way by some evil monster with nothing but the desire to destroy. Promise me, don't go back to die. Stay here, continue our research.

C: 你不该剥夺她自主思考的能力。
E: You shouldn't deprive her of the ability to think for herself.

C: 她为「正义」付出了生命。
E: She gave her life for "justice."

C: 只要使用者忍住不笑，就能缓慢获得其中蕴藏的神秘力量。当然啦，至今也没人成功过，所以我们只在审讯的时候才会用到它。
E: As long as you hold your laughter, you can slowly obtain the secret power it contains. Of course, no one has succeeded so far, so we only use it on people in interrogations.

C: 那你怎么不自己去？
E: Why don't you go yourself?

C: 终端机上能查到所有人使用虚拟数据留下的痕迹，比方说，你上班时间在访问一些奇怪的虚拟平台，在这儿都能看得到。
E: The traces left from using virtual data can be found on the terminal. For example, from here people can see all the unusual virtual platforms you visited during your working hours.

C: 啊对了，跟你说了这么多，差点忘记一件正事。
E: Oh right, by the way, I almost forgot one thing.

C: 检测到有效信标，正在连接
E: Valid beacon detected. Connecting...

C: 你之前和我聊的那些事情，我就当没有听到过，你也最好多多反思。
E: I'll pretend I never heard the things you said. Think before you act in future, please.

C: 「——美丽娇艳的花儿也经不起烈日的灼晒，卡波特将永远在你身后给予你柔情与关怀。」
E: "Against the scorching sun, a beautiful flower will never endure. Within my fair embrace, my love for you is tender and pure."

C: 他走之前给了我一张通行证，方便我在空间站内巡逻。
E: He gave me a pass for access across the space station while on patrol.

C: 大哥这叫未雨绸缪！不愧是咱空间站的冷酷翱鹰、防卫科的群狼之首。
E: He's just staying ahead of the game is all! He's the space station's coldhearted hawk, the Security Department's alpha wolf!

C: 我们不仅知道了你从心修行的核心，还调查到你曾委托了丹恒，想要完成从镜的修行。
E: We know the essence of your trial of the heart, and we also know that you asked Dan Heng to help you complete the trial of the mirror.

C: 我都感觉很抱歉，是我带给了你这么多的压力。让你在本来就很繁重的工作之下，还要替我的个人私事忙碌。
E: I'm just sorry that I gave you the stress of all my private affairs on top of an already stressful job.

C: 你的修行让艾丝妲担心极了。
E: Those trials really made Asta worry.

C: 就、就是。阿兰大哥，这吓人的皮球你可接不得啊！
E: Th—That's right. Arlan, you really shouldn't take this on all by yourself!

C: 要是被它们摸清空间站生态，洞悉科员弱点，指不定会干出什么堪比「反物质军团」入侵的坏事。
E: If they were to gain crucial intel on the ecology of the space station and figure out the researchers' weaknesses, it's quite plausible that they may even wreak havoc on a scale that could rival the Antimatter Legion's invasion.

C: 还是别这么冒进了……
E: Let's not rush ourselves...

C: 啊，哦，是的！我、我们的确不知道……
E: Um... Oh, yes, that's right! I... um... we really don't know...

C: 好大的呜呜伯！界种科竟然收容过这么巨大的奇物……
E: What a huge Wubbaboo! The Department of Ecology managed to contain a Curio this size!?

C: 这叫做智取。
E: This is me outsmarting you.

C: 它竟说了这么多吗…
E: It said that much with just one sound...?

C: 嗯，希望你不会嫌弃。
E: That's right! I hope you don't hate it.

C: 奇怪，应该就在这附近啊，该不会是藏在黑塔女士的画像里吧……
E: Strange... it should be around here somewhere. Maybe it's hidden inside Madam Herta's portrait...

C: 哦，我懂了，这是一个电子涂鸦，倒是挺符合朋克洛德给人的印象。如果我没猜错，这应该是某种自动加密。
E: O—Oh, I see. This is digital graffiti that appears to represent Punklordian symbols. If I'm not mistaken, this should be some kind of automatic encryption.

C: 朋克洛德？
E: Punklorde?

C: 她之所以那么关心奇物收藏目录，任务完成后依然逗留在空间站，是因为这才是她的目标！
E: She was so interested in the curio collection index that she stayed in the space station even after her mission was complete — this was what she was truly after!

C: 有种不好的预感。
E: I have a bad feeling about this.

C: 这涂鸦的位置可真精彩，总觉得她是在跟咱们玩游戏呢，一个点接着一个点……
E: The graffiti's location is quite interesting. It feels like she's playing a game with us. One dot leads to another...

C: 其中不乏公司和博识学会都未曾记录在案的细节，也因此，它得以成为模拟宇宙庞大演算资料的一部分。
E: Many of the records and details recorded therein are beyond the knowledge of even the IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild. That is why it became part of the masses of calculation data for the Simulated Universe.

C: 怎么了，还没做好心理建设吗？时间不等人啊，朋友，放心跟着螺丝咕姆先生进去吧。
E: What is it? Are you still making up your mind? Time doesn't wait, my friend. Put your mind at ease and follow Mr. Screwllum inside.

C: 请先不要打断她，仔细聆听，我们或许能有更多收获。
E: Please listen and don't interrupt her. We may be able to find out more of what we need to know.

C: 或是为了胜负，或是为了喜悦，他们在走过的地方留下自己的印记，一个又一个图案，串联起漫长的旅途，编写下生命的游戏。
E: Whether it be for competition or for joy, they leave a trail in the places they visit. One symbol after another link up to become a long, long journey that writes the game of life.

C: 不不不，没那么简单。
E: No, no no no. Not as simple as that.

C: 以我对列车的熟悉程度…刚才那绝对、绝对不是列车发出的声音帕！
E: Pom-Pom knows the Express inside and out — it definitely wasn't the train!

C: 有种不祥的预感……
E: I've got a bad feeling about this...

C: 你对此很失望…直到你想起自己身上还背负着搜索虫群的使命。找找别的地方吧。
E: You feel disheartened, until you remember your duty to seek out the Swarm. Time to search in another area.

C: 这家伙，一副没救了的样子……
E: He looks beyond saving.

C: 但…{NICKNAME}，我已作出决定。这是我身为纯美骑士，应当奔赴的「命运」。
E: But... {NICKNAME}, I have made up my mind. As a Knight of Beauty, this is my destiny.

C: 是这样吗？也曾有许多人如此劝说，或许你们是对的。
E: Is that so? Many others have said the same. Perhaps you're right.

C: {NICKNAME}，我予以保证：我并非鲁莽冲动之人，我将做好万全准备，找准时机脱身。
E: {NICKNAME}, I assure you, I am not a reckless person. I will ready myself for the opportunity to escape.

C: 你开始担心他了？
E: Are you worried about him?

C: 走啦，{NICKNAME}，我们快去找他们聊聊看。
