E: {NICKNAME}, let's go chat with them.

C: 你其实也很担心列车吧？
E: You're worried about the Express, just like everyone else, right?

C: 他们是这么描述的…「人体自燃」。
E: The words they used were... spontaneous combustion of the human body.

C: 冥火大公的火焰具有某种特殊的性质，而这种性质…正是「人体自燃」的秘密所在。
E: The flickering tongues of Duke Inferno's fire carry a certain property, and this property... is the secret behind spontaneous human combustion.

C: …来不及了。
E: ...We're running out of time.

C: 难怪恩主的军团亲临，也未能将此地净化，至此，我就暂且承认自己的鲁莽吧。
E: It is little wonder that even the descent of the savior's Legion was unable to cleanse this place. I will acknowledge my brashness... for now.

C: 点心很好吃，我还想再吃一点。
E: The dessert was tasty. I would like more.

C: 好吧……
E: Okay...

C: 情商
E: EQ

C: 螺丝咕姆先生的追随者都比较理性，但他们也在翘首以盼机械贵族的到来。
E: Let me tell you something, Mr. Screwllum's followers are all very logical, but they're just awaiting the arrival of the mechanical aristocracy.

C: 我创造了一个「复制体」，但它和那位令使的距离…终究遥不可及。
E: I made a clone, but it... doesn't hold a candle to the Emanator.

C: （它似乎怕你害怕，为你哼起了歌…）
E: (It seems to sense your fear and starts humming a song for you...)

C: 因为我讨厌不知礼数，恶语相向的人——当然，也包括我自己。
E: I can't stand discourtesy — even when it comes from myself.

C: 机器人工作分工。
E: Classification of the robots' jobs.

C: 这台机器人是最新版，搭载了空间站研发的智能系统，能自主工作，感觉和人工智能助手没什么区别。
E: This one is the newest model equipped with an intelligence system they developed on the space station. It can work autonomously and it feels no different to an AI assistant.

C: 嘿嘿，笨老爸回来得匆匆忙忙，都忘了给家里带礼物。妈妈虽然嘴上没说什么，但脸上有点情绪，我赶忙拉着老爸出来买花弥补。
E: Hehe, silly Dad. He was in such a rush that he forgot to bring presents. Mummy said it was no problem, but her face told a different story, so I dragged Dad straight here to buy flowers to make up for it.

C: 空间站不会送了个残次品吧？
E: Did the space station send me a defective product?

C: 根据姬子小姐上传的数据，星穹列车一行在罗浮的金人巷驻足过，振兴了当地的居民产业。
E: According to the data provided by Miss Himeko, the Astral Express has stopped in the Luofu's Aurum Alley previously, and served to revitalize the local industries.

C: 别急，我的数据库显示还有第二个目标。
E: One moment. My database is showing that there is a second destination.

C: 你怎么知道的？我还真捡到过这么一个玩意。
E: How did you know that? I actually did find something like that...

C: 看起来上一篇漂流记的故事已经结束连载，作者又开了一个新坑。
E: It looks like the previous story of being lost at sea has come to an end. It seems the author has taken a new artistic direction.

C: 哎，你们看见了吗？好像有什么东西在动……
E: *gasp* Did you see that? I think something's moving...

C: 唔，要是姬子能跟咱们一块去就好了……
E: If only Himeko could come with us...

C: 好丑的制服。
E: What an ugly uniform.

C: 公司认为雅利洛-Ⅵ遭受了毁灭级别的打击，文明已经不复存在，那笔投资也就被评定为了烂账。
E: The IPC deemed that the disaster had caused irreparable damage and that there was no civilization left to reclaim the debt from. As such, they considered the owed sum permanently lost...

C: ——啊，要不咱们边逛边聊吧？这边！
E: Let's walk and talk — this way!

C: 但雅利洛-Ⅵ的拖债时间已经超过履行期限太久，很多比较温和的解决方案恐怕已经不适用了。所以，我向布洛妮娅提出……
E: ...but Jarilo-VI has far exceeded the allotted repayment period. I'm afraid milder solutions aren't the order of the day. So, I proposed to Bronya...

C: …我明白，托帕小姐。我会…我需要时间考虑。
E: ...You've made yourself clear, Miss Topaz. I'll require some time to consider my next course of action.

C: 有人受伤吗？
E: Is anyone hurt?

C: …那你装得还挺像的，差点把我给骗了。
E: I should've known... Don't quit your day job.

C: 喂，你们看！它好像…想离开这里了？
E: Look, you guys. Looks like it wants to leave.

C: 那就预祝我们合作愉快！辛苦你带路了，史瓦罗先生。
E: Here's to our future cooperation! If you wouldn't mind leading the way, Mr. Svarog.

C: 我会立刻召集克里珀堡的筑城者，讨论合同签署相关的事宜。至于民间的部分…我想拜托两位替我收集民意。
E: I'll convene the Qlipoth Fort Architects immediately to discuss the contract. As for the locals, I'd like you to gauge their stance on the matter.

C: 姬子有解决的办法？
E: Do you have a solution, Himeko?

C: 我的故乡没有出现一位意志坚定的领导者，人们早早就放弃了自救的念头。而你们的文明竟然在风雪中坚持了<unbreak>700</unbreak>年之久…真令人钦佩。
E: My world never had a resolute leader, so people gave up on the idea of saving themselves long ago. But your civilization has persisted through the snow and storms for <unbreak>700</unbreak> years... A truly admirable feat.

C: 邓恩，真不愧有一颗军人的心啊……
E: A soldier's perspective is always valuable, Dunn.

C: 有件重要的事需要你的意见。
E: We need your opinion on an important matter.

C: 但即便如此…我想起了上学时读到过的一句话：「愿意放弃自由寻求保障的人，最后两者皆空」。
E: ...but even so, a quote I read back in school came to me just now: "Those who are willing to give up freedom for security will end up with neither."

C: 时间刚好，我们快去向她汇报吧？不知道她和克里珀堡的大臣们商议得如何了。
E: The time has come — let's go fill her in. I'm curious to see how she's handling those Qlipoth ministers.

C: 够了，你们！从现在开始，禁止交头接耳——不想罚抄作业的话，就都给我好好听着！
E: Enough! From now on, no whispering allowed! If you don't want to have any homework later, you'd better start listening!

C: 你来得正好，{NICKNAME}，我有些事想麻烦你。
E: You came at a good time, {NICKNAME}, there is something you can help me with.

C: …你说什么？大声点儿！我耳朵不好，听不清楚。
E: ...What was that? You'll have to be louder! My ears aren't what they used to be — everything's muffled.

C: 听到了听到了…小声点儿！没有，我才没听说过什么「互助会」……
E: Alright, I heard you! Do you have to shout? ...No, I've never heard of any mutual aid society...

C: 你真这么觉得吗？在我看来啊，那些卖药的就是在明目张胆地谋财害命啊…怎么能把这种东西卖给生病的人呢？
E: Just unlucky? As far as I'm concerned, those medicine dealers are making money for murder in broad daylight... Who would sell such a thing to the sick?

C: 药贩子利用了人们脆弱的一面…
E: Those medicine dealers prey on our weaknesses...

C: 我没什么想要了解的。
E: There's nothing I would like to ask about.

C: <size=36>比赛，正式开始！</size>
E: <size=36>Now, let the fight begin!</size>

C: 是{NICKNAME}回来啦，你来得正巧！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back. Just in time!

C: 但写信人的身份，并不是我的关注重点啦。
E: But the identity of the writer is not what I am most concerned about.

C: 魈魅听着尤其耳熟。
E: Spirit sounds particularly familiar.

C: 天知地知，你知我知！这句话我跟你说了多少遍，你就是存心要和我作对！
E: We should keep it only between you, and me! How many times have I told you that? You were just going against me on purpose!

C: 咳、咳，这房间，好浓重的水腥气…看来水魈真的来过这里。
E: Ahem, ehem, this room smells humid... It seems the Xenohydro really was here.

C: 银光闪烁的舱内，留下了几根水魈本就稀疏的毛发。
E: In the silver cabin, there are several hairs left from the Xenohydro's sparse fur.

C: （这儿也有浓重的水腥气…但拉明娜人呢？）
E: (There's also a strong watery smell here... But where's Lamina?)

C: 这话我应该问你才对，我堂堂{NICKNAME}，「星穹列车」的正义成员，行走的星核容器……
E: I should be asking you that. I'm {NICKNAME}! The official crew member of the Astral Express, the walking Stellaron vessel...

C: 不如皎皎独立。
E: Than to be an accomplice.

C: 呵，他连我们的名字都记不住，要他记住教训，恐怕也是够呛的。
E: Oh, he can't even remember our names. I'm afraid it's hard for him to remember this lesson.

C: 嘁，谁稀罕呵。光是处理你以前那些代笔信，就不知道要花多长时间。
E: Urgh, who wants that. It will take me forever just to deal with your previous ghostwriter letters.

C: 八成是从其他方向前来围堵我们的士兵。
E: They must have entered from another direction to cut us off.

C: 然后你第一个想到的居然是来找我…这就是坚不可摧的友谊啊！说吧朋友，只要是老桑博能力之内的事，绝对帮你安排到位！
E: And your first thought is to find... me? Now that's what I call an ironclad friendship! Tell me, my dear old friend — I'll do anything for you as long as it's within my capabilities!

C: 从结果来看这当然是好事…但我总本能觉得有点不对劲。总之，我们接下来多加小心吧。
E: That may seem like a good thing... But deep down, I'm disturbed by this strange quietness. Anyway, let's be more careful from now on.

C: 查宝到底是怎么找到这东西的？
E: How on earth did Findie find this thing?

C: 离我跟妈妈约定的时间还有一阵。我有个想法……
E: We're a little early. I've got an idea...

C: 戏剧…
E: A play... hmm...

C: 在下层待得太久，我也已经很久没闻到过花朵的芬芳了。
E: I've been underground for so long, I already forgot what flowers smell like.

C: …看来你们是已经下定决心了。我很想派人护送你们，但出外勤的小队绝对不能擅离职守……
E: ...Seems like you've made up your mind. I'd really like to send some of my men with you, but we can't leave our posts.

C: …我的家人，也是我曾经追逐的目标。
E: ...He was my family, and someone I used to look up to.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。这束花让我想起了童年…真是一段无忧无虑的时光。就和它们花瓣的颜色一样，洁白、纯真。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. It reminds me of carefree childhood days... Those times were pure and innocent, just like these petals.

C: 我身后这幢建筑是贝洛伯格的历史文化博物馆，从它建成至今已经过去六百多个年头了。
E: This is Belobog's History and Culture Museum — built more than six hundred years ago.

C: 如果可能的话，我很希望能马上开放综合馆——城里，尤其是下层区的孩子们，急需一个能接受文化熏陶的环境。
E: I really hope the museum can open up soon... The children here need a culturally-enriching environment — especially those from the Underworld...

C: 据说七百年前，天外的军团伴随着流星雨一同降落到了雅利洛-Ⅵ表面，那块碎片就是入侵者曾经荼毒这片大地的铁证……
E: It is said that seven hundred years ago, the invaders from beyond the sky descended upon the surface of Jarilo-VI with a meteor shower. The Meteor Fragment is solid evidence that those invaders once tainted our land...

C: …啊，来消息了！
E: ...Hey, we've got some news!

C: 迫不及待了。
E: You bet I would.

C: 抱歉啦…不过别泄气，还有我和克拉拉陪你一起呢。
E: I'm afraid so. But you'll have Clara and me to keep you company.

C: 有了这样东西，所有贝洛伯格人就都能了解到你们的故事了，{NICKNAME}。
E: With an exhibit like this, all Belobogians will know your story, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我不记得你…
E: I Don't Even Know Who You Are!

C: 我是华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，莱姆士汀家族第二十五任……
E: I am Wallace Cambridge Limestein, the <unbreak>25</unbreak>th head of the Lime—

C: 布洛妮娅小姐，我们回来了。
E: Miss Bronya, we're back.

C: 别太客气了。
E: Don't mention it.

C: 所以，哪怕你自己没什么感觉——但你真的做了一件非常伟大的事哦。
E: So, even if it seems small to you — you did a very great thing here.

C: 猛地一下破门而入！
E: Break down the door with a bang!

C: 猛地一下破门而入！
E: Break down the door with a bang!

C: 哎哟…哎哟喂！这不是{NICKNAME}大客户吗！
E: Oh... I mean — oh! If it isn't my valued client, {NICKNAME}!

C: 请问吧，佩拉小姐——只要能帮上忙，我一定知无不言。
E: Ask away — I'll answer everything to the best of my knowledge.

C: 毕竟是贝洛伯格的知名人物啊——抱歉，我没想到娜塔莎小姐竟然有这样的身世……
E: Well, he's a famous figure in Belobog's history — sorry, I never expected Miss Natasha to have such a colorful background...

C: 我明白，娜塔莎小姐。过去的事就让它过去吧……
E: I understand, Miss Natasha. Let bygones be bygones...

C: …我明白了。谢谢你，娜塔莎小姐。
E: ...I understand. Thank you, Miss Natasha.

C: 我想，你还是向她确认一下比较好。如果她确实没收到申请表的话，我再重新写一份便是。
E: I think you should probably check with her. If she doesn't have my application form, I'll just fill in a new one.

C: …还蛮有魄力的嘛。
E: ...That's quite admirable.

C: …就你话多。
E: I'm thinking!

C: 其实，「希儿」这个名字在贝洛伯格本身也很少见…它有什么特殊的含义吗？
E: In fact, "Seele" itself is not a common name in Belobog... Does it have a special meaning?

C: 关于史瓦罗你还知道些什么？
E: What else do you know about Svarog?

C: 真的只是训练的原因？
E: So it's really only the training?

C: 知道了。
E: Got it.

C: 我愿意给这玩意开价，已经算是对你们仁至义尽了。到底卖不卖，你给我个准！
E: I'm willing to offer a generous price for this thing. So, do you want to sell it or not?

C: 奸商！我们是不会卖的。
E: We aren't going to sell it to you, you crooked profiteer!

C: 我可以揍你吗？
E: Can I punch you now?

C: …好像有哪里不对，但是听上去又很有道理…桑博老哥，你这脑子转得可真快。
E: Something seems to be off, but it sounds perfectly reasonable... Sampo, you truly are one smart fellow!

C: 难道他们又要吵架了…快上去看看！
E: I sure hope they're not arguing again... Quick, let's head over!

C: 战斗的事就交给我们——你们快撤！
E: Leave the battle to us, you need to fall back!

C: 明、明白了…多谢各位救命之恩！
E: O—Okay! Thank you for saving us!

C: 不过，前面似乎有个非常强大的怪物，像是这帮怪物的头儿…你们可得小心哪！
E: I heard there's a powerful monster down the road — some kind of leader of the pack... I'd take caution!

C: 哎，罢了罢了，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
E: *sigh* I guess it doesn't matter. From here on out, I'm over that woman.

C: 七百年？！
E: <unbreak>700</unbreak>!?

C: 嗯。毕竟还得藏着掖着，总觉得不自在。
E: Uhh... I have to hide those from other people. I get a little embarrassed.

C: 从她感知到佩拉时起，一直到分娩那天……
E: From the moment she knew she was pregnant, to the day of Pela's birth...

C: 咱们到了，这里就是铆钉镇…唉，熟悉的景色……
E: We're here. This is Rivet Town... *sigh* Everything looks familiar...

C: 这是…餐厅？
E: A... restaurant?

C: 我身上…一分钱都没有。
E: I... don't have any money with me.

C: 到头来，我什么都「守护」不了。这样的我为什么会被选中，我怎么能胜任……
E: In the end, I haven't been able to guard anything. How could they have thought I was worthy to be the successor...

C: 他的系统出故障了。
E: There must be some error in his system.

C: 快走吧，我预估的时间应该还赶得上。回磐岩镇找娜塔莎交差吧。
E: Let's go report to Natasha in Boulder Town, it won't take long to get back.

C: 好啦，闲话就聊到这里吧！接下来该去找虎克的宝贝了。
E: Alright, enough chit-chat! Next we need to find my treasure.

C: （给诊所寄送物资的好心人，看来就是科鲁泽……）
E: (Looks like Kluzer is the kind-hearted donor after all, who's been sending supplies to the clinic all this time...)

C: 现在，这个风头都被哥哥姐姐们抢走了，所以……
E: But it sounds like you grown-ups just stole their thunder, so...

C: 请远离，克拉拉。该个体为裂界生物，危险等级评估——极高。
E: Clara, get away. This is a Fragmentum creature. It's extremely dangerous.

C: 顾不上尊严更顾不上生死只想去找他的爸爸妈妈
E: Life, death, and honor the struggle persists, finding his parents his solitary wish

C: …我说各位，不懂就别强行装懂啊，又没人会笑话你们！
E: ...Uh, y'know friends, if you don't know the answer, you don't have to pretend you do. No one's gonna laugh at you.

C: 不管怎么样，先让它识别一下之前的认证吧。
E: Whatever the case, we'll need it to identify our certifications.

C: 见鬼，怎么又是门！
E: Ugh... Why is there another gate here!?

C: 又要动手了吗？好啊，我随时奉陪。
E: Are we gonna smash this one too? Count me in.

C: 嘘，它好像想说什么，听——
E: Shh, it's about to say something. Listen...

C: …嗯，克拉拉修过很多东西，但还是第一次碰到这么复杂的装置。
E: ...Yeah. I've fixed a lot of things before, but I never had to repair one as complicated as this.

C: 我或许找到问题所在了。虽然替换了线管，但它的轴承错位阻塞了。
E: I think I found the source of the problem. You replaced the rollers, but the bearing is causing a jam — there's a misalignment.

C: 在史瓦罗恢复正常之前，照看这些人的工作就先由「地火」接管吧。
E: Wildfire can provide that while Svarog is recovering.

C: 我们没有什么打算！
E: We're not up to anything!

C: 嘿，很多人都跟你的目的一样。
E: Hey, there are lots of people here who want the same thing as you.

C: 真的吗？太、太感谢你们了——这下只要我的商品能卖出去，我就有钱去竞拍下黑宝石玩偶熊了！
E: Really? Thank you so much! ...Now, if I can just sell my items, I'll... have enough money to bid on the erebus teddy!

C: 笨蛋！荣誉队员的意思是，小偷肯定只是来凑热闹的，不买也不卖！对吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: Fool! What the honorary member means is that the thief only came here to create trouble — they weren't interested in buying or selling! Right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 闭嘴吧，小偷！
E: Shut it, thief!

C: 五百五十！
E: <unbreak>550</unbreak>!

C: 所以…拍卖会的过程不顺利？
E: So... the auction didn't go too well, huh?

C: 虎克已经尽力了。
E: You tried your best, Hook.

C: 还有还有，老爹每次都会给我准备一只特别大的烤岩居蟹，想想口水就要下来了。
E: Oh! Oh! And daddy always makes a huge Roasted Rock Crab for me. It makes my mouth water just thinking about it!

C: 毕竟我也算是有功之人嘛。
E: I guess I did help out a little.

C: …当、当然啦！老爹送给虎克的礼物，是世界上最棒的礼物！
E: ...O—Of course! Your gifts are the best in the world!

C: 「造物引擎」是曾经的筑城者修筑的巨型机械。它并非兵器。
E: The Engine of Creation was an immense construction machine created by the Architects. It was not built to fight.

C: 开拓者…啊，我知道了——你就是那位轰动全城的「外来者」，对吧？
E: Trailblazer... Oh, I know. You're the outsider who's made a name for themself around town, right?

C: 结案了，犯人就是方脑壳悍匪！
E: We've cracked the case! The culprit has a square head!

C: 这串痕迹…好奇怪，看上去不像是人类留下来的……
E: And look at these! How unusual... They don't appear to have been left by a human...

C: 少废话，把偷走的零件交出来！
E: Anyway, hand over the stolen parts, right now!

C: █ 伤害██痛觉█ 不██伤害 █ █不要 █ █疼痛█痛苦█ 对不起 ██ 零件██对不起。
E: █ Hurt██pain█ no██hurt █ █don't █ █pain█suffer█ sorry ██ parts██sorry.

C: 那…这件事就麻烦{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}了。
E: Then I'll entrust this task to you, {NICKNAME}.

C: ██异常██异█常██异常异█异常异常异常异常██████——
E: ██Incompatible██in█com██incomatiblein█incompatibleincompatibleincompatibleincompatible██████—

C: 查询得：与该个体拥有相同序列号的自动机兵多达<unbreak>32</unbreak>台。即使排除其中已报废的机体，剩余结果中仍有3台与关键词描述符合。
E: According to my search, there are <unbreak>32</unbreak> automatons with the same serial number as this one. Even after eliminating the scrapped ones, three automatons still match the keyword description.
█Tempering█Tempering██. back█back█back to Rivet██!█fire██fire██!

C: 帕斯卡，接下来要给你换新外壳了哦。不会疼的，放心……
E: Pascal, I'm going to change your shell. Don't worry, it won't hurt...

C: 我就知道这里肯定有个「但」…
E: I know there has to be a catch...

C: 贝洛伯格命运中的「变量」仍在此处。或许{F#她}{M#他}能替我们给出最合适的解决方案。
E: The variable in Belobog's fate is still here. Perhaps {F#she}{M#he} can suggest the best solution.

C: …嗯。我…我相信{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的判断。
E: Okay. I... I trust your judgment.

C: （此外，帕斯卡先前尽管没有对人造成伤害，但它确实有过盗窃行为。这点也必须纳入考虑。）
E: (In addition, Pascal has a history of stealing, even though he never caused any harm to anyone. This is also a major concern.)

C: 但如果承担「责任」是出于克拉拉本人的强烈意愿，我亦没有强行介入干涉的权力。
E: But if Clara insists on taking on such responsibilities, then I have no right to object.

C: 我还是更支持史瓦罗的方案…
E: I think we should go with Svarog's idea...

C: 啊，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！克拉拉想给你看的…就是这些小家伙。
E: Oh, it's you! I wanted to show you something... These little fellas.

C: 帕斯卡，自己，自己做！废弃，零件，材料！不是，偷的，很干净。
E: Pascal, make, make myself! Scraps, parts, materials! Not stolen, very clean.

C: 原来如此，不愧是你！我还以为那是你现编的呢。
E: So that's why you went for maintenance, way to go Serval! I thought you just came up with it on the spot.

C: 我的人生虽然短暂…
E: My life was short, but it was a life filled with—

C: 大概吧…遇不到是最好，要是碰上了，就只能试着跟他谈谈了……
E: He probably is... Hopefully, we don't bump into him, but if we do, we'll just have to try and talk to him...

C: 若当真如此，为什么不禀报可可利亚大人？为什么偷偷摸摸混入禁区，制造混乱？！
E: If that were true, why wouldn't you report to Madam Cocolia? Why would you sneak into the restricted zone and create chaos!?

C: 清醒一点吧，姐姐！你忘记自己立下的「存护誓言」了吗？
E: Come to your senses, Serval! Did you forget your Oath of Preservation?

C: （不理会他们的争吵）
E: (Ignore their quarrel)
You...

C: 看那边！我好像看到下一个装置了。
E: Look over there! I think I can see the next unit.

C: 哼——反正都没有退路了，至少我们做好了准备，不会被可可利亚唬住。有埋伏又怎样？！我们才不会输哩！
E: Hmph... there's no way back anyway. At least Cocolia won't catch us off guard now. So what if it's an ambush!? We're not about to lose now!

C: 不好——三月，让开！
E: Not good — March, out the way!

C: 商业区沦陷了。居民已经转移，暂时安置在外城区。戍卫队…牺牲二十六人，但我……
E: The Commercial District has fallen. We've transfered the residents to the Outer Municipal District for the time being. The Garrison lost <unbreak>26</unbreak> fighters... but I...

C: 但比起虚无缥缈，越来越遥远的「存护」，它是那么真实……
E: And compared to the illusory, evermore distant Preservation, this was so tangible...

C: 怎么突然想起问这个了？我可没空给你做知识科普啊…还有一大堆文件等着我盖章批复呢。
E: What made you suddenly interested in this piece of ancient history? I don't have the time for random trivia right now... There's a huge stack of documents on my desk waiting for my approval.

C: 既然只是推销信息，应该不会对雅利洛-Ⅵ形成威胁。有你确认我们就放心了。
E: Since it's just an ad message, it shouldn't pose a threat to Jarilo-VI. Thanks to your findings, we can all rest easy after all.

C: 好了，你先去找需要的书吧。如果还需要帮助的话，记得随时告诉我哦。
E: Alright. Go and find the book you need. Just let me know if you need any help.

C: …{NICKNAME}，你的手机似乎又响了。要看看吗？
E: ...{NICKNAME}. I think your phone is ringing again. Don't you want to check it?

C: 这也太难了吧！
E: This is too hard!

C: 乍听你这么说我还挺感动的。你，该不会是为了安慰我才这么说的吧？
E: Hearing you say that makes me feel a little better. You're not saying that just to console me, are you?

C: 散页上密密麻麻地写着家政相关的笔记，非常详细，甚至对浇不同花用多少水都有记录。
E: Detailed notes about housekeeping fill the scattered pages in tiny font. It even has specifications about how much water to use for each type of flower.

C: 梅姐虽然说了却又像是没说，我们再去问问其他的目击证人吧。
E: There's nothing we can use from Mei's statement. Let's go and ask other witnesses.

C: 不知道你们问到了多少目击证词。
E: I don't know how much eyewitness testimony you got.

C: 就是这艘了，我来查查它的记录。
E: Alright, let me check this starskiff's record.

C: 从左数第四艘。
E: The fourth one from the left.

C: …你怎么知道的？
E: ... How do you know that?

C: 怎么，你和她打过交道？
E: Oh? You've dealt with her?

C: 我该往哪儿走来着……
E: Which direction should I go again...?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 到底是什么东西？
E: Just what is this?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 来吧{F#小姐}{M#小哥}，帮我个忙：<color=#dbc291ff>打开它的后盖，找到它的玉兆中枢，给它狠狠修理一发。</color>
E: Come on {F#miss}{M#mister}, help me out. <color=#dbc291ff>Open up its back flap, find its jade abacus core, and give it a solid repair job</color>.

C: 你说了约等于没有说…静斋不是喜欢《流云集》吗，你想要这样的情诗吗？
E: That isn't helpful at all... Isn't Jingzhai a fan of the Drifting Clouds? Do you want a love poem like that?

C: 「我给你持明一生也未曾拥有的情感火花。我给你我设法保全的全部爱意，自从我出生起便紧握的爱意。 / 不被欢愉和逆境触动的爱意。 / 静斋，我喜欢你！」
E: "I offer you the spark of emotions that the Vidyadhara could never have. I offer you all the love I could muster that I have saved, somehow — That love which I've been holding onto since I was born. / The love that is untouched by joy, by adversities. / Jingzhai, I love you!"

C: 嘿嘿，我有时候真想送个「天才卜者」的牌匾给她当生日礼物。
E: Hee-hee, I'm tempted at times to give her a plaque that reads "Genius Diviner" as her birthday gift.

C: 嗯。小聪是不会一直消沉的。
E: Yes. Cong won't stay depressed for too long.

C: 我们这儿有个叫<color=#dbc291ff>温符瑞</color>的科员，原本大家都以为这人心中只有学术研究，对男女心动之类的事情毫无兴趣……
E: There's a researcher here named <color=#dbc291ff>Wen Furui</color>. Everyone thought he only has academic research on his mind and does not care about relationships...

C: 嗯？
E: Huh?

C: 怎么回事，情报上没有说过这几个人有这么强啊？快给我上。
E: What is this, why was there no mention of these people being so strong in the intel? At once, go!

C: …我的牌友给我发消息了，希望我们能谈谈，让我们「马上」过去。
E: ...My game mates just sent me a message. They want to talk, so they hope we will get there IMMEDIATELY.

C: …你会怎么做呢？
E: ...What will you do?

C: 不，没什么问题，恰恰相反，你拍到了一些有意思的东西。我本以为能通过照片看看这些景色已经是极大的幸运了。
E: No, there's no problem at all. On the contrary, you captured something interesting. I thought I was lucky enough to be able to see these views through the pictures.

C: {NICKNAME}，你说什么？
E: {NICKNAME}, what did you say?

C: 仙舟人看我们，便像这座石雕看我一般。要不了多久，我就不在人世了。
E: The Xianzhou people regard us just like how this statue would regard me. It won't be long before I'm gone.

C: 仿佛就在刚才，他又老了十岁，皮肤上每一道皱纹，那些像是永远擦不干净的污渍似的老人斑变得更加清晰可见。
E: He looks like he has aged another ten years in an instant. The wrinkles and the age spots that resemble stubborn stains on his face suddenly become more visible.

C: 考虑一下如何？然后<color=#dbc291ff>给我一个答复</color>吧？
E: How about you think it over? And then <color=#dbc291ff>give me your answer</color>, okay?

C: 再见了，我的朋友。
E: Goodbye, my friend.

C: 白露大人，这边这边。
E: Lady Bailu, this way.

C: 这位{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}请留步，我想问你一点儿事情。
E: You there, excuse me. I want to ask you something.

C: 太多人喜欢把秘密揉作一团，揣进裤兜。
E: Secrets are often scrunched up and shoved into pockets — why not have a look?

C: 先拿走吧。
E: I'd better take this.

C: 怎么样，现在就出发吗？
E: How about it? Shall we set off?

C: 我想是的。
E: I think so.

C: 不用特意奶声奶气！
E: Quit being so childish!

C: （去告诉那两个人吧。）
E: (I should go and tell Banxia and Bailu.)

C: 现在是说这个时候吗？
E: Is now a good time for this?

C: 前方风波未定，此行切要小心应对。
E: It could be dangerous ahead... we should proceed carefully.

C: 蜕生？你又编出什么新理由。我倒要看看这次把你带出去的是…丹枫大人？
E: Reborn? More excuses. Who brought you out this time. Is that... Master Dan Feng?

C: …你的研究？
E: ...Your research?

C: 明白。这个行动少不了像您这样身手矫健的人，我会等您的。
E: Got it. This operation needs agile people like you. I'll wait for you.

C: 所以…这位罗刹如果有什么特别可疑的地方，还请您明示，我也好着手安排对他的扣押审讯和调查。
E: So... if you feel this Luocha is suspicious in some way, make it known. Then I can arrange for his detention and interrogation.

C: 而且那小孩子还是个女孩。
E: And the child is a girl.

C: 啊…好的，走吧。
E: Oh, uh... okay. Let's go.

C: 和这个世界毫无关系。我只是有些担忧…担忧故乡的事在这里重演。
E: Remember, we're talking about different worlds here. However, I can't deny I'm a little worried that... what happened to my home world could befall this place too.

C: （咳咳，习惯了。好吧，接下来你们就想象罗刹那张脸会说什么台词，我不掺和。）
E: (*sigh* Fine, I'll be me. You guys will have to imagine his lines instead.)

C: 好耶！
E: Yay!

C: 二位找他什么事？
E: May I ask why you're looking for him?

C: 母亲…
E: Mother...

C: 能和遍行星海的无名客谈天，真是受益匪浅。这些礼物，是为感谢你们救下小女准备的，请不要推辞。
E: Please accept these gifts as thanks for saving my daughter. I'd heard that the Nameless had traversed the starry sea, but I wasn't prepared for how much I could learn from you.

C: 虽然这个东西的味道也许有些独特，但我超喜欢喝。
E: This thing has a bit of a unique flavor, but I love it.

C: 父母不想让孩子涉险。驭空大人的心思，我想我能理解。
E: Parents never want their children to be in danger. I think I can understand Madam Yukong.

C: 你们赶紧去吧。过一会儿，驭空大人就该回来了。
E: Hurry. Madam Yukong will be back soon.

C: 其实…我有事情想和您谈谈。
E: Actually... I want to talk to you about something right now.

C: 晴霓小姐似乎有些犹豫。这种时候，就需要你这样的同辈人推她一把了。
E: Seems like Miss Qingni is a little hesitant. Try giving her a little push.

C: 怎么？休了一年产假，技巧迟钝了？没有自信了？
E: Huh? Sounds like maternity leave knocked the wind out of your sails! Feeling rusty?

C: 我的言灵术还没完成，不过，在继续之前，我们还有一场游戏呢。想好你的问题了吗？带着你的问题来找我，在那之前，我可以等。
E: I need to use the Spirit Whisper on Blade again, but let's play another round first. Have you thought of your question? Come to me when you're ready. I can wait.

C: （刃…他似乎认识丹恒，两人之间的关系很奇怪，也许我可以乘机从卡芙卡口中得知真相……）
E: (Blade... he seems to know Dan Heng. I don't understand the connection between them. Maybe I can learn the truth from Kafka...)

C: 而艾利欧可以帮助我，只要我按照他的指示行事。
E: Elio can help me, if I follow his instructions.

C: 她真的好会差遣人喔。
E: She sure knows how to boss people around.

C: 这封信的出现令人感到不安。你唤起云吟，一团水珠自空中凝成，浸入信纸。
E: The appearance of this letter makes you feel uneasy. You evoke the cloudhymn, and a droplet of water condenses from the air and soaks into the letter.

C: 「星槎撑不住啦！龙尊大人，你那么能耐，就快些在它散架前接住咱们啊啊啊啊——」
E: The starskiff won't hold much longer! High Elder, catch us before it falls apart!

C: 我什么都记不得了。
E: I can't remember anything.

C: 不错，白珩就是写下那本游记的人。
E: That's right, Baiheng was the one who wrote that travelogue.

C: 我也没要求你把枪指向我，这儿的孽物不够你出手吗？
E: I'm not asking you to point your spear at me. Could it be that the abominations here aren't enough to motivate you?

C: 是与丰饶之民的血战…
E: It was a bloody battle against the Denizens of Abundance...

C: 啊…今天的客人还真是一个接一个……
E: I've got my work cut out for me today...

C: 我明白。持明轮回重生，宿业罪愆也该一笔勾销。如今的你是个游历四方的无名客。不过…人真的能告别过去吗？
E: I understand. The sins of a past life should be forgiven after rebirth. Now you are a Nameless, traveling across the galaxy... but can anyone really bid farewell to their past?

C: 只是在移交受审前，我提出了一个请求。我想宽限一日，会会许久不见的老友们，践行彼此在情深意笃时立下的约定。
E: I did, however, have one request before the trial. I asked to be given a single day to go and see old friends and to fulfill promises I made long ago.

C: 彼此彼此，所幸我预先做了些功课，不然今日这场对谈可要冷场了。
E: You flatter me. Fortunately, I did my research, or this conversation would've been quite dry.

C: 三月七
E: March 7th

C: 小谛听说，它们一直奉命追着仙舟上各种线索到处跑，一旦发现了奇怪的东西，就会立刻上报。
E: Little Diting says he's been dutifully searching for clues all over the Xianzhou. He notified us as soon as he found something strange.

C: 而且，那些人的样貌也变得极为可怖，形如怪物。这与我过往对「魔阴身」的认识不同……
E: Moreover, the mara-struck have taken on a horrifying appearance — as if they're turning into some sort of monster... This certainly differs from what I thought I knew about the illness.

C: 我要接受什么样的考验？
E: What kind of trial do I have to pass?

C: 放心吧，都给你准备好了。传统的仙舟笔墨纸砚，书写流畅，符合人体工学，抄写五万遍都不会觉得累。是真的，我当初就抄了五万遍。
E: Don't worry, a traditional Xianzhou brush and inkstone has been prepared for you — smooth action and an ergonomic design. I myself transcribed <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> copies with such instruments.

C: 行了行了，终于抄完了…我认得你，你是{NICKNAME}！景元将军的贵客！
E: Alright, finally... I know you — you're {NICKNAME}, General Jing Yuan's honored guest!

C: 我自有分寸。
E: I know what I'm doing.

C: 这是给你准备的酬劳，请收下。
E: ...and for all your efforts, please accept this reward.

C: 即使是这样诡异的药方，丹枢大人也一定能搞清楚的……
E: I'll wager she can wrap her head around this prescription.

C: 寿瘟祸祖当真邪恶吗？
E: Is the Plagues Author truly evil?

C: 帮。
E: It's a pleasure.

C: 穷观阵已经回溯重构出了你的过去。眼前这片空间便是以你提供的记忆和物品为素材，构建出的情境。
E: The Matrix of Prescience has reconstructed your past. Before you is a space generated from the memories and items you've provided as raw materials.

C: 还好还好。
E: I'm all good.

C: 而你，我的孩子，也应知晓过去虚幻如烟霞。
E: And you, my child, should come to learn that the past is just an illusion...

C: 我将会为你展示你的起点。
E: I'll show you the origin that you seek.

C: 对不住啦太卜，姬子姐说，拣到我的时候我被赤条条地封在了一块冰里——就像刚出生的婴儿一样，身边没有任何东西。
E: I'm sorry, Master Diviner! When Himeko found me in the ice, I was stark naked — like a newborn baby. I didn't have any items with me...

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 算了吧，就当她是逃课成功好了。
E: Forget it, let's just assume she successfully skipped class.

C: 虽然贸易航线刚通，从庇尔波因特出发，大概需要两百个系统时的跃迁才能抵达。不过咱们那儿真的很不错！
E: Even though the trade route just opened, it still might take around two hundred system hours to get there from Pier Point, but our planet is really great!

C: 我当然要阻止，看不得你闯祸。
E: Of course I'm here to stop you. I can't just stand there and watch you get into trouble.

C: 含光自食其果，但他留下的遗患却不能放任。按图谱所记，含光历年铸造的岁阳魔剑共计一千三百零八十二柄，其中形制特殊的计有一百八十二柄。
E: Hanguang paid for his sins, but his troubled legacy must not go unchecked. According to the records, he forged a total of <unbreak>1,382</unbreak> heliobus-cursed swords, and <unbreak>182</unbreak> of them had unique designs.

C: 他想到用岁阳传递经验…
E: So, he thought of using heliobi to impart combat experience...

C: 很累！
E: Totally exhausted!

C: （该回去看看逃课的三月七了……）
E: (Time to go back and find that class-skipping March 7th...)

C: 你就少说两句吧…
E: Just keep quiet...

C: 这很奇怪吗？
E: Is it really that strange?

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。虽然连我自己也没什么把握说服大毫先生……
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}, but I'm not sure if I can convince Mr. Dahao...

C: 剑匣并未上锁，显然只有将剑送来的人才能办到；而玫瑰花瓣，则是那位纯美骑士留下的。
E: The sword case was never locked, which is evidence that only someone who delivered the sword could have done that. And the rose petal was probably left behind by that Knight of Beauty.

C: 我答应了帮助孤云阁下的请求，它希望我能带它逃离仙舟，作为将它拔出石碑的人，被它的纯美所打动的人，我不能辜负它。
E: I agreed to assist Master Guyun in its escape from the Xianzhou. As the person who pulled it from the stone monument, captivated by its beauty, I must not let it down.

C: 我输了。按照骑士决斗的规矩，我理应将孤云剑双手奉上。
E: I've lost. According to the rules of a knight's duel, I should keep my promise and hand over the sword to you.

C: 骑士，就按她说的做吧。
E: Do what she says, Knight.

C: 有一点。
E: Yeah, a bit, perhaps.

C: 我实在想不到，我作为剑以外的命运……
E: I just can't picture my destiny being anything other than that of a sword...

C: 这哪里算是惩罚，我欣然接受！向仙舟住民传递纯美的信念，正是在下所求。
E: This is not a punishment at all, and I gladly accepted it! Spreading the message of Beauty to the Xianzhou residents is exactly what I desire.

C: 你说的也对。即便不会真的受伤，但好端端走在大马路上，就被人用锤子一顿乱砸…这绝不是该发生在匹诺康尼的事。
E: You're not wrong. Even if there are no casualties, being smashed over the head with a hammer in the middle of the street for no reason at all... this is not the kind of thing that happens on Penacony.

C: …「花火大人的尸体」也能算是一个角色么？
E: ...Does "Miss Sparkle's body" even count as a real character?

C: 虽说记忆就像深海，但想一鱼两吃…海里的鱼可未必合你胃口哦？
E: Memory is like the deep blue sea. But if you try to catch two fish with one cast... You might not be satisfied with your catch.

C: （抱歉打断您的梦境体验，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}。这枚梦泡中似乎没有这样的片段。）
E: (Sorry to interrupt your dreamscape experience, {M#Mr.}{F#Madam} {NICKNAME}. That segment doesn't seem to be in this dream bubble.)

C: 捕头和捕快成了两具颓然的死物。看来，它们已经完成任务了。
E: At this moment, the constable and his bailiff lay lifelessly, mere husks of their former selves. It seems they have already completed their mission.

C: 没什么事。
E: Nothing.

C: 姐，你有这手段，怎么不早用？
E: Miss, Why didn't you just do this earlier?

C: 没道理啊。我都被贬去管理书库了，她老人家还想怎样？
E: No way — she's already demoted me to managing the repository. What else does she want from me?

C: 青雀小姐不介意的话，由我来检查一番？
E: Miss Qingque, if you don't mind, may I take a look?

C: …我？咱们有见过面吗？
E: ...Me? Have we met?

C: 就像刻印章一般，仙舟工造司的匠人们会在玉石晶格内篆刻肉眼难见的兆亿符箓，而后按照需要将它嵌入各式机关中，让它们根据设计好的意图运行。
E: Just like engraving a seal, the craftsmen of the Xianzhou Artisanship Commission carve faint symbols into pieces of jade, and then insert them into machines to get them to operate according to a certain intention.

C: 而且，普通计算机哪有这么玄乎的来历？博识尊亲自指点的技术……
E: Besides, ordinary computers don't have cool backstories. Technology handed down from Nous, huh...

C: 别客套啦，那位将军的话我们也不是没听见…有事你就交给我们好啦。
E: No need for the formalities, we heard what the general said... If you need something from us, just say the word.

C: 什么呀？你只是把那些符文拼了个七七八八，这就算完啦？
E: What? You just matched up those symbols. Is that it?

C: 给你点阳光就灿烂了是吧。
E: Huh, I wouldn't go that far.

C: 「令行…禁止…！」
E: Passage... prohibited...!

C: 阿基维利呢？祂死于星神之手？
E: What about Akivili? Did THEY die at the hands of an Aeon?

C: 星槎已经备妥。我来为各位引路。
E: The starskiff is ready — I will lead the way.

C: 那不就是「完全不可以」吗？还不如「开拓」的界域定锚呢……
E: You sure about that? Even our trailblazing Space Anchors sound better.

C: 那便是这「造化洪炉」。先贤希望能点燃洪炉，日复一日消磨岁阳的能量，让它们化为乌有。
E: That vessel is the Creation Furnace. Our predecessors hoped that by burning the heliobi in the furnace, their energy would gradually be exhausted until they were completely destroyed.

C: 唯一的差异在于，接受或背弃「丰饶」带来的长生种本性。
E: The only difference between us is whether we embrace or reject the long life placed upon us by the Abundance.

C: （丹枢需要一些时间来准备给我的谢礼。现在闲来无事，不如去三余书肆看看书，等她联系我吧。）
E: (Dan Shu needs more time to prepare my gift. There's nothing pressing right now, why not head over to Spare Time Book Shop for a while?)

C: 没能抓住她吗？我明白了。这些家伙潜伏良久，如今终于露出真面目，一定是为了某些更可怕的计划。我得加快搜捕的步伐。
E: So you weren't able to apprehend her... I see. These people have been in hiding for so long — they must have a more nefarious plan. I've got to apprehend them quickly.

C: 收下这些酬劳吧，这是你应得的。
E: Take this as a token of my appreciation. You deserve it.

C: 又是这样的情况…这谛听确实可以借给您。只不过，等调查告一段落，希望你将结果带回地衡司。
E: It happens again... You can borrow this Diting, but you have to submit your result to us after you complete your investigation.

C: 稍等，我来同他们解释解释你的事情。
E: Please wait here while I explain your incident to them.

C: 查清楚了，查清楚了。是一群丰饶孽物吃掉了你的那些小羊。不过不用担心，这位{NICKNAME}{F#女侠}{M#少侠}已经把它们都干掉了！
E: Yes, yes. It was a bunch of Abominations of Abundance that ate your sheep. Don't worry! This {F#heroine}{M#hero}, {NICKNAME}, already eliminated those monsters!

C: 「野兽派」的放生标准…
E: What are the criteria for a species that can be released by the Beast Faction...?

C: 坏的很彻底啊，不过如果能替换几个关键零件，也许还有救…
E: These automatons are defunct to the core. However, they might be salvageable if some of their key parts can be replaced.

C: 放生它们，将它们从那无情的人类主子手里解放出来的您，冬妮娅小姐，将会攒下大大的功德！
E: Miss Tonya, you'll gain a lot of merits by releasing them and freeing them from their heartless human masters!

C: 强而有力！强而有力！那些乍一看颇为原始的机械结构，仔细一看，才发现都是独属于野兽的粗犷壮美！
E: Powerful and ferocious! After taking a closer look at the structure of these primitive machines, I can see the rugged beauty of beasts in them!

C: 呸…呸…赔钱！要不是你们两个王八蛋找来这种鬼东西…我又怎么会……
E: P—Pay... Pay for my loss! If you two scoundrels hadn't brought me this cursed heap of metal, I wouldn't have...

C: 尤其是那个希斯曼…植物…我看他长得就像植物，早晚把他给打成植物人！咳咳咳咳咳咳……
E: Especially Heathmann... Plants? He looks like one himself! One day, I'll beat him up into a vegetable smoothie! *Cough, cough, cough*...

C: 生长了两千多年，比我岁数还大的虚陵柏啊！它就挥着那个电锯，三下五除二给砍倒了！你知道这要赔多少钱吗！
E: It was a Xuling Cypress that had survived for more than two thousand years! It was even older than me! Just like that, the tree was chopped off with a chainsaw by that thing! Do you know how much you have to pay for this?

C: 一箱矿泉水，呵呵，她还真是个体贴人心的小姑娘。不过，那天在鳞渊境第一次遇到你们的时候，我就隐隐觉得你们不适合咱们的放生事业。
E: A case of mineral water. Hehe, what a thoughtful young lady. Actually, when I met you two for the first time in Scalegorge Waterscape, my intuition already told me that you two weren't cut out for this releasing business.

C: 这妖物…真棘手……
E: This demon... is quite troublesome...

C: 那就是老子瞧不上你这个只会耍弄诡计的白痴！
E: I'd rather help a human than a conniving simpleton like you!

C: …{F#她}{M#他}就是星穹列车上的无名客？
E: ...{M#He's}{F#She's} the Nameless? From the train?

C: 眼下绥园的异状不可避免地会引来关注，防不胜防。今天粗暴打发了不明就里的二人，他们心有不甘，万一再来，却不一定能有再遇上我们的好运。
E: As things stand, the situation in Fyxestroll Garden is sure to keep drawing attention. If we forcibly dismiss these two today, their curiosity will remain — who knows what might happen if they decide to come back. They might not be lucky enough to run into us next time.

C: 如各位所见，这「束形却邪阵」尚未完成，逃逸的岁阳尚未全部收复，这里依旧凶险，我会让判官藿藿送你们离开园子。
E: As you can see, the Evil Binding Matrix has not yet been completed, and not all the escaped heliobi have been recovered. This area is still very dangerous. I will ask Judge Huohuo to escort you out of the garden.

C: 闹鬼、岁阳、夺舍…？我感觉自己的脑袋像是被人插了一杆子，然后用力搅和了一下。
E: Ghosts? Heliobi? Possession...? That was a big info dump, my brain is still loading...

C: （你猜？）
E: (Why don't you take a guess?)

C: 喂喂，差不多得了，能够数落这家伙的只有老子…和那几个判官，明白吗！
E: Hey, cut it out. I'm the only one around here who gets to tell this kid off... Me and those other judges. Got that!?

C: 你不是看不起她吗？
E: Aren't you looking down on her all the time?

C: 洪炉破碎，岁阳出逃。曾经构成「燎原」的岁阳碎片们，全都是为了与将军再次交手的夙愿归来。
E: Now that the furnace is broken and the heliobi have escaped, fragments like us, who once constituted Ignamar the whole, have returned here — with the desire to challenge the general again.

C: 雪衣大人？！
E: Madam Xueyi!?

C: 但这些镜子里一定藏着脱离的出口，咱们…挨个看看吧？
E: But one of these mirrors must contain the exit, right? Let's check them all...

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: 藿藿为什么能当十王司判官？
E: How did Huohuo manage to become a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 如果您刚从梦中醒来，请牢记——此处是现实。
E: If you've just woken up from a dream, remember — this is reality.

C: 我有一样东西遗失在了梦境酒店——是一张唱片。您可以帮我拿回来吗？您看上去…有股强大的气场，肯定不怕酒店里的那些诡谲异常。
E: I lost something at the hotel in the Dreamscape: It was a record. Could you help me bring it back? You look like... you have a mighty air about you — you definitely won't be intimidated by those strange incidents going on in the hotel.

C: （把那些奇形怪状的家伙消灭掉，应该就能拿到唱片了吧？那我就不客气了——）
E: (I should be able to get the record after eliminating those misshapen creatures. Time to fire on all cylinders then!)

C: 我有很不好的预感，如果我们留她一个人在这里的话，会有很不好的事情发生——咱们不能丢下她不管！
E: I've got a bad feeling that if we leave her alone here, something very bad will happen. We can't leave her alone!

C: 拥有梦想更是一件残酷的事——一旦求而不得，梦想破碎的痛感可能会彻底摧毁一个人。
E: Having a dream is a childish, cruel thing — If it is not attained, the pain from a shattered dream may utterly destroy a person.

C: 娜娜，你为什么总是不肯告诉我们你的未来规划？听说你们的同学都有着落了，我们也很着急啊……
E: Cocona, why do you keep refusing to tell us your plans for the future? I hear your classmates have all found their places in life, and we're getting antsy too...

C: 别吵了……
E: Please don't fight...

C: 身着华贵服饰的老妇人站在奢侈品商店中，似乎在等待什么人过来。
E: An old lady who is dressed to the nines stands outside the luxury store, as if waiting for someone to arrive.

C: 柯柯娜踮起脚尖，轻轻地吻了吻庞德的脸颊……
E: Cocona tiptoes and gently kisses Pound's face...

C: …呃，我想您知道这意味着什么，柯柯娜小姐。
E: ...Err, I think you know what it means, Miss Cocona.

C: （得赶紧去找到她…希望一切安好。）
E: (I have to find her quickly... I hope everything's all right.)

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}……
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}...

C: 不认识？！怎么会有人不认识莱斯利•迪恩，艾普瑟隆的银河巨星？看你的形象还挺成熟，现实里不会还是个未成年吧！
E: You don't know him!? How could someone not know Lesley Dean, a galactic superstar of Epsilon? You look pretty grown up to me. You're not still a kid, are you?

C: 这没什么不礼貌的，女士，我在梦中不止一次被人问及此事。
E: There is nothing rude about this, miss. This is not my first time being asked this in a dream.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我想自救。你会帮助我吗？
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I wish to save myself. Will you help me?

C: （艾丽刚才，是不是想说「猎犬家系」来着……）
E: (Was Alley about to say "the Bloodhound Family"?)

C: 「你看重契约和荣誉，我完全理解。但请再仔细考虑一下…你确信这艘战舰上的人都和你一样信仰坚定吗，舰长？」
E: "I understand that you value your contracts and your honor. But I implore you to think carefully about this... Are you sure that the people on your ship share your firm beliefs, Captain?"

C: 难道是…难道是我刚才打扫的时候忘记锁门了？
E: Did... Did I forget to lock it after I finished cleaning?

C: 我们接着看下去吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Let's keep watching, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 替换桌上的照片。
E: Swap the picture on the table.

C: 怎么了，莱斯利？
E: What's wrong, Lesley?

C: 感谢您对我的信任——我就不浪费您的宝贵时间了，有些工作上的事务要跟您汇报。
E: Thank you for your trust in me. I won't waste your precious time. Some official matters require your attention.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 看起来什么人都有…
E: Looks like there are all sorts of people here...

C: 我的子侄发现尾翼的涂装还没更换，就连「晖长石号」的旧称也没改，这都易主了，是不是要改一下？
E: My nephew realized that the paint job on the empennage hasn't been changed, nor has the old name, Radiant Feldspar. Since you're its new master, isn't it time to change it?

C: 然后，你表达了自己想要顶替丹尼斯、体验大堂经理工作内容的强烈意愿。
E: And then, you express your fervent wish to replace Dennis as the lobby manager and experience his job for yourself.

C: 「灰总」！久仰大名，久仰大名！
E: Boss Gray! I've heard so much about you!

C: …巴登豪威尔，没错！
E: ...Baden-Powell, that's right!

C: （徒劳地试图插嘴）
E: (Try in vain to get a word in)

C: 不存在的！我的牌技，你还信不过吗？
E: No way! Still doubt my skill at games?

C: 我，我……
什么「四尺神子」，原来根本就是个冒牌的令使…退会，我要退会！
E: What "Four-Foot Follower"? He's just a fake emanator... I want a refund for my membership!

C: 我们平凡的灵魂…
E: Ordinary souls, yet destined to shine...

C: 我也不知道那算不算好时机……
E: I don't know if I'd call it that...

C: 按接驳客船的时间来看，朱明的客人已经快到了。
E: Judging by the standard vessel transfer time, the Zhuming guests should be arriving at any moment.

C: 眼下彦卿还在养伤，也没做好出行准备，不急于此时。
E: I am still recovering from my wounds, so I am not yet ready to depart. This matter can wait for now.

C: 就不耽误各位时间了，解散！
E: Well, we don't want to keep you waiting around. Let's head out!

C: 别问我，我就是个医士，就算是眼睛方便的时候，我也不会凑这个热闹，你问问貊泽。
E: Don't ask me. I'm just a healer. You wouldn't catch me getting involved in that kind of thing even when my eyes were working. Ask Moze.

C: 哇，{F#大姐}{M#大哥}，注意看，这份手稿是个什么秘密组织的东西。肯定不太对……
E: Whoa, look closer! This manuscript looks like something straight out of a secret society. It's definitely not this...

C: …呜呜呜，我就是个不肖之徒。
E: ...Boohoo, I'm just a lowly degenerate in comparison.

C: 是啊，不过从我认识他开始，他就一直没离开罗浮，比本地人还本地人。生前他还跟我开玩笑说，要不是因为我，他就要去<color=#dbc291ff>星际和平公司</color>了。
E: Yes. But since I got to know him, he's never left the Luofu. He was more local than the locals. He used to joke with me that if it weren't for me, he would've gone and joined <color=#dbc291ff>the IPC</color>.

C: 打工人何必为难打工人呢……
E: That seems to be above my pay grade.

C: 「星槎种子」？
E: Starskiff seeds?

C: …你这「师傅的梦想」可真是块膏药，哪里需要往哪里贴。
E: Well, it's starting to seem like you are just using your master's dream as an excuse to wallow in self-pity.

C: 这也确实是个办法，不过，我还没有达到能收徒弟的水准。
E: That's actually a pretty good idea, but I haven't reached the level of being able to take on an apprentice yet.

C: ……{NICKNAME}？你的意思是？
E: ...{NICKNAME}? What do you think?

C: 「莱恩•玛斯特隆佐，大约是一百二十年前进入了因果殿」…我这边将信息输入进去了，阵枢那边就交给你了。
E: "Ryan Masteronzo was sent to the Hall of Karma about <unbreak>120</unbreak> years ago." I've entered the info on my side, and I'll leave you to do your part at the base terminals.

C: 没错，它曾经是我的梦想，你愿意为我实现梦想，我很感动。
E: Yes, it used to be my dream. I'm very touched that you're willing to fulfill it for me.

C: 但你自己看看，你那最宝贵的热情，被我那粗陋的梦想牢牢捆住，快要磨干耗尽了…我从来没想过事情会发展成这样。
E: Now, look at yourself. Your enthusiasm is fettered by my poor design and is about to be depleted... I never thought that things would pan out this way.

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: …我说，别看卢卡那小子一幅愣头青的模样，他心里其实装得下很多东西。他跟你说过那只机械手的来历吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: ...Huh, he may be a tough guy on the surface, but he's got his secrets. Did he tell you about the origins of his mechanical arm?

C: 所以从他嘴里说出「都是为了自我修炼」这种话…多半是糊弄人的。他心里肯定瞒着什么事没跟你们说。
E: So when he says stuff like "this is for training" — that's probably a lie. He's hiding something from you alright.

C: 这里…看，好像有人故意把外壳上的漆字给刮花了，而且还没刮干净。
E: Here, look... someone deliberately scratched off the paintwork — didn't even do a good job of it.

C: 红方选手，熔锤镇的卢卡——你准备好了吗？
E: In the red corner, Luka from Moltammerville — are you ready?

C: ——「见识下火花四溅吧！」
E: Let's see some sparks fly!

C: 哈，终于有个能抗住这一拳的对手了！
E: Ha! Finally, an opponent that can take the punches head-on!

C: 小三月，维系关系，这就是成年人生活所必须支付的小小代价。既然罗浮仙舟发出了邀请，那么作为朋友，星穹列车也理当赴约。
E: Being an adult means maintaining relationships, whether we like it or not, March. Since we've been invited, it's only right for the Astral Express to attend the ceremony.

C: 对了…丹恒，这次去罗浮，你会跟我们一块儿下车走走的吧？
E: By the way, Dan Heng... this time, you'll be taking a stroll with us on the Luofu, right?

C: 我这是美好的祝愿，你这才叫乌鸦嘴吧！
E: Haha, I'm just hoping for the best! You're the one jinxing us!

C: 所以这种事还是要问其他游客啦！
E: That's why we're asking fellow tourists!

C: 那旁边这位小朋友是……？
E: And this young friend is...?

C: 丫头，去吧，借这个机会好好和彦卿解开误会。
E: Alright, Yunli. Take this opportunity to clear things up with Yanqing.

C: 呃，我是不是又说错话了。
E: Uh, did I say something wrong again?

C: 这样啊。那在下何时才能见到灵砂大人呢？
E: I see. So when will I be able to see Master Lingsha?

C: 走吧！
E: Let's go!

C: 您这是把景元将军当作敌人审视了吗？
E: Are you treating General Jing Yuan as your enemy?

C: 哦？那我给你个机会，打败我，或者干脆把你的剑全都交给我算了。
E: Oh? Well then I'll give you a chance. Defeat me, or hand over all your swords.

C: 这张匣子泛着钝光，以非木非金的材质制成。匣面上以高妙的技艺嵌入金属丝络，勾勒出莲花纹样。
E: This case gleams with a muted luster, crafted from a material neither wood nor metal. Its surface is masterfully woven with metallic threads, outlining an intricate pattern of lotus flowers.

C: 何况，听说剑士们都各有绝招呀，要是教我的时候不小心泄漏，大家知根知底，打起来岂不是破不了招？
E: Plus, I heard that each swordmaster has their own special moves. What if they let something slip while teaching me? If everyone knows each other's tactics, won't that mean everyone is stuck in a stalemate and unable to end their fights during the Wardance?

C: 驭空姐姐，自上次分别，咱们快有三十年没见了吧？
E: It's been thirty years since we last saw each other, right, Yukong?

C: 诶？彦卿师父也有礼物要送给我吗？
E: Huh? You have a gift for me too, Master Yanqing?

C: 那一日，练剑结束后……
E: On that day, after the sword training...

C: 没有最厉害的剑，只有更厉害的剑士。你彦卿师父喜欢使唤多把飞剑，但你云璃师父只用一把剑，在丹鼎司里不还是把他揍得吱哇乱叫？
E: There's no such thing as the "most powerful" sword. It's all about the skill of the swordmaster. Yanqing wields several flying swords, while I only wield one, but remember how I kicked his butt at the Alchemy Commission?

C: 炎老认可，我自然没有问题。
E: If Elder Huaiyan accepts the explanation, so do I.

C: 不是扣留。我会申请十王司「问字部」的判官以业镜台为诸位留下一份详细证言，补上报告所缺，也是为了堵上联盟内抗议的嘴巴。
E: No, I'm not imprisoning you. While you're there, I'll ask a judge in the Ten-Lords Commission's Interrogation Division to record a detailed testimony with the Karmic Mirror from both of you. We'll fill in the gaps that weren't covered in the report and silence any protests within the Alliance.

C: 此外，我来罗浮还有一桩要务。如果说十王司盖上大印的证言是为压服联盟高层里反对的声音。那么曜青仙舟狐人内部的声音要恳请景元将军听听。
E: Oh, there's one more thing. This testimony is for silencing the voices of opposition within the Alliance, but I would like to urge General Jing Yuan to listen to the pleas of the foxians on the Xianzhou Yaoqing.

C: 押解呼雷返回曜青，此事不仅对曜青狐人关系重大，对将军也极为重要，留神了。
E: Taking Hoolay back to the Yaoqing means a lot to the foxians on the ship and to the General herself. So, stay alert.

C: 寒鸦小姐？
E: Miss Hanya?

C: 更危险的是，除两位之外，刚才还有一队来访者进入了幽囚狱深处——曜青仙舟的使者。
E: And to make things worse, another group of visitors just entered the depths of The Shackling Prison, the messengers from the Xianzhou Yaoqing.

C: 距离您上次率领我族驰骋星海的猎场，已经过去…至少七百年时间了。看到您依旧如过去般狡猾机敏，我无限欢欣。
E: It's been... at least seven centuries since you led our Pack through the hunting grounds of the stars. I'm thrilled to see that you are as cunning and skillful as ever.

C: 曜青使者呢？姐姐呢？他们还活着吗？
E: Where are the Yaoqing messengers, and where's my sister? Are they still alive?

C: 姐姐，在「死后」，你看到了什么？
E: Sister, what did you see when you were "killed"?

C: 你又是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 当然是…唔，当然应该宣布戒严，将人力投入搜捕工作。至于演武仪典，还是先宣布无限期延迟吧。
E: Well... hmm... I believe we should declare martial law and allocate manpower to search for the escaped prisoners. And for the Wardance, it's better to announce an indefinite delay for now.

C: 云璃师傅，怀炎将军这是想让你替彦卿守擂呢？
E: Master Yunli, is General Huaiyan asking you to be the ringmaster instead of Yanqing?

C: 星槎海街头
E: Starskiff Haven Street

C: 是啊，这也意味着在罗浮内部有为这些伪装者提供药物的来源。
E: Indeed. This means that these borisin have a steady supply of the medicine within the Luofu.

C: 所谓「不死」不过是个名头罢了。世上岂有真正不死不灭的东西？不知罗浮为何要将这颗毒瘤延宕压抑如此之久，导致今日难以收拾的局面？
E: Their so-called "immortality" is just a facade. I mean, nothing can truly defy death, can it? I just don't understand why the Luofu kept this tumor for so long, leading to the terrible situation we're facing now.

C: 两位，当心。这东西还活着！
E: Watch out. This thing is still alive!

C: 好主意。若我出面，只怕打草惊蛇。此事就交给灵砂小姐了，持明内务仍要由持明处置。
E: Good idea. If I were to take action, it might alert the true mastermind. I trust you to handle this matter, Miss Lingsha. The internal affairs of the Vidyadhara should remain under their jurisdiction.

C: 知道我为什么敢放你离开吗？因为你们这些狐人总会乖乖回到主人身边的…无论逃多远。
E: You know why I'm letting you go? Because foxians like you always obediently return to their masters... no matter how far they run away.

C: 请问您是要乘坐星槎吗？
E: Would you like to board my starskiff?

C: 啊？您开什么玩笑，这艘小小的星槎怎么可能飞出玉界门啊？
E: What? Are you joking? How can I take you beyond the Jade Gate in this tiny starskiff?

C: 别担心，这位长官会帮我们的。
E: Don't worry, this captain will help us.

C: 这就是如今我所做的一切，紧紧跟在你的身边，只为用我的双眼见证一个结果：你的死亡……
E: Everything I'm doing now, following you so closely, is for just one reason: Witnessing your death with my own two eyes...

C: 知己知彼…让我看看，现在问问谁好呢？
E: Know myself and know the enemy... Let's see, who should I ask first?

C: 这位来自曜青的选手除去背后的长剑外，竟还随身携带了一柄电磁手弩。
E: The contestant from the Yaoqing, aside from the longsword on the back, also carried an electromagnetic hand crossbow.

C: 这个人竟然解释笑话！
E: He's actually explaining his joke!

C: 长椅沉默不语，长椅见过太多厉害的人，其中就包括曾经的罗浮剑首。
E: The bench remains silent, having witnessed the presence of many a formidable figure, including the once-renowned Sword Champion of the Luofu.

C: 等等，别靠近。
E: Wait, don't go any closer.

C: 呜哇啊啊啊啊——
E: Aghhhhhhhh...!

C: 我想确认有无异常登舰的情况。
E: I would like to confirm if there have been any irregularities in boarding.

C: 竞锋舰的速度似乎在变慢？莫非……
E: Does it feel like the Skysplitter has slowed down? Could it be...

C: 我好得很…一点事都没有！就算再来十个呼雷……
E: I've never been better... I could take on ten more Hoolays...

C: 就把我当成幻觉好了。
E: Just consider me a figment of your imagination.

C: 我会用你的爪牙撕裂你！
E: I will tear you apart with your own claws!

C: 就在刚才，呼雷，已在云骑围攻下授首了。
E: And just moments ago, Hoolay was executed by the Cloud Knights.

C: 陛下！好久没见您来这边出巡了。您身边这位是？
E: Your Majesty! It's been a while since you took a stroll here. This person with you is...?

C: 皇帝陛下，幸会。有什么事吗？
E: It's a pleasure, Your Majesty. Is there something I can do for you?

C: 蒂索克二世向猎犬解释了埃夫姆几个系统时后的急事…
E: Tizocic II explains to the Bloodhounds regarding Ephraim's urgent matter in a few system hours...

C: <size=36>你的罪行！！！</size>
E: <size=36>Your crimes!!!</size>

C: 我知道你要干什么…你想收回权力。所以你需要一个借口，去肃清为你操劳多年的忠臣！
E: I know what you want... You want your power back. You just needed an excuse to purge the loyal servants who've toiled for you all these years!

C: 是啊，是啊…{F#她}{M#他}不会恨朕的……
E: Yes, yes... {F#She}{M#He} won't hate me...

C: 我们是来带你回去受审的，蒂索克二世。
E: We have come to take you back to stand trial, Tizocic II.

C: （先给黑塔发个短信问问吧。）
E: (Let me text Herta and ask her about him.)

C: 他在匹诺康尼被人软禁着。
E: He's being confined in Penacony.

C: 啊，年轻人…很高兴我还认得出你。
E: Oh, youngster... I'm glad that I can still recognize you.

C: 但在刚才，你拿出那个药瓶的时候，从那片宇宙的深远角落传来了一个声音。那个声音…它想说服我相信螺丝咕姆和你。
E: But when you showed me the bottle of pills earlier, a voice came from a distant corner of my universe. It... tried to persuade me to trust Screwllum and you.

C: 过去的三年，我们翻过了几乎所有的理论障碍。在这个秘密实验室里诞生的科研成果足够震撼整个宇宙。
E: Over the past three years, we've overcome nearly every theoretical hurdle. The scientific achievements born in this lab are enough to leave the universe amazed.

C: 我从他人口中得知，下令使用「虚数坍缩脉冲」的技术研发部高层被部门专门立项审查，后来失去了音信。
E: I later learned from others that the higher-ups of the Technology Department who ordered the Imaginary Implosion Pulse detonation were subjected to an internal review. They were never heard of again.

C: 但还是请允许我称你一声——「朋友」。
E: Nevertheless, please allow me to address you as a friend.

C: 这样说也许算不上慰藉：但在我的计算中，你的研究本有潜力拯救数以亿计的生灵。
E: I understand this may not be much of a consolation, but in my calculations, your research had the potential to save billions of lives.

C: 比如折纸小鸟？
E: Such as origami birds?

C: 哼，他刚刚跑去走廊的另一头了，先过去看看吧。
E: Hmph, he ran off in the other direction of the corridor. Go look there first.

C: 我想起来了…奥尔拉，我真正的名字。
E: I remember now... Orla is my real name.

C: 每一项罪名都足以让你重回监狱，走，跟我去公馆进行审讯吧！
E: Each crime is enough to send you back to jail. Come with me to the Pavilion to receive judgment!

C: 奥尔拉修的藏身点应该就在附近，我知道过去的捷径。没必要两个人都交代在这。
E: Orla's hiding spot should be nearby, I know the shortcut to get there. No reason to sacrifice two lives here.

C: 喂，你不要多嘴——！
E: Hey, there's no need for you to talk...!

C: （去走廊找找他们口中的人吧。）
E: (Let's head to the corridor to look for that person they mentioned.)

C: 有事情想问你。
E: There's something I'd like to ask you.

C: 看得再多，你也找不到比我更好的。
E: You can look, but you won't find a better establishment than mine.

C: 就在大概三秒钟后。
E: We'll get there in three seconds.

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，这个最大的给你吃。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you should have the biggest one.

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，这个最大的给你吃。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you should have the biggest one.

C: 我本不想来的。
E: I didn't want to come initially.

C: （现场有这么多人…或许我应该试着调动这些公民的情绪。）
E: (So many people present... Maybe I should try to appeal to the public's emotions.)

C: 照你这么说，刻法勒何必捧着那太阳？他又不需要光照，难道是吃饱了撑的？
E: If it is as you say, why did Kephale carry the sun? He doesn't need sunlight. What, he had nothing better to do?

C: 公民们连连鼓掌称是。在他们看来，永恒之城只可能从内部被攻破——坚决不能让这种事发生。
E: The citizens applaud in agreement. To them, the Eternal City can only be breached from within — such a thing cannot be allowed to happen.

C: 这…{F#她}{M#他}真的是英雄吗？
E: Uh... Are you sure {F#she}{M#he}'s a hero?

C: 哎呀，有好处！我是商队的领队，好处有的是！
E: Jeez, you will be rewarded! I am the leader of a merchant caravan, and I have all the rewards you could need!

C: 求我。
E: Beg me.

C: 寻宝！伙伴，一起去寻宝！
E: A treasure hunt! Partner, let's go on a treasure hunt!

C: 帕…帕里斯……
E: Pa... Paris...

C: 那里是诗人、艺术家与追逐浪漫之人的天堂，一般主角都会在这里遇到自己的爱人，获得墨涅塔的赐福…此事在经典作品《金毯密传》中亦有记载。
E: It's a paradise for poets, artists, and those in search of romance. The main characters in these stories would meet their true love here and receive Mnestia's blessing... This is all recorded in the classic work Secret of the Golden Carpet.

C: 克帖西芬开始滔滔不绝地介绍起这个故事，你如果再不问正事，估计她要跟你把全集都讲一遍。
E: Ctesiphona begins to endlessly talk about the story to you. If you don't get back to the matter at hand, she may end up recounting the entire epic.

C: 我两个都同样的揍啊。
E: I will destroy you both.

C: （雕像中的神性已被提取，用它去开启牢房的机关吧……）
E: (The statue's divinity has already been extracted. Use it to open the prison gate mechanism...)

C: 欧洛尼斯亲传弟子来了。
E: Disciple of Oronyx, at your service.

C: 那你能吹口哨吗？
E: Then... can you whistle?

C: 为战而生的偶像逃离了战争，当命运偏离了航道，船上的灵魂也难免迷惘——
E: The idol born for war had fled the battlefield, their fate deviates from course. When the ship's trajectory is no longer followed, its passengers' souls become lost in remorse...

C: 恩人？好久不见，原来你也在这宴会上！
E: My savior? It's been a while. I had no idea you were at the celebration, too!

C: 唉，黄金之茧啊，不要再用丝线蒙住我同胞的眼睛了…这样的盲人，怎么面对即将到来的纷争呢？
E: *sigh* Oh, Chrysalis of Gold, weave your silk over the eyes of my fellow no longer... How can someone as blind as him hope to face the approaching strife?

C: 没看到。
E: I didn't.

C: 你想引弦发箭穿头盔铠甲破碎头颅绽放嫣红花蕾前去纷争践踏脆弱躯体成泥玷污白石砖斩骨切肉脆响悦耳前去纷争恐惧憎恨哭嚎环绕燃烧的尸山燃烧残缺败者肢体献祭饮血前去纷争
E: You want to draw your arrows and shatter helmets and armor making them bloom red flowers as heads shatter go on to the strife and trample the weak bodies into mud that stains the white marble brick beneath the beautiful sounds of chopping flesh and cutting bones go toward the strife fear hate crying out mountains of bodies burning all around you entrails and limbs of the defeated and the sacrificed go to the strife

C: 恩人，你也不想在这里跟尼卡多利拼个你死我活吧？不如和我们一起走，路上还能有个照应。
E: My savior, you don't wish to fight to the death with Nikador here either, do you? Why not come with us, so that we can look after each other along the way?

C: 你冷静一点…
E: Calm down...

C: 想起来了，这些雕像就储存着尼卡多利的神性！不过我们也不能把它们在这里砸碎吧？
E: Come to think of it, these statues store the divinity of Nikador! We can't just smash them here and now though, can we?

C: 希帕提亚。
E: Hypatia.

C: 你有见过她吗？
E: Have you seen her before?

C: 也只有这些没有经历过那个时代的家伙，才会相信一个来历不明的瞎子口中的预言。
E: Only people who have never experienced those times would believe the foretellings of a blind from dubious origins.

C: 黑潮降临时，父亲带着我逃了出来。然而，危险远比我们预料的更多。
E: When the black tide descended, my father took me and escaped. But, the danger was greater than we could ever imagine.

C: （如实交代）
E: (Tell the truth)

C: 可是，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
E: But {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

C: 该说的，我都说了。有些不该说的，我想你清楚该怎么解释。
E: I've already said what has to be said. As for the things I didn't say, I'm sure you know how to explain them to the commoners.

C: 我绝不认可这样的命运。
E: I will never accept such a fate.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只要成为圣女，你们都能活下来</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As long as you become the Holy Maiden, you all will survive</color>.

C: 我曾以为自己挣脱了命运，凭借自己的选择，走向了死亡。
E: I used to think I was free from destiny and I walked toward death based on my choices.

C: 这部《如我所书》定能在联盟内部如实传唱。但听你所述，想让它为寰宇铭记，仅凭罗浮一舰恐怕不够。
E: The faithful adaptation of this As I've Written within the Alliance is most definitely assured. But from what you've said, if we want it to be remembered throughout the cosmos, the Luofu alone may not be enough.

C: 上回书说到，在那游云天君后继者的号召下，公司、天才、调律者，乃至云骑大军，皆云集于此役，誓要将大敌彻底扼杀。
E: As the tale left off, under the call of the successor to the Cloudstrider, the IPC, the Geniuses, the Tuners, and even the great army of the Cloud Knights all gathered for this campaign, vowing to utterly annihilate the great foe.

C: 嗯…仔细想想，先说坏消息有点缺乏铺垫。还是先听好的吧。
E: Hmm... Now that I think about it, starting with the bad news might be a bit too abrupt. Let me give you the good news first.

C: 伊萨卡，你最缺乏的就是洞悉数据本质的眼光。
E: Ithaca, what you lack most is the vision to see through the true nature of data.

C: 你要不看看自己在哪？
E: You might want to check where you're standing.

C: 谢谢，靴靴，鞋鞋，雪蟹，呜呜～
E: Thank you... Tank you... Tank... Wooo...

C: 啊，太好了，是我最喜欢的学习耶！老师你人真好！太棒了，不过请等我先同步下载一下试卷。
E: Oh, great, it's my favorite! {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, you are the best! Great, but please let me download the exam papers first.

C: 原来如此，但是我先前竟然没有发觉，还以为是大家彼此之间很有礼貌。
E: So they don't mean what they said? How come I never noticed? I thought people are just naturally nice to each other.

C: 就是，和她姐姐比起来差远了。
E: I mean, she's completely different from her sister.

C: 听着，我不在乎你们在背后怎么说我，就像莱斯莉不会在乎别人对她的吹捧一样！
E: Listen up, I don't care what anyone says about me behind my back. Just like Lesley doesn't care what people say about her!

C: 感觉好像有点凶哦？
E: That seems kind of blunt.

C: 哈哈，你肯定是没机会和埃美丽小姐说上话对不对？人总是用最恶意的常识揣测未知。
E: Haha, you definitely haven't had the chance to talk to Miss Emily, right? People always assume the worst for things they don't know.

C: 可不敢瞎动手！
E: I won't dare to take them apart without knowing what I'm doing!

C: 我就知道你想使唤我…
E: I knew it. You just want me to run errands again...

C: 加班确实不对劲。
E: Doing overtime is definitely weird.

C: 啊，你是谁？抱歉，让你看到我现在这个样子。不过你是这段时间以来，第一个主动向我搭话的人。
E: Huh, who are you? Sorry that you had to see me like this... But you are the first person who actually spoke to me recently.

C: 哦，有关人选的问题，我觉得还是应该缩小一下范围，免得你找上些于我无益的闲杂人士。
E: Oh, regarding the candidates, I think it would be better to narrow the scope down before you bring in some randos who are of no use to me.

C: 啊？
E: What?

C: 来吧，来歌德宾馆的大堂找我。该让你看到华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀不一样的一面了。
E: Come and meet me in the lobby of the Goethe Hotel. It's time to show you a different side of me.

C: 拍完了？让我看看……
E: Done? Let's have a look...

C: 哎哟，我跟你说这么多干嘛？行了行了，任务结了，报酬也领了——要是没有别的事，各位就请回吧！
E: Wait, why am I telling you so much? The mission is over and you have your reward. If there's nothing else, please leave!

C: 嘿嘿，小事小事！只要伊蕾恩姐姐帮我们把鼹鼠党的英勇事迹宣传出去就好啦。
E: Hehe, don't mention it! But you can spread the word about the heroic deeds of The Moles.

C: 呼…今天的任务也顺利完成啦！有歌蒂阿姨帮忙，用不了几天，鼹鼠党就能取代「地火」，成为下层区最受欢迎的组织了吧？
E: Phew... Today's mission accomplished! With Ms. Gertie's help, The Moles will be able to replace Wildfire soon and become the most popular organization in the Underworld, right?

C: 谢谢你，孩子…还有你，年轻人。要是没有你们，这头晕的毛病怕不是要把我折磨个半死…唉……
E: Thank you, kid... And you, young one. My head would be torn apart by the dizziness without your help... *sigh*

C: 信？
E: Letter?

C: 欸？你们认识我老爸？
E: Eh? You guys know my father?

C: 这算是之的回礼吗？没想到老爸他这么细心…妈妈知道了肯定也会很开心的。
E: This must be a return present. I didn't expect Dad to be this thoughtful... Mom would be very happy too when she sees these pretty flowers.

C: 一样多。
E: Both have the same amount.

C: 还要答题？
E: More questions?

C: 请您放心吧，我会请示上级，接收您的论文。请稍安勿躁，之后曼娅小姐会通知您的。
E: Don't worry. I will ask my superiors to accept your paper. Please hold on, and Ms. Manya will notify you in time.

C: 埃里克。
E: Eric.

C: 对不起…
E: Sorry...

C: 哈哈，您这句话我每天都要听上好几遍。毕竟大部分人考试发挥失常的时候，都觉得问题不出在自己身上。不过嘛……
E: Hahaha, now that's a sentence I have to put up with daily — and often. Most students underperforming in examinations fail to place the blame on themselves. And yet...

C: 我想接受测验。
E: Yeah. I wanna take the quiz.

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 先去花店问问吧~小女子听说，塔米拉小姐每周都要买几束鲜花，装点自己的房间…哎，真是风雅啊。
E: Go to the florist first~ I heard Tamila buys a few bouquets of flowers every week for her room... *sigh* how elegant~!

C: 但这也是常有的事…人总会在某个时刻遭遇到一本无可替代的书，有时候这和那本书无关，只关乎这位读者的心境。
E: But that's pretty common... At some point, everyone finds that one book that is irreplaceable. Sometimes it has nothing to do with the book, but rather the reader's state of mind.

C: 唔，如果是像《歌德宾馆的夜与雾》那样的书…恐怕我还没找到适合你的……
E: Well, if it's something similar to Evening Ember at the Goethe Hotel that you're after, I'm afraid I've got nothing for you...

C: 能不能请你亲眼看一看，塔米拉小姐在舞台下的样子呢？
E: Could you please go and see for yourself how Tamila looks when she's offstage?

C: 呃…那个啥，你是叫{NICKNAME}是吧？谢谢你替我解围。你要是真认识老歌德的话，能帮我跟他转达下情况不？就说我晚点去找他。
E: Um... You are {NICKNAME}, right? Thank you for helping me out. If you know Old Goethe, can you tell him what happened? Tell him I'll see him later.

C: 还有…这是我的一点心意，请收下吧！
E: And... this is a small reward. Please take it!

C: 现在能说说为什么要拍照了吧？
E: Can you tell me now why you want a photo?

C: 老歌德说还得二十分钟，我们先等着吧。
E: He says it'll take about <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes. Let's wait.

C: 不，你更像是幽灵。
E: No, you are more like a ghost.

C: 声音…我听不见声音了…你们在哪儿……
E: Voice... I can't hear your voice... Where are you?

C: （既然决定将漂流瓶扔回去，还是装点什么进去吧……）
E: (Since I have decided to throw the drift bottle back, I should probably put something in...)

C: 你明白了，这位落难者需要的从来不是「陌生人的建议」，而是一种「认同感」。
E: You come to understand that what this castaway seeks is never advice from a stranger, but validation and approval.

C: …这也许是「欢愉」命途的体现。至少在当下，你走在「欢愉」的命途上。下次去模拟宇宙的时候，试试「欢愉」开局如何？
E: ...Perhaps this is a manifestation of the Path of Elation. At least, for now, you are ambling on the Path of Elation. How about trying out Elation at the start of your next Simulated Universe run?

C: 嗯…我当初也觉得挺好喝，色泽上看也很有噱头，反倒把「烈焰浓茶」的金字招牌抛之脑后了。
E: Yeah... I thought it tasted good and had a unique look, but now that you mention it, it really doesn't have anything to do with Flaming Potent Tea.

C: 这果然是货真价实的「烈焰浓茶」，虽然你尚未知晓杜老板究竟在里头加了什么配料，但那霸道的辛辣与刺激感直冲你的天灵盖。
E: While you have no idea what ingredients Boss Du added, you are certain that this is the authentic Flaming Potent Tea as its overwhelming spice and burn go straight to your brain.

C: 挂在墙上的车厢令你们心情复杂，但既然事已至此，「开拓」前行吧！正如仙舟经典相声所言——车到山前必有路，船撞桥头自然沉——好像不太对。
E: The carriage hanging off the wall causes some turmoil within you, but since it's come to this, keep on "trailblazing"! As they say in classic Xianzhou's crosstalk: A road will appear when the car arrives before the mountain, and a boat will naturally sink when it hits the bridge... Hang on, that didn't sound right.

C: 将自己的命运交托给某种外部的事物——仔细想来，一切文明之中似乎都会产生这种现象。一个人在孤独的宇宙中确实无法独自生活下去…至少也需要把自己的后背交付给某个朋友。
E: To entrust your own fate to an external factor... On further contemplation, such phenomena apparently occur within all civilizations. A lone person in the universe is certainly incapable of survival... They will at least need one trustworthy friend to have their back.

C: 此处视野开阔、幽静隐蔽，分明是盗贼理想的望风点，情侣最爱的约会地。
E: The view here is sweeping, quiet and concealed, an ideal vantage point for a thief, and the best place for lovers on a date.

C: 你决定将今日之举当作与三月七的谈资。
E: You decide to use today's experience as a conversation topic with March 7th.

C: 碎裂的雕塑真能恢复如初吗？你很想亲自检验它的强度。并且，机会似乎就在你的眼前。
E: Can a shattered sculpture truly be made whole again? You're keen to test its resilience, and the chance may just be at hand.

C: 当你们还在统治美丽的世界，还在领着那一代幸福的人。
E: When you are still ruling this beautiful world, when you're leading the happy people of that generation.

C: 倘若还有眼泪，命运也会为自己的荒凉悲恸。
E: If there were tears, destiny would grieve for its desolation.

C: 被拯救的人民留住你的的荣光，在每个{RUBY_B#清晨}明晰时{RUBY_E#}传唱：
E: The rescued people retained your honor, and chant during every {RUBY_B#dawn}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#}:

C: 纵世代破碎纷乱，此处传承不断，文明之火将续延。
E: The times may be tumultuous, but the legacy is passed down, and the fire of civilization keeps burning.

C: 是的，它们旧梦未泯——
E: Yes, their old dreams have not faded —

C: 朕知道你在想什么——歌耳戈，像她这般坚定善战的斗士，绝不会坐视我们将迈德漠斯杀死。
E: I know what you are thinking... A determined and talented warrior like Gorgo will not simply sit back and watch as we take Mydeimos' life.

C: 你记住了「律法、权衡与一场辩驳的故事」
E: You remembered the "tale of Law, Balancing, and a Debate."

C: 你记住了「曾倾听过利波吟唱的诗篇」
E: You remembered "Listening to Lipos Singing Poems."

C: 正如你所见。别太在意，无聊的门户之争罢了。
E: As you can see. Pay no mind — it's just a tedious rivalry of schools.

C: 就只能把火种托付给那个女人了。
E: I have no choice but to entrust the Coreflame to that woman.

C: 这座圣烛的在火炬形状的顶部装置下，是几道树枝般向上盘旋的金属支柱。细看之下，支柱上刻着{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神徽。
E: Beneath the torch-shaped device at the top of this holy candle stand several metal pillars that spiral upward like tree branches. Upon closer inspection, one can see the divine emblems of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: 我经历过「浪漫」尚未蒙尘的时代、知晓茧的构造，便试着用金丝为它们复刻那一方庇护所——也就是你所看到的这些虫躯。
E: I lived through an era when "Romance" was yet untainted and knew the cocoon's structure. Thus, I attempted to replicate that shelter for them using the golden threads — what you see now as these insect bodies.

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>启蒙王座的背后</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>behind the Luminary Throne</color>...

C: 解读…揭露…感谢……
E: Deciphering... revealing... thank you...

C: 我们的心念合一！
E: With united hearts and minds!

C: 你的领导是？
E: Who's your boss?

C: o((-'ω´-  )o「哦哦？有所领悟！这样的话，就可以拥有——」)∋
E: o((-'ω´-  )o "Ooh? I get it! That way, I will have—" )∋

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「那本豹就来考考你欧：云羊乳和石榴汁双拼羊乳，你会选择——」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "Then let me present you with a little quiz. Which is your choice — cloudsheep milk or pomegranate juice and milk mix?" )∋

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「最后一题！石榴汁双拼羊乳和巨无霸双拼肉饼，你会选择——」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "Last question! Pomegranate juice and milk mix versus the supreme patty blend pie, your choice is—" )∋

C: 奇怪，我也又跟着来了…
E: Odd, I'm also back here again...

C: 最快的办法…就是把自己也镌刻进天象画壁，与艾格勒融为一体，支撑起天空……
E: The quickest way... is to insert myself into the mural, merge with Aquila, and support the Sky...

C: 巴特鲁斯，你好端端藏墙里干嘛？
E: Bartholos, why are you hiding in the wall?

C: 大工匠，我们感谢你雪中送炭。只是，你现在的身体状况，实在不适合以战士的身份留在这里啊。
E: Grand Craftsman, we're grateful for your timely help. But... your current condition isn't suited for you to stay here as a warrior.

C: 将战事托付给你，我们很惭愧。但…请你替我们带领卫士与黑潮战斗吧！
E: I'm sorry for entrusting the battle to you, but... please lead the guards to fight against the black tide!

C: 驾驭大地兽向世界末日的最后一个黄昏奔去，留给翁法罗斯一个背影、一段传说，是个足够浪漫的好主意。
E: Riding a dromas into the last sunset of the world, leaving Amphoreus with only a legend and a silhouette from behind — sounds romantic enough.

C: 她总是独自承受……
E: She always bears the burden alone...

C: 或许这座小村庄确实有「岁月」的庇护，不然它怎么会像是完全不受岁月侵蚀一样？
E: Maybe this tiny village really is under the protection of "Time." How else could it remain so perfectly preserved against the ravages of time?

C: 看我把黑潮造物给推进冥河里。
E: See how I shove Black Tide Creatures into the River of Souls.

C: 「诚实的孩子，如果我有怪物就给你发怪物了。」
E: "What an honest child. If I had a monster to give, I would offer it to you."

C: 桀桀桀！你上当啦！根本没有人被关进去！传说，这雅努斯的神驹里锁着非凡的宝贝，老巴特鲁斯拿它无可奈何，就等着你这样的翻飞控制员来把它打碎呢！
E: Hehehehe! You fell for it! No one's locked in there! The legend says there's a treasure hidden inside this divine foal of Janus. Bartholos couldn't do a thing about it — he was just waiting for a Whimsy controller like you to smash it to pieces!

C: 流淌金血的英雄们，曾怀着野望启航——而他们的坟茔却只是一艘沉船，冰冷的海水冲淡一腔热血海，谎言将忠诚埋葬。
E: Heroes of golden blood once set sail, their hearts ablaze with ambition... only to find their graves in a sunken wreck, their passion washed away by icy seawater, their loyalty buried beneath lies.

C: 「断锋爵」拉比努斯，生于光历<unbreak>3743</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
E: "Dux Fragoris" Labienus. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3743</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

C: 不过那都不重要，老友，告诉我，还有什么需要我为你做的？
E: But none of that matters, old friend. Tell me, what else can I do for you?

C: 老友，你能想象吗？那里也有一片高山，一片原野，无数的生灵在那里奔跑。
E: My old friend, can you imagine? There's mountains and plains there too, with countless creatures running free.

C: 再…往上…一步…
E: Just... one more... step...

C: 关键词是「黑塔」和「光锥」——你在与上述概念接触时，植入了「记忆」、「流光忆庭」与「窃忆者」。
E: Some keywords and hints to your question: Herta and Light Cone — when you came in contact with them, the concept of Remembrance, Garden of Recollection, and Memosnatcher were implanted in you.

C: 我不相信你。
E: I don't trust you.

C: 还能再组织一次禁区演练吗？
E: Can we put together another round of restricted zone drills?

C: 你可别放松警惕，这活绝对不轻松。我只是不习惯在出战前把气氛搞得太压抑罢了。
E: Whatever you do, don't let your guard down. This ain't gonna be easy. I'm not really the best at delivering serious pre-combat pep talks.

C: 好的，希望你能在那里感受到公司的诚意。
E: Very well, I hope that your visit shows you the sincere intentions of the IPC.

C: （梦里会有佩佩吗？）
E: (Do you think I'd be in your dream?)

C: （没办法，只能这么回报给小姐再处理了。）
E: (There's no other way. I'll have to report this to Missy first.)

C: 熟悉的场景……
E: Feeling déjà vu...

C: （事不宜迟，走吧！）
E: (Time is of the essence. Let's go!)

C: 我不清楚你们究竟看不惯我哪一点，但是我从阮•梅女士身上学到了待人的耐心，有什么质疑，尽管放马过来，咱们一条条辩清楚！
E: I am unsure what is it about me that you dislike, but I've learned patience from Miss Ruan Mei. If you have a problem, then let it be known. Let's hash it out one by one!

C: （{NICKNAME}你该知道吧，那可是单手可取末日兽头颅的大能！）
E: (You should know {NICKNAME} — the one who has the power to single-handedly take on the Doomsday Beast!)

C: 要花时间构思的。
E: Great tales take time to craft.

C: 我「悄」咪咪？
E: My "Memoir"?

C: {NICKNAME}总是这么乐观，让人家很安心呢。
E: You're always so optimistic, {NICKNAME} — it really puts me at ease.

C: 我也没说过一定没有。
E: I didn't necessarily say there wouldn't be any.

C: （但是这怎么看都只是鹤运物流的广告牌啊……）
E: (But why does this just look like a billboard for Heron Express...)

C: 我要把匹诺康尼烧成灰！
E: I'm going to burn Penacony down to ashes!

C: 了解了，如果你还想接着占算，我会在授事厅等着你。
E: Understood. If you want to run some more divinations again, I'll be in the Conclave Hall.

C: 可恶啊！你…你这用阴谋诡计侥幸获胜的…小人…嗯，你好像没有用阴谋诡计……
E: Damnation! You... you feckless, insidious little... to obtain victory through such conniving... oh, you don't seem to have used any dastardly tricks to win...

C: 有多厉害？
E: How much harder is it?

C: 你去拿奖励吧。
E: Go fetch your reward.

C: 我们商量个事情，为了不让我在岁阳朋友面前抬不起头来，你可不可以假装输给我？
E: Hey, can we discuss something? Can you pretend to throw a match so I can get keep my dignity before my heliobi friends?

C: 在牢里开发不需要和别人开那些没完没了的会，也不用加班，自己想做就做，想休息就休息，也没有什么死线压力，真是太美妙了。
E: In fact, it's oddly liberating to develop games in prison. No more endless meetings or overtime. I have the freedom to develop at my own pace, taking breaks whenever necessary, and being free from the relentless pressure of meeting deadlines.

C: 戳一下就过关的那种！
E: The level where you can clear the stage with a quick press!

C: 哇，是个不错的结果！上次有学生占卜出这个，两三天就把毕业设计做出来了！
E: Woah, a decent result! A student got this result previously, and then knocked out his graduation design within days!

C: 好棒嗡！根本难不倒你嗡…难道你是天才嗡？
E: Excellent like a butterfly! This puzzle isn't a walk in the park... Are you a genius?

C: 嗯…有位织者漂泊在外，思乡心切。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>厅堂角落的堆积货箱中</color>等待同伴的消息。去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is wandering and longing for its homeland. The golden thread brings tidings: They now wait for news of their companions <color=#dbc291ff>in the stacked crates in the corner of the hall</color>. Go there and seek them.

C: 嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
E: Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.

C: <unbreak>11</unbreak>盆。
E: Eleven flames.

C: 巴特鲁斯，别装了！
E: Quit pretending, Bartholos!

C: 抱歉不知晓您的身份，多有得罪。我找到这位墨涅塔的织者，也只是想求助于它的智慧。您找它一定更有要事，就先交还于您吧！
E: I apologize for not recognizing you, please forgive me. I sought this weaver of Mnestia simply to seek its wisdom. If you have more urgent business, please go ahead!

C: 我好像还听到了大地深处的嗫嚅，声音沙哑，语句零碎…其中的蕴意，我甚至不敢转述。您最好也尽快离开吧！
E: I thought I also heard halting whispers from the depths of the earth, its voice husky, words faltering... I don't even dare mention what they may mean. You'd better get out of here fast!

C: 就、就算我初来乍到，也不是谁都可以随便欺负的！
E: E—Even if I'm new around here, I'm not to be trifled with!

C: 塞纳托斯于是又说：「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，您能偷盗世界上一切东西，唯独偷不到一件。瑟希斯的秘果，高悬在树庭之上，您能如何品尝到它呢？」
E: So Thanatos said again: "Bartholos, O Bartholos, you can steal everything beneath the sky, except for one thing: Cerces' secret fruit, perched atop the Grove. How would you even be able to taste it?"

C: 扎格列斯老祖的第一课。
E: That's ancestor Zagreus' first lesson.

C: 塞纳托斯听了哈哈大笑：「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，你上当了！我吩咐了岩隙的水流、翻墨的乌云，放下了这两颗暗藏『死之核』的果实。」
E: Hearing this, Thanatos laughed aloud: "Bartholos, O Bartholos, you have been fooled! I have summoned the currents from craggy crevices, and the clouds of roiling dark to drop these two fruits bearing the 'Core of Death'."

C: 太可怕了，这家伙！我鼓起勇气回应——
E: That was so frightening! I mustered my courage and replied...

C: 帮我把其他密径也都解了。
E: Solve all the other Hidden Passages for me too.

C: 吾乃巴特鲁斯大人之分身，在此恭候多时，陪您享受游戏。
E: I am Lord Bartholos' projection, dutifully waiting here to entertain thee with this game.

C: 别误会——第一，咱就是货真价实的巴特鲁斯；第二，货真价实的巴特鲁斯，在「正常时间」中，也确实不会出现在此时此刻的哀丽秘榭。
E: Don't get it twisted — first, I am the one and only real Bartholos. Second, the real Bartholos truly wouldn't be in Aedes Elysiae right now, "normally."

C: 黎明机器的真相？那个我知道。
E: You mean the truth about the Dawn Device? Already heard that one.

C: 不过，咱在这里特意埋伏你，倒也不只是为了贫嘴。你是不是有个水盆不小心忘在过去了？贴心的巴特鲁斯这就把它还你，桀桀桀桀……
E: But I didn't lie in wait just to run my mouth. Did you happen to leave behind a basin in the past? Lucky for you, Bartholos is as thoughtful to return it, hehehehe...

C: 感谢阁下。请稍等，我可以把它插入自己的身体，读取计算结果。
E: Thank you so much. Please wait a moment. I'll plug it into my system to read the results.

C: 说起来。之前来古士爷爷的说法，让我产生了一种感觉——
E: You know, Mr. Lygus's earlier remarks gave me a certain impression—

C: 我是最初且最后的替罪羊。8是一个神圣的数字：你可以用8个战利品在我这里换到额外一步的机会。
E: I am the first and the final scapegoat. Eight is a sacred number: with 8 trophies, you may trade for one extra step here.

C: 啊，原来是祭司大人！家父已经失智许久了，请告诉我，在哪里能寻回他的智慧？
E: Ah, you're the priest! My father has been senile for a long time now. Please, tell me, where can I find his wisdom?

C: 金卷。
E: The Golden Scroll.

C: 这份工作至关重要，推演时，执笔者必须维持全神贯注的状态，否则不但会影响溯寻的结果，还可能令仪式本身变得意外频频。
E: This task is crucial. During extrapolation, the scribe must maintain unwavering focus. Otherwise, not only will the results be affected, but the ceremony itself might become fraught with unexpected issues.

C: 让我们来看看。{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——
E: Let's see. O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —

C: 哗啦，完蛋。我可教不了你。再见，很高兴认识你。
E: *whoosh* We're doomed. I can't teach you. Goodbye, it was nice meeting you.

C: 打开第一层了。接下来的秘术锁可能会越来越复杂，请小心应对。
E: The first layer's down. The next ones will only get more complex — stay sharp.

C: 「是的…」那声音说，「均衡……」
E: "Yes..." Said the voice, "Equilibrium..."

C: 好吧，那我换个话题：这个大盒子里装的是啥？
E: Fine, how's this for a subject — what's in the box?

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: 要知道，星神毫无自由意志，除了命途之外别无所想。因此我们提问的时候，祂们根本不予理睬…即使螺丝咕姆给每个星神都做了份虚拟人格，还把社交倾向拉满了也没用。
E: You know, the Aeons have no concept of free will at all. THEY think about nothing but the destined Path. So, when we asked THEM questions, THEY simply ignored us, even when Screwllum gave THEM each a simulated personality and maxed out THEIR social tendency stat.

C: 好好地收集「存护」祝福，行吗？看看能不能让克里珀再出现一回。
E: Be sure to collect Preservation Blessings, okay? See if we can get Qlipoth to visit once more.

C: 「你没事吧，给点反应？」黑塔不满的声音传来，「算了，这样也行，反正总会再遇到祂。」
E: "Are you okay? Talk to me," said Herta with a dissatisfied voice, "well, that's fine. We will meet THEM again."

C: 不能把现实的经验套用在这种敌人身上，换用新的打法吧。
E: You can't apply real-world experience to this kind of enemy. Let's switch up the rules of the game, then.

C: 你凭借巡猎的直觉找到了答案所在的那一页——这是完全空白的一页；这本书从后往前撰写，结局早已注定，而起因却可被任意书写…无论是哪个可怜虫被利用，对棋局都毫无关系。
E: With The Hunt's instinct, you find the page with the answer — it is a blank page. The book is written in reverse chronology, with the ending predetermined. Yet, the cause can be made up arbitrarily. Whoever is the poor soul that is manipulated will have no bearing on the big picture.

C: 是，我恨我爱过的人。
E: Yes, I hate the people I've loved.

C: 「哇——」黑塔两眼发光，像看到钻石，「是『秩序』太一，最古老的星神之一。在祂还未陨落的时代，祂的光辉如同珠石一般圣洁！我说什么来着？这会儿没有纳努克！古老的秩序命途压制着众多灾祸——你确定还要再靠近吗？让我推演下祂的声音。好，来了！」
E: "Wow!" Herta's eyes gleam as though she has just discovered diamonds. "It's Ena the Order, one of the most ancient Aeons. In the times before THEIR fall, THEIR radiance was as holy as gems! What did I say just now? Nanook had yet to exist in this time! The ancient Path of Order suppressed numerous calamities. Are you sure you want to get even closer? Let me simulate THEIR voice. Okay, THEY are coming!"

C: 他手里把玩着一只…*跟屁虫*？无论你如何旋转，它的眼睛都无法与你对视；他会一直注视着你的背面。
E: He is toying with... a *Tagger* in his hand? No matter how you move around, his gaze never meets yours as he always keeps an eye on your back.

C: 看来一些野性的赏金猎人后裔开起了星际酒吧。
E: It seems that a band of fearless bounty hunters have opened an intergalactic bar.

C: 你的手心被它们咬了个窟窿！——你赶紧把它们掸了下来。
E: Their bites leave a hole in your palm! You quickly brush them off.

C: 诸星消亡之刻，浩瀚的星系凝聚成一个个微粒轰然坍塌；它们的哀亡如此壮美，当「贪饕」奥博洛斯张开巨口，吞下无数虫潮时，数十亿微粒的烟尘也同时被纳入腹中——很久很久以后，虚构史学家坐在与世无争的穹顶图书馆内，一笔一笔记录下这些罕为人知的历史。
E: At the demise of the stars, the once-vast star system coalesced into a single particle and collapsed, emanating its final and ultimate radiance. When Oroboros the Voracity opened its huge mouth and consumed countless breeds of the Swarm, the particles and dust of billions of stars were also inhaled into their belly. Eons later, History Fictionologists sat in their vaulted libraries, writing down these histories unknown to the majority.

C: 远行的贡多拉起航了，渴睡的伶人躺在船底，小心地护住沾惹闪粉的忆泡，但后来这艘船诡异地消失了：就像幽灵消失在宇宙的河水里。
E: The gondola set sail, and the drowsy Mourning Actors lay at the bottom deck, carefully guarding the glittering Memory Bubble. But soon, the ship vanished eerily, like a ghost fading into the stream of the universe.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...
