C: 「你什么时候见过她？」黑塔皱了下眉头，但没有深究，「天才俱乐部#81 阮•梅，生物领域的天才。要我引用下公司的评价吗？『阮•梅拥有超人的知觉和思想整合能力，能轻易捕捉现实的微观细节，并于脑内将之统合成信息洪流，并以此进行推演思考。她为人十分低调…』，低调？笑死我啦。」
E: "Have you met her before?" Herta frowns but does not probe. "Genius Society #81, Ruan Mei, a genius in the field of biology. Should I quote the evaluation from the IPC? 'Ruan Mei possesses extraordinary perception and cognitive integration abilities, easily capturing microscopic details of reality and synthesizing them into a torrent of information within her mind, which she uses for deductive thinking. She's very low-key...' Low-key? That's hilarious!"

C: 「当然是我，多可爱。至于你…我还没介绍呢，你怎么就进来了？」黑塔摊手，「天才俱乐部#81 阮•梅，生物领域的天才。要我引用下公司的评价吗？『阮•梅拥有超人的知觉和思想整合能力，能轻易捕捉现实的微观细节，并于脑内将之统合成信息洪流，并以此进行推演思考。她为人十分低调…』，低调？笑死我啦。」
E: "It was me, of course. Aren't they cute? As for you... Why did you come in so soon? I haven't introduced you yet." Herta shrugs and continues, "Genius Society #81, Ruan Mei, a genius in the field of biology. Should I quote the evaluation from the IPC? 'Ruan Mei possesses extraordinary perception and cognitive integration abilities, easily capturing microscopic details of reality and synthesizing them into a torrent of information within her mind, which she uses for deductive thinking. She's very low-key...' Low-key? That's hilarious!"

C: 此刻，连你也未曾想到，这之后，可瑞希特拉博士的秘密研究被柯拉帕乌启动：他曾答应博士永不启用这项机密；而彼时，二者的旧日誓言似乎已成尘土。他敕令手下的有机生命植入一种*拟造的*反有机方程——
E: Even you could not see this coming — Korapao later initiated Prof. Cressitra's secret research, something he promised to never do. At that time, the promise made between the two in the past seemed to have faded into oblivion. Korapao then ordered his organic subordinates to have a synthetic Anti-Organic Equation implanted into them...

C: 一个迷因？
E: A meme?

C: 当权威十足的哈托勒公爵喊出一千万信用点的高价，你果断地暗示同僚们停止起哄，毫不犹豫地敲下锤子。
E: As the influential Duke of Hattler called out a top bid of ten million credits, you signal to your colleagues to quit their calling out and strike the gavel decisively.

C: 你突然有了个好主意，从地上捡起来一颗玻璃球。你把它放进力场发生装置里，赋予它足够的速度，无限接近于光速的小球在其中颤抖，渴望着自由的到来。
E: You suddenly have a wave of inspiration, picking up a glass sphere from the ground. As you place it into the forcefield generator and grant it enough speed, it begins to shake as it infinitely approaches the speed of light, craving its impending freedom.

C: 导师抚摸着你的顶盖。「你在下面好好待着，只要有你在，『他们』就还活着。」
E: The teacher rubs your cover. "You just wait down there. As long as you exist, they will survive."

C: 我不想和你们分开。
E: I don't want to leave you.

C: 火势已经蔓延了过来。你颓然地倒在墙角。一切都被算好了，你自己也身处蝴蝶振翅的『糖果色』风暴里。如果可以的话，你很想拔枪请那老头吃个钢豆，然后问他，这你可曾预见到？——但你已经没有机会了。
E: The fire has already spread to where you stand. You collapse against the wall in despair. This was all calculated. You are already deep inside the candy-colored tornado of the butterfly's flapping wings. If you could, you would give anything to pull out your gun and treat that old man to a dinner of steel beans and ask him: Did you see this coming, too? ...But you will no longer get the opportunity.

C: 很有名？
E: She's famous?

C: 「是『孤波算法』。作为我学术成就的发轫之处，它算得上我引以为傲的成就，之一。」
E: "It's the solitary waves theory. As the starting point of my academic achievements, it can be considered my proudest accomplishment, or at least one of them."

C: 支援的炮舰令天空失色，清算的机械落下，在各大学派的相互攻讦之前，必须掐灭相对认知的火星。你们试图撤出克罗斯特亚，但围剿的军团已将这里堵得水泄不通。
E: As the supporting fire of the cannon ships darken the sky, the liquidation machines fall to the ground. Before the various schools can turn to expose each other's past misdeeds, the spark of Relative Cognition must be extinguished. You attempt to withdraw from Klostia, but the encircling Legion have blocked all escape.

C: <size=36>「要有笑声。」</size>
E: <size=36>"Let there be laughter."</size>

C: 又一个自转周期，异乡的微小生命在你的表皮上涂抹亮色，「凯旋而归」，这是独属于他们文化的花纹，从动作来看，代表亢奋、进食和捕猎的信息。
E: Another sidereal day. A microscopic life form from another land paints colors on your skin. "Triumphant return," it is a pattern unique to their culture. Their movements seem to communicate information on excitement, feeding, and hunting.

C: 虽然他们总做出一些你无法理解的事情，但你的脑蛋白天生不适合处理这种问题。他们在你打造的一颗颗天体上都留下了足迹。而这种足迹会带来更多的子嗣——不过，你也无法处理这样的问题。
E: Although they are constantly doing things that you cannot understand, your brain proteins were not designed to handle problems such as these. They leave footprints on every celestial body you create, and these footprints will bring greater offspring... But this is also a question that you cannot handle.

C: 给你介绍下，来了位客人——公司战略投资部的。
E: This is our guest from the Strategic Investment Department of IPC.

C: 我怀疑，路易斯•弗莱明退居幕后也和他们有关，这就是一段更复杂的故事了……
E: I suspect they had something to do with Louis Fleming's retirement. That's another even more complicated story...

C: 关于「黄金与机械」…
E: About Gold and Gears...

C: 「因为我们信仰『神秘』星神。」他沉吟片刻。
E: "It's because we're believers of the Aeon of Enigmata." He stays silent in deep thought for a moment.

C: 我加入你们的行动。
E: I'll join you.

C: 你遇见了一只三等身人形玩偶，它有稻草般的麻绳头发，肚子上有一个计数器。
E: You encounter a doll whose body is three times as tall as its head. It has straw-like hair made of ropes and a counter on its stomach.

C: 一股冲动上涌，你伸手握住雕像。你感到它在手中变为一只鸟，它的长寿以具象化的形式增生、膨胀，接着，赭红液体从你的指缝里流下来。
E: On the spur of the moment, you wrap your fingers around the sculpture, feeling it transforming into a bird in your hand. Its longevity proliferates and expands in a visualized form. Then, scarlet liquid flows through your fingers.

C: 懂经济学能挣钱吗？
E: Does the knowledge of economics help you earn money?

C: 背带裤…
E: The pair of overalls...

C: 在空荡的星际百货大楼里，一个街机出现在你面前。潮流扭蛋人、以太球和黏土玩偶堆叠在柜窗内，电子音乐和五彩的灯光随着你的到来而亮起。
E: An arcade machine appears in front of you in the deserted Interastral Department Store building. Trendy gachapon figures, ether orbs, and clay dolls are stacked inside the display cabinet. Electronic music and colorful lights come alive as you approach.

C: 完美的开局音乐在你耳边响起……
E: Perfect music that signals the start of the game blares off next to your ears...

C: 这位「永眠领主」双眼紧闭，它看上去沉浸在自己的梦境中。
E: The Lord of Eternal Slumber has both its eyes closed. It seems to be lost in its dreams.

C: 你路过一片布满巨型虫群的栖居地。一只巨型「永眠领主」正在腐殖化王座上沉睡。
E: You pass by a habitat filled by a massive Swarm. A giant Lord of Eternal Slumber is sleeping soundly on a putrefied throne.

C: 你悄悄离开了…你希望身上没有沾上「鏖兜虫」的味道。
E: You walk away quietly, hoping you remain untainted by the scent of the Combatobugs.

C: 事实上，你刚告别一位混沌医师。他的话令你有所深思：「繁育」的虫群只是一群除繁育本能外毫无智能的虫子，究竟是什么人将其改造为这种「神经网络兵器」？
E: In fact, you have just parted ways with a Doctor of Chaos, the words of whom are thought-provoking: The Swarm of Propagation is just a bunch of bugs bereft any true intellect beyond their breeding instincts. Who, then, transformed them into this manner of weaponized neural network?

C: 幼虫在奇物的影响下不断地膨胀、变异，蜕去的外壳一次次地炸开，直到整片丛林的天空都被它遮蔽。
E: The larva continues to swell and mutate under the influence of the Curio, its molted shell exploding again and again until the entire jungle sky is covered up by it.

C: 老翁从金属巨构上取下两块零件，郑重地交到你的手里，密集的方程式将你的认知篡改，强烈的回响令你头痛欲裂
E: The old man takes two parts from the metal behemoth and hands them over to you solemnly. A plethora of equations alters your cognition, their intense reverberations causing your head to split.

C: 你坐在阴暗的帐篷里，耳畔是迪斯普夜市的刺耳喧嚣，催人入睡的香薰，过低的星球重力，都让你不由地感到头重脚轻。
E: You are sitting in a dim tent. The ear-piercing noise from the Dispo Night Market, the lulling scent of the incense, and the exceedingly low gravity of the planet leave you feeling lightheaded.

C: 你产生了一种错觉，不是自己在嚼糖果，是糖果在嘴巴里嚼你。
E: You suddenly have a strange vision in your mind that it isn't you who is chewing the candy — it's the candy that is chewing you.

C: 你的思维凝滞，脑海中浮现出上一届亚军被等离子菠萝瞬间蒸发的影像。
E: Your brain freezes as images of the last runner-up being evaporated by a plasma pineapple rush through your mind.

C: 你走进冉比希星的地下据点，大量武器和垃圾桶随着生产管线从天而降，冉比希三世骑在战马之上，威严比起塔塔洛夫有增无减。
E: You enter the underground stronghold of the Rumbas system. A large number of weapons and trashcans fall from the production pipeline. Rumbas the Third rides atop his horse, displaying his authority that rivals Tatalov, undiminishing and ever-burgeoning.

C: 「模拟信息素，就连塔伊兹育罗斯来了都分不出真假。」同行的学士兴致高昂，让你不由担心，他和虫群哪一个更具危害性。
E: "Not even Tayzzyronth could detect whether these simulated pheromones were genuine or not." The scholar by your side is in such high spirits that you can't help but worry if they could be an even greater threat to your safety than the Swarm itself.

C: 人们在观众席上打成一团，你抽出球棒，面前的暴徒立刻交出钱包，向你跪地求饶。
E: The spectators in the stands have started brawling. You pull out your baseball bat, and the thugs before you start to hand over their wallets, dropping to their knees and begging for mercy.

C: 由于大多数人都押中了这艘船，你的收获不能说没有，只能说比空气多一点。
E: Since most people bet on that ship, you didn't end up completely empty-handed, just somewhat empty-handed.

C: 你在无笑话兽的肚子里奋力游动，漫无边际的冷漠海洋上，由无幽默粒子组成的胃液卷起浪花，呛进你的鼻腔。
E: You use every ounce of your strength to swim in the belly of the Jokeless Beast. Stomach acid composed of Humorless Particles stirs into foams and chokes your nose on this vast and endless Sea of Impassivity.

C: 「知道在哪儿就简简简单了。」醉意未除的愚者走向船尾，面具在顷刻间反复变换，骤然加速的愚人船在胃液上激起巨浪。
E: "It gets e-e-easy once I know where we are." The still inebriated Fool walks towards the stern. His mask switches repeatedly in the blink of an eye. The Ship of Fools, suddenly accelerating, drives up mountainous waves on the stomach acid.

C: 你还要继续下潜吗？
E: Do you want to continue diving?

C: 男人瑟瑟发抖地举起长矛，像只受惊的刺猬。
E: The man shakingly raises his spear, like a startled hedgehog.

C: 百无聊赖的妖怪凝滞在纸上，等待有人重新把它画出来，以「幻造」赋予其实体。
E: A monster lingers motionless on the paper, languishing in anticipation for someone to bring it back to life and grant it a tangible form through manifestation.

C: 一定是太久没有创作，有所生疏。但凡让你再苦练一首歌的时间，区区小画，不足挂齿。
E: You're just rusty from not creating for so long. But it does not seem worth it to practice for the duration of a song for such a small painting.

C: 草地的湿润与泥土的香气，都在告诉你，危险已离你远去。你张开双臂，手却骤然触摸到一块冰凉的东西。
E: The dampness of the grass, the fragrance of the earth... they all tell you that danger is far behind you. You stretch your arms, only for your hands to abruptly touch something cold.

C: 在简陋的船身被挤压至崩裂前，你必须做点什么，从沉没的结局中逃离。
E: Before the fragile boat is crushed under the pressure, you have to do something and escape a watery grave.

C: 忍耐不住的眷属们竞相跃入海中，争抢蜜酿，因歌声而来的鱼群也彼此归去。你小心翼翼地驶过礁石，在烂醉如泥的眷属中央，大海的宝藏正熠熠生辉。
E: The Titankins, unable to resist, leap into the sea and scramble for the honey brew, while the fish drawn by song return whence they come. You carefully steer past the rocks — amidst the drunken throng of Titankins, the treasures of the sea sparkle with radiance.

C: 「欧洛尼斯在上，我们愿以身外的所有，换取自己的生命。在僭主因愤怒将我们推上行刑台前，请您以奇迹拯救卑微的信徒。」你们将财物都放上托盘，甚至连镶金的假牙也不放过。
E: "Oronyx above, we offer all we have in exchange for our lives. Before the tyrant pushes us onto the gallows in their wrath, may you grant us a miracle to deliver us, your humbled disciples." You all place your worldly possessions on the tray, even gold teeth.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 但没人能胜过神明。
E: But no mortal can outpace a god.

C: 它潜藏在一年的终末，机缘月的最后一日。待到所有的泰坦都已出行，才偷偷跟在雅努斯的身后，翻转指引的门径。
E: It lurks at the year's end, on the last day of the Month of Fortune. Once all Titans have departed, it secretly follows Janus, reversing the guiding paths.

C: 传说，扎格列斯的宝藏早已被搬运一空，那盗贼在抢夺宝藏时误杀了神明。传说，扎格列斯根本就没有宝藏，它拿到多少就花掉多少。
E: Legend has it that Zagreus' treasure was spirited away long ago, the thief accidentally killing a deity in his greed. Another tale contends that Zagreus never had any treasure, as they spent everything they obtained just as quickly.

C: 还有些被死亡所摈弃的狂人，他们或是在欺骗泰坦后遭受惩罚，或是在跃入冥河后，得到了肉体的不朽。身获不死的诅咒者，只能在冥河边缘，苦苦哀求神明，直到塞纳托斯在某日生出恻隐之心。
E: There are also madmen abandoned by death, punished for deceiving the Titan, or cursed with immortality after diving into the river. These undying cursed souls linger on the river's edge, begging the god for mercy, waiting for the rare compassion of Thanatos.

C: 传说，扎格列斯曾偷走这瓶蜜酿，试图在宴会上毒死刻法勒，但全知的神明却用计倒换了金杯，令它自食苦果。
E: Legend has it that Zagreus once stole this honey brew to poison Kephale at a banquet, but the all-knowing gods outwitted them, swapping the golden goblets and forcing Zagreus to reap what they sowed.

C: 它们有的比堡垒还高大，有的长着两颗心脏和九个头颅，牙齿可以咬碎宝剑，尾巴能够刺穿磐石。
E: Some are taller than fortresses, some have two hearts and nine heads, some have teeth that can shatter swords, and tails that pierce stone.

C: 神明恍然大悟。
E: The god had an epiphany.

C: 命运的果实膨胀，高悬在枝头，塔兰顿发出轻柔的呼吸。但漆黑的丝线杂乱无序，纠缠不清，如刀刃割裂泰坦的神体。
E: The fruit of fate swells, suspended high, as Talanton breathes softly. Yet, the chaotic black threads are entangled and unclear, slicing through the Titan like blades.

C: 警用飞车穿越如织的无人机运输带，稳稳停在三千层摩天大楼的屋顶上，距离报案已经过去了整整7分钟，身为「高危生物处理专员」的你才匆匆赶到案发现场。
E: The police aircar weaves through the tangled lanes of drone traffic, touching down smoothly atop a three-thousand-story skyscraper. Seven minutes have passed since the emergency call, and as a High-Risk Biohazard Disposal Specialist, you've finally made it to the crime scene.

C: 你已经想好了，回到地面上要重新开家棉花糖店，这辈子再也不碰飞行器了。
E: Your mind is set. Once your feet touch solid ground again, you're reopening a cotton candy shop. And you're swearing off flying for good.

C: 你还要继续抬升吗？
E: Do you ascend further?

C: 「也罢，神悟树庭如此不识人才，不加入也罢。」说着说着你的眼角有泪划过……
E: "So be it. If the Grove of Epiphany can't recognize true genius, then I want no part of them." You say the words with defiance... but as you do, a lone tear betrays you, sliding down your cheek.

C: 山羊学派的评委应该会对这个成果感兴趣，但是标题似乎不太行，奇美拉有「产后」这个说法么？
E: The Caprism reviewer might find this particular outcome intriguing... but the title? A bit questionable. Do chimeras even have postnatal physiology?

C: 欧洛尼斯的所有预言中，仅仅只有一个还未验证，那便是关于翁法罗斯未来的走向。
E: Of all Oronyx's prophecies, only one remains unfulfilled, and that is the foretelling of Amphoreus' ultimate fate.

C: 我也很好奇预言的内容。
E: I'm curious about the prophecy, too.

C: 再后来，预言的颁布间隔越来越长，甚至苦苦等待数年，也只能换来它的只言片语。
E: Later, the intervals between prophecies stretched longer. Years of desperate waiting might yield only a handful of broken phrases.

C: 愿每个雨夜都能安眠。
E: May we sleep soundly on every rain-sodden night.

C: 他们忐忑不安地祈求瑟希斯的垂怜，一边拈去一片花瓣，深恐那拒绝的琥珀会将他们封入无望的深渊。
E: Anxiously, they would pray for Cerces's mercy, plucking petals one by one, deeply fearing that the amber of rejection would seal them in an abyss of hopelessness.

C: 「请您不要生气。当星夜降临，造物需要您的庇护，才能安然休憩。」
E: "Please, do not be angered. When the stars rise, my creations will need your protection, so they may rest in peace."

C: 废纸躺在光洁的地板上，你捡起看了看，上面尽是无意义的线条。
E: You glance at a piece of scrap paper lying on the polished floor. It's full of meaningless lines.

C: 别慌，听我慢慢跟你讲解。
E: Don't panic, I'll explain it all to you slowly.

C: 呃，那我就直说了。
E: Okay, I'll cut to the chase.

C: 你计算了下损坏奇物的赔偿金，你认为那将是天文数字，于是你悻悻地收回了手。
E: You calculate the compensation that would be owed for damaging a Curio, which is an astronomical sum. You resentfully withdraw your hand.

C: 再次见到这个宝箱，炽热浓烈的本能在你胸腔间不断升腾，但你知道这是有主之物，在道德的痛苦与压抑下，想要开启宝箱的欲念无奈地喑哑。
E: That fiery, strong instinct rises up in you once more as you see this chest again, but you know the chest already has an owner. The desire to open it is helplessly strangled in the midst of moral pain and repression.

C: 只有单身太久的人才会胡思乱想，你毫不客气地裁定了作者的情感状况。
E: Only someone who's remained single for a long time could be so full of nonsense. You mercilessly determine the author's emotional state.

C: 哎哟，那叫一个刺激劲爆！这空间站看着人不是很多，但这人与人之间的事儿啊…那叫一个，五彩缤纷！
E: Wow, now that's a blast! This space station doesn't seem to have many people aboard, but the human interactions are... well, ferociously intense!

C: 「呃…我看看，」你用小小的手掌握着太空笔，笔尖从表格的顶端自上而下，「<unbreak>27</unbreak>次？」你咕哝着。「嗯，<unbreak>27</unbreak>次。」你舔舔嘴唇。其实你还不太能认字。
E: "Um... Let me see..." Holding a space pen in your small palm, you trace at the form from top to bottom with the tip of the pen. "<unbreak>27</unbreak> times, I guess?" You mutter. "Yes, <unbreak>27</unbreak> times." You lick your lips. Actually, you are not quite literate yet.

C: 「哇哦。」他看着你，表情显得有些不可思议：「真没想到…你还是个演讲家。」
E: "Wow." He stares at you with an incredulous expression. "I didn't know you were so articulate."

C: 不要挤，要守秩序。
E: Don't crowd around, have some order.

C: 旁边那位——对，就是正被粉丝团团围住的那个红头发少年——可是连续二十七届搏击擂主挑战赛的冠军，「熔锤镇的卢卡」！
E: That guy - yes, that red-haired boy surrounded by fans - is the <unbreak>27</unbreak>-time champion of the Fighting King Challenge, "Luka of Moltammerville"!

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: …到此为止吧。你实在是不想再听到她发表任何有关寄生虫和排泄物的隐喻了。可正当你意图下达逐客令时，却发觉大厅猛烈摇晃了起来，天花板也开始坍塌——
E: ...Time to end the conversation. You have no more interest in listening to her allusions to parasites and excrement. Just as you are about to order her to leave, you feel the hall sway violently. The ceiling begins to collapse.

C: 突然，你的感觉球似乎捕捉到了什么：一种芬芳的、诱人的味道——那究竟是什么？会不会很好吃？你的胃丝开始兴奋地战栗——你已经等不及了……
E: All of a sudden, your sensory orb seems to pick up something — something fragrant, a scent that draws you in. What could it be? Is it something delicious? The filaments in your stomach tremble with excitement. You can't wait anymore...

C: 你离开温暖的被窝。掀开窗帘，景致果然与你感应一致。看来你还没有老。你又转身，向那台老电视投出一道灵能波。电视应声启动——现在正播放午间天气预报。
E: You leave your warm blankets and pull open the curtains, greeted by a landscape that matches what you've sensed. Looks like you are not old yet. You turn toward the aged TV and direct a psychic energy beam toward it. The TV lights up in response. The midday weather forecast is on.

C: 这里似乎没有更多若虫了…去告诉衣匠吧。
E: There are seemingly no other nymphs here... Let's tell the Garmentmaker.

C: 哈哈…它们发现不了我……
E: Haha... they'll never find me...

C: 直视深渊，如同直视那位不可提及名字的霾中之影…究竟何时，它才愿将尘世的幸福归还于我们？
E: Gazing into the abyss is like staring into that hazy shadow, the one that must not be named... When will they finally return to us the joy of the mundane world?

C: 你说的有点道理。我要是能搞到「冷面小青龙」的签名就好了……
E: You've got a point. If only I could get my hands on Cold Dragon Young's autograph...
*barfs*...

C: 哦，对了…我这儿还准备了一些特别的小礼品，请您一并收下！
E: Oh, right... I prepared a few special gifts for you. Here you go!

C: 哦…你也是来试运气的吗？
E: Ah... Are you here to try your luck, too?

C: 但那个宝箱还在旁边，哪儿都没去。那个可能藏匿着「不幸」的容器……
E: But the chest is still there. It hasn't gone anywhere. There it is, a container that conceals bad luck...

C: （继续不说话装高手）
E: (Remain silent and act like a professional.)

C: 这是一把电吉他。或者，用机械屋主人的话来说——「超电磁流射演奏器」。
E: This is an electric guitar or, as a workshop master would say, a "super electromagnetic flux player."

C: 我确实是她的粉丝。
E: It's true. I am her fan.

C: 这也能看出来？
E: How can you tell?

C: 哦…那一定是我还不够聪明。
E: Oh... Then it must be because I'm not smart enough.

C: 啊…她真美丽……
E: Ah... She is truly beautiful...

C: 现在只差一个推动巨石的触发装置了，艺术就是碾压喀！
E: Now all I need is a trigger to push the boulder. My art would really be "crushing it"!

C: 阳光依旧明媚…一定是梦喀。
E: But the sun still beams down brightly... It must have all been a dream.

C: 而众所不知的是，这种特殊的舞蹈，其实起源于人们对法吉娜眷属的观察与模仿。
E: But what's less known is that this unique dance actually came from people observing and imitating Phagousa's Titankins.

C: 宝藏、我的宝藏…
E: Precious... My precious treasure...

C: 你见过巨鲸跳舞吗？
E: Ever watched a giant whale dance?

C: 你战胜了生命中必然的「不幸」。你是真正的战士。
E: You've conquered the bad luck inevitable in life. You are a true fighter.

C: 宝箱内是一方黑暗，衬得角落里闪现的一簇光芒格外惹眼。
E: The inside of the chest is completely black, but in the corner of the chest's lining, you see a flash of light that particularly catches your eye.

C: 出于良心，你没有收他们的钱。友情可是无价的！
E: Out of the kindness of your heart, you opt to not take their money. Friendship is priceless after all!

C: 我记得这里是列车着陆的地点…某种程度上讲，它的「预言」还挺灵验。
E: This is where the Express touched down... Ironically, that "prediction" wasn't far off.

C: 可是，总感觉有些孤独嗡……
E: But... why does it feel so lonely?

C: 再说，这机巧鸟态度消极，说不定毁灭人类之前，自己就先毁灭了。
E: Besides, who knows. This cycrane is so pessimistic, it might destroy itself before it ever destroys humanity.

C: 你要记住，在真挚而公平的感情之中，没有一句情话是土味情话。
E: You better remember that in sincere and fair emotions, there are no cheesy words of love.

C: 哪有这么多破事儿，不帮。
E: What's all this nonsense? I'll pass.

C: 你帮我修一下，拜托……
E: Fix me, Ple—e—ease...

C: 哼，我只是一个恰好路过的物流机巧鸟罢了。
E: Hmph, I'm just an express cycrane that happened to be passing by, is all.

C: 比起这事儿，「四大恶人」是…
E: That's beside the point. About the Infamous Four...

C: 听着，要想在我们的地盘上全身而退，就必须证明你有足够的智慧！
E: Listen, if you want to leave our territory unscathed, you must prove that you have wisdom!

C: 您将与来自罗浮内外的大胃王们同台竞技，看看谁能在限定时间内吃下更多包子——胜出者即可获得海量丰厚奖励！
E: You will be pitted against other competitive eaters around the Luofu and beyond to see who can eat the most buns within the time limit. And the winner wins a massive prize!

C: 反正他家的包子我已经吃了三百年了……
E: I've already eaten three hundred years of his buns, anyway.

C: 当然，之前您说过这些机巧鸟都搭载了智能一事——我们确认过了，是真的。每一只机巧鸟都能说会道的，我们也很惊讶。
E: Of course, you've mentioned before that these cycranes are actually equipped with intelligence — we've verified that this is indeed true. Every cycrane can produce coherent speech. It's quite astonishing.

C: 假如那帮狂热的家伙还在， 一定不敢相信自己的眼睛喀！
E: If those fanatics were still around, they wouldn't believe their own eyes, crrk!

C: 方位已确定——启航！
E: Direction confirmed — Set sail!

C: 你找错人了，我只是路过而已。
E: You've got the wrong person. I'm just passing by.

C: 你要不要听听自己在说什么？
E: Are you listening to what you're saying?

C: 什么也没发生。不然呢？难不成你还想把丹鼎司洞天乃至仙舟罗浮开个大洞吗？
E: Nothing happened. What did you think was going to happen? A massive explosion blasting a gigantic hole on the Alchemy Commission delve or even the Xianzhou Luofu?

C: 景元让我把这个交给你。
E: Jing Yuan told me to give this to you.

C: 我心想谁怕谁啊，我在工造司这上百年可不是吃素的，他要是敢来，我指定给他个教训！
E: I thought to myself, who's afraid of whom? I've been in the Artisanship Commission for over a hundred years, and I didn't get to where I am by being a pushover. If he dares to come, I'll be sure to give him a lesson he won't forget!

C: 当然啊，在自家地方谁怕谁啊？再说了，我又不是什么莽夫。
E: Why wouldn't I? I'm on my home turf. Why should I be afraid? Besides, I'm not a reckless person.

C: 这些豪车的门连接着一个个私密观影包厢，顾客只需拉开车门就能进入影院落座——在高峰时段，一辆车甚至可以同时服务上千个顾客。
E: The doors of these limousines are all connected to individual private viewing booths. The audience just needs to open the car door to enter the cinema and sit down — One limousine can even simultaneously service thousands of customers during peak hours.

C: 恭喜，你已集齐了神圣的七大热气井盖之加护，你的威名在井盖界无盖不知，无盖不晓。
E: Congratulations, you have collected the blessings of the sacred Seven Manhole Covers. Now your great name is known by all throughout the world of the manhole covers.

C: 在气球上画画可是个技术活，一不小心，笔就会打滑，然后引发孩童无限的遐想。
E: Drawing on a balloon is a true art. One slip of the pen, and it will glide across the surface, leading children to imagine all sorts of things.

C: 事到如今，再回看地图上的这对大楼，的确让人印象深刻。当年，「钟表匠」也是从它们的夹缝中窥探出了这场梦的未来吧。
E: Seeing how things are now, the sight of these two towers on the map leaves quite the impression. Back then, the Watchmaker must have peeked through the crack between them to glance at the future of this dream.

C: 况且，这片空间扭曲本就很美，它以一种巧妙的精度维持着自身稳定，并呈现出光滑的特质。
E: What's more, the distortion of this space is inherently beautiful. It maintains its stability with remarkable precision and exhibits smooth and sleek properties.

C: 想这么多干什么，反正也不是你我能改变的。
E: What are you doing thinking about all that? It's not like it's something either of us can change.

C: 总算不用打工了！
E: Finally, no more work!

C: 在比遥远还遥远的地方，列车正满载着戴帽子的猴子、穿鞋子的蜘蛛和会跳舞的蠕虫飞驰而来。
E: In a place unfathomably far away, the train is speeding here, loaded with monkeys wearing hats, spiders with shoes, and dancing worms.

C: 万籁俱寂。无人搅扰的夜色里，一切纷争好像就这样短暂地落定了。
E: Silence reigns supreme. In the untouched night with nary a soul, it's as if all conflict has come to a standstill in this reprieve.

C: 但就现阶段而言，它只能用来玩《小小哈努行动》。
E: For now, you can only use it to play Hanu's Adventure.

C: 你仔细打量了它的高度，根据你的精准计算，你或许能*跳*——严格来说是某种攀爬技巧——总之你应该或许大概勉强能上去吧？
E: You study its height carefully. According to your precise calculations, you should be able to jump — well, more like climb, you suppose — onto it. In any case, you should be able to get up there... Right?

C: 船长好！
E: Hi, captain!

C: 能卖钱的太少。
E: So few worth selling.

C: 去哪？多洛斯，吕奎亚？
E: Where to? Dolos? Loukas?

C: 热浮羊奶吧，有助于长高。
E: Steamed puffergoat milk, it'll help you grow taller.

C: 让列车长看看…{NICKNAME}乘客，你已经不是帕姆最开始认识的你了！
E: Tickets, please! ...Oh {NICKNAME}, you're not the same person Pom-Pom first met! What's happened to you?

C: 在不同星球上能买到当地特产，但我还是推荐你在列车里就提前准备好！列车长可不会乱收费。
E: You'll find local specialties on different planets, but by Pom-Pom's recommendation, you should just get everything here on the train! The conductor doesn't rip off passengers.

C: 这是很正…诶！？没有吗？唔…没有的话该怎么继续，书上没有写这样的回答情况帕！
E: Why, that's norm— huh!? Really? Oh... Where do we go from here, then? The book doesn't cover how to respond to that kind of answer!

C: 这是给你的奖励，请快点收好帕！
E: Here's a reward for you — quick, take it!

C: 你发现了一枚闪闪发光的小东西，凑近一看…是帕姆衣服上的纽扣！
E: You discover a sparkly thing and draw closer to inspect... It's Pom-Pom's button!

C: 可能是你有洁癖？
E: Do you have mysophobia?

C: 正好{NICKNAME}乘客在，我跟艾丝妲打过招呼，她已经知会过对应科室的负责人了，就麻烦你代我跑一趟帕！
E: Since you are here, I have told Asta, and she has already informed the person in charge of the corresponding department, why don't you run the errand for me this time!

C: 这样的朋友…我还真认识！
E: I do know one!

C: 帕姆不明白姬子明明有精湛的维修技艺，为什么却成天捣鼓些不着调的「手调咖啡」。
E: Himeko is highly competent when it comes to fixing things, but then she's always pumping out this uninspired "hand-blended coffee." Pom-Pom just doesn't get it.

C: 前方检测到障碍物，请及时确认道路状况，保证物流通畅。
E: Obstacles detected dead ahead. Please verify route situation to guarantee a smooth delivery.

C: 期待你的表现，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: I look forward to your performance, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: （现在还不能去挑战「少校」…）
E: (I can't challenge the Major yet...)

C: 你要改装自己吗？
E: Do you modify yourself?

C: 让你们见识下什么叫斩首行动。
E: I'll show you how it's done with capturing the ringleader.

C: 轻轻松松，滴汗未流。
E: It's a walk in the park to me.

C: 你是贝洛伯格的传奇，{NICKNAME}。你不单存护了这座城市的当下，还为保住它的未来尽了一份力。
E: You're the legend of Belobog, {NICKNAME}. Not only have you preserved the present of this city, but you've also contributed to its future.

C: *电波滤音*这附近怪物数量太多，<color=#dbc291ff>请直接冲刺到浮梯处，不必恋战！</color>
E: *electronic voice* There are way too many monsters here. <color=#dbc291ff>Just sprint straight to the levitator and don't engage with them!</color>

C: （好像是次元扑满的声音，赶紧跟上去。）
E: (That sounds like a Warp Trotter. I should hurry up and track it down.)

C: 您可以理解为，到处都是看不见的线。一旦踩到那些线，那些怪物就会蜂拥而至，让您陷入苦战。
E: Imagine it this way. There are invisible wires everywhere. As soon as you step on one of these wires, those monsters will come rushing in together, forcing you into a tough battle.

C: 我们「正当权益会社」本质上是一个公益组织。入会不需要缴纳任何费用，只要在您有空时配合协助其他成员即可。
E: We are essentially a nonprofit organization with no fees to join. You just have to help fellow members in your spare time.

C: 下层区的搏击俱乐部只有两种状态——人声鼎沸，以及更加人声鼎沸。
E: The Fight Club in the Underworld comes in two ambiances: Noisy, and noisier.

C: 「四大天王」之二
E: Second of the Formidable Four

C: 出石头！
E: Rock!

C: 啊…我究竟该怎么办才好……
E: Ah... whatever shall I do...

C: 好家伙，你还有理了？
E: Are you trying to reason with me?

C: 我真的知错了！我再也不敢了。
E: Please stop! I won't do it again!

C: …但是，但是！你得给我时刻记住——破坏公物者，虽远必诛！
E: ...But know this — no vandals will be tolerated!

C: 唔…可恶啊！居然连最基本的公物都保护不了，真是狼狈…真是愧对邓恩队长…！
E: I can't even protect the most basic infrastructure... I've brought shame to Captain Dunn!

C: 毕竟…假设它真是一颗炸弹，也不至于就这样迟迟不爆炸，而被丢在这里吃灰了。
E: If it were a bomb, then why hasn't it ever exploded? All this time, it was just collecting dust.

C: …你别再拿那种眼神看我了！我招了，我全都招……
E: ...Don't look at me like that! I confess, I confess to everything...

C: 西北方有什么？
E: What's in the northwest?

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 等、等一下…
E: H—Hang on...

C: 系统提示：你正处在本机预设的行进路线上，请及时避让，以免发生危险。
E: System prompt: You are standing on an intended travel pathway. Please step aside to avoid any harm.

C: 不是，您别走啊…
E: No, don't go...

C: 要讲规矩！不问自取这可不好！
E: Be disciplined! It's not a good habit to pick something up without asking!

C: 这罐子虽是俗物，但有我罐中仙的修为加持，自不是你这小东西能动摇分毫的。
E: This vase may be an ordinary object, but with the blessings of my power, a pipsqueak like you won't be able to shake it up at all.

C: 说来也妙，凭我的修为，一般人是注意不到这罐子的，而你注意到了。若不是你根骨不凡，那就是冥冥之中自有定数。
E: In fact, with the amount of power I have, most people wouldn't notice this vase. Yet you did. If you're not an extraordinary person already, then you're destined for greatness somewhere.

C: 不如帮我办件事吧，就当是扰我清闲的赔礼。
E: Why don't you give me a hand? Consider that as an apology for disturbing me.

C: 谢礼准备好了。仙门已开，你径自来取吧。
E: The thank-you gift is ready. The gate to the celestial realm is open. Come and get it yourself.

C: 很快，你找到了。
E: Soon, you find it.

C: 但你随时可以回到这里！*随时*都可以。
E: But you can come back here any time! *Any* time you want.

C: 当然会。
E: Of course.

C: 你怎么不自己来…
E: Why don't you do it yourself?

C: 怎么会有机巧鸟被困在这里啊…应该是故障以后被困在这里了…标记一下位置吧，会有专员来救它的。
E: Why is there a cycrane here... I suppose it has been stuck here since it went faulty... Let me mark the location, and I believe an officer will come to its aid in no time.

C: 他们现在就藏在这里？
E: Are they hiding here?

C: 能和{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}共事，真是太荣幸了！
E: What an honor to be able to work alongside {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}!

C: 那个…我们的回收预算被砍掉了，就算麻烦您出手帮忙，我也没有办法给你任何回报了…没关系吗？
E: But... our retrieval budget for this has been cut, so we won't able to pay you for your help. Are you still fine with it?

C: …不过，你要是真的有空，随时都可以来找我！
E: ...Still, you are welcome to come find me anytime if you are free!

C: 冤冤相报何时了。
E: If revenge breeds revenge, will there ever be an end to it?

C: 品质看上去一般，反倒是有些天然去雕饰的意思。听说熟悉仙舟文化的化外民会喜欢这个，但是到哪儿去找这样的化外民呢，你说是吧？
E: As average as they may look, they're molded to look like that. I heard discerning Outworlders steeped in the Xianzhou culture like it this way, but how am I ever going to find this kind of Outworlder around?

C: 真是太感谢你的大恩大德了！集装箱里这些东西，是我全身上下最值钱的东西了，请你收下吧。
E: Thank you so much for your inestimable kindness! These things in the container here are the most valuable possessions I own. You've earned them.

C: 那眼神仿佛在说：你怕不是把脑子玩坏了。
E: That look seemed to be saying: I'm afraid you've lost your mind.

C: 这倒是让我想起了很早以前遇见的一位艺术家，他也是这样时哭时笑、行为奇特，还时不时把周边人当作捉弄的对象……
E: This reminds me though of an artist who I met a long time ago. He also cried and laughed a lot, behaving strangely and sometimes poking fun of the people around him...

C: 哦，我懂了——是我充的钱还不够？拿去，都拿去吧！都是身外之物，我才不需要这些钞票！
E: Oh, I understand... I didn't top up enough credit? Then take it! Take it all! It's all just mere worldly possessions. I don't need any of this cash!

C: 你生病了？
E: Are you sick?

C: 虽说此地不宜久留，但抱歉…请容我先缓缓。
E: Even though it's not good to stay here for long, I'm sorry but... please allow me to take my own time.

C: 无论您有怎样的烦恼，都可以向我倾诉。我会倾听您的心声与诉求，并力所能及地为您提供帮助。
E: No matter what troubles befall you, you can always tell it to me. I will listen to your thoughts and wishes, and provide as much help as I possibly can.

C: 这「梦想之城」…可真是个好地方啊！它能让人感到自由自在，感到自己充满了…力量。
E: This City of Dreams... it really is a wonderful place! It lets you feel completely free, lets you feel like you're full of... power.

C: 不、不是……
E: N—No...

C: 《重返梦境》？哼，宣发倒是做足了架子，可惜从头到尾都是花架子！
E: Return to Dreamscape? Hmph, marketing did a great job trying to stand this up, but it's all vacuous from beginning to end!

C: …快去、去找家族…找梦境…鼓励师……
E: ...Go quickly, find The Family... Find the Dreamscape... Motivator...

C: 可以想象，他们是这颗星球的幸存者，不知用什么手段逃离了灭顶之灾，却注定因资源耗尽走向死亡。
E: It's possible that they are the survivors of this planet, escaping utter catastrophe through some means but doomed to ultimately die due to exhaustion of resources.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 成功回收信标的同时，我的飞船也被黑洞的引力捕获，搁浅在了吸积盘上。那感觉就像身处湍急的水流，不管怎么努力都无法前进，稍一松懈又会被推着后退。
E: While safely retrieving the beacon, my ship was captured by the gravity well of the black hole, trapping me on the accretion disk. It felt like being in water rapids — no matter how hard you tried there was no way forward, and if you relaxed for a second, it would push you back.

C: 计算机解析了样本成分，测得碎片诞生于十多个琥珀纪前——那个时期发生了一件大事，你应该知道。
E: The computer analyzed the sample composition, and found that the fragments were formed over <unbreak>10</unbreak> Amber Eras ago — a huge event happened back then, which you should know about.

C: 我可以给你们钱。
E: I can give you money.

C: 船员们看着这头长相酷似黄石牛的生物，决定把它煮了吃掉，我没意见。但就在厨师准备下刀时，大毛开口说话了……
E: The crew looked at this yellow boulder calf lookalike and decided to cook it up to eat. I had no objections. But just when the chef was about to stick the knife, Hairy spoke...

C: 如果可能的话，最好让他们打个具体的分数…至于具体该找谁打听，你自己定吧。放心，凡是<color=#dbc291ff>家族里稍微有点地位的人</color>应该都已经来过这里、体验过一遍了。
E: If possible, I'd like them to rate our work... It's up to you who you want to approach. Don't worry, as <color=#dbc291ff>anyone who holds a position in The Family</color> should have already been here and tried what we have to offer.

C: 不可理喻…太可恶了！多少个日夜的辛勤劳作，居然被家族那群人两三句话就都给毁了！
E: This is outlandish... How infuriating! They negate all our hard work with their off-the-cuff remarks!

C: 您要是…要是什么时候得了空，能不能再来这边转转？我、我请您喝苏乐达，管够！
E: If you... you're free next time, could you drop by again? I—I'll get you some SoulGlad, as much as you can drink!

C: 难道不是你为了抢夺波奇的劳动成果，故意抹黑他的吗？
E: Didn't you badmouth Bocchi so that you could take credit for his work?

C: 如果只因前路泥泞艰辛就熄灭了灵魂的火焰，我和那些嘲笑我的人又有何区别！
E: If I lose my heart just because the road ahead is muddy and challenging, I'll be no different from those who mock me!

C: 你以为这就是简简单单的一张纸？大错特错！
E: You think it's "just" a piece of paper? Hah, dead wrong!

C: 和我说话的态度就可能就决定了你未来的人生——说这句话的意思是，对我和我的发明都放尊重点！
E: The way you talk to me might determine your future, you know? Treat me and my inventions with respect!

C: 唔…之前把观景望远镜给锁定了以后，立马就惊动了家族的人。
E: Well... When the telescope was locked, The Family got alerted right away.

C: 她是猎犬家系的人？
E: She's from the Bloodhound Family?

C: 你的经纪人让我来找你。
E: Your manager asked me to find you.

C: 或许比起管理能力和市场知识，我更该学习的是如何了解艺者们的心吧……
E: Perhaps I should learn how to understand the hearts of my talents instead of management skills and market knowledge...

C: 我一定会支持的！
E: I'll definitely support you!

C: 我本来没想射她的，但那辆车颠簸得太厉害，开枪的机会又转瞬即逝……
E: It wasn't my intention to shoot her. The car was so bumpy, and the opportunity to fire would be gone in a fleeting second...

C: 那次失误不仅葬送了我的前途，还剥夺了一个孩子的生命。
E: Because of that mistake, I lost my job, and a little girl was killed.

C: 嗯，再见……
E: Sure. See you around...

C: 何况，一切都已经过去了。凶手受到了法律的制裁，我的家人也早就脱离了悲伤。
E: Moreover, everything is water under the bridge now. The murderer has been sentenced, and my family has long grieved for my passing.

C: 我驶过寂静已久的航道，曾经热闹的星球仅剩一片荒凉。
E: When I sailed along the route that had long been unused, a planet, once thriving, was quiet and desolate.

C: 没有文明，也没有残余的兵器。整整三个琥珀纪过去，什么都没能留下。
E: There was no civilization and remaining weapons. Nothing was left in the past three Amber Eras.

C: 你是……
E: ...And you are?

C: 说说看你需要什么。
E: Tell me what it is you need.

C: 这是你应得的报应。
E: You got what you deserved.

C: 这个宇宙充满了罪恶。孩子无家可归，奴隶被套上项圈，人不再像人，死亡成为冰冷的数字，发动战争的刽子手却对此沾沾自喜。
E: This universe is filled with sin. Orphans with no place to call home, slaves bound in shackles, people deprived of their own humanity... The dead are nothing but a cold number beneath the smug hand of the executioners who commissioned these wars.

C: 很快就有一笔大生意要谈成，或许是好几笔，金额大到可以买下一打小行星。
E: Soon there'll be a big deal coming down the line — could be several deals. More than enough to buy a dozen asteroids.

C: 五个琥珀纪前，我们的星域也是个和平世界，看看现在，那地方比虚空鲸的胃袋还要恶臭。战争就是这样，你不知道它什么时候就落到自己头上。
E: Five Amber Eras ago, our segmentum used to be peaceful, too. But look at it now: It stinks worse than the stomach of a void song whale. That's war for you — you just never know when it'll fall on your head.

C: 这是一版未被选用的校徽提案。能知道它的要么是历代校长，要么是早在建校之初就已抵达匹诺康尼的某位名宿…亦或两者都是。
E: This is a proposed version of the university crest that went unused. Only two types of individuals would know of it: Someone who is or was once a dean, or someone of renown who had already arrived in Penacony in the early days of the university's construction, or... someone who is both.

C: 折纸大学还真是有一位爱操心的校长，居然还在关心着这所学校，明明都已经……
E: Paperfold University really does have a worrywart of a dean. He still cares so much about the school, even though he's already...

C: 这台电梯被拦着是有原因的——果不其然，它坏了。
E: This elevator is blocked for a reason. Just as you've suspected, it is out of order.

C: 你看远处的山，居然都没有那台机器人大。
E: Look at those mountains in the distance, they're not even as tall as that robot!

C: 啾啾，人家的头好痛，怎么回事？
E: Tweet tweet. My head's throbbing. What's going on?

C: 再见啦，人家要去打卡啦！不过…人家会记住你的！有机会的话，一起来晒星光啾！
E: I'm off for some sightseeing now, but don't worry, I won't forget you! Let's go enjoy the starlight together sometime, tweet! See you around!

C: 啾啾！我忘记去招募船员了，原来是我是光杆船长…好丢人，亏我还那么高兴……
E: Ah, I forgot to recruit crew members! Tweet tweet! A captain without a ship... How embarrassing. And here I was so excited...

C: 在最后几分钟倒计时里，意识开始迟缓，脑海中却不知为何浮现出了阮•梅的样貌。
E: During the final moments of the countdown, your consciousness begins to fade — but somehow, Ruan Mei's visage pops into your head.

C: 你打算怎么处理这些废料？
E: What do you plan on doing with this scrap?

C: 啾…沉默的孤狼，追猎着贪婪的邪鳄，渴望让美梦小镇回归安宁啾……
E: Tweet... The silent lone wolf hunting the greedy evil crocodile, wishing that Dreamville could return to its former serenity, tweet...

C: 真的啾？真的不会伤害我啾？
E: Really, tweet? You won't hurt me, tweet?

C: 垃圾桶里怎么会有宝藏？
E: Why would there be treasure in a trashcan?

C: 真的吗？那我之后再去其他桶里看看，你可别骗鸟啊啾！
E: Really? I'll have to rummage through other cans then. You'd better not be lying to me, tweet!

C: 啾…？糟了，看得太入神，都忘了还在捉迷藏呢啾！
E: Tweet...? Oh dear, I got too distracted and forgot that we were still playing hide-and-seek, tweet!

C: 汽水先生家好高呀…
E: Mr. Soda's house is so high up...

C: 关于金叶广场…
E: About the Goldleaf Plaza...

C: 小鸟兴奋地抖了抖翅膀，叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
E: The bird excitedly ruffles its feathers, picks up your offered coin, and then... gobbles it up!

C: 好听的，歌！
E: What a lovely song!

C: 啾啾~
E: Tweet tweet~

C: 想要和我一样的好运气吗？来一起啾啾吧！
E: Do you want to be as fortunate as me? Come and sing with me!

C: 为了保护这里和幼小孩子们，在下会与其他的兄弟姐妹轮番站岗。毕竟，孩子们对睡前故事可是很挑剔的啾。
E: I rotate watch duty with some of my other brothers and sisters to protect these little birdies. After all, children are very picky about their bedtime stories, tweet!

C: 竟然是魔法硬币啾！
E: A Magic Coin, tweet!

C: 啾…啾啾……钟表小子和哈努兄弟都有自己的电影了……
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Clockie and Hanu both have their own films...

C: 不过，以我在观众席耕耘多年的经验，这次比赛的冠军绝对是那只甜猿泰山啾。
E: But, with my years of experience in the spectators' seats, the winner of this match is bound to be that Sweet Gorilla, tweet.

C: 谢谢你们的表演。
E: Thank you for the show.

C: 你要再晚点儿过来，等这广告牌掉下去，多半得摔我个头着地啾。
E: If you had come any later, this billboard would have fallen and made me land on my head, tweet.

C: 可现在…我只想送上那枚戒指，和我最亲爱的小小鸟在一起啾。
E: But now... I only want to gift that ring and spend an eternity with my dearest little bird, tweet.

C: 你再好好想想？
E: Think about it again. Carefully!

C: 祝银河球棒侠{F#小姐}{M#先生}生日快乐啾啾啾~
E: Happy birthday to you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Galactic Baseballer, tweet tweet tweet!

C: 可是一旦流传在外，很难说有「擅长解读之人」会遭遇什么事情，还得尽快回收。
E: However, if they fall into the hands of someone who is skilled at deciphering them... it pains me to imagine the terrible things that could happen. They must be retrieved as soon as possible.

C: 这些我从药王秘传手里缴获的赃物，其中有个叫《开智之卷》的小册子，一共没几页，上面尽是些鬼画符。
E: Here's the thing: I confiscated some stolen property from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and among them was a booklet called the Manuscript of Wisdom with all sorts of weird symbols on it.

C: 渐渐地，你的文字开始崩坏…涓轰簡缁欐瘝浜叉姤浠囨潃姝讳粬……
E: The Words iN FrONt oF yoUR eYes StaRT tO DiSTorT, dISsolVe, anNnnNd tHene TuUrRN iNto ssOmmmooMmmeTHing ILLeeegigbla...

C: 这次无论如何都要抽到吉签！
E: I must get a "Weal" hexagram this time no matter what!

C: 开几个供品盲盒试试！
E: Try opening a few mystery boxes!

C: 虽然我没有本事，但是仙舟罗浮上肯定有<color=#dbc291ff>懂音乐的人</color>能够完成这首曲子。
E: I may not have the aptitude for it, but there must be someone aboard the Xianzhou Luofu who <color=#dbc291ff>knows about music</color> and who can help complete this song.

C: 我想，长乐天里有一位能演奏编钟的乐师，估计她能帮上你。
E: I think there's a musician over in the Exalting Sanctum who plays the chimes. I bet she could help you.

C: 等你准备好了，就和我说一声吧，我教你怎么唱这首《合巹记》。
E: Once you're ready, let me know, and I'll teach you how to sing Wedding Wine.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Ah, forget it.

C: 对不起，我习惯性反击了…
E: Sorry, I'm just used to fighting back...

C: 从现在的角度来看，是比较俗套。而且咱岁阳本不分性别，却要被你们人类套上个「红颜祸水」的剧情模板。
E: It seems cliche from a modern perspective. And heliobi of course take no gender, but of course you humans have to wrap this archetype of a "femme fatale" around the whole thing.

C: 最强法务…你是说十王司吗？
E: The strongest legal department... are you talking about the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 是啊，只有有心之人才会做这样的事。你得到了我的认可，所以我要给你奖励。
E: Yes, only a considerate person would ever do such a thing. You've earned my approval, so I want to reward you.

C: 你附身吧，我带你过去。
E: Come on then, and I'll carry you over.

C: 是那个智械故意讹人。
E: That Intellitron's trying to extort him.

C: 你没钱很骄傲吗？说这话之前能不能先反思下自己努力了没有？
E: Are you proud of having no money? Can't you have a good think about whether you've worked hard enough before complaining about it?

C: 再说了，咱们现实里谁认识谁啊？
E: Besides, does anyone here actually know each other in the real world?

C: 这也就是智械了…
E: Only for an Intellitron...

C: 我印象里的她总是一个人在沙发上发呆，还时常露出忧郁的神情。我甚至都没怎么见过她画画的样子……
E: In my memory, she was just this figure staring into space on the sofa. She always looked so depressed. I don't think I've ever seen her paint...

C: 你该狠狠踢它一脚，让它破烂的外壳更加破烂——没错！就像这样，狠狠一脚…嘿，等等！
E: You should give it a good kicking. Kick it until its busted shell is even more busted — that's right! Just like that, kick it... Hey, wait a second!

C: 你低头看向手中的*磁带*。那不起眼的小东西此刻正散发着某种难以抗拒的吸引力，试图拉扯着你沉入泥淖更深处——那么，你打算怎么做呢？
E: You lower your head to look at the *tape* in your hands. The unsuspecting little object is emitting some kind of irresistible attraction, trying to pull you deeper into the mire. What will you do?

C: 至于更多的，我也不太方便透露。不过你只要知道家族会尽最大的努力保护每一位宾客就对了！
E: I cannot divulge too much information to you. However, you should know that The Family will be working their utmost to ensure the safety of every guest here!

C: 这样啊…感觉是个很有趣的故事，可惜和我没什么关系。
E: I see... I imagine it's quite an interesting story, though it is none of my business.

C: …赌神！
E: ...The Ace Gambler!

C: 我看他赢了好久了。
E: He's been winning like this for ages!

C: 小女子深知自己本是劳碌命，不求坐享荣华富贵，但若是此生有幸，得以服侍如您这般…懂我、关照我的贵客，也算是有个安稳的去处了。
E: I know that I am fated to a life of labor, I dream not of a life of riches and indulgence. It's just, if I were fortunate enough to serve a guest... a guest like you, who understands me and cares for me, that would be enough of a stable home for me.

C: 若是不嫌弃的话，可以时常来此处逛逛，听小女子唱个曲，也算是为您解闷了。
E: If you would like, please come back for a stroll and to enjoy my singing. I would like to at least relieve your boredom.

C: 是吧。我确实不该将旁人拖进来，请您…还是都忘了吧。
E: You're right. I shouldn't be dragging others into this. Please... just forget what I said.

C: 为您特意增设的盛典即将召开…还请务必出席。
E: A grand ceremony dedicated to you is about to begin... Please make sure you do not miss it.

C: 你先前可没说还有这事啊。
E: You didn't tell me about that earlier.

C: 不管怎么说，这下你似乎是真的没法取钱了。
E: In any case, it seems like there's no way you can get your money now.

C: 没错，{F#女士}{M#先生}，您没听错——是我在和您说话。
E: That's right, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}. You heard it right. I'm speaking to you.

C: 吃得个烂醉如泥好尽意！
E: Nothing beats a good feast and drinking to the death!

C: 要不是当初一气之下砸碎了那瓶苏乐达，又何至于如今这副田地。
E: If I had not let myself get carried away with emotion and smashed that bottle of SoulGlad, we would not be in this situation.

C: 小红，就前段日子，我偶然听到了黄和阿绿聊天，有些不太好听的话。
E: Little Red, I happened to hear Yellow and Green talking, they said some pretty nasty things about you.

C: 单纯，真切，这就是纯粹的酒，纯粹的，纯粹的，烈！
E: Pure, sincere, this is pure alcohol. It is pure, pure... Strength!

C: 天杀的东西，大半夜的音量开那么大。要不是我懒得动，真想出来给他一榔头。
E: That darned kid, always playing songs super loud in the middle of the night! If I wasn't too lazy to move, I'd have gone out there and introduced him to my hammer.

C: 那两位跨种族的知己朋友呢？我看他们对案件似乎有所见解。
E: What about our different-flavored friends over there? I see they have some opinions on the case.

C: 神秘优雅的黑天鹅…没准她现在就在这里，只是没显形呢。
E: The mysterious and elegant Black Swan... She might even already be here. She just hasn't shown herself.

C: 「对不起，我正在执行任务，」她的声音依旧温柔，「但你一定要玩得开心，好吗？」噢…真是太可惜了。
E: "Sorry, I'm on a mission right now." Her voice is as soft and gentle as ever. "But I hope you have a great time!" Ah... That's a real shame.

C: 跟我一起说——
E: Everyone, together...

C: 尽管面对镜头微笑对一些人来说真的很难，但你还是收获了一张绝好的合影。
E: Though staring into a lens and smiling is very difficult for some people, you still managed to get a wonderful group picture.

C: 啊？你当这里是苜蓿草开的游乐园吗？{F#小妞}{M#小子}，我们是在打劫！
E: Huh? You think this is some kinda amusement park run by the Alfalfa? This is a robbery, {F#girl}{M#boy}!

C: 流梦礁可是「原初梦境」，你要是在这儿出了事，可别想像美梦里一样全身而退。
E: Remember, Dreamflux Reef is the Primordial Dreamscape... If ya get into trouble here, don't think ya'll be gettin' out without a scratch like in a dream.

C: 赚到钱之后，我们也拾起了以前的工作，去帮居民解决生活问题，抓捕偷鸡摸狗的犯人，甚至来打扫这条街道的卫生…大家也不会觉得我们是坏人了。
E: Once we got our cash, we went back to our old jobs. We helped the residents deal with their problems, captured all the pesky criminals n' even cleaned up the street... People don't think we're bad guys no more, either!

C: 如果已经没气的话。
E: If you've got no fizz left in you, that is.

C: 啧，只收缴到一张知更鸟小姐的新专辑，这家伙到底卖出去了多少啊？
E: Tsk, we've only managed to recover one copy of Miss Robin's album. How many has this guy already scalped?

C: （大副帮我领了包裹还是回船长室一趟，找大副问问吧。）
E: (The first mate collected the package for me. I'll ask for it in the Captain's Quarters.)

C: 过往的回忆清晰地投映了出来……
E: A memory from the past is projected vividly...

C: 没有跳过！你心虚了吧！冥差大人，{F#她}{M#他}是假的。
E: You can't skip the question! You're guilty, aren't you!? Your Honor, {F#she}{M#he} is a fake.

C: 勘录舍的阴影中蹿出两名幽府武弁，立刻将「无相者」嘟嘟控制了起来。
E: Two Wraith Wardens leap out from the shadows of the Domain of Collations and apprehend Shapeless Doot-Doot in an instant.

C: 看看你发现了什么，一本书？幽囚狱里什么样的犯人都有，既然书是精神粮食，也许其中就有某种精神系的犯人，以阅读有营养的书本维生。
E: Let's see what you've found... A book? The variety of inmates in this Shackling Prison is truly intriguing. Since books are spiritual food for the soul, maybe there is a spiritual inmate who's an avid reader and relies on them for sustenance.

C: 理解理解，如今获取信息的手段太多了。
E: I understand. After all, there are many ways of getting information these days.

C: 总之，十王司的判断绝对不会出错，我们绝不会冤枉一本好书的。
E: In any circumstance, the Ten-Lords Commission will not make a mistake. We will never mistreat a good book.

C: 没错，虽然十王司的人说要把我有关幽囚狱地形结构的记忆删除掉……
E: That's right, although the people from the Ten-Lords Commission said that they'll erase the part of my memory related to the layout and structure of the Shackling Prison...

C: 匹诺康尼的有钱人不缺钱，缺的是独一无二的体验。咱们提供的体验足够独特，就自然会有人需要。
E: In Penacony, the rich do not lack money. All they seek is a unique experience. If the experience we're providing is unique enough, naturally there will be demand.

C: 带着它<color=#dbc291ff>去证物仓库</color>附近找找白鸟吧。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Go to the evidence storage warehouse</color> with it and look for Shiratori nearby.

C: 等等，我还有些别的事。
E: Hold on, I have other things to do.

C: 这些字母又是什么意思呢？
E: What is the significance of these letters?

C: 很快你进入到了安检机器的内部，里面什么也看不见，只有机器运作的声音。
E: You soon reach the inside of the security scanner. Unable to see anything, the whirring of running machinery is the only thing you hear.

C: 不过实不相瞒，我们确实有事相求，我听说星穹列车无名客总是乐于助人。
E: I shall not deceive you. We do indeed have something we'd like to ask of you. I hear the Nameless of the Astral Express are always happy to help others?

C: 就像是弹奏一曲乐章，竞锋舰舰炮以既定的节律歌唱，这就是老白提到的「礼炮精神」。
E: The Skysplitter's cannons begin to ring out in a set rhythm like a roaring symphony. This is it! This is the "cannon spirit" that Old Bai mentioned.

C: 孙子们，你们要服从这个灰发高手的命令！
E: My grandsons, you must heed the orders of this gray-haired master!

C: 就好像你，下盘微微挪步，右手握拳蓄力。心里想的一定想趁我说话时贴近我，冲我鼻子…哎哟！
E: Just like how your lower body has moved slightly, and your fist is clenching tight. I am certain that you are planning to approach me while I talk and punch me in the nose... Oof!

C: …那你也没法伤我分毫？
E: ...So, you can't harm me either?

C: 听起来导演和这些酒瓶很熟？那就好，瞧瞧它们饱满的姿态，即将满溢而出的热情——这就是老艺术家的从容！
E: Sounds like the director's very familiar with these drink bottles? That's good then. Look at their brimming poise, almost bursting with passion — that's the swagger of a seasoned artiste!

C: 你不确定这种行为是否值得提倡，但至少，你绝对不希望它发生在自己身上。
E: You're not sure if such behavior is worth lauding, but at the very least, you hope it never has to happen to you.

C: 为了制造出最漂亮的喷泉，小金猛烈摇晃自己的身体，直至玻璃壁都四分五裂。但观众们都相信，那将会是他们此生见过的…最壮丽的景象。
E: To create the most beautiful fountain, Goldie violently shakes her own body, to the point where her glass walls start to crack. But the audience wholeheartedly believes that it's probably... the most magnificent sight they have ever witnessed in their lives.

C: 原来是这个{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}干的好事啊！
E: Oh, so you're the {F#young lady}{M#young fellow} who caused this to happen!

C: 古怪的建筑在你面前矗立，顶部的圆球里似有某种黄金般闪耀的液体在微微流动。
E: A strange structure stands before you. A golden, glittering fluid fluctuates within the sphere above it.

C: 天啊——我、我研究搁置了这么久，突然一下思路就开阔了，果然…果然！
E: My word! I've been neglecting my research for so long, and now my thoughts are clear... I... I knew it!

C: 我的精神状况，世界第一健康！
E: My mental health is unbeatable — number one in the world!

C: 抱歉，走神了，题目是啥来着？
E: Sorry, I was a little distracted. What was the question again?

C: 抱歉，您是一位「抱歉开拓者」。
E: Sorry, you are an Apologetic Trailblazer.

C: 回声尚未结束，酸麻感便已褪去。你的视野又重新恢复了。
E: Before the echo ends, the sensation of tingling subsides. Your vision is restored.

C: 保持您的身心健康始终是我最关切的目标，欢迎随时再来。
E: Your physical and mental health is always my primary priority. You are always welcome here.

C: 这两句话和接下来的内容没有任何关系…为什么要和你说这个来着？
E: These two lines have nothing to do with what's coming next... Why are we talking about this?

C: 想不出来了…
E: I can't think of anything...

C: 可以不回答吗？
E: Can I refuse to answer?

C: 没错，就是「墨涅塔的赐福」！
E: That's right. It's "Mnestia's benediction"!

C: 卜者阿洛。
E: The diviner Alor.

C: 讲讲你的故事？
E: Tell me your story.

C: 你很能装垃圾啊。
E: You can contain a lot of trash.

C: 什么，难道现在的公馆侍者连自知之明都没有了吗？干脆让我来清理门户吧！
E: What? Don't the servers nowadays even know their roles here? Maybe it's time to fire some of them!

C: 原来你也是同道中人，作为长辈，我本该接济你点垃圾，只可惜老夫一路乞讨过来，也没留下多少存货。
E: Ah, you're in the same plight as me. As the elder, I would share with you some of my supplies, but I had to rely on the kindness of others on my way here, and I don't have much to offer.

C: 但我不是学生。
E: But I'm not a student.

C: 去走廊罚站！
E: Go stand out in the hallway!

C: 最后是结尾…结尾比文章的其他部分关键太多了。如果需要升华主题的话，再不动手就来不及了。
E: And finally, the ending. A good one makes all the difference, seriously. If you wanna make the topic of the writing more sublime, this is it.

C: 多亏了{NICKNAME}，哀丽秘榭越来越热闹啦。
E: Thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, Aedes Elysiae is getting livelier by the day!

C: 风铃发出了悦耳的声音。除此之外，什么都——
E: The wind chime sings a lovely tune. Other than that, nothing—

C: 这些都是你种的？
E: Did you plant all these?

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 权杖内部的世界，则在千百年的演算中逐渐趋于疯狂。我尝试向内窥探，却险些被那疯溃的数据实体扰乱了逻辑原件。
E: The world inside the scepter gradually descended into madness after centuries of extrapolation. When I attempted to peer inside, I nearly had my logical components disrupted by those insane data entities.

C: 不如说，{NICKNAME}才是这一幕的主角呢。
E: Honestly, {NICKNAME}, you're the star of the whole scene.

C: 不过，要是人类也能学会读心魔法就好了，只要注视彼此就能传递心意……
E: Still, wouldn't it be nice if people could use mind-reading magic? Just one look, and you'd know exactly how someone feels...

C: 迷是来听故事的，给迷讲个外面的故事就好！要优美动听的！
E: Mem's here to listen to stories. Tell mem a story about the outside world and that'll do! Something wonderful and moving!

C: …还好，人家难以启齿的记忆，只有你知道呢。不提这个了，跟人家在迷境里多探索一会儿吧？
E: ...It's okay. Only you know the memories I can't bring myself to speak of. Let's put that aside. Why don't you stay with me a little longer in this maze and explore together?

C: {NICKNAME}，你说…海的另一头会是什么呢？
E: {NICKNAME}, what do you think... lies at the other end of the sea?

C: 然后…迎面撞上了一位悬锋卫兵打扮的壮硕男性。
E: Then... You find yourself face-to-face with a powerful-looking man in Kremnos guard uniform.

C: 你注意到盔甲上有被火舌灼烧过的痕迹，以及刻在头盔中央的小小的天秤标志。这位忠于信念的战士，或许他曾尝试去引发一场火灾，但烈焰最终只吞噬了他自己。
E: You notice that the armor shows signs of being burnt, as well as an insignia of a set of scales carved into the center of the helmet. The soldier who remained true to his faith may have attempted to start a fire here, only to end up being engulfed in the flames himself.

C: 呼呼…呼呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 谁说不是呢。年纪大了腿脚不方便，只怕很难捱到再创世咯。
E: Who wouldn't agree? Getting old makes it hard to move around, I fear I might not make it to Era Nova.

C: 记忆应该无法带到下一世吧？毕竟我们没有前一世的记忆。可这么一来…和死了也没有区别。
E: Memories shouldn't be carried into the next life, right? After all, we have no recollection of a past one. But if that's the case... it's no different from simply dying.

C: 我知道诸位逃脱黑潮，一定饥肠辘辘，但我必须提醒一句。
E: I know everyone must be starving after escaping the black tide, but I must remind everyone.

C: 守卫叔叔们已经去救他们了，没准听完这个城邦的故事，他们就来接你了呢。
E: The guards have already gone to rescue them. Maybe by the time you finish hearing this story about the city-state, they'll be here to take you home.

C: （还是不练了吧）
E: (Don't train it)

C: 数据依托在终端设备上，承载了空间站的意志。
E: Data relies upon a terminal device to sustain the will of the space station.

C: 当然是关于珍稀生物……
E: Of course it's about a rare organism...

C: 大概就是这种逻辑感，让我更愿意研究它们吧。
E: It's probably their sense of logic that makes me want to study them.

C: 具体的时间？记不清啦。
E: I don't remember exactly how long.

C: 哦！你也是对这次入侵事件感兴趣的科员吗？这件事可有来头了！
E: Oh! Are you also interested in the invasion? That was a huge event!

C: 你可以不与我为伴，也可以不理解我的行动。但请你不要污蔑、践踏我的尊严！
E: I never asked you to join me or to understand my actions. But, please do not slander or trample on my dignity!

C: 打扰了。
E: Sorry.

C: 不过……除了展望未来进行复兴，还有很多需要完成的事情吧？
E: However... Other than looking towards the future, there is still a lot to be done.

C: 拜托，可不可以不要在休息的时候讲工作？
E: Oh, come on, can you please not talk about work while I'm taking a break?

C: 有什么身体不舒服的问题可别直接问我，我只负责工作分内的患者，临时偶遇的概不负责。
E: Don't come to me if you are not feeling well. I'm only responsible for the patients under my scope of work. I don't take care of any random people I bump into.

C: 要不是那什么物质军团来捣乱，这种事情才不会交到我手里。
E: If it wasn't for the Legion's invasion, this kind of thing wouldn't have become my duty.

C: 咳咳……我都说了些什么！那都是空谈，空谈！
E: Ehem... Look what I said! Nonsense! Nonsense!

C: 这场入侵对密卷科影响是最大的吗？
E: Does the Department of Insight suffer the most from this invasion?

C: …哈哈！你还真信啊！肯定是那个顶着「爆炸头」发型的家伙在忽悠你。
E: Haha! Where did you hear that from? The guy with that luscious hairstyle is probably the one who tricked you into believing this.

C: 不该喊「阮•梅女士」吗？
E: Aren't you supposed to call her "Miss Ruan Mei"?

C: 和你聊了几句，我感觉自己的心里好像没以前那么灰扑扑了。
E: I seem to feel better after talking to you.

C: 噢，这个…说来话长了。简单来说就是我有过一个设想，让它成为我们和空间站其他区域的「外交成果展示模特」。
E: Well, that's... a long story. To put it simply, I intend to make Wubbaboo a model that represents our diplomatic relationships with other space station zones.

C: 这一层的怪物可多了，有到处乱飞的虫子，还有「悬浮呆呆怪」和「约瑟夫的幽灵」。
E: There are plenty of monsters here, such as the flying bugs, the Levitating Fool, and Joseph's Spirit.

C: 我现在是沉稳睿智的「洞悉者」，这是我的最新外号，以后就喊我「洞悉者大人」或者「睿智的洞悉者大人」吧！
E: Now, I'm called the "Insighter," I am one who is wise and well-composed. Please call me "Lord Insighter" or "The Wise Lord Insighter" in the future!

C: 远程通话已开启，远程信号正常。
E: Remote call started. Remote signals normal.

C: 吹得神乎其神的啊。
E: That's a load of divine bull.

C: 这不是我的真正实力。
E: This isn't my full power.

C: 唉，常在河边走，哪能不湿鞋。这次咱们算是认栽了。
E: *sigh* If you play with fire, you're bound to get burned. Let's just admit our defeat this time.

C: 虽说它们看起来和垃圾没什么两样，但眼尖的你还是注意到了：它们的表面似乎正流动着微弱的光。
E: Though they may seem like trash to the untrained eye, your sharp intuition alerts you to something: There seems to be a faint light coursing across their surfaces.

C: 尽管从液体的色泽来看，它不像普通泉水那般清澈，浑浊的模样看上去颇为可疑，但你还是注意到了它的特殊之处——在晃动中，液体间有点点星光闪烁。
E: Looking at its color, you can see that it is not as clear as regular spring water and has a suspicious cloudiness to it. However, you also notice something special about it... As it sloshes around, you see small flashes of sparkling starlight.

C: 我是阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，对大地的信仰如同吉奥里亚的神躯般坚定。我从云石天宫来，洗净我的身体与思想后，正要往城门口去。
E: I am Parmenides of Icatus. My faith in the earth is as firm as the divine body of Georios. I have come from Marmoreal Palace. Now that I have washed my mind and body, I shall head for the city gates.

C: 哈！智者的话语真是一阵见血。帕门弥德，你怕是要砸掉自己的饭碗咯。
E: Hah! Your words go right for the throat, wise one! Parmenides, you are in danger of destroying your own profession!

C: 容我再思考一番…
E: Let me think about it...

C: 拉达曼？我好像听说过他……
E: Rhadaman? I think I've heard of him before...

C: 哎，她说被逼上如此绝路，才能显得父母不义。但，安全问题是我最大的顾虑……
E: *sigh* She said that only by forcing us into a desperate situation could her parents be painted as the bad guys. However, my greatest concern is our personal safety...

C: 没想到，他们竟然真会对自己的女儿采用强硬手段…阿芙罗小姐，你知道宁芙可能被带到哪儿了吗？
E: I never expected them to actually take such tough measures against their own daughter... Miss Aphrea, do you have any idea where they may have taken Nympha?

C: 厄琉斯，我刚听其他店主讨论，宁芙家的卫兵，最近在云石市集的附近频繁出现。
E: Aelius, I just heard some shopkeepers talking about Nympha's family guards. They've often been sighted near Marmoreal Market.

C: 原来宁芙…一直是在骗我吗…我只是来自异邦的玩物吗……
E: So Nympha... has been lying to me all along...? I'm just some boy toy from the outlands to her...

C: 快去吧，愿这块鹰血红带你见到你所爱之人。
E: Go, now! I hope this eagleblood can help lead you to the one you love.

C: 蛮不讲理的家庭！原来…宁芙一直在承受这样的高压，可她从未和我提起过丝毫。
E: How unreasonable her family is! So... Nympha has been putting up with such huge pressure at home, but never once let on to me about it.

C: 仇恨就像雪球，滚过千百年，到最后已不在乎最早犯错的究竟是谁。
E: Hatred is like a snowball: Once it's been rolling for centuries, it doesn't matter who made the first mistake.

C: 所以…我希望您能伸出援手……
E: So... I'm hoping you can help...

C: 无论如何，这人一定以某种形式事先了解过树庭的情况，他的行为方式根本不像一个莽撞的抢劫犯，反而像是个对一切了如指掌的刺客。
E: Regardless, this individual must have scouted out the Grove beforehand. His methodical approach doesn't scream of a careless burglar, but rather hints at a calculated assassin who's thoroughly in the know.

C: 我曾雇佣你出城调查，寻找德墨忒尔婶婶女儿的线索。
E: I once hired you to leave the city to investigate, looking for clues about Aunt Demetria's daughter.

C: 我可以替你去看看。
E: I could go on your behalf.

C: 来，试试把手挂到我的肩膀……
E: Here, try grabbing onto my shoulder...

C: 你小心翼翼地将其拎起，突然福至心灵——或许在刚刚的那段记忆中，挡在姐姐与怪物之间的妹妹，拿起的就是这把剑？
E: You pick it up carefully, then it dawns on you — could this be the blade the younger girl raised in her last defiant stand?

C: 我真的快要饿晕了，这就是脑力劳动带来的负担吗？
E: I'm really starving here. Is this the true burden of mental exhaustion?

C: 研发只投入一成预算。
E: Only <unbreak>10%</unbreak> of the budget has been invested in R&D.

C: 你怎么又没回复群消息？群公告一旦更新，就要回复一次「收到」！！！
E: Why haven't you replied to the group chat? When the group notice is updated, you have to reply with "Received"!

C: 不过话说回来，你觉不觉得咱们说话也有点那个。
E: But then again, don't you think us even talking is too... y'know?

C: 哥们，你给我发的那个报告我看过了。
E: Dude, I read the report you gave me.

C: …来…这边……
E: Come... over here...

C: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡？
E: Grumph... Grumphhh?

C: 所以…呃，我插句话，你们就是这头大地兽的主人？
E: So... uh, let me interrupt. Are you the owners of this dromas?

C: 陷害？你被谁陷害了？
E: Entrapped? Who set you up?

C: 你这丑恶的神明！我为你奉献了一切！你曾经多少次舐过我的祭品！
E: You despicable deity! I gave you everything! How many times have you enjoyed my offerings!

C: 不要叫我伊俄，我是埃德加！我要向不公平的命运作出反抗，我要弑神！
E: Don't call me Eio. I'm Edgar! I'll defy unfair fate and slay the gods!

C: 没错，我是这么写的。
E: Yes, that's what I wrote.

C: 那这件事，就此结束？
E: So, is that it? Case closed?

C: 所以呢？
E: And?

C: 是我挨了一顿打，我还要负全责吗？我以为我们在讨论对伊俄惩罚的轻重……
E: What? I took the beating, and now I'm to blame? I thought we were discussing how to punish Eio, not me...

C: …这画像是她吗？
E: ...Is this portrait really her?

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，真是麻烦你了，要陪我起个大早…守卫大叔说得没错，这会儿人确实少了许多，幸好跟他打过招呼了。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, sorry for making you get up so early... The guard was right, there are definitely fewer people now. Good thing we talked to him ahead of time.

C: 可笑，我在这里主持了几十年的祭仪，没人比我更懂刻法勒。
E: Ridiculous! I've presided over the rituals for decades — no one knows Kephale better than I do.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，久等啦。刻法勒大人真的很好，耐心地听我说了好多话。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, thanks for waiting! The great Kephale was really kind and patiently listened to everything I had to say.

C: 光是守住这里就已经十分勉强，更别提抽出人手外出搜救。任由平民独自外出和送死无异，这也是为你着想。
E: Just holding this place is already a struggle, let alone sending people out for rescue missions. Letting civilians go out alone is no different from sending them to their deaths, this is for your own good, too.

C: 再考虑考虑。
E: Let me think it over again.

C: 克利克瞅准机会丢下货箱，被砸中的怪物们应声倒地。你和柯库翁一拳一个，将圣殿中的怪物扫荡了个干净。
E: Kilik seized the opportunity and dropped the cargo box, crushing the monsters it hit, causing them to collapse. You and Glykon each took down a monster with a punch, clearing out the remaining creatures in the temple.

C: 嚯，好身手。如果你去参加摔跤比赛，恐怕连我也要暂避锋芒。
E: Impressive moves there! If you ever entered a wrestling competition, I'd have to step out of your way.

C: 不过嘛，我现在天天都在做好事，期盼着到了再创世，我能成为一名真正的刻法勒祭司！
E: But now? Daily do-gooder! In the Era Nova, I'll be a proper priestess of Kephale!

C: 回想他的长相。
E: Recall his face.

C: 开什么玩笑呢？是刻法勒。
E: Are you kidding? It was Kephale.

C: 扩声器漏音了？
E: The voice amplifier malfunctioned?

C: 是的…昨天{NICKNAME}阁下送完信回来，我才决定鼓起勇气和他当面表达清楚。
E: Yes... After {NICKNAME} came back from delivering the letter yesterday, I finally decided to gather my courage and tell him face-to-face.

C: 在畅饮蜜酿之时，我脑中掠过一缕针扎般的念头——逐火之旅果真能如此完美么？一场欢宴，果真能承载翁法罗斯那悲惨的命运么？
E: As I indulged in the honey brew, a needle-sharp thought pierced my mind — could the Flame-Chase Journey really be this perfect? Could a mere banquet truly bear the weight of Amphoreus's tragic destiny?

C: 但我一直想说，你念诗的样子很美。我想过，等到了新世界，一定要与你并肩相依……
E: But I've always wanted to tell you, you look beautiful when you recite poetry. I've dreamed that when we reach the new world, we'll stand side by side...

C: 你好，灰鱼儿。所谓欢宴，正是由灵魂的洋流交织而出的浪花与暗涌。
E: Hello, Gray Fry. A feast, you see, is like waves and undercurrents woven from the ocean currents of our souls.

C: 迷津残卷在摇曳着，希望你操控「雅努斯迷津」，帮它追溯过去的推演。
E: The Maze scroll fragment is flickering. Use Janus' Maze to help retrace and extrapolate its past.

C: 委托名「世界的真理在哪里」，推演结果是「反正不在这」。
E: Request: "Where is the truth of the world?" - Extrapolation Result: "Not here, that's for sure."

C: 你要是有空，记得回空间站看看，大家都挺想你的。
E: If you're ever free to visit the space station, please come check in on us. We all miss you.

C: 那虎克就特批帕姆为鼹鼠党的荣誉队员吧。
E: It's settled then — Hook will make Pom-Pom an honorary member of The Moles.

C: 不如提拔我当鼹鼠党二把手…
E: Why don't you make me deputy leader of The Moles...

C: 其实…克拉拉是想说——不知道{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}还记得帕斯卡吗？
E: Actually... I wanted to ask if you remember Pascal.

C: 都聊什么了？
E: What were you two talking about?

C: 参观列车过后，我就在想……
E: Ever since the Express tour, I've been wondering...

C: 我非常理解你…
E: It's not for everyone...

C: 别在列车上聊工作…
E: We have a rule on the Express — no work talk...

C: 科员们经常需要坐在椅子上办公，有的时候也会抱怨肩颈酸痛。
E: Sadly a lot of our researchers get shoulder and neck pain — they're sat at their desks most of the day.

C: 啊，那大概是在下弄错了吧。
E: Ah? Then I am most likely mistaken.

C: 这里就是空间站「黑塔」吗，不知访客能否入内？
E: So, this is the Herta Space Station? I wonder, are visitors permitted onboard?

C: 安心吧，只是来串个门。我正在进攻星际互联网络的黑域，碰巧在网络迷宫看见了星穹列车的信号，就来瞧一眼。
E: Relax, I'm just dropping by for a visit. I was hacking through the dark regions of the Interastral Network a while ago and happened to see a signal from the Astral Express, so I thought I'd stop by to check it out.

C: 你们这么大个车厢，连台街机都没有，真好奇你们平时都是怎么打发时间的，读书？拍照？喝咖啡？东奔西走助人为乐？
E: You all have so much space here on the Express, and not so much as a single arcade machine to show for it. How do you pass the time? Reading? Photography? Sipping coffee? Running around everywhere helping people as a hobby?

C: 星核猎手不是这样吗？
E: So a Stellaron Hunter's life is not like this?

C: 比之前矮。
E: You're shorter than before.

C: 也好也好，只要不是无意义地谩骂和批判，我都会好好听着的。
E: Fine fine. I'll take it to heart as long as it's not pointless criticism and slander.

C: 不过幸好，我的人生还不算彻底黯淡无光。毕竟我还拥有你，以及真正理解我的人。
E: Thankfully, my life is not completely devoid of light. After all, I still have you and those who really understand me.

C: 首先去验收收容回来的奇物，然后再去做例行仓库抽检，最后答应了要陪阿德勒去找那个会说话的怪东西…哎哟，今天也没空写报告了！
E: Firstly I need to do the inventory for reclaimed Curios, then do regular quality control at the warehouse, then I promised Adler to go find the weird thing that talks... Great, no time to write my report today either!

C: 哼，别提了！刚刚知道洛奇走了的时候，可差点没把我气死！
E: Ugh, don't even get me started. I was absolutely livid when I first realized Rocky had left.

C: 帕姆…好眼熟……
E: Pom-Pom looks... familiar...

C: 而且…智库…智库还没……
E: And... the data bank... It hasn't been...

C: 游云天君的传说？
E: Tales about the Cloudstrider?

C: （托帕还在打电话……）
E: (Topaz is still on the phone...)

C: 唔，看来我还是缺乏经验……
E: Mm... looks like I still have a lot to learn...

C: 你们每天就是像这样踩着银河，在太空里旅行吗？真厉害…怪不得列车组的人个个都见多识广。
E: So, you guys travel across the galaxy and journey through space like this every day? That's so cool... No wonder everyone on the Express is so knowledgeable.

C: 一位故友，不知镜流是否向你提起过，那是许多年前的事了……
E: An old friend. I'm not sure if Jingliu has ever mentioned her to you — it was many years ago...

C: 有什么观察结果吗？
E: Have you sensed anything?

C: …对了{NICKNAME}，你觉得列车长和尾巴大爷谁更可爱？
E: Who do you think's cuter, {NICKNAME}? Pom-Pom or Mr. Tail?

C: 有意思的是，不知为何，列车组的感情常常让我想起我与黑塔、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬的关系。
E: I can't explain it, but for some reason, the dynamics among the Express Crew often remind me of my relationship with Herta, Screwllum, and Stephen.

C: 有列车长在，一切都不是问题！
E: With the conductor around, everything will be just fine!

C: 放松的感觉…
E: The feeling of relaxation...

C: 刚才看到列车长在给盆栽浇水，它是不是很喜欢绿植？我这就托管家帮忙，尽快送些匹诺康尼特有的绿植过来。
E: I saw the conductor watering the bonsai earlier. Do they really like plants? I'll ask the butler to help send over some of Penacony's unique flora as soon as possible.

C: 不得不说，清理完那些不必需、不合适的物品后，整个人都变得清爽了很多。
E: But I have to say, after clearing out all those unnecessary items, I feel much more refreshed.

C: 烟花？哪里？没看到啊？
E: Fireworks? Where? I don't see any.

C: 不过嘛，如果不是梦里可爱的森林、青草地和小狐狸开始褪色扭曲。我说不定能再睡一整天！
E: But, if the cute forest, meadows, and little foxes hadn't started to twirl and fade away, I really might have slept for the whole day!

C: 难道还有别的方式？
E: Was there any other way to open it?

C: 礼物嘛，就是要有仪式感才行。
E: It's a present. Of course it's gotta look the part.

C: 星海间有太多消逝之物，那些前人寻过的路和被遗忘的往昔，本都应当在宇宙的进程中留下浓墨重彩的一笔。
E: There are too many discarded things in the sea of stars. Our predecessors' trodden paths and forgotten pasts should have left behind vivid marks across the universe.

C: 还是替三月谢谢你！
E: I still have to thank you on her behalf!

C: 记住，你的第一感知，是非常重要的。
E: Remember, your first instinct is very important.

C: 所以！你不仅觉得我脾气差，还觉得它长得丑？
E: So, not only do you think I have a bad temper, but you also think he's ugly?

C: 唉…虽说徒弟已经学到了些本事，但我这当师父的，终究还是放心不下啊！
E: Even though my apprentice has learned a thing or two, as a master, I can't stop worrying!

C: 正是！
E: Yes!

C: 你手气也太好了吧？我不信，一会儿换个位置再来。
E: That's a hot hand you got tonight! I can't believe it. Will you switch places with me?

C: 你说的该不会是华莱士吧？好巧啊，他就是我的赞助商…等等，他要和我做朋友？我还以为他也对物种学感兴趣呢！
E: You can't be talking about Wallace? What a coincidence! He's my sponsor... Wait, he wants to be friends with me? I thought he was interested in speciology!

C: 你这么讨厌他？
E: You hate him that much?

C: 交出未妥投的信封•四
E: Hand over the Misdelivered Letter 4

C: 您打算在请愿表上签字了吗？还是说，您有其它问题想问呢？
E: Are you ready to sign the petition or do you have any other questions?

C: 你好？
E: Hello?

C: 他有恰到好处的幽默感，既温柔体贴又内敛克制……
E: He has the right amount of humor. He's caring, thoughtful, and restrained...

C: 你别想太多。
E: Don't let it bother you too much.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: （适当的沉默）
E: (Brief silence)

C: 我想问问你…
E: I wanted to ask you...

C: 嗯？你说……
E: Mm-hmm...

C: 照你这逻辑，我要是批评「哞哞」牛奶不好喝，还得自己先学会产奶了是不是？简直是荒谬！
E: Based on your logic, I would have to learn to produce milk myself if I say I'm not a fan of Moo-Moo Milk. That's ridiculous!

C: 这不挺好的吗？
E: Isn't this good news?

C: 浪费？
E: Waste of time?

C: 我想读推理小说。
E: I love mystery novels.

C: 你觉得是大守护者的功劳？
E: Do you think it's the work of the Supreme Guardian?

C: 我只是在闲逛…
E: I'm just taking a stroll...

C: 但现在可不一样了。只要有人租我的矿具，那么我不出工的三天也能挣到钱！这也就意味着……
E: But now it's different. If someone rents my mining tools, I can earn money during the time I don't work! It means...

C: 你刚才明明在喊…
E: You were shouting out that...

C: …算了，之后再说吧。你找我有什么事？
E: ...No, I'll deal with it some other time. What is it you want to see me about?

C: 怎么，你觉得我这是病？
E: What, do you think I'm ill?

C: 我，我答应了那个姐姐，以后绝对不会再偷东西了…必须说到做到……
E: I... I promised her that I would never steal again... I must keep my word...

C: 等我学成了，以后就能靠这门手艺赚钱，然后就能帮到老爹他……
E: When I master the techniques, I'll be able to make some money with them. Then I can help my dad...

C: 我、我没别的意思。各位、各位没事的话就不、不打扰了……
E: Sorry, I — I didn't mean to bother you. I'll leave you alone...

C: 这饭店也归「地火」管吗？
E: Is this hotel under the administration of Wildfire?

C: 关于托帕，你怎么看？
E: What do you think about Topaz?

C: 没错，还好她能站在我们这边…这就叫因祸得福吧？贝洛伯格经历了一番重大的考验，但也因此获得了一位强大的盟友。
E: You're right. It's a relief that she is on our side... I guess this is what you'd call a blessing in disguise, right? Though Belobog experienced a great trial, it also gained a powerful ally because of it.

C: 留在这里的都是托帕小姐最信任的员工，他们似乎管这叫「技术支援类外派驻场」。
E: Those that are stationed here are all Topaz's most trusted employees. It seems they call this place an "Exo-Technical Support Dispatch Zone."

C: 关于你哥哥的事…
E: About your brother...

C: 不过我已经向上级请假回家探亲了。看在我解决了失控机器人问题的份上，应该可以批准我回去吧？
E: But I've applied for a few days off to visit my family, and I think it will be approved since I solved the Malfunctioning Robot problem.

C: 这次回去，我可一定要向母女俩好好道歉才行…
E: Once I get back home, I must apologize to my wife and my daughter...

C: 继续听多米尼克演讲…
E: Continue listening to Dominic...

C: 有什么要我帮忙的吗？
E: Is there anything I can help you with?

C: …谨言慎行，外来者！
E: ...Be careful with your words, outsider!

C: 茉莉小姐在那之后状态如何？
E: How's Molly after that incident?

C: 然而，这一数值将随着时间推进不可避免地回升。
E: However, this metric will inevitably increase again with the passage of time.

C: 你担心矿工们会找公司麻烦？别怕，问题已经解决了。
E: You think the mine workers will be looking for trouble with the IPC? Don't worry. We've already resolved this.

C: 香甜的面包屑，是漫天飘散的雪雾
E: Those sweet breadcrumbs, like scattered snowflakes

C: 用它轻柔细腻的指，弹奏余晖、山丘和家乡
E: Gently play that music, your hometown's within sight

C: 路上小心，{NICKNAME}。愿你的旅途里都是晴天。
E: So long, {NICKNAME}. I wish you a smooth ride ahead.

C: 多亏了我，这里的矿工已经基本掌握了日常操作。难道不是好事一桩吗？
E: Thanks to me, the miners here are getting the hang of it. Isn't that a good thing?

C: 扑满的逃跑天赋同样反映在它身体的各个部位上。你试图抓住它灵巧的耳朵，手速却怎么都不够用。
E: The Trotter's talent for escape is reflected in every part of its body. You try to catch its dexterous ears, but your hand is just not fast enough.

C: 次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神，使用撞击！
E: Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord, charge!

C: 这年头，工作真难找啊…
E: These days, it's really hard to find work...

C: 就是少了点技巧……
E: But there's room for improvement...

C: 你等会儿，我腿麻了……
E: Wait just a second, my leg fell asleep...

C: 那个啥…你们能说人话不？
E: That thing... Can you guys please talk sense?

C: 美食专栏作者出来挨打。
E: Who authored this food column? Come out, and get a beating.

C: …你们会刷盘子吗？
E: ...Do you guys mind washing dishes?

C: 岳父！
E: Sir!

C: 这时刻表……
E: This timetable...

C: 近日，大矿区矿民与流浪者爆发激烈冲突，史瓦罗大佬的机器人也强行介入……
E: A fierce conflict recently broke out between some miners and vagrants at the Great Mine. Svarog's robots forcibly intervened...

C: 我才不去干体力活呢。
E: Manual labor is just not my thing.

C: 这座学校是我的母校，也是我宝贵的心血。倒也不是自夸，但在我任校长那会儿，我们学院的办学水平可以说是达到了有史以来的新高峰……
E: The college is my alma mater, and I poured my heart and soul in it. I don't mean to indulge in self-praise, but when I was serving as its dean, the college's education level was at its historic peak...

C: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，{NICKNAME}。我是博物馆的志愿导览员，兼银鬃铁卫戍卫官，杰帕德。
E: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, {NICKNAME}. I am a volunteer tour guide of the museum and the Silvermane Guard Captain, Gepard.

C: 这位志愿导览员似乎并不打算来段说唱，还是不要逼她了。
E: This volunteer tour guide doesn't seem to be in a mood for rapping, so maybe don't force her.

C: 不过，我仍然需要提醒您，幽囚狱是罗浮仙舟囚禁重案犯人的所在地，{NICKNAME}大人需要对幽囚狱内所见所闻之事按照保密章程进行守密，请您务必遵守。
E: However, I am dutifully obliged to remind you that the Shackling Prison is where the Xianzhou Luofu imprisons our most dangerous felons. {NICKNAME}, {M#sir}{F#madam}, we seek your cooperation to keep everything you see and hear in the Shackling Prison to yourself, as laid out in our confidentiality regulations.

C: 之前在太卜司的时候认识了一位小姑娘叫作青雀，你要是经常来这里，也会经常看到她。她从书库里复原了这个棋牌戏，就叫「帝垣琼玉」。
E: I knew a girl called Qingque during my time at the Divination Commission. You'll run into her if you come here often. She recreated this game called "Celestial Jade" from old books.

C: 我自己是不做饭的。
E: I don't do my own cooking.

C: 您也知道，仙舟人的一生很漫长，所以特别追求各种不同的味觉体验。
E: You know that a Xianzhou native's life is long, so they are very particular about variety in their pursuit of flavor.

C: 咱也是持明嘛，心想着持明同胞得到了这样的荣誉，咱高低得去捧捧场…结果去了一看，您敢信吗？喂鸟都不够吃的一点东西，他们竟敢要价几十万信用点！
E: Being Vidyadhara, I thought I had to go and support the business of my kin, especially when they received such honors... But that place charged hundreds of thousands of credits for portions that won't even be filling for little birds! Would you believe it?

C: 老板，你的态度好冷淡。
E: Boss, you could be a little more enthusiastic.

C: 你是不是也觉得蘑菇不该失败？
E: Do you also think mushrooms shouldn't fail?

C: 悲伤淹没了你…
E: Sadness overwhelms you...

C: 不过，看您这打扮，应该是其他世界派来幽囚狱视察访问的贵客吧？
E: But, looking at how you're dressed, you must be a distinguished guest from another world sent here to inspect The Shackling Prison?

C: 他这样游手好闲，要是在别的工作环境上，也许就会被排挤了吧？但是我想再给他些时间，他只是暂时还没有准备好。
E: At any other workplace, he'd be cast aside for being so lazy, right? But I want to give him some more time. He's just not ready yet.

C: 我们这些局外人没法真正理解他，但是至少能给他「足够的时间」，几十年也好，几百年也好，这就是长生社会少有的好处了。
E: We have no way of really understanding him, but at least we can give him "enough time," be it decades or centuries. That's one of the few great benefits of living in a long-life society.

C: 步离人也会做生意？
E: Borisin know how to do business?

C: 哈哈，倒也有不少人这样问过我。可你也要明白，工作不是说换就换的。
E: Haha, everyone always asks me that. But you also have to understand that a job isn't something I have the luxury of changing.

C: 搞什么成年资格认证啊，烦死了。爹娘难道就没有法子替我解决这档破事吗？
E: This stupid rite of passage thing is such a pain. Is there really no way for my parents to just do it all for me?

C: 听上去不太靠谱。
E: Sounds pretty unreliable.

C: 建木生发以后，罗浮人的健康状况急剧恶化，我这才不得不违背族制，将这副「建木正气膏」拿出来贩售。
E: The Xianzhou people's health has rapidly deteriorated since the regrowth of the Arbor, so I had to bend the race laws a little bit so I could start hawking my Ambrosial Arbor Ointment.

C: 可别提了，神策府下了死命令，要我们在建木生发的敏感时间段严防死守，决不允许出现任何次生灾害。
E: Drop it. The Seat of Divine Foresight put out a mandate demanding that we stand on strict guard duty during this sensitive period of regrowth. We absolutely cannot afford any secondary problems to occur.

C: 别提了，我那「阻止建木继续生长」的众筹活动才刚开了个头呢，前期投资我都砸了不少进去…现在倒真停了。
E: Don't even go there. My crowdfunding campaign to stop the growth of the Ambrosial Arbor has just started, and I have invested heavily in it... Now, the tree has stopped growing for real.

C: 灾难终于结束了…
E: The disaster is finally over...

C: 姐，这可不是应该对客人细说的内容。
E: Sis, we shouldn't be telling strangers these details.

C: 好什么兴致啊，老夫都快烦死了！
E: Yes, an excellently annoyed mood!

C: 嗐…说得又不是你，你跟着起什么急啊……
E: Oh, I didn't mean you... What are you getting riled up for...

C: 老夫的爱徒们啊！活得太长了！一切都可以拖到明天，因为还有无数个明天！每个人都像一块湿柴火，怎么点也点不着，不会燃烧，只会冒着白烟散发废气！
E: But my darling apprentices! They live far too long! Everything can just be put off until tomorrow, because the tomorrows seemingly never end! They're like wet firewood: They don't burn enough, and even if they catch fire, they just pump out a whole load of useless smoke!

C: 地衡司执事的正式回复。
E: The formal response from a Realm-Keeping Commission officer.

C: 这不是一本正经的胡说八道吗…
E: You're just spouting nonsense, aren't you?

C: 你来自什么样的国家呢？
E: What kind of country do you come from?

C: 所以该从谁手上购入这批超导合金，就成了我该头疼的问题。
E: So the question of who to buy these superconducting alloys from has grown into a rather thorny problem for me.

C: 求之不得，老爷你想聊些什么呢？
E: That's all I could ask for. What would you like to chat about?

C: 哎呀，糟糕…一不小心就讲上头了…抱歉，这些事您肯定比我更清楚，完全没必要浪费时间听我在这里喋喋不休……
E: Ah! Whoops! Got carried away. Sorry. You must know these details better than I do. There was no need to waste your time with all my incessant chattering...

C: 太卜司怎么你了？
E: What did the Divination Commission ever do to you?

C: 算了，我没什么想问的了。
E: Forget it. I don't have any more questions.

C: 但咱们无法一个个详加盘问，毕竟这里名义上是属于持明族共治的洞天。
E: But we can't just interrogate them one-by-one. After all, this delve is under Vidyadhara rule, at least on paper.

C: 太卜司的人曾给我算过一卦，说我会是大富大贵的命。可我不信，江湖行医嘛，为的不过就是一口饭而已。
E: Once, this diviner read my fortune and told me I'd be rollin' in dough and living large. But I ain't buying it. I mean, I'm just a wandering healer trying to make ends meet.

C: 这段时间我一直在想，一直在想，但怎么想也想不通——我那时真的应该出手吗……
E: These days I can't stop thinking about this all the time, but I can never get over it. That day, did I really have to take up arms and...?

C: 听说「建木」重生是因为有人将星核送进了鳞渊境深处…哼，向来持明族中有人也被药王秘传的妖人蛊惑了。要不了多久，神策府也许会对龙师们发难吧？
E: I heard that the Arbor's resurrection was caused by someone plunging a Stellaron deep into the Scalegorge Waterscape waters... Hmph, thinking things through, some Vidyadhara may also have been seduced by those Disciple devils. It won't be long before the Seat of Divine Foresight comes after the Preceptors, will it?

C: 护珠人啊…这可是个古老的行当。持明族蜕生成卵时，除了珠壳之外，对外界的危险毫无抵抗力。因此持明内部历来会赋予在世的青壮「护珠」的职责。
E: Pearlkeepers are... an ancient profession. When Vidyadhara molt into eggs, they have no protection from the outside world other than their eggshells. That's why the Vidyadhara have historically bestowed the role of Pearlkeeping upon their young and strong.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 你怎么什么都不知道！
E: How come you don't know anything?

C: 你不会相信那些金属脑袋能战胜我聪明的大脑吧？那些金人傻乎乎的，行动轨迹早被我摸透了。
E: You don't believe that those bolt-brains could ever compete with my great mind, do you? Those aurumatons are simple and dim-witted. I figured out their patrol routes a long time ago!

C: 您来了，请问还有什么事情要找我吗？
E: There you are. Is there anything else I can do for you?

C: 好的，您慢走。
E: Okay. See you.

C: 是什么味道？
E: Of what?

C: 听上去口气不小，动手试试啊？
E: You sure talk big, buddy. You wanna fight?

C: …我明白了。这不是在街道上谈论的话题，是我语气有些强硬了。
E: ...I see. This isn't a topic to be discussed out in the open. I was being too tough.

C: 毕竟我做的是劳务中介的工作，交谈两句就该把握个四五成了。
E: Well, I'm an employment agent, after all. I can usually get a sense of what my clients are like from just a few words.

C: 你是在小看「商业行为」。不能打听的事情太多了，不止是我安排的工作。
E: You underestimate "business practices." Apart from the jobs I arrange, there are many things that shouldn't be heard outside of the ears of the intended parties.

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 来仙舟旅游该买什么纪念品？
E: What souvenirs should I buy on my Xianzhou trip?

C: 再说了，我家是出了名的专卖稀奇货，客户群稳定得很……好了好了，这些都属于商业机密，您就甭操心了。
E: Besides, everyone knows me as someone specializing in rare goods. I have plenty of stable customers... Never mind. Don't you worry your pretty little head about this. These are business secrets.

C: 算了，这些事也急不得一时。倒是你，你是有什么事吗？
E: Ah, never mind. These things won't change overnight after all. But you... what brings you here?

C: 过去的金人巷到底是有多繁华呢？
E: How prosperous was this alley before?

C: 客官您好，请问有什么需要的吗？
