E: Greetings, customer. What do you need?

C: 我毕竟是个丹士，就算永陷幽囚深狱，也不可能就这样甘愿一辈子手搓日用化学品。
E: I'm an alchemist, after all. Even if I'm doomed to eternal confinement within the Shackling Prison, there's no way I'd be willing to resign myself to a lifetime of making household chemical products by hand.

C: 哈哈哈哈，棋局只是用来娱乐休息的。棋局讲究对弈双方开局公平，有胜有负，鲜有和局，对吗？
E: Hahaha, chess is just for fun and games. It's all about starting off on equal footing, having gains and losses along the way, and reaching a decisive result at the end.

C: 复活了三次以后，兄弟们说了——我必须跟着一起上阵，不能再坐在台下指挥了。于是没办法，我就只能一起上擂台去打架了……
E: After coming back via repechage three times, the guys said I had to get in the ring and fight instead of sitting on the sidelines. So, I had no choice but to step up and join the fray.

C: 这东西是本座当年和异邦人做技术交流时写给对方的书信，内容算得上深入浅出，用作宣教材料最合适不过，也省去了本座一番解释的功夫。
E: These are the letters I wrote to the traveler during a technical exchange years ago. The content covers a lot but is easy to read, making it suitable to be used as educational material. It spares me the trouble of doing the explanation too.

C: 看不完的参考情报，批不完的军务报告，还要同天舶司处理外事，同工造司讨论修缮…如此一看，出征巡猎反而更像是休假。
E: I have endless pieces of intelligence to read and military reports to review. Besides, I also have to deal with external affairs with the Sky-Faring Commission and discuss the reconstruction work with the Artisanship Commission... With so much going on, any outing, even if it were on official business, would feel like a vacation to me.

C: 一开始还有人指责这「帝垣琼玉牌」让人玩物丧志，浪费时间；后来不知怎么的，有人说这牌是「越古博戏」能够锻炼大脑，增长智力。
E: At first, some accused the game of being addictive and time-wasting. Later on, the game was somehow hailed as an ancient game that could keep one's mind sharp.

C: 推测：因为仙舟联盟的有机体拥有远优于「我们」的计算机科技，所以他们可以在「我们」展露敌意的瞬间，就将「我们」囚禁。
E: Conjecture: The Xianzhou Alliance possesses computational technology far superior to ours. Consequently, these intelligent organic lifeforms were able to incarcerate us the moment we displayed hostility.

C: 不聊了，拜拜。
E: That's it for today. Bye.

C: 想和藿藿再随便聊聊。
E: I just wanted to chat with you.

C: …我什么时候才能像她一样。
E: ...I wonder when I can become like her.

C: 要不你歇会儿去？
E: Why don't you go take a rest?

C: 你就拿这种态度招呼景元老兄？
E: Do you greet Jing Yuan with this attitude as well?

C: （询问寒鸦的日常工作）
E: (Ask Hanya about the daily work)

C: 行，等客官什么时候方便，我们再来聊聊。
E: Okay, let's chat again when you have the time.

C: （太长了，下次再听吧）
E: (This story is taking too long. I'll listen to it another time.)

C: 客人误会了，这家小店是家父开的，不夜侯在宣夜大街上也有四百余载啦！
E: My parents opened this teahouse, not me. The Sleepless Earl has been on Starwatcher Avenue for over four hundred years!

C: 我想来杯茶。
E: I'd like a cup of tea.

C: 这些年，我考取了很多职业资格证，就是为了能够在任何船队的任何岗位有空缺时挤进去。
E: Over the years, I've taken plenty of professional certifications to fill up any vacancies a crew might have.

C: 是不是你的标准太高了？
E: Could your standards be too high?

C: 你要是他们中的一员，你肯定就知道我是什么病情了。但是看着你天真无辜的小脸蛋，我很确信，你根本就不知道。
E: If you were, you'd surely know what illness has stricken me. But with that sweet, innocent face of yours, I'm certain you have no clue.

C: 跑去别的世界是很严重的罪吗？
E: Is it such a serious offense, running off to other worlds?

C: 我刚逃出仙舟，选了一个文明开化不到一千年的世界。为了避免云骑军的追查，我开着最小型的逃生鞘降落地表。
E: Back when I just fled from Xianzhou, I chose a civilization that was not even a millennium young. To evade the Cloud Knights' queries, I drove the smallest escape sheath I could find to descend on the surface.

C: 就是这样！我不认为自己是什么重犯，本仙只是在追求自己的幸福罢了！要是能在仙舟过上好生活，谁会想去什么低文明的穷乡僻壤生活啊？
E: That's right! I'm not some hardened criminal. I just want to pursue my own happiness! If I could live out the good life on Xianzhou, who would even think of slumming it in some lowly civilization?

C: 我相信，那肯定就是我在筋肉命途登神的前兆。
E: I believe that to be a sign of me ascending to the Path of Brawn.

C: 没错，寄件请预约鹤运速递～我是鹤运物流专员，梓桥。
E: That's right. For deliveries, please book a courier with Heron Express. I'm a Heron Express Specialist — Ziqiao's my name.

C: 当真啥都能寄吗？
E: Is it true that you can really mail anything?

C: 那可太忙了。在这里为星槎测速是一件事，高峰期统计往来星槎数量是一件事、为路过行人普法…就像现在这样…也是一件事…哎，工作总也做不完。
E: Way too busy. It's one thing to measure every starskiff's speed, but it's another to count the number of starskiffs in rush-hour traffic. And I have to enforce the law for each case... like I am right now. It's just another thing to do. My job is never done.

C: 感觉这辈子都没有机会了。
E: I don't think I'll ever get that chance.

C: 你唱得真好听。
E: Your voice is beautiful.

C: 一般般，没什么区别。
E: Hmm, nah. Sounds the same to me.

C: 记住这是天舶司的第一条规矩，别乱动驭空大人的东西。
E: Remember the first rule of the Sky-Faring Commission: Don't touch Madam Yukong's things without permission.

C: 没错，天舶司担负着与异族互通有无的重任，而商会则是这其中最重要的一环。
E: That's right. The Sky-Faring Commission bears the salient duty of exchanging mutual necessities with other races, and the merchant guilds are a key part of this process.

C: 可惜了，可惜。我还以为你够资格，是我误会了。这一方小小竞锋舰，自称吸引了天下的习武高手，本以为能让我兴奋一下，看来也不过如此。哎……
E: Oh, what a shame! I thought you worthy, but I was wrong. This little Skysplitter boasted about attracting the greatest martial artists in the cosmos and got me all hyped up, but what a letdown it has been.

C: 再者说来，我和仙舟签订过互不侵犯协议，不会在联盟境内动武。要是一不小心忘了收力，将罗浮击沉了，你说谁能负责？
E: Besides, I've signed a non-aggression pact with the Xianzhou and pledged to abstain from violence within the alliance's borders. If I fail to keep my strength in check and sink the Luofu, who's to be held accountable for that?

C: 「我知道你很急，但你先别急」，「现在先别急，以后有你急的」…我感觉自己像是一个踢来踢去的皮球，真是气死了。
E: "I know you're in a hurry, but slow down," "Take it easy, worry about it later"... I'm getting kicked around every which way like a ball on the field!

C: 再说了，我们俩也见过面，我还拜托过你帮我送东西呢。
E: Not to mention we've met before. I even asked you to deliver something for me.

C: 我懂我懂，我是有原则的，跟那些真正的下流之徒是不一样的，别担心。
E: I get it. Unlike the true scoundrels, I have principles. So relax.

C: 不过您放心，要是地衡司的人来了，我就不会这么喊了，他们管这叫虚假宣传。我这个人不惹事儿，自己心里门儿清。
E: Don't worry though. I don't yell this tagline if the Realm-Keeping Commission's around. They say it's "false advertising." I'm not looking for trouble, I know better than that.

C: 下次进货了之后，客人记得再来呀。
E: Do come back again when my next batch of goods arrives.

C: 嘘——我从不搞地下赌博。你看，这里是竞锋舰，这是天上赌博。
E: Shhh, I'll never touch underground betting. And look, this is the Skysplitter, so we're actually betting in the sky.

C: 嘻嘻，虽然彦卿大人比合影里更迷你一点，但不妨碍他在我心中的高大形象。
E: Hehe, although Master Yanqing appears smaller than in the photo, it doesn't hinder his mighty image in my heart.

C: 彦卿大人让云骑不要为难我，所以云骑只对我进行了批评教育。
E: Master Yanqing instructed the Cloud Knights to not make things difficult for me, so they only severely reprimanded me.

C: 我什么也没有。
E: I have nothing.

C: 那给你尝一小块…
E: Then here, have a little taste...

C: 酷耶，早就想养一只！
E: Cool, I've been wanting one of those for ages!

C: 就是说啊！管饭吗？
E: Right!? What do we eat in the meantime?

C: 怎么这样啊！你这个骗子！你好过分！
E: Huh, how!? You blasted liar, that's too much, man!

C: 我也没见到，虽然我从一开始就不觉得真能在线下见面……
E: Me neither, though I didn't really expect to meet in-person...

C: 你说的对。罗浮早就彻底消除了贫困，现在根本没有人需要为了温饱而「乞讨」。所以，这才更有「乞讨」的意义啊！
E: You're right. The Luofu has long eliminated poverty, and now absolutely no one has to beg for a warm bed and a hot meal. Which is what makes begging even more meaningful!

C: 有机会的话，得请你看场比赛。
E: If there's a chance, I'll invite you to watch a match.

C: 我真的不会开……
E: Honestly, I can't even drive...

C: 曜青和朱明的人陆续到了不少。
E: Many from the Yaoqing and the Zhuming have also come.

C: 如果只以为我是无法晋级那就大错特错了。不是我谦虚，以我的实力早就可以晋级。不过，这算是我的舒适区吧……
E: You're gravely mistaken if you think that's the case. I'm not trying to be modest, but I could've advanced long ago with my skills. It's just that this is my comfort zone...

C: 我不知道你在说什么，我不欺负老实人，我只欺负新人。
E: I don't know what you're talking about. I'm not bullying decent folk, I'm just bullying newcomers.

C: 有些事想问你。
E: I have a few questions I wish to ask you...

C: 我只有一点心得需要你记住——不要手下留情。只要能做到这点，无论是新人还是老人，你都能将对方彻底击溃。
E: You only need to remember one rule — never, ever be merciful. As long as you can accomplish this, newbie or not, you'll be able to crush your opponent.

C: 哎，这罗浮仙舟要是没了我该怎么办？
E: Ah, what would the Xianzhou Luofu do without me?

C: 都是业余乐手…
E: Amateurs...

C: 做工精良，绝世美玉！
E: Good workmanship. Exquisite jade!

C: 你能帮我加班吗？
E: Can you work overtime for me, please?

C: 我和她没话说！
E: I've got nothing to say to her!

C: 狡猾！狡猾！明明是我的！
E: You're a liar! That's a lie! It's obviously mine!

C: 这是扣押的违禁品。
E: It contains contraband goods that are confiscated.

C: 什么弹珠？也给我玩玩吧。
E: Marbles? I wanna play too!

C: 五味逍遥丸，养心返魂丹…
E: Pentaflavor Relax Pill, Rejuvenation Pellet...

C: 这事连我也听说了。
E: Even I have heard about the matter.

C: 我想想啊……
E: Let me think about it...

C: 原来你们那里管这样的事儿叫作葬礼……
E: So you guys call this thing a funeral...

C: 我和云泓入伍两百年…
E: I've been in the army with Yunhong for two hundred years now...

C: 思维枝椁、大地晶矿、悬锋钢，再缀以少许黄金……
E: Bough of Thought, Earth Crystal Ore, Kremnoan steel, with a touch of gold...

C: 当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
E: When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—

C: 或许他们也在等你加入。
E: Maybe they're waiting for you to join them.

C: 唉…我家披索，要是能有白厄一半省心就好了。
E: *sigh*... If only my Piso could be half as well-behaved as Phainon.

C: 是说黄金裔们？回想起上次轮回，我早早沉入大地深处，与多数英雄们几乎不曾有过照面。
E: You mean the Chrysos Heirs? Come to think of it, during the last cycle, I descended deep into the earth much earlier, so I barely crossed paths with most of the heroes.

C: 那我…我来！
E: Then I'll... I'll do it!

C: 呵呵，就罚你去给你的遐蝶姐姐编头发吧。
E: Hehe, as punishment, you'll have to go braid your sister Castorice's hair.

C: 那么，我就编右边吧。
E: Well then, I'll take the right side.

C: 下次，请在我的学生不在的场合这样称呼。
E: Next time, please call me that only when my students aren't around.

C: 但愿它也能让你平安归来。
E: I hope it brings you back safely, too.

C: 说几个段子就进来了？
E: You came in because you told a few jokes?

C: 那确实可以理解。
E: That is indeed understandable.

C: 我不明白，你必须当着我的面讲清楚！
E: I don't! You have to explain it to my face!

C: 罗浮是用中央控温系统。
E: We have centralized temperature control.

C: 「Woooh～」
E: "Woooh~"
Kneel

C: 材质：囚犯
E: Materials: Convict

C: 笼中无鸟，这也许是对自由生命最好的隐喻。就让牢笼空置着吧！
E: A cage without a bird is probably the best metaphor for a life of freedom. Just let the cage be empty!

C: 不愧是王牌执事，但是如何做，这需要你自己判断。
E: No doubt you're a top-class officer. But, regarding how to proceed, you must make your own judgment.

C: 先冷静一下，有尼古丁吗？
E: Need to calm down, anyone got a smoke?

C: 此言差矣，一力降十会。
E: I beg to differ: Sheer strength can overpower ten skilled fighters.

C: 铁臂卢卡！无敌拳法！
E: Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!

C: 在物流机巧鸟尚未被发明时，罗浮人一直在训练真正的鸟来送货——极高的丢件率促成了物流机巧鸟的诞生。
E: Before courier cycranes were invented, the Luofu people trained real birds to deliver their goods. The extremely high rate of goods being lost led to the creation of courier cycranes.

C: 星槎种子浸泡在富含营养的培养液中，如同一颗真正的种子——虽然有点像绕口令，但这实际上意味着星槎种子并非真正的种子。
E: Like a real seed, the starskiff seed is immersed in a culture medium full of nutrients. The concept might be confusing, but the starskiff seed isn't a real seed.

C: 「慧骃，灵长目 • 人科 • 有蹄亚种。丰饶之民中的一支。」
E: "Houyhnhnms: Primate, hominid, ungulate subspecies. They are one of the races of the Denizens of Abundance."

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: …你真幽默。
E: ...You're so funny.

C: 我得帮帮这位陌生人。
E: I must help this stranger.

C: 它宣称自己来自朱明仙舟。在那里，不朽的龙尊穿行于烈火炎庭中，信手挥洒灵感的星辉。而它受尊主之令，前来传授罗浮工造司诸位大师匠艺。
E: It claims to have come from the Xianzhou Zhuming, where the high elder of Permanence moves around in a courtyard of blazing fire, and distributes the sparks of inspiration without care. It was sent here by the high elder to teach the masters of the Luofu Artisanship Commission about craftsmanship.

C: 做餐饮的店铺总是聚在一起形成美食街。究其原因，大部分人在走进美食街之前，其实是不知道自己想吃什么的，又或者是排队实在太长了，不如换一家。
E: Food and drink stalls always come hand-in-hand to form food streets. The reason is that most people won't know what they want to eat before setting foot in there. Also, if a queue is too long in one place, they can just find somewhere else.

C: 以防你没有注意，「寿考堂」特地将一副担架放在店外，你记得刚到长乐天的时候见过它——悬浮担架，原理不明，只能说是「仙舟科技」。
E: Longevity Hall has specifically placed a stretcher outside the store to make sure no one overlooks their shop. You remember seeing it the first time you arrived in Exalting Sanctum. The mechanism behind this floating stretcher is completely unknown and could only be explained as "Xianzhou technology."

C: 如果箱子上的标志没有错，那么这三个东西应该都只有1斤重。也许的确是「信仰」赋予了帝弓遗物更大的质量。
E: If the signs on the crates are correct, the three items should all weigh 1 kilo each. Perhaps it really is "faith" that caused the relics to have a heavier weight.

C: 我也祈个福吧…
E: I'll ask for good fortune, too...

C: 哈哈，这些宝贝都归我了！
E: Haha, these treasures are all mine!

C: 几个箱子并不整齐地排列在地上。凭借翻别人快递箱的深厚经验，你一眼就看出，这是几个空箱子。
E: A few boxes lay in a messy formation on the ground before you. With your great experience of poking through other people's courier packages, you can tell immediately that they are empty.

C: 今天遇到一个诗人…
E: I met a poet today...

C: 他老惦记着他那古海，天天往浴缸里倒海盐，还说什么这是「大海的味道」。我反正受不了！
E: He often misses the ancient sea, so he pours sea salt into his bath daily and claims that it is the "scent of the sea." I had enough!

C: 只是…它似乎没有放大功能。你左看右看，觉得还是直接用双眼欣赏这副景象更好。
E: However... it lacks magnification. Enjoying the view with your naked eyes seems preferable.

C: 喷泉中汩汩流淌的梦泡对你说着悄悄话：「真实与存在都是伪命题，快跳进来吧——和我们、和这个梦融为一体！」
E: The dream bubble blubbering from the fountain whispers to you: "Truth and existence are false propositions. Hurry up and jump in — become one with us in this dream!"

C: 如果有什么东西想要从这堆屏幕里爬出来的话，它该不会迷路吧？
E: If something wanted to crawl out from those screens, it wouldn't get lost, would it?

C: 很快它便发现了你，随后变戏法般地消失在了屋檐下的阴影中。
E: Soon, it realizes your presence before vanishing into the shadows under the eaves.

C: 我一直热衷于观察来到匹诺康尼的宾客。人究竟为什么会选择离开熟悉的现实并投身梦境，我直到今天都还在探究答案。
E: I've always been passionate about observing the guests who come to Penacony. Why would people choose to leave the reality they are familiar with for the Dreamscape? Till today, I'm still searching for the answer.

C: 你拥有的力量十分奇特。期待你在未来能够利用它做成一番大事。
E: You possess a very special power. I look forward to seeing you using it for something great in the future.

C: 您费尽艰辛来到匹诺康尼，恐怕也不愿空手而归吧？
E: Having arrived at Penacony after such a tough journey, surely you wouldn't want to go home empty-handed?

C: 无论如何，我都会祝您旅途顺利——哦，还有…如果我是您的话，就会尽量避免和「调查记者辛格勒」产生联系。
E: Regardless, I bid you safe journey. Oh, and... If I were you, I'd steer clear of Singler, that investigative reporter.

C: 我没有问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 毫无进展…家族的手脚不可能这么干净，肯定会留下痕迹……
E: I'm getting nowhere... The Family's hands can't be this clean, and there must be a clue somewhere...

C: 你说起浩瀚宇宙中那艘智慧的孤舟，说起它那古怪的主人与众多人偶。
E: You talk about that lone ark coasting along myriad stars, about its eccentric master and her numerous puppets.

C: 我看大哥就是太惯着他了，多大的人了，还■■整天让我们给他擦屁股！每次看他那被踹了一脚的小狗似的脸我就气不打一处来！
E: You know what it is? Elder Brother dotes on him too much, that's what. He's a grown man who needs us to clean up his ■■ every other day! Every time I see that pathetic face of his, I have to remember to breathe from being so mad!

C: …很抱歉，这里不欢迎你！请回吧。
E: ...My apologies, but you're not welcome here! Please get out.

C: 管它的！能有什么比此刻的幸福更重要。哪怕{RUBY_B#蟑螂}「繁育」的余孽{RUBY_E#}即将率全族进攻匹诺康尼，你都决定要先将温软的皮毛抓在手中。你确定这就是你愿为之付出所有的正义。
E: Who cares about anyone else! Nothing is more important than happiness right here, right now. Even if the {RUBY_B#Cockroach}dregs of Propagation {RUBY_E#} are about to lead a withering assault against Penacony, you decide you want to grab onto that soft fluff first. You're sure that this is the great justice behind why you do all you do.

C: …你总算从盲目的冲动中回过神来了？
E: ...Have you recovered yet from the rashness of your blind impulse?

C: 说吧，但我不觉得能和你有什么共同语言。
E: Speak, but I don't think we have anything in common.

C: 知更鸟……
E: Robin...

C: 没关系，您想什么时候来都可以。
E: Don't worry. You can come here anytime.

C: 不赔钱，这事儿就不算完！
E: If you don't pay up, I'm not going to let you off!

C: 我得到幸福了吗？也许有那么一阵…但存在我心里的那股暖流很快就流逝了。再后来，我还是宁愿把自己关在小屋子里，自顾自地画画。
E: But was I happy? Perhaps for a short moment... but that warmth in my heart disappeared shortly after. After that, I'd rather lock myself up in a small hut and paint alone.

C: 很早我就意识到了：能陪伴我走完这一生的不是我的亲人或朋友，而是这份与生俱来的天赋。
E: I realized it in my early stage of life that my family and friends aren't going to be the ones that accompanying me to the very end, but this talent of mine will.

C: 啊…她是如此令人过目不忘，您对这张脸有印象吗？
E: Ah... She is unforgettable. I don't suppose you recognize this face, do you?

C: 我会帮你留意。
E: I will let her know.

C: 你们是怎么相爱的？
E: How did you fall in love?

C: 看似浪漫的对视，没有告别的离去…那不叫「相爱」，我不过是她在梦中遇到的一只随处可见的广告牌罢了。
E: That look we shared that seemed so romantic, that parting without a farewell... That is not "falling in love." I'm just a billboard that she can see anywhere in her dream.

C: 广告牌像是被自己先前亢奋的声音噎住，突然大哭起来。
E: The billboard seems to become choked up by its previous outburst of excitement and suddenly bursts into tears.

C: 也许「钟表匠」只是美称？
E: Perhaps "Watchmaker" is just a title?

C: 他们渴望拥有属于个人的奇迹，我便在制造过程中加入与众不同的原料：稀世罕见的珠宝；陨星的碎片；甚至无机生命本身。
E: They desired a miracle that was all their own, so I began to introduce unusual materials into the crafting process: Rare gemstones, meteorite fragments, and even inorganic life itself.

C: 聊聊你自己。
E: Tell me about yourself.

C: 一位和蔼的老妇人突然向你搭话。你环顾四周，却发现这轻飘飘的耳语，竟来自眼前的钢琴。
E: A gentle voice suddenly addresses you. As you look around, you realize that it comes from the piano in front of you.

C: 猎犬家系是做什么的？
E: What does the Bloodhound Family do?

C: 我们猎犬在五大家系中主管安保与维和。不只是警卫，消防员、侦探和其他一些职位也由我们的成员负责。
E: Among the five lineages, we the Bloodhounds manage security and maintain order. It's not just the police — our members are also in charge of the firemen, detectives, and other vocations.

C: 有些问题想要问你…
E: I have some questions for you...

C: 真的亲密无间？
E: Are they really?

C: 我们猎犬在五大家系中主管安保与维和。不只是警卫，消防员、侦探和其他一些职位也由我们的成员负责。
E: Among the five lineages, we the Bloodhounds manage security and maintain order. It's not just the police — our members are also in charge of the firemen, detectives, and other vocations.

C: 有些猎犬成员长得是有点凶，但一见我们就跑是不是有点太夸张了——我们又不吃小孩！
E: Some Bloodhound members may look pretty fierce, but people don't have to flee at the sight of us... It's not like we eat children!

C: 说来奇怪，最近许多梦境中人都变得…不一样了。背后可能有人在做手脚。
E: It's strange, but recently, many people in the Dreamscape have become... different. There might be someone causing this behind the scenes.

C: 我们猎犬会持续关注此事，以免影响其他来宾。客人你就放心好了。
E: We Bloodhounds will continue to keep an eye on this matter and prevent it from affecting the other guests. Please do not be concerned.

C: 我从未识得过「真心」…所以说啊，与其妄想着有人真心相待，还不如花钱买快乐实在。
E: I have never experienced sincerity... which is why, instead of fantasizing about someone treating you sincerely, it'd be better to buy happiness and authenticity with money.

C: 朋友，你应该能听出来吧？自动乐团的音乐完全无法跟真人演奏相比！
E: My friend, can't you hear it? The music from an automated orchestra pales in comparison to the music produced by a living, breathing human!

C: 呃…您是刚来匹诺康尼不久嘛，梦境里的车都是全自动驾驶，完全不需要进行任何操作，只用激活按钮，输入目的地，接下来交给系统就好。
E: Ah... You've just arrived in Penacony. The cars in the dreams are all self-driving. You don't have to drive them — just push the button, enter your destination and let the system take care of the rest.

C: 感谢家族的提拔，感谢我妻子的支持和照顾……
E: It's all thanks to The Family for the promotion, and my wife's for her care and support...

C: 我本来也是抱着猎奇的心态去接触那些作品的，没想到它们有着远超我预期的想象力……
E: I originally kept a curious mind when I came into contact with these works. The level of imagination in them far exceeded my expectations...

C: 将那些相干或不相干的基酒原材，通过特殊手法、以特定比例调配，就能得到千奇百怪的有趣饮品。
E: Combine base ingredients, both related and unrelated, in specific proportions to create a variety of intriguing beverages.

C: 宇宙中真的有这颗星星吗？你不禁开始猜测——或许有，但「富商」的身份恐怕就和那个「雅利洛八号的公主」一样，都是她编造出来的故事罢了。
E: Does such a star really exist? You can't help but wonder. Perhaps it does, but her identity as a "wealthy merchant" is just as fabricated as her claim of being a "Princess of Jarilo-VIII."

C: 过度沉迷梦境大概率会让您疏于管理现实中的身体，甚至引起小脑萎缩、肌肉退化、零件锈蚀等负面反应。
E: Excessive immersion in dreams can lead to negative effects such as cerebellar atrophy, muscle degeneration, and overall deterioration.

C: 你问吧，不过快点，我待会还要去巡查。
E: Go ahead, but please make it quick as I still have patrol tasks.

C: 作为一名大堂经理，时刻关注客人们的需求、为大家排忧解难就是我的天职。
E: As the lobby manager, it's my responsibility to attend to the guests' needs and help them resolve their issues.

C: 继续继续，不要停~
E: Keep doing that. Don't stop...

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 哔哔，帕特鲁鲁鲁电电枪。人人有枪，才更好玩！
E: Beep-beep! Patrululu's Zappy Gun is here! It's only fun when everyone has a gun!

C: 不太妙啊。你看起来愁眉苦脸的，发生了什么事吗？
E: I sense a negative vibe here, and you seem troubled. What's the matter?

C: 疾风——力量！！！
E: Speed is power!!!

C: 送我去「黄金的时刻」。
E: Bring me to the Golden Hour.

C: …因为我不想。
E: ...Because I don't want to.

C: 好了，一切搞定。我在这集的戏份终于结束了。
E: Well, it's a wrap! I've finally finished my part in this episode.

C: 人之无情，竟可以到这种地步？真是令人作呕！
E: Is the heartlessness of humanity truly capable of such atrocity? It simply makes me nauseous!

C: 再见，希望你在这里玩得开心。
E: Goodbye, and I hope you have fun here.

C: 你…？如果你是在开玩笑，很抱歉我现在并没有这个心情；但如果你是认真的，请立刻打消这个念头——否则我会如实向猎犬反馈！
E: What...? If you're joking, I'm sorry. I'm not in the mood for that right now. If you're serious about it, I'd suggest that you drop the idea immediately, or I'll report you to the Bloodhounds!

C: 什么宝贝？
E: What's that?

C: 我从来没有怀疑过家族事业的正确性！不过现在的美梦…确实有些糟乱。
E: I've never doubted whether what The Family is doing is correct! However, I must say the Dreamscape is indeed a bit chaotic now.

C: …没想到作为「家人」，我居然也会表现出如此强烈的情绪，真够失态的。
E: ...I didn't know I could get so emotional as a "kinsman." That was so shameful.

C: 哦…哦！这是什么？我的战甲正在以<unbreak>12</unbreak>倍功率运转，感觉好像要飞起来了！
E: Oh... Oh? What's happening? My armor is overlocking <unbreak>12</unbreak> times more than its original rate! It feels like I'm going to fly!

C: 瞧你这话说的…匹诺康尼已经不做监狱很多年了。
E: Oh, c'mon... Penacony hasn't been a prison for a long time.

C: 善良的朋友啊，你是不会将钟表小子的秘密武器告诉邪恶的石头老板的，对吧？
E: My kind friend, you won't tell the evil Boss Stone about Clockie's secret weapon, will you?

C: 那么，您准备来点什么呢？
E: So, what can I get you?

C: 最近可真是轻松了不少啊……
E: Things have been a lot more relaxed recently...

C: 这念头或许有些不合时宜，但…祈祷真的有用吗？
E: This thought may not be entirely appropriate but... Does prayer even work?

C: 别的都无所谓，但我无论如何都没法忍受那些自动乐团。它们演奏的不是音乐，是毫无灵魂的噪音，简直亵渎了那些旋律！
E: I'm fine with most things here, but those automated orchestras... What they produce is not music, but soulless cacophony!

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: 呵，看来是真货——恭喜，你的嫌疑被洗清了。
E: Ha, looks like you are the real deal — Congratulations, you are no longer under suspicion.

C: 真高兴有你陪我…一个人在这儿盯梢，我快闷死了。
E: I'm happy to have you keep me company... I would have been bored to tears scouting here all alone.

C: 所以划走信用点也是…
E: So that bit about stealing the credits, too...

C: 不管！超级骇客也要打工挣钱，我正在气头上，非得要痛骂这群评委，好好出这股恶气！
E: So what! Super hackers also have to earn a living, and I'm angry. I'm going to really give these judges a piece of my mind and let off some steam!

C: …我和你说那么多干嘛，反正你拍完两个镜头就要换下个剧组了吧？走吧走吧，别干扰我工作！
E: ...Why am I telling you all this? You're just going to shoot two scenes and then switch crews, right? Come on. Let's move — and stop interfering with my job!

C: …新来的？先前在流梦礁没见过你啊。
E: ...Are you a newbie? I haven't seen you around the Dreamflux Reef before.

C: 原本我以为流梦礁会是整段冒险的高潮，高低得在这里发生一段激烈的打斗，然后感悟出宇宙真谛什么的……
E: I thought that Dreamflux Reef was going to be the crux of the entire adventure. I thought that I would be cast into fierce battle and come to understand the truths of the universe...

C: 可惜，现实没有如果。倒是这座梦境给了我个重新尝试的机会…我已经开始享受这种*扮演他人*的感觉了，哈哈。
E: Unfortunately, there are no hypotheticals in the real world. But it was this Dreamscape that actually gave me the chance to start again... And I've come to enjoy the feeling of playing another character... Haha.

C: 所幸在大家的帮助下，这些困难没有打倒我们。未来也许会有更困难的时候，但我坚信只要我们不放弃，一定能够安然度过。
E: Fortunately, thanks to everyone's help, these challenges did not bring us down. There may be even greater challenges in the future, but I firmly believe that as long as we don't give up, we will be able to make it through safely.

C: 只要找出原因，也许就能扭转忆质的异常活动。
E: As long as we can find out the cause, we could perhaps reverse the abnormal activity of the memoria.

C: 他们不介意我的怪异，时常鼓励我进行研究，与我倾诉他们所知的过往。
E: They embraced my quirks without reservation and occasionally spurred me on in my research endeavors, sharing with me glimpses of the past as they remembered it.

C: 也许，在不久的将来，流梦礁将重新变回那个繁荣、美丽的地方，变成那个真正的美梦小镇！愿钟表小子的精神与我们同在！
E: Perhaps in the near future, the Dreamflux Reef will return to its vibrant and beautiful state, evolving to become that true Dreamville! May the spirit of Clockie be with us!

C: 但你知道吗？我仍记得他们的面孔，记得他们讲的笑话与夜晚的吵闹，可就只是记得而已。
E: Do you know? I can still remember their faces, the jokes they told, and their playful voices at night, but that's all I can do.

C: 淡化历史、漠视历法、令人沉沦美梦…好像这样做，所有的过去就能一笔勾销，悄悄让不利于自己的记载烟消云散，史书只留下家族的赞美诗。
E: Dismissing history, disregarding calendars, and drowning everyone in dreams... It's as though through these acts, they seek to erase the past, silently eradicating the unfavorable truths and leaving the history books echoing only the hymns of The Family.

C: 我还没来匹诺康尼的时候，参加过一个古代遗迹的挖掘。遗憾的是，那个文明因为资源缺乏，最终也没能走出自己的星球。
E: Before arriving in Penacony, I participated in an excavation of ancient ruins. Regrettably, the local civilization failed to depart the bounds of its planet due to a lack of resources.

C: 我们一个个地记录并转译下那些故事，故事又流转到宇宙的各个角落，在我们身上，失落的文明获得了第二次进入太空的机会。
E: Methodically, we recorded and transcribed the stories, disseminating them to all corners of the universe. Through our endeavors, the lost civilization was afforded a second opportunity to travel the stars.

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 哎呀，你又来啦…欢迎光临，有什么需要吗？
E: *Oooh* You're back... Welcome back. Can I help you with anything?

C: 我的琴声与她的歌声回荡在原初梦境的天空里，回荡在璀璨的漫天星光中。那段日子…或许是我这漫长一生中最快乐的时光。
E: My strings would reverberate with her voice throughout the sky of that Primordial Dreamscape, echoing in the brilliant starlight. Those days... may just be the happiest days I've ever had in all my years.

C: 现在想想，之前和我同一时间开的那些店，也只有我一家一直开到现在了。唉，沧海桑田啊。
E: Now that I think about it, my store's the only one left out of all those stores that opened up around the same time as mine. *sigh* How things change!

C: 在过去的匹诺康尼，人们都叫他「格拉克斯教授」，曾经是来自博识学会的扎兹卡学者，后来是隐夜鸫家系的首领。
E: In the Penacony of the past, people called him Professor Glaux. He was once a Zatzka scholar from the Intelligentsia Guild, and later became the leader of the Nightingale Family.

C: 嗯…有只小鸟最近在尝试一种类似于「蹦极」的行为，难以理解…总之，去<color=#dbc291ff>下沉楼梯附近</color>找找它吧。
E: Hmm... A bird has recently been experimenting with an activity much like bungee jumping, though the reason escapes me... Anyway, head to the <color=#dbc291ff>sunken staircase</color> to find it.

C: 寻鸟游戏已经结束了。有话快说，没话就快走。
E: The bird hunting game is over. Make it quick, or leave me be.

C: 清醒村是坐落在美梦小镇影子中的神奇村落。这里聚集着许多被美梦驱赶的村民：爱撒谎的猎犬先生、神奇的猫头鹰老师，还有建设村落的折纸小鸟……
E: Rouseville is a wondrous village within the shadow of Dreamville. Here, many villagers who have been driven out by Dreamjoy have gathered: A Bloodhound who lies compulsively, the fascinating Professor Owl, and an origami bird that is building the village...

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，音符小姐让不少小鸟有了新的梦想，有个爱上了舞台的小家伙，现在还在找它的<color=#dbc291ff>星星</color>啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: Miss Note has invoked new dreams among the birds. There's one that's obsessed with stage plays, and is still finding its <color=#dbc291ff>stars</color>, tweet.

C: 你讲话挺怪的…
E: You talk weird...

C: 我曾用心血浇筑家族的美梦，如今却发现，那不过是个金碧辉煌的谎言。
E: I once slogged for The Family's dream, but now I have discovered that it is but a gilded lie.

C: 真是太可恶了！
E: This is preposterous!

C: 但这绝不意味着智械比有机生命更低级，我们也可以拥有自己独特的快乐。我的玩具只是第一步，未来，我会为同胞创造出更独一无二的快乐之物。
E: But this doesn't mean that Intellitrons are inferior to organic lives. We also possess our own unique joys. My toys are just the first step — in the future, I will create an item of joy exclusively for my brethren.

C: 宇宙中最大的玩具厂前一阵刚发布宣告，声称自己被星际和平公司收购后会将业务转向军工行业，将他们的玩具机器人用于「存护」的正义战争。
E: The universe's biggest toy vendor recently announced that it would pivot its efforts towards military equipment after being acquired by the IPC, using their toy robots to help the righteous war fought by "Preservation."

C: 我想跟你聊聊…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: 嗯…你在改变我的情绪，对吗？
E: Hmm... You're changing my emotions, aren't you?

C: 在我们现在能接触到的史料里，哈努努的过错被无限放大，仿佛是他让匹诺康尼陷入绝境，才有了家族救世的传奇，这太荒谬了！
E: Hanunue's mistakes were amplified exponentially in the history books that we have access to these days, as if he was the one who created Penacony's crisis, paving the way for The Family's legendary rescue of this world. Preposterous!

C: 除此之外…除此之外还有同谐的韵律，就像黑白之外又沾染、晕开暧昧的色彩…这非常美。
E: In addition... in addition to that, you possess the rhythm of the Harmony, like a monochrome shade that has been stained with a dizzying array of enigmatic hues. Such immense beauty, indeed.

C: 只要见到孩子，他就会把从自己别处的收集到的花朵送给他们，然后看看他们的笑容。
E: Each time he met a child, he would give the flowers that he had collected to them and observe their smiles in return.

C: 也不知道忆域深处究竟发生了什么，竟然真的有人在招募与之相关的人手，甚至还绕过了五大家系的精锐，特意起用一些下层……
E: I don't know what happened in the depths of Memory Zone. I can't believe that someone is actually recruiting people who are associated with it. They even overlooked the elites of the Five Lineages and chose to use some lower-class...

C: 晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号上随时可以用餐，您尽管招呼就好。
E: Feel free to order a meal at any time on board The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: 嗯，如果想尝试雅各布大厨的新品，一定要听听我的推荐。
E: If you're looking to try Chef Jacob's latest dishes, I've got some fantastic suggestions for you!

C: 看来有很多人想跟你交朋友？
E: Sounds like people are vying to get onto your friend list, huh?

C: 有遇到什么有趣的事吗？
E: Is there anything interesting going on?

C: 市场上好像还没有什么太大的动静…哼，看来还要再观望一阵子了。
E: Not much is happening in the market right now... Hmph, seems like I'll need to continue keeping a close watch.

C: 我们同事之间总爱讲一句话：「战略投资部只认功劳，不认苦劳」。哎，年纪越大，我就越感到一种莫名的悲哀。
E: There's a saying at work: "The Strategic Investment Department only recognizes credits, not efforts." *sigh* The older I get, the more that hits home.

C: 所幸，我的技艺出神入化…所以我总能在最关键时刻找到出路。
E: Fortunately, I'm already a master of the art... That's how I always manage to find a way out at the most critical juncture.

C: 抱歉，我还有些法律事务要处理，我们下次再聊。
E: Excuse me, but I have some legal matters to see to. Let's talk again sometime.

C: 船长您来得正好，供应商刚刚送了一批新货过来，都是照足您的模样定制的小玩意。
E: Oh, captain! Just in time. Our supplier just delivered a new batch of goods, little knick-knacks designed after you.

C: …孤独的人在音乐里逃避现实，那我算不算在现实里逃避梦想呢？
E: ...People turn to music to drown out solitude from the real world. So, am I escaping my dreams to go back to reality?

C: 制冰机又坏了，这一地的水，调完这一杯还要拖地…我到底是调饮师还是清洁工？
E: It's flooding in here because the ice machine's down again. Now I have to mop the floor after crafting this drink... Am I really a drinksmith? Or a cleaner?

C: 听起来蛮深奥的…
E: That sounds kind of deep...

C: 每次看到年轻人耍那些新潮乐器的时候，我这里心里就快活，像看到了年轻时的我。
E: Whenever I see youngsters playing contemporary musical instruments, I feel great joy. It's as though I'm watching my younger self.

C: 别难过，你的名声太大，也许他们是害怕没法好好招待你，这样说感觉会好些吗？
E: Don't take it personally. They might think this party is beneath someone as famous as you. Does that make you feel better?

C: 钱不是万能的。
E: There are some things that money can't buy.

C: 她讨厌我…她不讨厌我…她讨厌我…她不讨厌我……
E: She hates me... She likes me... She hates me... She likes me...

C: 等等，你没穿校服…是游客？穿搭虽然认不出版型，但整体做工精细，莫非是私人订制？
E: Wait, you're not in our uniform... You're a visitor? Hmm, I don't recognize the design on your outfit, but it does boast impeccable workmanship. Could it be a custom piece?

C: 家里人给我买的。
E: My family got it for me.

C: 如果你有些有价值的点子，需要资金和人脉才能实现，或许我可以介绍一些合作渠道。
E: If you're lacking funds or the right network for a brilliant idea, I may just be the person to link you up with a partner or opportunity.

C: 有空的话，请务必来参观筑梦学院的概念艺术展！
E: If you get time, please come along to the Dreamweaver Academy Conceptual Art Exhibition!

C: …这件事嘛，消息的来源我不便提及…大概就是说，一伙虚构史学家绑架了橡木家主——大明星知更鸟的哥哥，星期日。
E: ...That one, huh? I cannot actually tell you where I got my intel on this, but... the general story is that a group of History Fictionologists kidnapped the Oak Family Head — Sunday, brother of that famous star Robin.

C: 啧，就说那个电台绝对有问题，他们还不信…啊，抱歉，这件事有些危险，学校里很多人都中招了，所以我不打算邀请你一起调查。
E: Tsk, I knew there was something wrong with that radio station. they still don't believe me... Ah, sorry, this matter is quite dangerous. Many students have already fallen victim. I will not invite you to help me investigate this one.

C: 人活着总得有点爱好…
E: People always need a hobby...

C: 哎呀，计划总是赶不上变化，我的兴趣爱好那么丰富，换个人生目标也很正常。
E: Oh well, plans always change, and I have so many interests and hobbies. It's normal to switch to a different life goal.

C: 不行不行，我对学术本来就没多少兴趣，再待下去未免太浪费人生了。
E: No can do. I've never had much interest in academia. I would be wasting my life away if I stayed on.

C: 将我的美好回忆，弃置于此——
E: I'll leave my precious memories here.

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 否定：作为匹诺康尼的股东，你愿意参与到学生活动当中，帮助折纸大学举办这场彩梦校庆，自然值得郑重道谢。
E: Negative: As Penacony's shareholder, you were willing to participate in the school's activities and help Paperfold University organize this exciting celebration. Profuse appreciation is naturally deserved.

C: 但…正是这份对艺术的执着，才驱使他做出了阻挠乐队登台的行为。学院的训练既是知识，同样是对我们视野的限制。
E: But... it is that obstinacy with art that drove him to do what he did to hinder the band's performance. Knowledge is what students learn in school, but it is also what limits our horizons.

C: （写下严肃的寄语）
E: (Write a serious message)

C: …普通人把日子过好，比什么都重要。
E: ...As an ordinary person, living the best you can is more important than anything.

C: 总而言之，记得关注人家哦！我总有一天也会成为像你一样的盛会巨星！
E: In any case, don't forget to follow me! I'll be a Festive Superstar like you one day!

C: 不过，或许可以想象这种可能：我的前史远比前任主人编造的版本更加波澜壮阔？
E: But, you might imagine such a possibility: Could my past be even more magnificently dramatic than the version my previous owner created?

C: 提问：谁是「帝弓七天将」中最强壮的人？
E: Which of the Seven Arbiter-Generals is the most cunning?

C: 某种意义上，它代表了我人生的一个阶段。
E: In a way, it symbolizes a chapter of my life.

C: 也许你会感到疑惑，但我忧心的事中，唯独不包括她。
E: You may find this confusing, but among my worries, she is not one of them.

C: 想知道更多我的事吗？
E: You want to know more about me?

C: 盛会巨星联名活动，热砂大酒店专场——但就是贴了几个立牌而已。
E: This is the Festive Superstar collab event held at the Scorchsand Grand Hotel, and all they have are a few stands.

C: 看来这就是今天的分成了。
E: It seems like this is the profits for today.

C: 可惜遇上了秀恩爱的。
E: A shame to have run into public displays of affection.

C: 有，但这个不卖。
E: Yes, but it's not for sale.

C: 吃饭，做梦，排队…
E: Eating, dreaming, and queuing up...

C: 我要是懂艺术…
E: If I knew art...

C: 就是因为有你这种喜欢指手画脚的家伙，艺术才会屡遭亵渎！
E: Art is often treated with disrespect because of bossy people like you who like to criticize ideas!

C: 怎么专挑「美梦剧团」下手…
E: Why did they only target the Sweet Dreams Troupe?

C: 我为你包下了整个餐厅！
E: I've booked the entire restaurant for you!

C: 加完苏乐达就能跑~
E: Get refueled with SoulGlad and be on the road immediately!

C: 这人真可悲…
E: This one is just pathetic...

C: 啊？！你这牌运…
E: Huh!? Speaking of luck...

C: 送快递也不容易啊…
E: Making deliveries isn't a cakewalk...

C: 这地方光用来打游戏…
E: This place is just used to play video games...

C: 看，我和你一样高了！
E: Look, I'm as tall as you are now!

C: 呃…先不吐槽梦里居然有厕所这回事，那地方视角能好吗？
E: Ummm... setting aside the oddity of having a restroom in a dream, can you actually see anything from that angle?

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 汪…呃，我是说——有没有可能，我只是一条狗？
E: Woof... Uh, I mean, is it possible that I'm just an ordinary dog?

C: …嗯？周围也没什么状况啊…你还在等什么？
E: ...Huh? What are you waiting for...? There's nothing around here.

C: 这里应该演一段对手戏。
E: We should act out a fight scene here.

C: 我们的夙愿终于达成了…
E: We finally made it here...

C: 无法预测的比赛…太酷了。
E: An unpredictable competition... How cool!

C: 谁知道你这么不争气。
E: Who knew you'd be so terrible at it? I didn't.

C: 调查结束前，任何人不得进出！
E: No one will be allowed in or out until the investigation is complete!

C: 重点是付出的努力。
E: The main thing is the effort put in.

C: 不知道家族在搞什么，这谐乐大典竟然延期了……
E: What is The Family doing? They actually delayed the Charmony Festival...

C: 孩子，我们——
E: Children, we are...

C: 我一进去就看到一只虫子的黑影刷一下躲进了床底！
E: Right when I entered, I saw the shadow of a bug flash past and hide under the bed!

C: 我们「晖长石号」也在其中…届时，我们的工作会有变动吗？他们该不会上来就裁员吧？
E: That includes our Radiant Feldspar... You think our jobs will be affected then? They won't be laying off the lot of us as soon as they take over, will they?

C: 冠名权啊…这也太有面子了！
E: Naming rights, wow... Such an honor!

C: 那个厨子被开除了吗？
E: That cook was fired?

C: 那个项目前景不错…
E: That project looks promising...

C: 物是人非…
E: Things aren't what they used to be...

C: 那个项目前景不错…
E: That project looks promising...

C: 听学生说，有些柜门从来没有打开过，配套的钥匙也早已不知所踪。或许柜子里藏着极其危险的生物，也可能是草药和什么关键时刻能救命的物品。
E: The students say that some lockers have never been opened, and the keys that go with them have long been lost. Perhaps some dangerous creature is hidden in those lockers, or it could be herbs and items that can deliver salvation in crucial moments.

C: 双簧管与长笛的悠扬合奏声在门后响起，你的心情也随之变得如鸟儿般轻快起来。
E: The oboe and flute's elegant duet can be heard behind the door. Your mood is lifted like a bird taking to the sky.

C: 明白了，你继续站会吧。
E: I see. Well, carry on with your punishment, then.

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 游戏标题隐含着欠妥当的表述，因此制作方收到了联盟的抗议。制作方进行了深刻反省，现在新发售的版本已经改名为《只狐》了——意为「形单影只的狐人」。
E: The game's title contained an inappropriate implication, leading to protests from the Alliance. The developers reflected deeply, and the newly released version has been renamed Sole Fox — meaning "a solitary foxian."

C: 这沙发好软啊…感觉是个睡觉的好地方。
E: This sofa is so soft... It feels like a good place to sleep.

C: 是谁把我送回来的吗？
E: Someone brought me back?

C: 最近世道挺乱，你要是有什么东西想从外面运进奥赫玛来，或者就是想买一些稀奇物件，找我们「阿尔戈」下单，那是最安全的。赫拉克勒斯像黄金裔一样值得信赖！
E: Things aren't as calm as they used to be. If you need to move anything into Okhema or find something rare, Argo's your safest bet. Trust me, Heracles is just as dependable as the Chrysos Heirs!

C: 这些年来，赫拉克勒斯跟着我完成了无数不可能的任务，我挑选了其中最困难的十二次，将它们称为「赫拉克勒斯的十二试炼」。
E: Heracles has been my loyal partner through countless impossible tasks. Among them, I've dubbed the toughest twelve challenges he faced as The Twelve Trials of Heracles.

C: 需要找什么再和我说，有些东西我不摆出来卖……
E: Let me know what you're looking for. There are books I don't put up for sale...

C: 你在大地兽面前凶狠偷吃它们的红土，突然站直了「咣」地一下倒在地上…然后大人们没了办法，先把你放在这*大地兽看不见的地方*，等着大地兽消气。
E: You stood boldly before the dromases and viciously ate their redsoil, but then suddenly, you straightened up and collapsed to the ground with a loud crash... The adults had no choice but to place you somewhere out of the dromases' sight and wait for them to calm down.

C: 退化到土中生活。
E: Regress to a life in the earth.

C: …没懂你的逻辑。
E: ...I don't quite get it.

C: 他们只是自以为自己很了解罢了…还不如塞纳托斯或者某位自封的演化神秘学家来得可爱。
E: They just believe they know what's going on... They're even less endearing than Thanatos or that self-proclaimed Evoccultist.

C: …你好。欢迎来到全世界最大的浴场的图书室。理论上你可以从这里借阅到任何一本在奥赫玛出版的书籍——只要不介意填写调书单之后等待几天。
E: ...Greetings. Welcome to the library of the largest bath in the world. Theoretically, you can access any book published in Okhema, as long as you don't mind waiting a few days after filling out a book-transfer form.

C: 算了算了。
E: Forget it.

C: 《异乡人之歌》
E: The Outlander's Ballads

C: 想和缇宝聊聊天！
E: I want to chat with you, Tribbie!

C: 怎么样，这下就不会再认错了吧？
E: What do you think? You won't get us mixed up again from now on, right?

C: 那时候缇安在云石市集正玩得开心，突然就开始抽噎了。街坊们都被吓到，一个劲儿地往缇安怀里塞好吃的来安慰她呢！
E: At that moment, Trianne was out having a wonderful time in Marmoreal Market and she suddenly started sobbing too. Seeing that, everyone was worried and shocked. So they tried to stop her from crying by handing Trianne loads of tasty food.

C: 不知你是否听闻，我曾与自己的故乡有些过节。出于某些原因，我选择了离开悬锋城，在翁法罗斯各地流亡，悬锋孤军则是愿追随我同行的一众乡友。
E: I'm not sure if you have heard this before, but I had a few issues with my hometown. I elected to leave Castrum Kremnos for various reasons and wander across Amphoreus. The Kremnoan Detachment was a group of my fellow countrymen who were willing to follow me.

C: 我的事？没什么好说的，就是个普通人罢了。不过既然你好奇…那就大大方方地问吧。
E: About myself? There's not much to say. I'm just a normal Mountain Dweller. Feel free to ask if you are curious.

C: 啊，谢谢你！现在我感觉好多了。法吉娜在上，庇护我的口舌永不打结！
E: Ah, thank you! I feel much better now. Great Phagousa above, protect me from ever growing tongue-tied!

C: 每个都信点吧。
E: I have a little faith in all of them.

C: 敬颂泰坦的市民们。
E: Warmth of citizens who pay tribute to the Titans.

C: 那你有查出来原因吗？
E: Have you been able to find out why?

C: 这里毕竟未曾「开拓」，对方看到你的模样也毫不在意，甚至跃跃欲试地想要动粗。
E: As this place has not been "trailblazed" previously, the group is unfazed by your appearance. In fact, they seem to be raring for a fight.

C: 怒火在这位报名官的肌肤下涌动，她就要爆发了。
E: A burning fire boils beneath the skin of this registration officer. She is about to explode.

C: 水面恢复了平静…真是稀奇，看来你以后只要带着仙馔秘酿来，就可以在这儿讨点好处。
E: The water returns to its serene state... How curious — it appears that you just have to bring Celestial Ambrosia back here next time to get something nice.

C: 平民看到我们，曾经害怕。但大家都善良，慢慢融入，他们叫我们，温和的巨人。
E: Fear us, common folk did. But kind, everyone was. Accepted, we slowly were. "Gentle giants," they called us.

C: 让这神器和翁法罗斯最先进的经营模式结合，这铺子就这么成了，贼赚！
E: By combining this relic with Amphoreus' most advanced business model, this shop was born — criminally profitable!

C: 此外呢，最受欢迎的服务是「代辩」以及「真言狮口代答」，老希亲自出马，保准变着法驳倒对方，让您能获得充足的面子！
E: Other than that, our most popular services are "substitute debaters" and "acting Verax Leo responders." I will personally step in and ensure the opponent is left tongue-tied with my eloquence, leaving you to reap all the ensuing respect and admiration!

C: 此时一只横冲直撞的小奇美拉朝你飞奔过来。它在你面前一个急刹，开始原地打转，急不可耐——
E: At this moment, a tiny, reckless chimera lunges at you. It abruptly breaks in front of you and starts spinning in circles, bursting with impatience...

C: 秘酿浓郁的风味连通全身的感官，渔船开始颠簸，风雨欲来——
E: The ambrosia's thick flavor surges through all your senses, and the fishing boat starts to sway, heralding the approach of a storm...

C: 我在给朋友取材，能照个相吗？
E: I'm gathering materials for a friend. Can I take a photo?

C: …今天天气不错嘿？
E: ...Nice weather today, huh?

C: 所以，吉奥里亚加了很多土。让我们，又高又壮。用双臂，代替言语。
E: Georios gave us, lot of earth, making us tall and strong. We talk with, our arms.

C: 但还是，被嘲笑。没有工作适合。有的，当了铁匠。有的，当了铁块。赞美刻法勒，赞美塔兰顿。我们，当了卫士。
E: Still, we are mocked. No good jobs. Some became, blacksmiths. Others just iron blocks. We praise Kephale, praise Talanton. We are now guards.

C: 那么这座虚构的城邦，是否也有对应的的「概念」？毕竟，按你的说法，阿卡索斯能否找到并不重要，你思想中的那座城邦才更为真实可信。
E: Does this fictional city then become the same kind of "concept"? After all, according to your argument, it is not whether one can locate Icatus that matters. To you, it is the concept of the city that you have in your mind that is more credible and true.

C: 这个嘛...说来话长。最初我只是个普通画家，画些简单的作品糊口。那时候我总觉得自己的画缺少点什么，但又说不上来。直到有天...我听到阿格莱雅大人的一番话。
E: That's a long story... Initially, I was just an ordinary painter, making simple pieces to make ends meet. I always felt something was lacking in my work, yet I couldn't quite identify what it was. That changed one day when I heard insightful words from Lady Aglaea.

C: 还是算了。
E: Actually, let's forget it.

C: 他失眠睡不着觉，一时兴起去城郊的墓地散步——本以为这里足够清净，却不成想有一群无法无天的年轻人，跟着自己传信石版上放出来的音乐在跳莫名其妙的舞蹈！
E: Unable to sleep, he went for a walk in the suburban graveyard, expecting peace but found a group of unruly youths dancing to strange music from their teleslates!

C: 对，脚气，嘿嘿，你们不会希望闻到我脱鞋的。
E: Yes, athlete's foot, hehe! You wouldn't want to smell it when I take my shoes off!

C: 我允许你穿鞋进去！
E: I'll allow you to wear your shoes in the bath!

C: 放心吧，只要您予我信心便足矣，我会用自己的力量向奥赫玛证明。
E: Rest assured. As long as you grant me confidence, that is enough. I will use my own strength to prove myself to Okhema.

C: 关于奇美拉的来历…
E: About the chimeras' origin...

C: 现在，奇美拉和奥赫玛的人们相处得可好啦，大家都很喜欢它们。
E: Now, the chimeras get along so well with the people of Okhema. Everyone loves them.

C: 这是什么新型的精神内耗吗……
E: Is this some sort of newfangled mental friction...

C: 「莲食学派」主要研究植物及其制品，但那帮家伙一个个都是苦修者，无聊得很。跟他们呆久了，怕不是正常人也要变得跟植物似的呆呆傻傻。
E: The Lotophagist school primarily studies plants and their products, but those fellas are all boring ascetics. Even a normal person would eventually turn into a vegetable after being in there for too long.

C: 其实在浴场这儿，我最常讲的永远只有两个话题——一个是抱怨像我姐姐那样短视的家伙们，一个则是我的「知识开源论」。
E: In this bath, I only ever talk about two topics. One of them's complaining about short-sighted crooks like my elder sister, and the other is my Open-Source Knowledge Theory.

C: 唔，这东西说来话长，我捡些简单易懂的内容跟你说道说道吧。
E: Mm, it's a long story. I'll pick out some less-complicated stuff to explain to you.

C: 没事~即便这蜜酿蕴含法吉娜的赐福，最多也只会让人沉溺，不至于醉倒……
E: I'm awright... Even if this honey brew was blessed by Phagousa, it'll only keep one heartily indulged without any of the drunkenness...

C: 聊天？也好，就当消磨时间了……
E: A chat? Sure, I've got time to kill...

C: …你是谁？
E: ...Who are you?

C: 那你就走吧，找不到钥匙的人，不得入此门！
E: Then you should leave. If you can't find the key, you're not allowed inside!

C: 你被雷金蒙骗了。
E: You've been fooled by Regin.

C: 愿泰坦们保佑你，年轻人…也保佑那些迷茫的人们。
E: May the Titans bless you, youngster... and all those who wander in search of clarity.

C: 说来也巧，那地方的朝圣者昨天组团来了，带了好多贡品，我看它堆在边上，模样也别致，就悄悄进了货。总共就这么一个，先到先得！
E: Funny enough, a group of pilgrims from that place came through yesterday, bringing loads of offerings. One of them caught my eye — it looked pretty unique — so I snagged it for the stock. There's only one, so it's first come, first served!

C: 异邦的祭司阁下，很高兴再见到您！您今日的气色也很好，想必是命运眷顾！有什么是我能帮到您的？
E: Priest from the outlands, it's good to see you again! You look great today. Destiny must favor you! How may I assist you?

C: …呵，开拓者，又开始说胡话了么？
E: ...Haha, Trailblazer, are you rambling again?

C: 可是，凡人的生命脆弱无比，百年之后，她就又变成独自一人，而且比以前更不爱说话了……
E: However, mortal lives are fragile, and a hundred years later, she was alone again. By that time, she spoke even less than before...

C: 而我也终于能够确信……
E: And now, I can finally be certain...

C: 而属于白厄的命运，也已步步趋近…他将如烈阳一般冉冉升起，接下我的职责，为翁法罗斯的人们照亮前路。
E: As for Phainon's destiny, it too approaches step by step... He will rise like a blazing sun, take on my responsibilities, and light the way for the people of Amphoreus.

C: 我知道灰宝来自遥远的天外，在其他的世界，人们又是用什么样的方法治愈伤患的呢？
E: But I know you come from a faraway land beyond the sky, Grayie. How do people in other worlds heal the sick and wounded?

C: 战斗，我也喜欢！
E: Fighting? Now we're talking!

C: 我对戏剧不熟，有什么理念吗？
E: I'm not very familiar with theater. Do you have any particular creative philosophy?

C: 哈哈哈，怎么样，现在你想要我的签名石板了吗？
E: Hahaha, what do you think? Do you want my autographed slate now?

C: 留下了悬念。
E: Such suspense.

C: 死难者众多的地方，总有它们翩飞的身影。
E: They are always found in places where many have met their demise.

C: 讲讲寿终正寝的人…
E: Those that died in their beds...

C: 奥赫玛最近怎么样？
E: How are things in Okhema lately?

C: 奥什么安？
E: Odre... what now?

C: 又一位前来祈祷的善信？让我看看…你可懂得如何向至高的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}行礼？
E: Another faithful has come to pray? Let's see... Do you know the proper way to greet the great {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}?

C: 祭仪啊，这可是我们与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}沟通的唯一途径，也是我们向它展现诚意的重要方式。
E: The rituals are the only way we communicate with {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. They are vital means through which we demonstrate our sincerity.

C: 但若要说从前…我只能说，从辅祭到这个位置，全凭虔诚与坚持。我每日尽心侍奉泰坦，从不敢有丝毫懈怠。
E: But if you mean the past... I can only say that I rose from an acolyte to this position with nothing but piety and perseverance. Every day, I serve the Titan with diligence, never allowing myself the slightest slack.

C: 世界末日归世界末日，大家的日子还是要过的，对吧？
E: World ending or not, life goes on, right?

C: 嗯嗯，有缘再会啊！
E: Mmm, until we meet again!

C: 天空倾覆，大地震颤，末世终于还是来了。
E: The sky falls, the earth shakes, the end of days has finally come.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I have other matters to attend to.

C: 你还会为我写诗吗？
E: Will you still write poems for me?

C: 刻法勒的小祭司，你好啊！
E: Hello, little priestess of Kephale!

C: 你瞧，这儿是整个市集最开阔的地方，好多来奥赫玛避难的人都会从这儿经过，包括…从阿卡索斯第一次来奥赫玛的我。
E: Look, this is the most open place in the whole market. Many people who come to seek shelter in Okhema pass through here. Including... me, who came here from Icatus.

C: 情况如何？
E: How's the situation?

C: 不如说，我只能坚信再创世是事实，所有人都会迈入轮回，然后表现得一派轻松。不然，真要是陷入自我怀疑…我可能会撑不下去。
E: If anything, I must believe that the Era Nova is real and that everyone will step into the cycle, then act as if it's nothing. Otherwise, if I truly fall into doubt... I might not be able to carry on.

C: 嗯…有位织者另辟蹊径。金丝带来消息，它正倒悬在<color=#dbc291ff>一处通道的天花板上</color>，不知它是怎么做到的呢？
E: Hmm... a certain weaver took an unusual approach. The golden thread brought word, it's currently hanging upside down from the <color=#dbc291ff>ceiling of a passage</color>. I wonder how it managed to do that?

C: 奇怪的预言，很难说是否吉利。更进一步的内容，贵客可以多看看这份金织。
E: A strange prophecy... Hard to say if it's a good omen or not. Perhaps you should examine this goldweaver more closely, esteemed guest.

C: 多谢你了，贵客，织者们在圣城会过得很愉快的。这些礼物就权当报酬收下吧。
E: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be very happy living in the holy city. Take these gifts as your payment.

C: 风车转呀转，转得好慢好慢，仿佛连时间也停下来了呢。
E: Round and round the windmill spins, so slow, oh so slow, so slow that it's like even time itself has stopped.

C: 想吃刺刺球迷！
E: I wanna eat some Quillorbs, memi!

C: 回头有机会让你尝尝我炸的鱼吧，保准是你没见识过的独家手艺。
E: Next time, I'll let you try my fried fish. Bet you've never tasted anything like it!

C: 他也许在谷仓那边…
E: He might be over by the granary...

C: 去吧去吧，我待会也要去找那臭小子了。
E: Go on then. I've got a certain brat to hunt down myself.

C: 对了迷，你有没有遇到过其他练舞的妖精？
E: By the way, memi, have you come across any other dancing fairies lately?

C: 「撕裂~形骸~解放~」
E: "Rending my form, setting free~"

C: 是我敲门的声音太轻了，还是屋主人不在家？
E: Was I too soft when I knocked? Or maybe the owner isn't home?

C: 那，该做些什么好呢？
E: Well then, what should we do next?

C: 啊， {NICKNAME}阁下，你、你好！欢迎你们来参加宴、宴会！
E: Oh, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... G—Good day! Welcome to the f—feast!

C: 吟风爵，我来找你聊天啦！
E: Dux Carminum, let's chat!

C: 断锋爵，来聊几句吧。
E: Dux Fragoris, let's have a chat.

C: 下次见吧。
E: See you.

C: 哈哈…瞧——瞧、你这话…我等「满溢之杯」…信徒，不就应耽于…欢宴、溺于迷狂…吗？
E: Hah! Look at you... Isn't our creed as Chalice of Plenty followers to drown in revelry... to bathe in delirium?

C: …况…况且…身为她记忆中的残影，我最虔诚的供奉…就是与她一同沉沦…在这醉梦之中……
E: Besides... as a fading echo of her memory, my most devout offering... is to sink with her... into this drunken dream...

C: 对这里的黄金裔来说，我是他们过去的敌人。但凯撒大人虽将我们收于麾下，却不妨碍大家对清洗者的忌惮。
E: To the Chrysos Heirs here, I am their past enemy. However, the Great Imperator took me under her wing. Yet, that didn't stop everyone from fearing the Cleaners.

C: 冬霖爵每次都会，一口气点五杯蜜酿，然后全喝掉。本狮好奇，问，问她为什么。她说，这是敬她四位，故去的，天空子民的战友。
E: Dux Brumalis would always down five cups of honey brew at once, with not a single drop left. I was curious, s—so I asked her why. She said, it was to pay her respects to her four Skyfolk comrades who have passed.

C: 玩得开心点，贵客。
E: Have fun out there, honored guest.

C: 这阵子你辛苦了！
E: You've worked hard lately!

C: …不是，我又怎么得罪你了？干嘛突然拿冷水泼我…
E: ...Have I offended you again? Why are you suddenly pouring cold water on me...

C: 不提了，过了就是过了，现在想想，努力取得收获，值得。哎，兄弟你当时考了几次？
E: Whatever. It's a solid pass after all. Looking back now, it was worth it to work hard for that. *sigh* How many times did you have to take the test, bro?

C: 怕不是吃饱了撑的…这不是扰乱城内秩序吗？
E: Do they have nothing better to do... Isn't this disrupting the order of the city?

C: 你非得在浴场做实验吗？
E: Do you really have to conduct your experiments at the baths?

C: 嘘，快讲讲…
E: Shh, tell us quick...

C: 我已经泡腻了，换个吧。
E: I'm getting sick of it already. Let's switch it up.

C: 没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
E: Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...

C: …是来玩的吗？
E: ...Here to play?

C: 可这群小家伙生性向往自由，抗议道美梦小镇中不该有考试这般邪恶的存在咕。
E: But these lil' fellas inherently yearn for freedom, and protest these tests — an evil presence they deem alien in the Dreamville, hoot.

C: 咳咳——真是良药苦口。
E: *cough* Truly a bitter medicine.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 没问题的！绝对会的！老鸟向你们保证咕！
E: Of course! They absolutely will! This old bird promises you, hoot!

C: 那是当然。
E: Of course.

C: 不用了，我自行领悟就好。
E: It's fine. I'll study it myself.

C: 比如，这场袭击里有空间站的内鬼在搞事情。
E: For example, an insider from the space station was behind this attack.

C: 综上所述，这场入侵可谓是一把双刃剑！不然我哪儿有时间像这样放松自己，感受生活啊？
E: To sum up, this invasion is a double-edged sword! Otherwise, I wouldn't have time to relax and enjoy my life!

C: 到了我这把岁数看过去，那啥事都多少有点难以忘怀，你懂这意思吧？
E: At my age, everything is unforgettable. You know what I mean?

C: 我不了解其他科室的情况，但是单说密卷科，这场入侵无疑是一场灾难。
E: I'm not sure about the other departments. But this invasion is undoubtedly a disaster for us.

C: 如果等到之后，就连温天翁那个结实的身板都忙得受不了，那我再来麻烦你这位小年轻吧。
E: If even someone as strong as Wen Tianweng couldn't handle this, I guess I'll have to seek help from you.

C: 但我可不想成为压倒屋顶的最后一只若虫喀！
E: But I don't want to be the last nymph that broke the rooftop, crrk.

C: 这个世界要完了！
E: The world is ending!

C: 嗯…有位织者想要成为人类。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌矩阵的平台边缘</color>，询问过路人的意见呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who dreams of becoming human. The golden thread brings tidings: It's at the <color=#dbc291ff>edge of the Demiurge Matrix platform</color>, asking passersby for their opinions.

C: 难道是我的请求太过冒失了吗……
E: Was my request too reckless...

C: 近在眼前的兔子洞…究竟指的是什么呢？
E: What could this rabbit hole right before our eyes be about?

C: 我真要代入了你又不乐意，再说了，你这水平真能看懂我的演技吗？
E: If I really get into the characters, you won't like it either. Besides, are you even skilled enough to appreciate my acting?

C: 再说一遍——这是我家！没有我的许可，不能乱翻！
E: Let me say it again: This is my home! You keep your hands off and don't dig through it unless I say otherwise!

C: 克、帖、西、芬——
E: Cte-si-pho-na—

C: 女士，新上的草药香袋，能提神醒脑、平心静气，您要试试吗？
E: Ma'am, would you like to try our new herbal sachet? It helps boost energy and calm the mind.

C: 唉…唉！你们别光顾着笑啊，倒是给我出出主意！
E: *sigh*... Hey! Stop laughing and help me figure something out here!

C: …我能感觉到…你的灵魂，早已不堪重负……
E: ...I can sense it... Your soul is already overwhelmed...

C: …半分钟就蹦出一个字啊？
E: ...Taking half a minute just to get one word out?

C: 嗷呜嗷呜，该我出手了！泡泡不介意再次击败你们！
E: Awoo-woo! It's my time to shine! I don't mind beating you all again!

C: 这个小奇美拉很得意了！
E: Look at this little chimera, so full of itself!

C: 而是只有平静。正如远远望见，并呼唤一位归来的旧友。
E: ...Just a sense of peace. As if seeing an old friend from afar, and calling out to them.

C: 是一张小贴纸呢，谁这么大胆，居然敢在凯撒大人头上动土。灰宝一起来看吧，上面写的内容……
E: Oh, a little sticker! I wonder who was bold enough to stick this on her crown. Come on, Grayie, let's read it...

C: 哎呀，要说善解人意，灰宝才是第一名！
E: Aww, and you're the most considerate of them all, Grayie!

C: 希望你铭记的东西…呀，看你期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
E: Something to remember...? Oh, judging by your eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?

C: 缇宁…好想睡觉……
E: I'm... so sleepy...

C: 昔涟坐在棚顶上看风景。你想起一句诗：「明月装饰了你窗子，你装饰了别人的梦……」
E: Cyrene sits on the roof, taking in the scenery. A poem comes to your mind: "The bright moon adorns your window, while you adorn someone else's dreams..."

C: 交给我！我下笔绝对公正客观。
E: Leave it to me! I'll write with absolute fairness and objectivity.

C: 他们胖乎乎的指尖，像拥抱一样温暖。
E: Their chubby fingertips are as warm as a hug.

C: 「沿着仪式剑的源头而下，便是通向新世界的桥梁。」预言如此阐述道。
E: "Follow the source of the ceremonial blade downward, and you shall find the bridge to a new world." Thus spoke the prophecy.

C: 「无晖祈堂」。
E: The Lightless Chapel.

C: 「毁灭」的星神只有湮灭宇宙的念头，「智识」的星神一心求解万物的答案；「存护」的星神无休止地铸造着墙壁，「神秘」的星神致力于让确凿无疑的信息变得混沌不清……
E: The Aeon of Destruction seeks only to destroy the universe, while the Aeon of Erudition wants to find the answer for all that exists. Meanwhile, the Aeon of Preservation continues to forge walls, and the Aeon of Enigmata devotes themself to obscuring all that is known...

C: 暂时闲了下来，想听你讲讲过去…
E: I'm free for now and want to hear you talk about the past...

C: 在和平年代拥有一份自己喜欢的职业，这可是许多人梦寐以求的生活。
E: Having a career you love in a peaceful world is the dream of many people.

C: 瓦尔特先生为什么会离开故乡？
E: Why did you leave your home?

C: 入侵者…是反物质军团？
E: Invaders... The Antimatter Legion?

C: 现在就开始吧。
E: Let's get started.

C: 看我的！
E: I got this!

C: 听着很光鲜，但…其实我还是想干点大事。我可不想一辈子被圈在这矿区里。
E: I mean it sounds pretty important... But still I want to do something much bigger in life. I don't want to be trapped in these mines forever.

C: 真没劲…啥时候才能休息啊？
E: I'm exhausted... When can we take a break?

C: 不过今天的挑战才刚刚开始——我再给你来一道题……
E: Today's challenge however has only just begun — here's the puzzle...

C: 矿车工师徒俩的事已经摆平了。
E: The issue between the miners, master, and apprentice has been settled.

C: 希望这批苏乐达能「活」得久一点。
E: I hope this batch of SoulGlad can last longer this time.

C: 滴答，我是要赶什么东西的截止日来着？
E: Tick-tock, what deadline is it that I'm rushing for again?

C: 这套模拟工具里有很多关卡，设计师还给每个关卡都做了三种难度区分。但哪怕是最简单的模式…对我来说也太勉强了。
E: This simulator has lots of stages, and the developer even split each stage into three difficulty levels. But even the easiest mode... is far too much for me.

C: 这样啊…没关系，您慢慢来。
E: I see... Okay, take your time.

C: 呃…你是在开玩笑吧？这话可不兴说啊，要是被外人听见了，会把你报给「公司」的。
E: Uh... You're kidding, right? You can't just say that. If anyone hears, you'll be reported to IPC.

C: 是星核猎手？
E: Stellaron Hunters?

C: 我想问你点事…
E: There is something I want to ask you...

C: 哦，你要说这个，我还有点兴趣。
E: Oh, those guys. You've piqued my interest.

C: 「我自己写的，为了营造氛围，参考了公司的广告邮件，学得挺像的，对不对？…等一下，你刚才是不是说了『垃圾』？」
E: "I wrote those based on the IPC's advertising mails to build up ambiance. Don't you think they sound similar? ...Hang on, did you just say spam?"

C: 啊！虽然这食材长得古怪了些，但味道果然棒极了——
E: Ahh! It may look weird, but the taste is just unbeatable...

C: 我拿到油画《劳动者》了。
E: I've got The Laborers.

C: 让你受累了，{NICKNAME}。我这就去安排布置展品的事……
E: Thanks for the hard work, {NICKNAME}. I'm off now to arrange the exhibit...

C: 啊，对了，别忘了稿费——给你，就拜托你转交给他了。
E: Oh yes, that's right — don't forget the fee. Here you go. Pass it on to Rebini.

C: 辛苦你了，希望它们能为博物馆带来更多的参观者。
E: Good job. I hope they'll bring more visitors to the museum.

C: 听说你有事找我。
E: Heard you were looking for me?

C: 「尽管大守护者在残酷的命运面前落了下风，人性中的光辉亦被逐渐蚕食；但她仍尽力将温情留给人民，助他们求得拯救——如同她对待女儿那般。」
E: "Though the Supreme Guardian lost before her cruel destiny and the light of humanity eroded away, she still tried her best to give whatever gentleness she had to the people and help them toward salvation, just like how she treated her daughter."

C: 翻阅。
E: Flip through.

C: 一台自动机兵的操作终端机柜，与机兵们复杂的系统直接相连。
E: An operational terminal cabinet of an automaton, it is directly connected to the complex systems of the automated soldiers.

C: 自动机兵真的很自动，所以没有多少人会专门操作和维护这个东西。
E: Automatons are all automated, so not many people know how to operate and maintain this thing.

C: 这款汽车自诞生起就以品质过硬、价格低廉著称，长年冠绝「拉塔」汽车销量榜冠军，以至于它们到现在为止只发售了这一款民用型号。
E: This model has been famous for its high build quality and affordable price. Ratta Motors's sales always tops the chart, so much so that they have only released this one civilian model so far.

C: 一台自动机兵，型号名为「战犬」。
E: An automaton of the model Hound.

C: 「{F#她}{M#他}帮助一个迷茫且无助的灵魂找到了安息之所，给她枯寂的来生也画上了句号。」
E: "{F#She}{M#He} helped the lost and helpless soul to find a resting place and put an end to her lonely afterlife."

C: 怎么样？她答应了吗？
E: How was it? Did she agree?

C: …再见。
E: ...Goodbye.

C: 涨粉还得仰仗你。
E: We gotta count on you to increase our fan numbers.

C: 能再叫两个遥控人偶过来吗？
E: Can you please get two more remote-control puppets to come over?

C: （差不多得了，不要浪费相机内存了……）
E: (Pretty much done. Don't want to waste too much camera memory...)

C: 确实很好看。
E: It really is a great photo.

C: 对吧！你的审美也算是过关啦！
E: Right? Looks like your taste is passable, too!

C: （总之，先向食客们打听打听吧……）
E: (I should see what the other customers have to say about the food here...)

C: 我是故意不小心的…
E: Tee-hee, I chose it on purpose~ *giggles proudly*

C: …小秘书，你就直说吧。
E: ...Miss Secretary, just tell it like it is.

C: 而且，商会顾问的职责不仅仅是规划，还有说服和博弈…我们想要仰仗您的可不止这份规划的才能哦。
E: Also, the duties of a Merchant Guild consultant include planning, negotiation and strategy... We're going to be relying on you for more than just delivery routes.

C: 按照你的思路来，物流应该能减少不少成本。
E: With these routes in place, logistics costs will be reduced significantly.

C: 喂喂！
E: Hey!

C: 我们要检查你的快递包裹。
E: We want to check your courier package.

C: 我们赔得起，现在就拆。
E: We can compensate you for any damages. Open it.

C: 是、是这样的，这台「浓云金蟾」不是斯科特先生的。
E: I—If I may, h—he's telling the truth. This Golden Cloud Toad does not belong to Mr. Skott.

C: 哦，你是想说公司是在给金人巷商会下套吗？
E: Oh, are you implying that the IPC was setting a trap for the Merchant Guild?

C: 金人巷的商户们…有一天也会背叛我吗？
E: There has come a day... that the merchants of Aurum Alley have betrayed me?

C: 我直说吧，如今的金人巷商会毫无胜算。
E: Let me put it bluntly — Aurum Alley Merchant Guild has no chance of succeeding today.

C: 我现在是学徒了，对吧？
E: So I'm an apprentice now, right?

C: 公司提出的方案存在很多可能性，但那个老东西只是过去留下的一潭死水。他想要的，不会实现。
E: I see a lot of potential in the Corporation's plan... but a certain old friend of mine lives in the past. Whatever vision he has — it won't come true.

C: 不满？不，没有的事。我只是固执而已。
E: Issue? It's less about issues, and more about stubbornness.

C: 但时代变了，没有任何人的努力可以扭转时代的变迁。我接受公司的方案，金人巷可以消失，在罗浮之上还会有其他集市取代它的。
E: But times have changed — we can't sail against the current. That's why I stand behind the IPC's plan — Aurum Alley will inevitably be replaced.

C: 请你告诉小孩我是发声玩具。
E: *sigh* If there are any children here, just tell them I'm one of those talking toys...

C: 这是你用数据得出的结论？
E: Do you have data to support your statements?

C: 如果人类无法从历史里学会经验，那金人会教给你们。
E: If humans are unable to draw wisdom from history, aurumatons can teach them.

C: 素裳姑娘就在尚滋味等你，快去吧。
E: Sushang is waiting for you at Spices Supreme. Go find her when you have the time.

C: 要是我输了，也别怪我哦。
E: Don't blame me if we end up losing.

C: 我也准备好了。
E: Let's do this.

C: 家父只是个固执迂腐的匠人，不必以他的意见为参考。
E: ...Father has never been the shrewdest when it comes to business matters. I'm afraid his opinions don't constitute the most valuable insights.

C: 自由讨论的时间结束。请双方回去之后静候评审团消息，辛苦了。
E: That concludes our discussion. We will inform all participants of the result when a decision has been made. Thank you all for coming.

C: 这多好，我也想吃您家的外卖。
E: Sounds perfect to me. I'd love a good takeout meal from Delicacy Pavilion.

C: 难道说我的辛苦都白费了？
E: Are you telling me I did all that for nothing?

C: 没事，等你有空的时候。
E: It's fine, whenever you're free.

C: （要是客人们同时点单，真的能记得住吗？）
E: (Can I really remember everything if two customers order at the same time?)

C: 一份肉桂香排盖饭，一份豉油蒸鸡。
E: One portion of cinnamon pork ribs on rice, and a portion of steamed soy sauce chicken.

C: 我出现了大量脱发、浑身头疼、肝部肿胀等症状，严重影响了我的日常工作。为了避免病情恶化，传染其他卜者，我应该积极采取治疗措施。
E: My symptoms include hair loss, headache in my arm, and a swelling liver, all of which severely impact my daily work duties. To avoid my condition worsening or infecting any other diviners, I should take active treatment measures.

C: 但是你没有否定码头的重要性，无论是合作，还是物流规划，最终都服务于码头。
E: But you don't deny that the dock was vital to your operations, correct? Your partnership with the shop owners and the increase in cargo handling capacity — none of it would have been possible without the dock.

C: 杜老板发生什么事情了？
E: Boss Du, what's going on?

C: 我收集了很多金人巷的情报，要看看吗？
E: I've gathered a lot of info on Aurum Alley. Want to take a look?

C: 这位路过的好心人，你有见过我的搭档吗？他是我们鹤运物流的测试员，我方才去送了个货，回来就没见着他踪影了。
E: Hello there, kind-hearted pedestrian. Have you seen my partner? He's one of our Heron Express testers. I nipped out to deliver a package — but when I got back, he was gone.

C: 你是机巧鸟，可以给他发坐标。
E: You're a cycrane. You can send him your coordinates.

C: 看来他不在这里…按照工作计划，今天原本要去「杜氏茶庄」和「同功坊」的，看来他应该是去了「同功坊」。
E: Looks like he's not in... Based on work plans, he is meant to visit Du's Teahouse and the Artistry Hardware today. Looks like he's probably gone to the Artistry Hardware.

C: 守灵有事便先行一步了。
E: Shouling has other matters to attend to and shall take leave for now.

C: 稍微有点粗略凌乱，你将就着看，看不懂的也别问我，我恐怕也还没想明白呢！
E: They're all a bit rough and messy, so just go with it. Don't even bother asking me if you can't understand, since I myself haven't figured them all out yet!

C: 但是你可别拿去商用啊！我还没来得及上交认证呢。我私下做了几次试验，产出都挺稳定的，你自己拿着用应该没问题。
E: But this is not ready for commercial use. I haven't gotten around to applying for safety verification yet. I did a few experiments in private which produced consistent results. You should be fine using it on yourself.

C: （摸摸它）
E: (Touch it)

C: 不安全的得加钱！
E: Danger? Extra charge!

C: 我又不像是你这么神通广大，上天入地样样都行！自然也有能力受限的时候……
E: I'm not as powerful as you are, I can't do a tenth of the things you can! Naturally, my personal power is limited...

C: （这边人流量比较少，应该不会引起什么恐慌，速战速决！）
E: (Not many people are around, so no one should see you. Let's wrap it up quickly!)

C: 这个东西胖胖的！像个大面包！
E: This thing is so fat! Like a huge, fluffy loaf of bread!

C: 那我可以近距离观察博物馆里的东西了？好耶好耶！
E: You mean I can examine a museum collection up close? Yahoo!

C: 唯有眼前这块无辜的看板，承受着肢体威胁，却仍旧屹立不倒。
E: As for the board, it endures your physical abuse, unyielding.

C: 哎…你是不是还没从之前的异常勘测中恢复过来呀？不然还是老实休息吧？
E: Hey, have you not recovered from your anomaly detection earlier? Why don't you take more rest?

C: 今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
E: Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!

C: 哈努老大说，感谢你们为大家殿后。所有伙伴都安全逃了出来。
E: Boss Hanu appreciates you two for providing cover for us. Everyone has made it out safely.

C: 这解释好勉强…
E: Sounds like the plot has just jumped the shark...

C: 恭喜您，您已经体验完了梦泡的全部剧情内容！
E: Congratulations on completing the full story in the dream bubble!

C: 你们的上司是谁？
E: Who is your boss?

C: 再稍等我一会儿。
E: Please wait for me.

C: 它的存在，就是家族失去对梦境世界掌控力的铁证！
E: Its existence is iron-clad proof that The Family has lost control of their Dreamscape!

C: 还记得我说的话吗，饮品是种很神奇的东西，能打开对方的心扉。调饮能做到的事，远比你预想得要多。
E: Still remember what I said just now? Drinks are magical things that can make someone open up. What a drinksmith can achieve is so much more than you might expect.

C: （结束了手头的事，就去看看舒翁究竟在忙什么吧。）
E: (I'll go see what Siobhan is up to when I'm done here.)

C: 舒翁说的没错，我承认你是一位极为优秀的调饮师。
E: Siobhan was right. Now I admit that you're an extraordinary drinksmith.

C: 等等，别退别退，我不是新年贺卡，再说了…现在是哪个世界的新年吗？
E: Wait! Don't. I'm not a New Year card. And for that matter... what world is celebrating New Year right now?

C: 没错没错，姬子的咖啡也蛮好喝的…喂！你是故意等我吐槽吗？
E: That's right. Himeko's coffee is also quite good... Hey! Are you waiting for me to spell it out for you on purpose?

C: 这些东西上沾染的记忆，我记得他！
E: I remember him... I remember these memories these things are tainted with!

C: 钟表小子——这个可爱的小家伙为匹诺康尼带来了无数的财富，如今他陷入困境，人美心善的「音符小姐」自然会伸出援手。
E: The lovely Clockie has brought immense wealth to Penacony. Now that he's in a bind, the kind and beautiful Miss Note is ready to lend a hand.

C: 确实有点不适合。
E: Not really.

C: 他们的代表跑来提议收购钟表小子的版权，自称这是在拯救克劳克影业——
E: Their representative made us an offer to buy the copyrights of Clockie, claiming that they were trying to save the company...

C: 但不幸的是…这部影片的胶卷在之前的事故中受到严重破坏。我们竭力修复也只能还原出一些混乱的片段，还混杂着废案的剧情，<color=#dbc291ff>必须重新进行剪辑。</color>
E: The thing is, the film reels of the series were severely damaged in the earlier accident. Despite our best efforts to repair them, we can only salvage some fragmented scenes, mixed with scrapped storylines. <color=#dbc291ff>We have to re-edit it.</color>

C: 米莫萨面露忧伤，拿出了柜中的胶卷。
E: Looking disheartened, Mimosa retrieves the film reel from the cabinet.

C: 叛徒！
E: Traitor!

C: 这是…「钟表匠」留给我的信？
E: Are these... letters from the Watchmaker for me?

C: {NICKNAME}导演，观众的感想如何？
E: Director {NICKNAME}, what do the viewers think?

C: 哎呦——好沉！
E: Argh, so heavy!

C: 「再见了，广告牌！」
E: "Goodbye, billboard!"

C: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板已经全部消除了，快打开宝箱吧！
E: The moving SoulGlad floor has been completely removed. Open the chest now!

C: 呼呼…呼呼……
E: Phew... Phew...

C: 船长！该撤退了！
E: Captain! It's time to retreat!

C: 等我再琢磨一下…
E: Allow me to ponder it a bit more...

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>差强人意</color>吧。这个镜头过了。这场还有一个镜头。
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>Could be better</color>. This scene is over. There's another scene coming up.

C: 汪，汪汪，嗷呜——
E: Arf, arf arf, arrooo...

C: 朋友，来瓶苏乐达吗？
E: My friend, how about a bottle of SoulGlad?

C: 没问题，开拍！
E: No problem. Action!

C: 呃…我知道演的不对，但我的屏幕没有阴沉内向的素材！
E: Err... I know my take wasn't quite right, but my screen just does not contain anything gloomy or introverted!

C: 咳咳，最近剧组手头紧呀，请多见谅。
E: *cough* So, like, the production team's been a bit stretched on the budget side of things recently. We hope you understand.

C: 等我一会儿。
E: Give me a moment.

C: 哈哈，这个和「钟表匠」先生笔下的汽水先生一样，吝啬又贪心。
E: Haha, that's just like Mr. Watchmaker's portrayal of Mr. Soda — cheap and greedy.

C: 经典的大团圆结局！不过这转折是不是太随便了……
E: The classic happy ending! But isn't that twist a little bit too much of a non-sequitur?

C: 「还好钟表小子找来了木头老爷帮忙，在木头老爷的劝说下，镇民重新团结了起来。石头老板也不敢肆意妄为了，只能暗中给小镇添乱 / 洗心革面，重新做鳄 / 和大家幸福地生活在一起。」
E: "But fortunately, clever Clockie sought out help from Old Man Wood who persuaded the townsfolk to reunite once again. Boss Stone didn't dare play up anymore. All he could do was secretly mess up the town / wash your hands clean and be a new crocodile / live happily together with everyone else."

C: 啾，可惜我完全不了解这些筑梦师，只能照着能在网上查到的资料去创作了……
E: Tweet, unfortunately, I don't know these Dreamweavers at all. I can only create based on material I can find online...

C: 那盘录像带就在沙发上，我们的盛会巨星，交给你了！
E: That film tape is on the sofa. O, our heroic Festive Superstar, we are all counting on you.

C: 「太、太好了！我喜欢这种…刺、刺激的生活！」
E: "Th—This is great! I love living on the... w—wild side!"

C: 多年之后，他们在繁华的匹诺康尼再次相见，却迟迟不敢相认，因为——
E: Many years later, their paths cross once more in the thriving Penacony, yet they refuse to acknowledge each other because...

C: 那我们就再来一次吧…准备好了吗？
E: Well, here we go again... Ready?

C: 你是从哪冒出来的？
E: Where did you come from?

C: {NICKNAME}，小心，它好像失去理智了！
E: {NICKNAME}, look out! It's lost its senses!

C: 请问吧。
E: Ask away.

C: 按照爱德华医生提供的地址，你似乎找到了那位「合作伙伴」。
E: According to the address that Dr. Edward provided, you seem to have found that supposed "business partner."

C: 系统收录了你的身份，以后你随时可以登录「差分宇宙」进行测试。
E: Your identity has been registered in the system. Please feel free to log into the Divergent Universe at any future time for testing purposes.

C: 这是另一件趣事：你在测试中邂逅的故事，会被系统截取成切片，并以画作的形式记录下来。
E: Here's another interesting tidbit: The stories you've encountered during the test will be extracted in section by the system, then recorded in the form of a painting.

C: 哦？我倒要听听云璃大师有什么高见……
E: Oh? Now I'm curious to hear what Master Yunli has to say...

C: 剑习木人
E: Practice Dummy

C: 每位学徒都需要一些鼓励保持剑术练习的热情，在下可以检索古往今来的「剑术学习鸡汤<unbreak>100</unbreak>句」，提供这样的情绪价值。
E: Every student requires a certain amount of encouragement to maintain their passion for learning swordplay. I am capable of referencing "<unbreak>100</unbreak> Motivational Phrases for Swordmasters" from throughout the ages in order to provide this kind of emotional support.

C: 三个老师，一个学生…
E: Three teachers and one apprentice...

C: 这段时间，咱不仅向两位老师学了剑，还认识了很多人和事，得到很多宝贵的体验。
E: Yeah, I've not only learned swordplay from masters, but I've also met a bunch of people and gained a lot of insights from my experiences.

C: 嘿嘿，就这样做，我已经有想法了。
E: Hehe, let's do it. I already have an idea.

C: 啊啊啊啊——你们这些好吃懒做的废物！你们怎么、怎么就输给了那个菜鸟了呢？！
E: Ahhhhhhhh! You pathetic losers! How... how did you all lose to that rookie!?

C: 这件事忙完之后，我有了一段空闲的时间，如果三月七小姐为了对付斯科特而需要帮助的话，请随时来找藿藿，我和尾巴大爷一定会帮你的。
E: I've got a block of free time after attending to this matter. Miss March 7th, if you need help taking on Skott, come see me anytime. Mr. Tail and I will definitely help you out.

C: 几个尚能活动的公司员工冲进人群，七手八脚地抬走了斯科特专员。
E: Several IPC workers who can still move rush into the crowd and carry off Skott.

C: 呃啊…这个，还是不要告诉他们了吧，哈哈哈。
E: Well... maybe it's better not to mention it... Haha.

C: 编程讲究少即是多，做太多事反而容易出纰漏。
E: No, when it comes to programming, less is more. Overdoing it increases the chance of creating errors.

C: 能把迟到说得这么理直气壮，要是在我手底下干活，我一定扒你一层皮。
E: Making excuses for being late like it's no big deal? If you worked under me, I'd personally make you regret it.

C: 呵…如果堂堂正正打一架，那或许可以算是武术交流活动。可惜啊可惜，三月七，你的所作所为已经越过了法治的最后一条界限！
E: Heh... if we fought fair and square, you might call this a sparring session, but March 7th, your actions today have blatantly crossed the last line of the law!

C: 什…什么？
E: Wh... what?

C: 当初你离开后，金人巷业务推进得更好了。而你现在负责的运输船，真的没了你就不行吗？
E: Funny thing is, Aurum Alley has actually been doing better since you left. As for those transport ships, do you really think no one else can handle it?

C: 适当地沉默。
E: Remain silent.

C: 假的。
E: It was false.

C: 别急嘛，我只是在试探三月小姐「求药是否心诚」。毕竟，这灵丹妙药的食品保质期很短的，要是我辛苦做出来你又不敢一试，可不就是浪费吗？
E: Please understand, I was merely testing your earnestness in seeking the medicine. This miracle elixir's shelf life is short after all — what if you didn't dare try it after I went through all the hard work to make it? Wouldn't that be a waste?

C: 据说「赤龙呕血，命殁归阴」，这药材可是秘中之秘，恐怕只有丹鼎司的司鼎大人才晓得个中细节。鄙人就言尽于此了。
E: It is said that "when dragons spew blood, life is returned to the shadows." This herb is a secret among secrets. Only the Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission is privy to its details. That is all I will say.

C: 你知道吗？你现在的说话方式就像他一样讨厌。
E: You know what? The way you're talking now sounds as annoying as him.

C: 无论心理阻力究竟如何，这件事不就是「做与不做」吗？
E: Regardless of the psychological resistance you have, this is a matter decided by "whether you want to do this or not."

C: 上次回去之后，老夫心血来潮，翻箱倒柜地找到了阿休的设计稿。
E: When I returned home that day, I impulsively began sifting through my cabinet, where I stumbled upon A-Xiu's design.

C: 再后来，老夫变得忙了起来。一开始我压抑着「将它做出来」的想法，默默告诉自己，等忙过了这段时间就做…等真的忙过了，我已经想不起这股冲动了。
E: As time went on, I found myself consumed by other obligations. Initially, I pushed aside the notion of "get it made," reassuring myself that I would attend to it once I had more time... But by the time I finished my work, the desire to see it through had faded away entirely.

C: 欲望被压抑太久是会消失的。
E: Repressing desires over an extended period can eventually lead to their dissolution.

C: 银狼复制了「阿休」以太灵，惊讶地发现它兼具机械和异形的特征。
E: Silver Wolf replicates A-Xiu's Aether Spirit and is surprised to discover that it has both Mechanical and Aberrant stats.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 一阵金光闪过，小桶宝力获得了佩拉的「友谊魔法」。
E: With a bright flash of light, Litter Pony obtains Pela's Magic of Friendship.

C: 但是不必感到悲伤——有机会能结识你和贝洛伯格的各位、并与你们并肩作战，我十分荣幸，没有遗憾！
E: But there is no need to be sad — I am so honored to have had the chance to meet you and everyone from Belobog, as well as fight by your side. I have no regrets!

C: 该不会是压力太大了吧？我小时候每次到考试前夕，也会觉得书上的字变得张牙舞爪，和一群妖怪似的！
E: Are you too stressed out? When I was younger, every time before the day of exams, it also seemed like my textbooks grew fangs and talons, as if they were demons!

C: 史瓦罗说，他要进行一些数据采样。让虎克在这里等他，不许打扰卢卡哥哥比赛！虎克很乖，一直一个人在这儿！
E: Svarog said he needed to do some data sampling. He asked Hook to wait for him here and not disturb Luka. Hook has been a goodie and waiting here alone!

C: 灵砂大人说，这几帖药是起效最快的…不过明天就要继续打比赛了，能行吗？
E: Lady Lingsha said that these medical patches are very effective... But we're fighting again tomorrow, will it be enough?

C: 四百年前？！这怎么可能？这封邀请函，分明是我们不久前刚收到的啊……
E: Four hundred years ago!? How is that possible? We just received this invite not too long ago...

C: 你在教我做事？
E: You're teaching me how to do my job?

C: 你不明白，尾巴大爷，我只是不想输。
E: You don't get it, Mr. Tail. I just don't want to lose.

C: 她输了。
E: She did.

C: 尽管我还想多和你聊聊天，{NICKNAME}，但请你原谅我的冷落，因为今天的主角并不是你。而是卢卡。
E: As much as I want to keep chatting with you, {NICKNAME}, please forgive me for not giving you as much attention today. You're not the star of the day. It's Luka.

C: 抱歉，主持人。在比赛开始前，我想占用各位观众几分钟。我谨代表「丹轮寺」，向仙舟联盟提出庇护请愿！
E: Apologies, host. Before the competition begins, I would like to ask for a moment of the audience's time. On behalf of Claretwheel Temple, I would like to implore the Xianzhou Alliance for protection!

C: 你想追根探底？
E: You want to find out the truth?

C: 不知多少个系统时之前……
E: Not sure how many system hours ago...

C: 智械究竟归属有情生还是无情生，这绝非我愚钝的智慧能够参透。但是否救他，却能由我们心中的一点善念来决定。奢摩，来帮我。
E: I do not presume to determine whether Intellitrons have emotions with my meager intellect. However, as for whether we should save him, that boils down to the compassion in our hearts. Come help me, Samatha.

C: 可你们都还活着…
E: But you're both still alive...

C: 警告，警告，幽囚狱内所有的金人均失去控制，控制台无回应。
E: Warning, warning. All aurumatons in the Shackling Prison have lost control. The control station is unresponsive.

C: 哈哈，真是辛苦你啦，教练！
E: Haha, you've worked hard, coach!

C: 嗯！现在状态正好，我要趁热打铁，赢得更多胜利！
E: Yeah! I'm on a roll, so I've gotta keep my momentum going and score more wins!

C: 那就是个小屁孩！
E: That's just a kid!

C: 可惜，今天你注定要止步于此了。
E: Unfortunately, this is as far as you'll go.

C: 停停停！都说了，本大爷最受不了别人谢我……
E: Stop stop stop! I already said, I can't stand people thanking me...

C: 打得相当不错嘛！看来本大爷的治疗很成功嘛～
E: Your moves are pretty impressive! Looks like my treatment is very successful.

C: 嗨，你好！你养的这些植物都挺好看的。
E: Hi, hello! These plants of yours are pretty.

C: {NICKNAME}教练你好，我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽。虽然比赛结果令人遗憾，但是总体来说这仍是一场精彩的比赛。
E: Hello Coach {NICKNAME}, Carmella from Interastral Peace Entertainment. While the match result was regrettable, overall it was still an exhilarating match.

C: 比赛前我看到他脸色发青，扶着墙从卫生间里走出来，人都快虚脱了。如果他的状态更好一些，区区几枚子弹，他徒手就能接下。
E: I saw that his face was sickly before the match. He was leaned against the wall when he came out from the toilet, like he was dehydrated. If he were in a better state, he would've easily countered those few measly bullets.

C: 我建议你少看幻戏，多看实战。
E: I'd suggest you lay off the immersia and pay attention to actual fights.

C: 我为了宣传卢卡的复活赛，在直播里把嗓子喊哑了，{NICKNAME}教练您是不是应该表示一下？
E: To promote Luka's repechage, I screamed till I went hoarse during my live stream. Don't you have something to say about that, Coach {NICKNAME}?

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 卢卡选手有一个习惯，他在赛前会尽可能保持空腹，这样在比赛过程中会更加清醒。
E: Luka has a habit of trying to keep an empty stomach before a match. This way, he can stay alert during the match.

C: 体育采访真的不适合我，我还是安心主持美食栏目吧，
E: Sports interviews really don't suit me. I think I should stick with hosting food shows.

C: 正式开始！
E: Begins now!

C: 滚蛋
E: Get out of here.

C: 我的妈呀！这不是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}吗！好巧啊，没想到会在这里遇见你！
E: Holy moly! Isn't this the world-famous {NICKNAME}? What a coincidence! I can't believe I'm meeting you here!

C: 第二个？第一个是谁？
E: Second one? Who's the first?

C: 当然经过了！
E: Of course he did!

C: 那家伙长得有点过于…宝相庄严，容易吓到庙会的客人，实在不适合当引导员。
E: That fellow looks a little... imposingly dignified. We fear he might scare off temple fair guests, so he's really not suitable to be a guide.

C: 我也不知道，但应该还要继续办吧。毕竟这也是延续一万年的传统了，可不能说不办就不办。
E: Beats me, but I bet we will keep it going. I mean, it's a tradition that's been carried on for <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> years. We can't just stop doing it all of a sudden.

C: 先这样转一下，再那样转一下，成了！
E: First turn it like this, then like that, done!

C: 让我整顿一下就不深了。
E: Allow me to make it less complicated.

C: 哟！{NICKNAME}•忍者，别来无恙…不对，此刻，应当称呼阁下为{RUBY_B#乐队经理}「音律•主公」{RUBY_E#}。
E: Yo! Ninja {NICKNAME}, how do you do... Wait, I should presently address you as {RUBY_B#Band Manager}Sound Master{RUBY_E#}.

C: 契波•欧拉欧…名号甚是绕口，忍号应当简洁有力——听好，阁下此后便是「键盘•忍徒」！
E: Czipo Lionel... Your name is certainly a mouthful. Ninja names should be crisp and powerful. Listen up, your name will henceforth be Ninja Initiate Keyboard!

C: 你还有什么惊喜是我不知道的？
E: What other surprises are you keeping from me?

C: 贝斯好难啊，我怎么都弹不好……
E: The bass is so hard. Why can't I get it right...

C: 你沉浸在现场的喧闹气氛中，度过了一段愉快的时光。
E: You bask in the venue's uproarious buzz, enjoying a pleasant time.
