C: 实不相瞒，在下本应于近日启程——但得知忍徒们的祭典陷入窘困之境，忍侠绝不能袖手旁观。
E: Truth be told, I was to depart soon, but when I learned that the ninja initiates' festival was in jeopardy, this Ninja Hero could not sit idly by.

C: 明白，不就是写不出歌嘛，这事我们可有经验了。演出临近，要演奏的曲子却还没有着落，是挺烦躁的。不过别急，总归会有办法。
E: Understood. It's just writer's block, isn't it? Not something new to us. When a show is looming, but the song that needs to be performed isn't finalized, it's pretty annoying. But don't rush it. There's always a way.

C: 但我有自己的乐队了。
E: But I already have a band of my own.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 在下作为「缭乱」忍首，有义务给诸音忍一个公正的评判。
E: As the Head Dazzling Ninja, it is my obligation to make sure every sound ninja receives a fair judgment.

C: 既然如此，那由阁下上台又有何妨？
E: If that's the case, then what's wrong with letting you perform instead?

C: 明白了——您是位真正的忍者•大师。
E: I understand. You are a true ninja master.

C: 协议达成。你和同伴回去吧，学院内的反对意见，我来处理。
E: Then we have reached an accord. Please return with your companions. I shall deal with the opposition from the school.

C: 啊…其实，后来乱破同学找过我很多次。
E: Ah... Actually, Rappa came to see me many times after all that.

C: …不妙啊。
E: ...Uh oh.

C: 我就说嘛，玩乐队哪有不解散的啊，迟早的事情啦。
E: I told you! All bands break up eventually. It's always just a matter of time.

C: 阁下当然可以观摩我等的狩猎，但用卑劣的语句伤害在下的忍徒……
E: You are welcome to spectate our hunt, but using such hurtful words on my disciples...

C: ——此等行径就如邪忍手下的那群面目可憎、品行低劣、到处惹事生非的「邪祟」一般。
E: Such behavior is akin to that bunch of despicable, boorish, trouble-making fiendlings working for that Evil Ninja.

C: 所以才会拜托乱破小姐担任乐队核心，让音乐派对顺利举办下去。
E: Which is why I asked Miss Rappa to become the band leader and facilitated the success of the music party.

C: 我猜…
E: I'm guessing...

C: 这不公平。
E: It's not fair.

C: 记录猫猫糕的演唱
E: Record cake cat's performance

C: 我的经验…在没什么想法的时候，就会坐在雪地里发呆。
E: From my experience... when I was stuck, I'd sit in the snow and zone out.

C: 但是…如果不按标准的乐理规范来，难道不会写出很奇怪的曲子吗？
E: But... if we don't follow standard music theory, wouldn't we write really strange melodies?

C: 哼。这是在考验我们的诚意，不能轻易就这么放弃！
E: Hmph. This is a test of our sincerity. We mustn't give up so easily!

C: 你不相信吗？
E: You don't believe me?

C: 最近测试的游戏有点多啊。
E: Feels like so many games have gone into beta testing recently.

C: 哎，您来的正好，小店刚开张呢。今天，在迷因的催化下，<color=#dbc291ff>虚粒子</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>燃素</color>将汇聚成一团引人深思的火。要试试吗？
E: Ooh, you came at just the right time. Our stall just opened. Today, with meme catalysis, <color=#dbc291ff>Virtual Particles</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Phlogiston</color> will coalesce into a fire that provokes profundity. Care for a try?

C: 红红火火，吉利啊。
E: Red and fiery, a lucky portent.

C: 哟…人们是过得多苦，这东西比想象中还受欢迎啊。
E: Mm... How much hardship must people be suffering from... This item is more popular than I imagined.

C: 家人，今天就是寒腿小店的最后一日。用<color=#dbc291ff>量子涟漪</color>再加上一点<color=#dbc291ff>种子</color>，这次我们将揭开寰宇的奥秘——开玩笑的。开始吗？
E: Fam, it's the last day for this shop's old games. Use <color=#dbc291ff>Quantum Ripples</color>, and add a few <color=#dbc291ff>Seeds</color>, and we'll be unlocking the secrets of the universe... Just kidding. Shall we begin?

C: 查看销售情况。
E: Check sales.

C: 哎，这波提欧也挺闹腾的，竟然召集了不少帮手…本来就够乱的了，这下还来一大帮子添乱的。
E: Bah, this Boothill certainly does know how to stir up a sandstorm — he hired a whole horde of lackeys... It was sheer, unmitigated chaos.

C: 出卖巡海游侠，有违正义…
E: Betraying a Galaxy Ranger violates the code of justice...

C: 在一场毫无观赏性的闪电战后，你赢得了一场碾压级的胜利。
E: After a blitzkrieg battle devoid of any spectators, you triumph in an overwhelming victory.

C: 《魔剑神机•阿拉哈托》真的太好看了！好想驾驶巨型机器人斩妖除魔啊！
E: Blade of Chaos: Arahato is so good! I wanna pilot a giant mecha and vanquish demons too!

C: 最近帕姆经常在绿植里面发现奇怪的残渣。帕姆蹲守了一夜，终于抓到了那位往绿植里倒东西的神秘人——
E: These days, Pom-Pom would regularly find strange residue in the plants. Pom-Pom stayed up the whole night, eventually catching that mystery person who had been pouring trash into the plants...

C: 为什么非要生存竞争呢？就不能和平共处吗？来，快看看，这只叫小滑，这只叫小糊，这只叫小黏。它们是快乐的一家人，快来摸摸吧。
E: Why must it be a competition for survival? Can't we co-exist in harmony? Come take a look. This one's called Slimy, this one's called Sticky, and this one's Gooey. They're all one big happy family. Come pet them.

C: 丹恒是步离人。
E: Dan Heng is the borisin.

C: 快打开列车门罢！我要在宇宙那广袤的寂静中迎接风暴！
E: Hurry up and open the Express door! I want to welcome the storm in the fathomless silence of the cosmos!

C: 有件事需要和你商量一下——今天星穹列车同时收到了两个派系的请托，希望我们提供护送和运载服务。
E: There's something I need to talk to you about: The Astral Express received two faction commissions at the same time today, hoping that we would provide escort and transport services.

C: 你还品鉴起来了……
E: You're even starting to critique the joke...

C: 嗯…听起来是个很有年代感的名字呢。
E: Hmm... Sounds like a name that suits its time.

C: 听说，这回车展请到的代言人排场可大了，说出来吓死你们，宇宙知名的爱车人士——「星穷列车」！
E: I hear that the ambassadors invited for this car expo has massive clout. Don't freak out, but it's the car lovers renowned across the universe: The Arstral Express!

C: 你们按照花火的提示，从娃娃口袋里找到一枚镜头。
E: You follow Sparkle's hint and fish out a lens from the doll's pocket.

C: 是呀，这样优秀的演员，值得大家的掌声。
E: Yes, these excellent actors deserve the audience's applause.

C: ……所以，你直接把「惊梦酒吧」的怪物们请到模仿秀来模仿自己？
E: ...So, you got all the monsters from the Dreamjolt Hostelry to play as themselves in an impressions show?

C: 得令！您就瞧好吧！
E: Command received! Watch closely!

C: 你刚在嘟囔什么？
E: What're you muttering about?

C: 笑话，小人难企英雄之境，你不够格替泰坦发言。
E: What a farce. The petty will never reach the greatness of heroes. You are unworthy to speak for a Titan.

C: 嗷呜！我要来，我才不想继续跟着这种管理员！我要换队，我要辞职！
E: Awoo! I'm coming! I don't want to follow such a mean administrator! I'm switching squads. I'm resigning!

C: 请吧。就是不清楚，在园丁们看来，与欺负小奇美拉相比，究竟谁的行为更过分呢？
E: Please do. I'm just not sure what could be worse than bullying the chimeras in the eyes of the Gardeners.

C: 我可以交出这群奇美拉的管理权，不过事情没这么简单。注意点，别把自己给赔进去了！
E: I can hand over the authority to these chimeras, but it won't be that simple. Just watch out before you end up losing everything!

C: 以后和它们打交道的时候，灰宝得多留个心眼才行。
E: Grayie, you should be more careful talking to them in the future.

C: 我受阿格莱雅女士之托，前来奥赫玛为伤者提供治疗，原本想着很快便能返回，但……
E: I was besought by Lady Aglaea to come forth to Okhema to provide treatment for the wounded. I initially wanted to return post-haste, but...

C: 老大！不要离开我们啊——
E: Boss! Don't leave us...

C: 在你的身上，我看到了许多和那些英雄相似的地方。
E: I see many traits similar to those heroes in you.

C: 先把浴池重新换上干净的水…更重要的是抓住犯人——
E: First, refill the bath with clean water... but more importantly, we need to catch the culprit—

C: 我宣布第一阶段的小组赛正式结束！
E: I hereby declare the first stage of the group matches officially over!

C: 怎么了吗？
E: Is there a problem?

C: 哎，争斗…并无意义。
E: *sigh* All this fighting... it's meaningless.

C: 我们的羁绊不会消失的，对吧？
E: Our bonds won't disappear, will it?

C: 哼，我偏偏就要躺赢下去。
E: Hmph, I'll just sit back and win.

C: 这么认真，小海豹也没在树庭上过学呀！
E: You're taking this way too seriously. Baby seals don't study at the Grove!

C: 别说这些，听着怪肉麻的！
E: Enough with all this! How mushy!

C: 上次旅行刚做完「太一之梦」。
E: I just had the "Ena's Dream" during my last trip.

C: 你都不敢想，要是自己拿到了「金海豹杯」该有多幸福。
E: You can't even imagine how happy you'd be if you got the Gold Seal Cup.

C: 好！{NICKNAME}记入参赛选手。各位，敬请期待我们的比赛吧！
E: Then it's settled! {NICKNAME} has been recorded as a contestant. Everyone, please look forward to our tournament!

C: 对不起！我…我承认，我在浴盐里萃入了木屑、煤渣…黑夏果的汁水，把它们倒进了浴池。
E: I'm sorry! I... I confess. I mixed the wood shavings, coal dust, and juice from black summer berries into the bath salts. Then I poured it all into the waters.

C: 不摆出来，更容易引起怀疑。
E: It's more likely to raise suspicions if you don't...

C: 这个「游侠」的称号听着好耳熟，不会是说我吧？
E: Rangers? That title rings a bell. Are they referring to me?

C: {NICKNAME}，不如听听我的预言吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, why not hear my prophecy?

C: 如果想了解更多细节，之后可以随时找我，我会一五一十告诉你的。现在，你只需要享受游戏就好，其他的我来考虑。
E: If you need more details, ask away anytime — I'll explain everything. For now, just enjoy the game. I'll handle the rest.

C: 这游戏的设定，让我想起了公司旗下的「星际文明成果展示大会」。
E: This game's setting reminds me of IPC's "Interastral Civilization Achievement Exhibition."

C: 虽然早就从广播里听说了列车的经历，但亲自看上一遍，还是不禁感慨——你们的开拓之旅可真精彩啊。
E: You know, I'd already heard about the Express' experiences through broadcasts, but watching these stories firsthand? I'm still so impressed — Your trailblazing expedition is truly exciting.

C: 我想想…测试版中的故事是这样的：「小小的勇者辞别家乡，在无尽银河中漫游探险，寻找星际最强武器——传说中的球棒」。
E: Let me think... In the test version, the story goes like this: "The little hero bids farewell to their hometown and embarks on an endless adventure across the cosmos, seeking the strongest weapon — The legendary ball bat."

C: 在此之前，我的朋友，不妨先去体验一下正式版的魅力吧？
E: Before that, my friend, why not dive into the charm of the official version?

C: ——永别了，世界！等等…工伤能申请赔偿的吧？
E: — Farewell, sweet world! Wait... Can I claim compensation for a work injury?

C: 为了防止邪恶统治被破坏，为了守护世界的和平，我们要将你埋葬在这满是糖分的星球！
E: To protect the evil government from facing destruction! To uphold the peace within our population! We will bury you in this sucrose-filled planet!

C: 哦！看来是有黑客帮您报的名。先说好，「极速杯」对此免责啊！
E: Oh! Looks like a hacker signed you up. Just so you know, "Speed Cup" takes no responsibility for that!

C: 到了第二场…除了她的赛道，其他赛道都被连环追尾堵塞。
E: Second race? Every track but hers got gridlocked by pileups.

C: 眼下正值游戏上线之际，作为匹诺康尼股东，也作为测试版合作方，公司将在您的「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」上开设所谓街机厅的「元祖店」！当然，它的所属权都是在您的名下！
E: With the game launching soon, the IPC will set up the original arcade store on your property, The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand, since you're both a Penacony shareholder and beta testing partner! And don't worry — it'll be completely under your ownership!

C: 其实真正的问题是——即便在现实酒店醒过来，幽灵小鸟的诅咒依然存在……
E: Here's the real problem — even waking up in the hotel in reality won't break the Ghost Bird's curse...

C: 我在折大里进修过匹诺康尼史，关于折纸鸟，我记得一些……
E: I took Penaconian history courses at Paperfold University, so I know some things about Origami Birds...

C: 啾！啾！
E: Tweet! Tweet!

C: 藿藿不会说「本大爷」……
E: Huohuo doesn't talk like that...

C: 没错，就是现在！
E: You bet. Let's do this!

C: 哎，这都什么事儿啊……
E: Ah... What is even happening...

C: 啾、啾啾——
E: Tweet, tweet tweet—

C: 你或许能在「圣杯」里遇上不少老朋友，但我对此实在是没什么兴趣。
E: You may meet many old friends in the Holy Grail, but I'm honestly not interested.

C: 下次见吧，祝你做个好梦。
E: See you next time, and hope you have sweet dreams.

C: 呦，开心果。
E: Hey, Mr. Sunshine.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，希望你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
E: Hohohoho, enjoy your time in Penacony.

C: 要不要再试一杯？
E: Ready for another glass?

C: 你在听吗？
E: Are you listening?

C: 其实不然。某些游戏表面看来是运气，背后却是精密的数学计算，譬如……
E: That's not quite true. Some games may look like luck on the surface, but behind them are intricate mathematical calculations, like...

C: 黑塔女士的美貌是宇宙的奇迹！
E: Madam Herta's beauty is a miracle of the universe!

C: 绝对…不可以……
E: Absolutely... mustn't...

C: （附赠一个冷笑话。）
E: (An eye-rolling joke as a bonus.)

C: 为什么会去那里？
E: Why were you there?

C: 不对，你又使计害我！
E: No! You tricked me again!

C: 没关系，在后续的测试中你会明白的。
E: Don't worry, you'll understand in the following tests.

C: 当然，我也会信守承诺，根据你的测试进度支付对应的报酬。
E: Of course, I'll keep my promise and pay you accordingly based on your test progress.

C: 当然，黑塔空间站也提供了一点技术支持，虽然天才看不上宇宙商业竞争这种小事，但没有理由会拒绝公司的赞助。
E: Of course, Herta Space Station also provided some technical support. Although geniuses might not care much about cosmic business competition, there's no reason to turn down IPC's sponsorship.

C: 行，但最好赶紧动手，别让同行抢先了。
E: Sure, but it's best to act soon and prevent others from getting the drop on us.

C: 关于名字，我无意多说…
E: I won't even comment on how that name sounds so...

C: 「有了前两处幻境的经验…」
E: "Drawing on experience from the previous two fantasias..."

C: 这段时间在下也没闲着，一直在构思接下来的情节。但确实有个问题，在下一直没找到解决方案……
E: I've been keeping myself busy, coming up with the rest of the plot. But we may have a problem to which I haven't been able to find an answer yet...

C: 也好，毕竟我是主角。
E: That's okay, I guess. After all, I am the protagonist.

C: 这应该就是丹枫留下的宝藏了。拿去找雕像交差吧。
E: This looks like one of Dan Feng's treasure items. Report back with it to the statue.

C: 幻胧不长这样啊？
E: I don't think Phantylia really looks like that.

C: 要锻造出这把足以与幻胧匹敌的碎星绝尘剑，需要两个部件。
E: To stand any hope of standing toe-to-toe against Phantylia, there's going to be two parts needed to forge this Star-Shattering Blade of Truth.

C: 喘够了没？我接下来还有活儿要接呢，快着点。
E: Rested up enough? I've got work to do later, so hurry up.

C: 大宝剑！
E: Big Sword!

C: 言简意赅，不落窠臼！大，宝，剑！端的是好名字！
E: Concise, but unconventional! Big, sword... Truly a splendid name!

C: 特派委托全都完成了！
E: All special assignments complete!

C: 好了，这即兴段子还得改，我们先不谈这个，谈谈正事。我觉得录音的事听上去没啥问题，不过我一个人说了可不算，还得问问我搭档的意见。
E: There's still much room for our improvisation, but let's put it on hold for now. The recording thing sounds good to me, but I need my partner's opinion before making a final decision.

C: 那你打算听谁？
E: So, which part of the customers are you going to listen to?

C: 先别走，呃…我要说什么来着……对了，跟我来一场「以太电线」的对决吧！
E: Don't go, uhh... What was I going to say...? Oh, yeah! Let's have an "Eater Room Wards" battle!

C: 哈哈哈，无伤大雅、无伤大雅！我反而很喜欢三月小姐这直率的性格。
E: Hahaha, no harm done! Your candid personality is charming, Miss March.

C: 是啊，为什么呢？
E: Yeah! What brings you here?

C: 那还请务必按月付我朋友费…
E: Monthly friendship payments are due on the first of each month...

C: 我说啊，几位公司的客人们——看你们对那枚硬币紧咬不放的样子，想必你们也是《以太战线》的玩家吧？
E: I say, my IPC friends, I can see how captivated you are by that coin. Am I right in assuming that you're also Aetherium Wars players?

C: 啊，出来了出来了！
E: Aha! There we go!

C: 这就是「以太战线玩家终端」了——来，实际操作看看吧。
E: This is the Aetherium Wars Player Terminal — give it a try.

C: 你在这里做什么呢？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 我们把它从公司手里救了下来，然后就一起踏上旅途了…我们也想借着这次庆典搞清它的身世背景。
E: We swooped in and rescued them from the clutches of the IPC, and then off we went on our adventure together... We're hoping to unravel their origins during the tournament.

C: 哼哼…哼…！
E: Oink... Oink, oink!

C: 就是，我看你们才是啥都不懂吧！
E: Right! Why waste your time?

C: 嗯，已经走了…欸？是谁？
E: Yeah, he's gone... Wait a sec, who're you!?

C: 你怕乔瓦尼了？
E: Are you afraid of Giovanni?

C: 行啊，没问题…呃，等会儿，我接个电话。
E: Sure, no problem... Ugh, wait, I need to take this call.

C: …咦，你的手机是不是响了？
E: Uh... Is that your phone?

C: 哈哈哈，说来惭愧，我确实和那位玩家交过手——可惜我实力不济，落了下风。
E: Hahaha, it's embarrassing to admit, but I did face off against that player... Unfortunately, I didn't quite measure up.

C: 哈哈哈，真是敏锐…不愧是你！
E: Haha, so astute!

C: 到目前为止，我可以这样告诉你们：我并非那位传闻中的高手玩家；但我仍有义务为那位女士保密——这是我和她之间的约定。
E: I can assure you that it is not me — I am bound by an agreement to keep her identity confidential.

C: 看来次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神也已经准备好了。
E: Looks like Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is also ready.

C: 居然把灯炉放在那种地方…看来我们是没办法直接把<color=#dbc291ff>热能核心</color>装进去了。
E: Seriously? Who puts a lamp there... There's no way we can directly load the <color=#dbc291ff>thermic core</color> into this one...

C: 电梯操作界面上显示着一行字：「请输入密钥以获得电梯控制权限。」
E: The elevator interface displays a line of text: "Please enter the encryption key to gain control over the elevator."

C: 呜呜伯将<color=#dbc291ff>冠军候补凭证</color>交给你后激动地飘走了，仿佛在说：「我解放了！我解放了！」
E: Wubbaboo hands you the <color=#dbc291ff>championship contender pass</color> excitedly and floats away, as if saying, "I'm free! I'm free!"

C: 喂，快开打，别浪费我的时间。
E: Hey, let's get to it, don't waste my time.

C: 来吧，我们再来较量一次吧！这次虎克可不会手下留情了哦！
E: Bring it on, let's battle! Don't expect any mercy from Hook this time!

C: …你有领取第二份奖励的资格！不错啊，这已经算得上是高端玩家了。
E: ...You're qualified to claim the second reward! Not bad, you're already a high-tier player.

C: 认输吧，你们赢不了我的。
E: Just give up already. You've got no chance.

C: 你和卢卡那小子的比赛，我观摩了全程——真是精彩到连我也热血沸腾起来了！
E: I saw your duel with Luka — I gotta admit, I was on the edge of my seat!

C: 如你所见，因为某些客观原因，我现在没办法以实体现身…所以只好通过全息投影的方式参赛了。
E: As you can see, due to certain reasons... I couldn't be here in person. Looks like I'm attending the rest of the tournament as a hologram.

C: 真是精彩…不愧是乔瓦尼先生向我保证的、一定会带来巨大惊喜的顶级玩家！
E: Incredible... Mr. Giovanni wasn't kidding when he said I'd be up against some exceptional players!

C: 对阵——来自仙舟「罗浮」的桂乃芬——！
E: They'll be facing off against... Guinaifen of the Luofu!

C: 会不会是造谣？
E: Maybe they made it up.

C: 这家伙张口说的每个字都是在变着法拒绝你……
E: That's just another way of saying they don't want to cooperate...

C: 而且…我们在追龙女大人时，还看到了…两个她！真是莫名其妙啊。
E: And while we were chasing her, we saw two of her! It really is a mystery.

C: 小姑娘，你真是太懂我们了。等忙完这一阵，老成，咱哥俩得请个年假了。
E: Huh, you really get what we're up against... After this is behind us, I say we take a holiday and get rested up.

C: （摇动铃铛）
E: (Ring the chime)

C: 按古老的神话所载，仙舟曾面临大敌入侵，举族覆灭的绝境。为此，有位凡人英雄为了挽救危亡，不惜与岁阳之祖「燧皇」立下夺舍约定。
E: The ancient legends recount that the Xianzhou once faced an invasion by a great enemy that threatened the annihilation of every race aboard the Xianzhou ships. In order to save the Alliance, a hero made a pact with the Flint Emperor — the predecessor of all heliobi.

C: 你该知道，你动不了我分毫的对吧？
E: Outside the confines of our agreement, you would be unwise to attack.

C: 素裳小姐，你忘了咱们行动的保密原则了吗！
E: Miss Sushang, we're supposed to be operating in secret!

C: 不过，在走之前，我得帮这几位解决眼下太卜司面对的麻烦。要不然，别人还以为我是临危脱逃才被开除的呢。
E: But before I leave, I have to help these guests take care of some trouble here at the Commission. If I don't, people will think I was fired because of cowardice in the face of danger.

C: 这应该单纯是吃霸王餐被抓以后在给自己找借口。
E: Sounds like a very hungry criminal came up with a very poor excuse...

C: 小鬼，又来嘲笑我了么？
E: Come to laugh at me again, have you, little brat?

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我按它的指示，由它指挥，竟然觉得自己武艺大有长进。可它却说，我实在是资质驽钝，朽木一块。他要另收一名弟子，将自己的技艺发扬光大。
E: I followed its instructions... To my surprise, it felt like my combat skills had greatly improved. Still, it told me I was incompetent, like a piece of rotten wood. It wanted to find a new apprentice to carry forward the art.

C: 我劝你别在这里假装悠闲，熔炬杀性极重，一旦被它役使，六亲不认，何况是师父。
E: Then you should hurry — Apyra has an insatiable bloodlust. Once they've enslaved your mind, they can make you turn against your friends, your kin... even your own master.

C: 既然各位能看得见它，岂不是意味着你们也堕入了幻境中？
E: Since each of you can see it, wouldn't that mean you'd fallen into the illusion as well?

C: 这不是丹鼎司医士能处理的情况，我会将藿藿带回十王司，再看看有什么手段。
E: This isn't something the healers at the Alchemy Commission can handle. I'll take Huohuo back to the Ten-Lords Commission — perhaps they'll have an answer.

C: 就像是「燎原大战将军」一样，岁阳意识到「败局注定」时，就会溃不成形吗？
E: So just like what happened to Ignamar, once a heliobus realizes they're going to lose, they'll shatter?

C: 我们不要和怪物说话了，快走快走。
E: We shouldn't be talking to a monster, anyway. Let's get out of here.

C: 至少现在，有尾巴愿意为我回来，我很满足了。
E: ...but you came back for me... and that's all I need.

C: 彦卿的目的应该和老师一样，都是来制伏岁阳的。
E: I think I'm here for the same reason you are, to subdue this heliobus.

C: 刚才的冥差也许不是小孩……
E: Maybe that spiritfarer just now wasn't actually a child...

C: 我懂了，捉鬼小队，出动！
E: I understand. Ghost-hunting squad: Move out!

C: 我不认识你们，也不知道你们想干什么，但请你们立刻离开我的妻子。
E: I don't know you, and I don't know what you're trying to do, but please leave my wife alone. Now.

C: 求你别带她走…把若昔还给我…若昔……
E: I'm begging you, please don't take her... please give Ruoxi back to me... Ruoxi...

C: 谢谢你，无论你是谁，「若昔」。
E: Thank you, no matter who you are, "Ruoxi."

C: 对吧，你肯定能立刻理解。
E: You see? I'm sure you understand.

C: 我要和各位谈的是人生的价值与自我实现！…然后才是钱！
E: I am talking to you about the value of life and self-fulfillment! ...Only after these can you think about money!

C: 哼！本座当然知道！是…是了，青总，我这就去干活。
E: Humph! I know that, of course! Y—Yes President Qing, I will get to work now.

C: 为什么、为什么事情会演变到这个地步？
E: Why? Why has it come to this?

C: …谢谢。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 我现在就想撕下来！
E: I want to tear it down!

C: 破损的箱子，因其沉重而难以移动。箱子锁眼已经锈蚀，上方有拳头大小的破洞，箱子内部似乎有什么金属物件。也许有什么办法能将箱子里的东西取出来……
E: A broken box that is hard to move due to its weight. The lock is corroded, and there is a hole the size of a fist on the topside. It looks like there is something metallic inside. Perhaps there is a way to get the item out from the box...

C: 不知何时的食盒，装在其中的食物却像是刚做好不久。
E: A discarded food box. The food inside seems to have been prepared very recently.

C: 你说的没错，真相就是这样无聊。
E: That's right. The truth is just that boring.

C: 如果真是岁阳在天上作乱的话...咱们有谁会飞吗？
E: If it's really a heliobus causing trouble in the sky... Who among us can fly?

C: 哎？别一个人单干啊，这次我也要来！
E: Huh? Don't fly solo. Count me in too!

C: 就一块奖牌，你还是自己收着吧。
E: It's just one medallion. Hold onto it yourself.

C: 以后肯定还播的呀，不过大家都有各自的生活，所以要组齐人也不容易，观众老爷们记得留意我们账号的开播预告呀。
E: We'll definitely keep streaming in the future, but everyone has their own lives to live, so it's hard to line everyone up. Remember to follow our channel and enable notifications.

C: 但大家站在一起就没什么好怕的了。
E: But if we stick together, there's nothing to be afraid of.

C: 我到了，什么事？
E: It's me. What happened?

C: 如需开启测试，请躺在旁边的休眠舱上，正面朝上平躺，保持心境平和。
E: To start the test, please lie down face up in the cryosleep pod next to you and maintain a calm mental state.

C: 刚培育出的造物蜷缩在机器人身旁，仔细打量着你。
E: The newly-nurtured creation huddles up next to the chassis of the robot, carefully sizing you up.

C: 你认出了这只造物，就是方才窜出去的那一只。
E: You recognize this creation as the one that just scuttled away.

C: 变异的原理是什么？
E: What is the principle behind the mutations?

C: 你长得像黑塔…
E: You look like Herta...

C: <size=36>…你们不要过来啊！</size>
E: <size=36>...No! Stay away from me!</size>

C: 好可怕。人家…人家不敢看这种暴力场面呀。
E: That's so scary. I... I can't bear to watch such brutal scenes.

C: 我问你话了？我问你话了？啊？这下只是警告，再多嘴一句，我连你一起抽！！
E: Did I ask you anything? Huh? DID I!? This is just a warning. One more word, and you're gonna get it, too!

C: 要你们有什么用，有人造没人教的玩意！砸碎了当零件卖都比现在强！
E: What's the point of owning you? Worthless pieces of junk! Why don't I just smash you up and sell you for parts!?

C: 以为自己很聪明？以为自己看透了很多道理？告诉你，没用！只要归我负责，我就能随便揍你们，你反抗不了，其他人也管不着！
E: You think you're smart? You think you've seen it all? Hah, nonsense! As long as I'm in charge, I can punish you as much as I want. Don't even think about fighting back or getting help from anyone!

C: 那…舒翁呢？
E: What about... Siobhan?

C: 「最后的两扇门。」
E: "Now, here are the final doors."

C: 五乘四再减去二，最后除以六…得到的结果是大还是小？
E: Five times four minus two, and then divided by six... is the result big or small?

C: 让我去你的酒吧里看看。
E: Show me your lounge.

C: 汪！听听你说的话！这个名字非你莫属了哇。
E: Woof! You really should hear what you just said! That name suits you perfectly.

C: 听着，我是会生气的！吼——！！！
E: Hey now, you won't like to see me mad! Roar...!!!

C: 不开玩笑，我从这酒吧刚建好的时候就在光顾了，当时连张像样的桌子都没有，柜台还是随便拼出来的，稍微使点劲就会散架，材料的种类也不全。
E: I'm not kidding when I say I've been a patron of this lounge since it started. Back then, there weren't even proper tables. The counter was just thrown together and would fall apart if you put any weight on it. This place didn't even have the full range of ingredients.

C: （用搅拌棒戳它。）
E: (Poke it with the stir stick.)

C: 我的台词有那么难懂吗？看来，我们之间已经隔了一层可悲的厚障壁了。
E: Are my words truly so inscrutable? How heartrending. An impenetrable barrier has formed, dividing us.

C: 你在这里当调饮师，想要的是什么？没有客人，没有收入，就像那些卖不掉的剧场票。
E: What's the point of being a drinksmith here? There are no customers, no revenue, much like those unwanted concert tickets.

C: 唉，虽然舒翁的调饮技术是很好，但把店开在这种地方，变成这样也是当然的吧。冷冷清清，无人问津。
E: *sigh* Sure, Siobhan is great at mixing drinks, but given the location, it's only natural that the lounge remains deserted and unattended.

C: 唉。强烈的欢乐过后，无止境的空虚再次包裹了我。
E: *sigh* Following the bliss, boundless emptiness once more consumes me.

C: 它提到了舒翁的名字。
E: She mentioned Siobhan.

C: 我就不该对个身份低微的服务员抱什么期待！调杯能喝的饮料是他们最大的作用了！
E: I shouldn't have expected anything from a lowly waiter! Making drinks is the only thing you're good for!

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 可惜，它被赶出来的时候，把那个盒子弄丢了。
E: Unfortunately, they lost that box when they got kicked out.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: （淑女喜欢的是……）
E: (Lady likes...)

C: （加油，感觉就快接近它的真实想法了。）
E: (Keep at it. Looks like I'm getting close to what they're really thinking.)

C: 这次的故事就到这，后面有机会再讲吧。
E: That's all for now. I'll tell you more later when a chance arises.

C: 品尝你调出来的饮料总会让我想起很多事…你真的没有偷偷对我使用那个神奇的能力？
E: Tasting the drinks you make always brings back memories... You didn't secretly use your magical ability on me, did you?

C: …看来你很习惯窥探别人的内心嘛？
E: ...Looks like you're quite used to peering into people's hearts, right?

C: 汪！这就是我最想要的味道，亲爱的调饮师，你真的好懂我哇！
E: Woof! This is the taste I really want! My dear drinksmith, you know me too well!

C: 哈！您真是位优秀的调饮师，调出来的饮料正正好好就是我想要的！
E: Ha! You're truly a superb drinksmith — your drinks are exactly the way I want them!

C: 错了，不是这个。哎，还是让舒翁多教教你吧。
E: Wrong. This is not it. *sigh* Get Siobhan to teach you more.

C: 启动调饮模拟器！
E: Activate the drinksmith simulator!

C: 啊，这…这个，这怎么能算开挂，又不是什么「声控一声通关」，要自己慢慢打的！
E: W—Well, it's not... not a cheat, yeah! It's not like you press a button and instantly beat the game! You still have to clear those stages yourself!

C: …好吧，或许这就是无名客的非凡之处。
E: ...Alright. I guess you Nameless are simply extraordinary.

C: 尽量
E: I'll try

C: 让我<rhythm>详细<rhythm>来<rhythm>破案
E: Lemme <rhythm>break <rhythm>this <rhythm>down

C: 在没有提示的情况下试试吧。
E: Now try without any hints.

C: 当扑满到达取景框的中心时，<color=#f29e38ff>点击屏幕</color>进行拍摄。
E: When the Trotter enters the center of the viewfinder, <color=#f29e38ff>tap the screen</color> to take the picture.

C: 当立牌出现后，<color=#f29e38ff>按下空格</color>进行射击。
E: When a stand pops up, <color=#f29e38ff>press space</color> to fire.

C: 好像有点口渴…再给我来杯味道<color=#dbc291ff>超级强烈</color>的饮料吧，要能让我回忆起戏耍他们的愉悦的那种！
E: I'm a little thirsty... Bring me another <color=#dbc291ff>super intense</color> drink, one that reminds me of the joys of playing tricks on them!

C: 嗝。差不多饱了…走了走了。新人，你自己多保重！可别被舒翁吃了哦。
E: *hiccup* I think I've had enough... I'm off. Take care of yourself, newbie! Don't let that Siobhan eat you alive.

C: 你打发谁呢？
E: Who do you think I am, a beggar?

C: 那既然你同意了，ID卡借我用用，放那就行——
E: Well, since you've agreed to it, let me use your ID for a while. Just place it over there and—

C: 要被踩扁了啾！爪子倒是先挪一挪啊，傻狗！！！
E: You're about to get trampled, tweet! Move your paw aside, stupid dog!!!

C: 本来就是「折纸小鸟」吧…
E: You are an Origami Bird though... You're made of paper...

C: …我会考虑的，翡翠女士。但无论如何，非常感谢你的善意。
E: I will think about it, Madam Jade. Regardless, I appreciate your kindness very much.

C: 嗯…公司当然没有那么好心，我也不是什么慈善家。这是一桩双赢的生意，仅此而已。
E: Well... The IPC isn't exactly generous, and I'm certainly not running a charity. It's purely a mutually beneficial business deal, nothing more.

C: …容我稍微思考一下，可以吗？
E: ...May I take a moment to think this over, if that's okay?

C: ……感谢你的坦诚，卢卡选手。如果你想通了，随时联系我～
E: ...Thank you for your honesty, Luka. If you change your mind, feel free to let me know anytime.

C: 何况…假如让你重来一遍今天的比赛，你会为了逃避这些刺耳的声音选择输给铄金吗？
E: Moreover... if you could redo today's match, would you choose to lose to Shuojin just to avoid these grating voices?

C: 我发出邀请，正好能解决这个让你头疼的麻烦。
E: My invitation could solve this headache for you.

C: 怎么样，卢卡选手，对我的安排还满意吗～
E: How do you like my arrangement, Luka?

C: 我又来测试了。
E: I'm here to do testing again.

C: 早知道，还得是我。
E: I knew it. It has to be me.

C: 哈哈，我拒绝。
E: Haha, I refuse.

C: 按照黑塔女士的计划，原本打算将鲁珀特二世的数据体作为第五位天才邀至席间，未曾料想，竟是「寂静领主」的数据体活化。
E: Madam Herta's original plan was to turn Rubert II's data into the fifth genius and invite them to our table, but we did not expect the data entity emulating the Lord of Silence to gain sentience.

C: 以这一发现作为前提，结论：编写反转反有机方程的程序，其可行性并不为0。
E: With this discovery as the premise... Conclusion: The probability of composing a program that reverses the Anti-Organic Equation program is greater than 0.

C: 比起关照自身，你更爱探索世界。
E: Exploring the far corners of the universe will seem more exciting than just looking out for yourself.

C: 全剧终
E: The End

C: 观景车厢还要用来接待客人呢！
E: Don't even think about it! The Parlor Car is for receiving guests!

C: 我就是为派对而生的！
E: I was born for parties!

C: 嘿嘿，地毯、摇椅、抱枕、巨大帕姆玩偶…这些怎么不算生活必需品呢？
E: Carpets, pillows, rocking chairs, and jumbo Pom-Pom toys are lifestyle essentials, aren't they? Hehe.

C: 已经很晚了，我们就先告辞了帕！
E: It's getting late, so we'll see you later!

C: 晚安，星穹列车。
E: Goodnight, Astral Express.

C: （我要在这里疯狂泡澡！我要成为浴缸深潜者！）
E: (I'm going to soak like crazy in here! I'm going to become a bathtub deep diver!)

C: 不过我还是略感震惊。元胞运算芯片的插槽上有防呆设计，理论上反过来是根本插不进去的。生产商大概也没料到，你真是有一身使不完的力气……
E: I'm still a bit surprised. The cellular calculation chip has a foolproof design, so it theoretically shouldn't fit if inserted incorrectly. The manufacturer probably didn't anticipate this. You really have a remarkable amount of strength...

C: 依据特征。
E: Based on characteristics.

C: 很符合我对你的想象。
E: That fits perfectly with what I imagined about you.

C: 那时的奥赫玛是真正的「永恒之城」。比起一座城市，它更接近一位母亲。站在山崖上向外眺望，视野所及之处全是我们的领土！
E: Okhema was a true "Eternal City" back then. People did not think of it as their city, but rather a motherly figure. When one stood on top of the hill and looked outward, everything we could see was our territory!

C: 这便是我喜爱大地兽的二百七十个理由之一：大即为美。也就是说，大地兽是世间最美丽的造物。
E: That's just one of the <unbreak>270</unbreak> reasons I love dromases: Bigger is more beautiful! Which makes dromases the most beautiful creatures in the world!

C: 「开拓者二世」。
E: "Trailblazer Jr."

C: 你好啊！小家伙——不用怕，我只是一位路过的学者，愿意和我说说话吗？
E: Hello there, little one! Don't be afraid. I'm just a scholar passing by. Would you like to have a chat with me?

C: 泰坦睡醒树木客厅？有什么了不起的？
E: Grope of Muffin? What's so big about that place?

C: 吉奥里亚祝福还有这功效？
E: Georios's Blessings can do that, too?

C: 神功已然大成的驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大微微张嘴，磅礴的岁月之力便从它口中喷出。被那光束扫到的人们惊讶地发现，自己竟然重返了青春！
E: Having achieved perfect transcendence, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas opened its mouth slightly, releasing an invincible power of time. Those caught in the beam were stunned to find themselves young again!

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大愿不愿意先参加留在城里的「驻屯分团」？虽然资历较浅，但一定能帮它快速熟悉旅团的工作。
E: Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas, would you like to start out with the city-based "Garrison Regiment"? Though you're a bit green, it'll definitely help you get familiar with the troupe's work quickly.

C: 呜嗡！（好耶，我要吃一座山！）
E: Grumph! (Yeah! I could eat a whole mountain!)

C: 好吧，既然你都拜托我了。
E: Alright, since you've asked.

C: 好久不见呀， {NICKNAME}。欢迎回到「黑塔」空间站！
E: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. Welcome back to the Herta Space Station!

C: 请您放心，我们会全程监控系统运行的。如果有任何异常，会立即中止测试。那么…测试的事就拜托您了！
E: Don't worry, we'll be monitoring the system the whole time. If anything goes wrong, we'll stop the test right away. So... we're counting on you for the test!

C: 我等仲裁官着眼于宏大的均衡：无论自然生长的植物，还是人为修建的塔楼，在我们眼里都无区别。唯有天平两端值得关注。
E: We Arbitrators focus on the grand Equilibrium: Whether it's naturally growing plants or artificially built towers, we see no difference. Only the two ends of the scale are worth our attention.

C: 我经营的餐馆，就叫做——
E: My restaurant shall be called...

C: 小妖精们好认真呀，原来是这么严肃的场合吗？
E: The fairies are really serious about this. Is it that formal of an event?

C: 这就是星级餐馆的模样吗？
E: So this is what a starred restaurant looks like?

C: *我们*同意！但是，有意思的内容，会是什么呢？
E: We're in! But what do you mean by "fun"?

C: 既然如此，最终结果是……
E: Which means the final tally is—

C: 只是，得多付钱。
E: Of course... it'll cost you.

C: 你们自己尝了吗？迷。
E: Have you all tried your own dishes? Mem.

C: 抓到了一只小馋猫！
E: Caught you, you little glutton!

C: 没关系，快去吧，我就在这等你哦。
E: No worries. Go ahead, I'll wait for you right here.

C: 迷！原来就是你，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」的掌管者，黄金料理界的领军人物，迷称「开拓之主」的迷之店长……
E: Mem! So it's you, the one who runs The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2, the legendary figure leading the world of golden gourmet cuisine! Mems call you the "Trailblazer of Flavor"... the mysterious owner behind it all!

C: 直到这场竞赛逐渐演变，开始和迷境中的每个妖精都息息相关……
E: But then, the contest began to spiral into something that entwines every fairy in the Maze...

C: 哎呀，好多妖精盯着这边，有点紧张呢。感谢刻律德菈提供的数据，我就照着读啦？
E: Oh wow, all these fairies staring at me... kinda nerve-wracking! Thanks to Cerydra for compiling the numbers. I'll just read them straight out, okay?

C: 灰宝，我们去问问看吧，希望老师这次还能拿出什么厉害的炼金秘药来。
E: Grayie, let's go see what the professor says. Hopefully, he's got another one of his brilliant alchemical fixes up his sleeve.

C: 太厉害了！有了这些巨型蔬菜，餐馆再也不用担心食材短缺的问题了！
E: That's incredible! With these giant vegetables, food shortages will be a thing of the past for our restaurant!

C: 差不多玩够了吧？再闹下去，要耽误餐馆经营了。
E: Alright, enough. Keep this up, and you'll interfere with the restaurant's actual business.

C: 迷！空荡荡的，好适合跳舞迷！
E: Mem! It's so spacious, perfect for dancing memi!

C: 关于餐馆主管…
E: About the Restaurant Supervisor...

C: 促销确实是迅速消耗库存的办法，但该如何招徕更多顾客，就得看捷足爵的本事了。
E: Promotions may help burn through stock fast, but how do we attract more customers? That is up to Dux Celeripes' talent.

C: 记好啦。另外，老师刚才还说过：「自己种的胡萝卜，味道果然很不错啊！」…这句话也要记吗？
E: Yup, all recorded. Oh, and you also said, "Carrots I grow myself really do taste better!" Should I write that down too?

C: 是你突然出现在迷路迷境，帮我们复兴了荒废的餐馆迷！
E: But you suddenly appeared in the Membrance Maze and helped us revive the abandoned restaurant, mem!

E: {NICKNAME} updated the purchase list for the Express' supplies.

E: March 7th organized an archery contest.

C: {NICKNAME}合成炒饭时，万能合成机福至心灵，炒出一碗粒粒分明、金黄可口的炒饭，令人唇齿留香，念念不忘。
E: When {NICKNAME} synthesizes fried rice, the Omni-Synthesizer has a moment of enlightenment and makes a bowl of fried rice where every grain can be picked apart and is good in looks and taste. It lingers in the mind and is hard to forget.

C: 会议时间到！
E: It's Meeting Time!

C: 领队姬子综合考虑各队员分工，重新调整了任务排班。
E: Squad leader Himeko took everything into account and reshuffled the task assignments for everyone.

E: The Nameless Hero

E: Future

E: Love

E: Educator

E: Child

C: 发亮的梦想
E: Lustrous Dream

C:
提及此事时，
男人全无波澜。
来去绝境足足九回，
曾被视为缺失的，
如今他都已强胜众人百倍。
E:
The man seems unmoved
when this past is mentioned.
Having braved death nine times,
He who was once lacking,
Now excels above everyone else, still rising.

C: 「自己创造的东西，都不许玩吗？」
E: "Can't I just play with something that I've created?"

C:
于是孩童明白——
于是孩童释怀——
即使无数离别沉在肩头，
即使命运之血已经干透，
E:
Thus, the child understands —
Thus, the child accepts —
Though countless farewells on her shoulders weigh,
Though destiny's blood dries like clay,

C:
当她醒来，仍能感到水花的冰冷刺骨，
与翻涌的潮声刺耳——

似魂灵的哀哭，似困兽的咆哮，
昏惑，冥迷，悲恸喧阗。
E:
When she wakes, she can still feel the water's freezing touch,
And the cacophony's billow—

Like the wail of the dead, the howl of beasts,
In confusion, delirium, and clamors hollow.

C: 少女眯起贪婪的瞳子，\n看向被称为黄金裔的奇人。
E: The girl narrows her eyes of greed,\nTowards those called the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 她以神力捏塑面具，\n遮住眼底<color=#9e5738>最后的真心</color>。
E: She used divine power to forge a mask,\nAnd conceal <color=#9e5738>the last of her true heart</color>.

C: 「无可分离？」\n在我向众人诉说后，\n车厢中展开了激烈的讨论。
E: "Inseparable?"\nAfter I told everyone,\nA heated discussion broke out in the Express car.

C: 如永夜的寂静。
E: Like the silence of the Evernight.

C: 晨昏数度，岁月轮转。\n尘埃覆盖昔日辉煌，\n祭司们将这位泰坦遗忘——
E: Days and nights passed, the years turned,\nDust covers the glory of the past,\nThe priests have forgotten this Titan —

C: 「没办法，人家还很困嘛。」 ——三月七 「下次早点起，定个闹钟。」 ——丹恒 「闹钟一响就能起床的人太可怕了！」 ——{NICKNAME} 「这种人什么事都做得出来。」 ——三月七
E: "I can't help it. I'm still sleepy~" — March 7th "Next time, get up earlier and set an alarm." — Dan Heng "People who can get up right as soon as their alarm goes off are terrifying!" — {NICKNAME} "This kind of person is capable of anything." — March 7th

C: 半数火种尽在她手，\n隐匿的<color=#9e5738>「诡计」</color>泰坦按捺不住，\n放下厥词。
E: Half of the Coreflames were now in her hands,\nAnd the hidden <color=#9e5738>Trickery Titan</color> stirred,\nLeaving taunts.

C: 「陪我啜饮一杯吧，爱臣。」 终是凯撒率先打破沉默。 「比起血与盐的味道， 我偶尔也留恋你的秘酿…」
E: "Drink one more cup with me, my dear follower." In the end, the Imperator first broke the silence. "When compared to the taste of salt and blood, I sometimes miss your ambrosia..."

C: 如同我曾嘱托<color=#9e5738>「吟风爵」</color>的那样——\n帝王史传绝不为记录功绩，\n而为照鉴来人。
E: Just as I once instructed <color=#9e5738>Dux Carminum</color>...\nThe histories of rulers are not for recording our merits,\nBut for warning future generations.

C: 公主在女王的膝间伏泣。
E: The princess wept, her face on the queen's knees.

C: 她唱到歌喉喑哑，\n怀中的灵水干涸。
E: She sang until her voice turned hoarse,\nAnd the spirit water she held was no more.

C: 如那风中的歌谣所述：\n<color=#9e5738>逐火是不断失却的旅途</color>。
E: Just as the ballad blown on the breeze says:\n<color=#9e5738>Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey</color>.

C: 几乎每个脚印，\n他都满<color=#9e5738>怀着怒意</color>踩下。
E: Nearly every footprint,\nWas stamped <color=#9e5738>full of the fury</color> that filled him.

C: 相较重获新生之喜，\n伴死而归的学术破壁，\n更令学士心盛。
E: Compared to the joy of a new life,\nThe scholarly breakthrough, carried home alongside death,\nFilled the scholar's heart with more fervor.

C: 织金的改衣师，浪漫的代行人。\n她那云崖上的宅房，该是何等富丽堂皇…
E: The gilded dressmaster, the executive of romance.\nHow resplendent would her mansion be above the radiant dawning clouds...

C: 可是啊，黎明机器真能始终照耀？\n鸟儿的歌喉不会有一日变得喑哑？
E: But will the Dawn Device truly shine forever?\nWill the voices of songbirds not one day turn hoarse?

C: 所以…桃子。遐蝶写过一篇名叫《黄金大饭店》的故事。我参考了大家喜欢的风格，天马行空地进行了续写。至于结局…听说{NICKNAME}要让全银河都读到《如我所书》，不如一起许个愿吧？期待人们为这篇故事构思出最完美的结局。
E: So... Peach. Castorice once wrote a story called The Grand Restaurant. I borrowed the style everyone loved and let my imagination run wild to continue it. As for the ending... I heard {NICKNAME} wants the whole cosmos to read As I've Written, so why don't we make a wish together? Let's hope people dream up the most perfect ending for this story.

C: 「炼金术已经让悬锋城进入热兵器时代！现在，就让老古董们见识一下『王翼居合』派的厉害！」
E: "Alchemy has brought Castrum Kremnos into the age of firearms! Now, let's show these old-fogeys what the King's One-Turn-Kill School is made of!"

C: 大地兽之王报以温和的低吟。
E: The Dromas King responded with a gentle growl.

C: 「今天已经吃了两筐苜蓿、十几个野苹果和半袋稻谷了，但它还是砸吧着嘴向我嗷嗷待哺，这在过去从未发生过……」
E: "Today it's already devoured two baskets of alfalfa, over a dozen wild apples, and half a bag of rice, but it's still smacking its lips at me like a hungry baby bird. This has never happened before..."

C: 小伊卡无忧无虑，小风堇愁云遮额。看着智种学派被驳回的资金需求表单，少女辗转反侧，最终决定——带着小伊卡离树出走，找到治愈它…或者让它吃饱的办法。
E: While Little Ica remained carefree, Cinny's brow was clouded with worry. Looking at the rejected funding request form from the Nousporists, the young girl tossed and turned before finally deciding to leave the Grove with Little Ica, determined to find a way to heal it... or at least keep it well-fed.

C: 「龙来了，龙又来了…！」
E: "The dragon's here, the dragon's here again...!"

C: Leoreia300，被称为格奈乌斯的个体继承火种后，通过「裂魂仪式」将自身解离为五份，以对抗扩张的黑潮。在迭代后，该仪式的部分数据继承至下一循环，并以箴言、习俗等方式呈现。\n\n代码在迭代中的继承具有一定的随机性。任何主动干涉，都应当谨慎进行。
E: Leoreia300, an entity known as Gnaeus, split himself into five parts through the "Soul-Rending Ceremony" after inheriting the Coreflame to combat the expanding black tide. After iteration, some data from this ceremony was inherited into the next cycle, manifesting as proverbs, customs, and so on.\n\nThe inheritance of code during iteration carries a degree of randomness. Any active intervention should be undertaken with caution.

C:
两簇信号在δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>演算中引发的死循环，旨在阻止实验进程。
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>借由「毁灭」的力量，将PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的存在从翁法罗斯抹除，令「岁月」路径出现逻辑漏洞。而后为「记忆」的触媒注入十二火种，回退演算进程。
██PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>███发挥的具体作用█不得而知████
目前，由于外部变量干涉，永劫回归已被突破。实验进入最终阶段。
E:
A recursive feedback loop triggered by two signal clusters within the δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> computation. Designed to stall the experiment.
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak> wielded the power of Destruction to erase PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>'s existence from Amphoreus, introducing a logic breach in the track of Time, and then infused the catalyst of Remembrance within the twelve Coreflames and regressed the extrapolation process.
██PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>'s ███exact role █remains unknown.██████
Due to external variable interference, the eternal recurrence has now been broken. The experiment enters its final phase.

C: 今天列车的制冷系统坏掉了。幸亏乘客们都超级厉害，成功拯救了冰箱里的冰淇淋。但是被{NICKNAME}乘客和三月七乘客偷偷吃光了。记仇。
E: Today, the train's cooling system broke down. Fortunately, the passengers were amazing and saved the ice cream from the fridge. However, Passenger {NICKNAME} and Passenger March 7th secretly ate it all. Noted for future vengeance.

C: 今天解决了列车盆栽中的病虫害，开心。但是「锡什么什么蛞蝓」太恶心了！列车长希望它们希望再也不要出现在列车里了！
E: Today, Pom-Pom dealt with the pests in the train's plants. Happy. But the "something-something slug" was just too disgusting! This conductor hopes they never appear on the train again!

C: 你一定是我熟悉的人。
E: You must be someone I know.

C: 毫无疑问，努力本身就有价值。\n请记得：你现在所做的一切，都比曾经做过的更伟大；你「开拓」之旅的前方，也将比你曾了解的地方更美好。
E: It is without question that hard work has its own value.\nPlease remember that all you do now is greater than everything you've done before. The places ahead on your trailblazing expedition will also be better than the locations you've known prior.

C: 你与少女共同见证了幻梦中的流星雨——你在现实中从未感觉如此幸福。\n你愿意全身心地投入某个值得留恋的时刻…哪怕温暖转瞬即逝，这短暂的幸福也值得你铭记终生。
E: You and the girl witness the meteor shower in this fantastical dream together. You've never felt so happy in the material world.\nYou're willing to dedicate yourself completely to a certain moment worth remembering... Even if the warmth of that moment leaves you, that fleeting happiness is worthy of being remembered till the day you die.

C: ——这些敌人会逐渐变强，请优先解决掉它们。
E: — These enemies will gradually increase in power. Please prioritize eliminating them.

C: ——这里的敌人团结一致，互相照应。它们会一起狩猎寻宝者。
E: — Enemies here are united and look out for each other. They hunt treasure hunters together.

C: ——拥有成长能力的敌人发现了你，它们开始积蓄力量，准备向你发起攻击。
E: — Enemies with the Growth ability have noticed you. They start charging up, preparing to launch an attack against you.

C: ——强大的敌人已经发现了你，大战在所难免，请谨慎对敌。
E: — A powerful enemy has noticed you. Please be careful in this unavoidable fight.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Instigator</color>: Enemies with the Support ability will strengthen other enemies around them.

C: 战斗胜利时，连胜计数+1。\n连胜越多，<color=#f29e38ff>连胜金币奖励越多</color>。
E: When you win a battle, your winning streak tally increases by 1.\nThe longer your winning streak, <color=#f29e38ff>the more Gold Coin Rewards you'll earn</color>.

C: 在「货币战争」中招募角色时：\n若你<color=#f29e38ff>已拥有该角色</color>，则<color=#f29e38ff>继承</color>你的角色的<color=#f29e38ff>养成数据</color>。\n若你<color=#f29e38ff>未拥有该角色</color>，则可招募到其对应的<color=#f29e38ff>试用角色</color>进行游玩。
E: When recruiting characters in "Currency Wars":\nIf you <color=#f29e38ff>already own the character</color>, you will <color=#f29e38ff>inherit</color> your character's <color=#f29e38ff>build data</color>.\nIf you <color=#f29e38ff>don't own the character</color>, you can recruit a <color=#f29e38ff>trial version of the character</color> to play with.

C: 「货币战争」中，<color=#f29e38ff>金币</color>是用来购买角色、升级提高团队规模和刷新商店的核心经济资源。\n获得更多金币以提升团队的战斗能力。
E: In "Currency Wars", <color=#f29e38ff>Gold Coins</color> are the core economic resource used for recruiting characters, upgrading team size, and refreshing Store offerings.\nGain more Gold Coins to enhance your team's combat power.

C: 在对局中，攻略系统将根据你拥有的角色阵容自动推荐适合的攻略。\n使用<color=#f29e38ff>应用攻略</color>功能，可快速在商店中找到想要的攻略推荐角色！
E: During the match, the strategy system will automatically recommend suitable strategies based on the character lineups you have unlocked.\nUse the <color=#f29e38ff>Apply Strategy</color> feature to quickly find the characters recommended by the strategy in the Store!

C: 存在此标记的敌人可以进入【月狂】状态。当敌方施放攻击后，为能够触发【月狂】状态的敌方单位附加一层【嗜血】。
E: Enemies with this mark can enter the Moon Rage state. After enemies use attacks, apply 1 stack of Bloodlust to enemy units that can trigger Moon Rage.

C: 攻击【战甲】被破坏的敌人还会对其造成额外的伤害。敌人回合结束时完全修复【战甲】。
E: Attacking enemies with destroyed "War Armor" will also additionally deal DMG to them. "War Armor" will be completely repaired at the end of the enemy's turn.

C: 选中不可转动模块时，边缘会呈<color=#f29e38ff>红色</color>。
E: The edges of fixed modules will appear <color=#f29e38ff>red</color> when selected.

C: 部分方块上拥有特殊的<color=#f29e38ff>花纹</color>，需使其与两侧的<color=#f29e38ff>薄板</color>花纹对应才可破解<color=#f29e38ff>枘凿六合</color>。
E: Some cubes have special <color=#f29e38ff>patterns</color> on them, which need to match the patterns on the <color=#f29e38ff>plates</color> on the two sides to solve the puzzle of the <color=#f29e38ff>Hexanexus</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>建木缠结</color>需要被同时破坏，否则其旺盛的生长力会使它复原。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Ambrosial Arbor coils</color> need to be destroyed at the same time or they will grow back rapidly.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>梯子</color>进行上下移动，所有长度的梯子都只需一步。
E: Use the <color=#f29e38ff>ladder</color> to move up or down. You only need to take one step for each ladder, regardless of their length.

C: 控制来去自如的贼灵巴特鲁斯完成挑战任务。拖动左下角摇杆控制贼灵飞行，使用上升、下降按键可以调整贼灵飞行高度。使用结束操控按键退出控制贼灵。
E: Control the agile Spirithief Bartholos to complete challenge missions. Drag the joystick on the bottom-left side to control the Spirithief's flight, and use the ascend/descend buttons to adjust flight height. Use the end control button to exit Spirithief control.

C: 扎格列斯的力量使敌人无法察觉到巴特鲁斯；发射一定数量的泡泡弹可以击败敌人。
E: Zagreus's power makes enemies unable to detect Bartholos. Firing a certain number of bubble shots can defeat enemies.

C: 使用左摇杆控制「槲寄生」号转向，点击<color=#f29e38ff>加力</color>按键可以短暂加速。
E: Use the left joystick to steer the Mistletoe, {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} the <color=#f29e38ff>Accelerate</color> button for a temporary SPD Boost.

C: 敌人有<color=#f29e38ff>弱点</color>和韧性。利用和敌人<color=#f29e38ff>弱点相同的属性</color>进行攻击能够<color=#f29e38ff>削减</color>敌方目标的<color=#f29e38ff>韧性</color>。
E: Enemies have <color=#f29e38ff>Weaknesses</color> and Toughness. Use attacks of the <color=#f29e38ff>same Type as their Weaknesses</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>reduce</color> their <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>指定类型的货物仅可匹配指定类型的置点</color>，可利用货物堆叠提升单次码货收益
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Specific types of goods only fit in specific types of Placement Spots</color>. Profit from a single inventory arrangement can be increased by skillfully overlaying goods on top of each other

C: 不同颜色的情节片段会使不同的观众情绪发生变化，产生不同的效果
E: Different colored Story Snippets will cause different Audience Emotions to change, resulting in varied effects

C: 不同<color=#f29e38ff>行动卡</color>有不同工作量，选择行动卡后，日程会推进<color=#f29e38ff>相应步数</color>，移动到对应的格子上。
E: Different <color=#f29e38ff>Action Cards</color> entail varying workloads. After selecting an Action Card, the schedule will advance by <color=#f29e38ff>a set number of steps</color> to reach the corresponding tile.

C: 「虚构叙事」中的所有战斗有轮数限制，行动轮数结束或击败<color=#f29e38ff>全部波次敌人</color>，则战斗结束。\n击败更多的敌人或削减首领生命值可获得<color=#f29e38ff>更高的积分</color>，以获得更多奖励。
E: All battles in Pure Fiction have a Cycle limit, and battles finish when action cycles end or <color=#f29e38ff>enemies from all waves are defeated</color>.\nDefeating more enemies or reducing Boss enemy's HP will earn you <color=#f29e38ff>higher scores</color> and greater rewards.

C: 每次覆写将从3个随机加权奇物中选取1个，覆写选中的加权奇物。
E: Each overwrite will select 1 out of 3 random Weighted Curios and overwrite the selected Weighted Curio.

C: 每次合成可以从3个组件中选取1个。
E: You can select 1 Component from 3 with every synthesis.

E: Business Bonds usually take the form of <color=#f29e38ff>Duo Bond</color>. For example, <color=#f29e38ff>March 7th</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Himeko</color> can form a bond. Later, you'll see more powerful <color=#f29e38ff>Trio Bond</color> combos.

E: Those who willingly place themselves in peril often lack strategy. Yet, he possesses a brilliance few can rival, all while chasing the uncontrollable thrill of facing death head-on... Perhaps he is, through and through, a "rational madman." A formidable fighter who doesn't care about winning or losing. That is truly fearsome.

C: 这个人像是用自己的记忆抄写了一遍《仙舟律》，难得有长生种背负了这么多的罪业，还能维持神志清醒…等姐姐抓住他后，我定要细细判读他的罪业。
E: This man has violated every statute in the Xianzhou Legal Code. It is rare to find a long-life individual who carries such a crime-ridden history and still maintains his sanity... Once my sister catches him, I'll examine his crimes in detail.

E: By the will of the Ten Lords...

E: I once followed the trail of a shooting star, and in doing so, I found freedom. But the place where it fell is no longer there.

C: 比划比划，给你五秒。
E: Show me what you can do. I'll give you five seconds.

C: 这位罗浮小剑士的味道和他的为人一样干净，只有雨后的清香。唔，该说他心志干净呢，还是性格太单纯了？

E: Music may have its creative secrets, but it's the emotions and resolve in the voice, not just the skill, that makes a song really move someone.

E: Dangerous thoughts.

C: 他寻求「死」的结局，我找寻「生」的机会。我们走在看似相反的道路上，却将抵达同样的终点，他…也不会成为命运的奴隶。

E: Where am I going to find another genius as mentally well-adjusted as me? In the mirror?

C: 生在这个时代，信仰是大多数人生命的全部，她们的神谕就像和风细雨，安抚着焦躁不安的世界。

E: We gathered together under Aglaea's direction, not because of her cunning, but because there's a blazing fire in her cold eyes that is destined to ignite.

C: 学生的问题越大胆，我越喜欢，要是能与我辩驳上五个来回…高分！
E: The more bold a student's question is, the happier I am. And should a student be able to debate with me for hours — Then they'll pass with flying colors!

C: 留于人世的痕迹，远比死亡漫长。
E: The traces we leave in this world will last much longer than death.

C: 拥抱「新生」吧，玻吕刻斯。

C: 万千生灵的目光，或许比王冠所承载的期待更为沉重。真是让人期待呐，他的开拓之旅会抵达何许的境界。
E: The gazes of countless lifeforms may be even greater than the expectations placed upon the crown. I look forward to seeing how far his trailblazing expedition will take him.

C: 正面强攻，抑或侧翼包围？

C: 长夜将临，正适合一场美梦♭
E: The evernight draws near. Time for some sweet dreams ♭

C: 身为王，他亲手造就了悬锋王朝的变迁，革新的力量比纷争之力更令人印象深刻。

C: 能在梦里听见朦胧的神谕，还在它的指引下前行…人家也觉得很神奇呢。原来，那从来不是他人施予的奇迹，而是内心深处的自我呀♪
E: To be able to hear a vague prophecy in my dreams and move forward under its guidance... I think that's pretty magical, too. As it turns out, it was never a miracle granted by someone else, but the self deep within my own heart ♪

C:
・流萤在筑梦边境的秘密据点，向你承认自己确是偷渡犯，并向你讲述了自身罹患的失熵症。
・离开秘密据点后，你们被「桑博」袭击——原来，他的真身是假面愚者花火。
・你和流萤被她送入了奇怪的梦境中，此后，你们一同在那里寻找出路，途中常常听到呼唤米哈伊尔的奇怪声音。
・你们遭遇了忆域迷因「死亡」，并在忆者黑天鹅的帮助下得以逃离。
・回到现实后，你与流萤暂时失散，黑天鹅告诉你：刚才你离开的是原始梦境，并且梦境世界正在瓦解。
・列车组认为，梦境的异常与星核猎手「萨姆」有关。在银狼的介入后，你决定重回原始梦境调查「萨姆」的动向。
・黑天鹅陪同你回到了原始梦境，途中，你们通过忆质了解到了流萤在与你失散后的去向。
・流萤在你的面前被忆域迷因「死亡」杀死。
・你和黑天鹅遭遇了星核猎手「萨姆」，并与其交手。
E:
・ At the secret hideout in Dream's Edge, Firefly admitted that she was a stowaway and told you about the Entropy Loss Syndrome she has been suffering from.
・ After leaving the secret hideout, you were attacked by "Sampo," who turned out to be the Masked Fool Sparkle.
・ She sent you and Firefly into a strange dreamscape, where you both searched for a way out while frequently hearing mysterious voices calling for Mikhail.
・ You encountered the Memory Zone Meme "Death" but managed to escape with the help of the Memokeeper Black Swan.
・ After returning to reality, you temporarily lost track of Firefly. Black Swan told you that you just left the Primordial Dreamscape, and that the dream world was breaking down.
・ The Express Crew believed that the dreamscape anomalies were related to the Stellaron Hunter "SAM." After Silver Wolf's intervention, you decided to return to the Primordial Dreamscape to investigate "SAM's" movements.
・ Black Swan accompanied you back to the Primordial Dreamscape, where you learned about Firefly's whereabouts after your separation through memoria.
・ Firefly was killed before your eyes by the Memory Zone Meme "Death."
・ You and Black Swan encountered the Stellaron Hunter "SAM" and engaged in combat.

C: ・不久后，为避免梦境被「虚无」吞噬，「梦主」对黄泉下达逐客令，黄泉按其要求离开。\n・黄泉来到星穹列车，交还了巡海游侠铁尔南的遗物。\n・黄泉推测家族阴谋，丹恒决心使用结盟玉兆，向罗浮求援，力挽局势。
E: ・ Soon after, to prevent the Dreamscape from being consumed by the Nihility, the Dreammaster issued an expulsion order to Acheron, who left as requested.\n・ Acheron arrived at the Astral Express and returned Galaxy Ranger Tiernan's relic.\n・ Acheron speculated The Family's plots. Dan Heng resolved to use the jade abacus of allying oath to seek help from the Luofu to turn the tide.

E: Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow

E: Unfortunately, I feel nothing. Simply dead inside

C: 陌生的
E: Strange

C:
代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为波涛夫人，大海的女儿们，被「毁灭」的罪孽蚀尽灵肉，只余空荡扭曲的形骸，为将临的黑日起舞颂唱。
残有的黑潮自往世流淌，落入此世浪涛——
美艳动人的波涛啊，你为君王饮尽灾殃，酒痕染花碎珍珠点缀的妆——
你醉倒在迷狂的屠场，在血与蜜酿的坟场，引歌为自己号丧。
E:
An erroneous materialization after the code was affected. The reference entity is Lady of Crashing Waves. Daughters of the sea, their souls and flesh corroded by the sins of "Destruction," now dance and chant for the coming Dark Sun as hollow, twisted husks.
The remnant black tide flows from past ages into this world's tides—
Enchanting waves, you drank calamity for your sovereign, and your visage is adorned with wine-stained petals and shattered pearls—
You lie drunken in the frenzied abattoir, and in this grave of blood and honeyed ruin, you sing your elegy into the void.

C: 流萤想要启动「萨姆」机甲制造骚乱，再趁机以「流萤」身份入梦。银狼认为风险太高，并且发现流萤看到的画面和「监控」不一致。
E: Firefly wanted to activate the SAM mech to cause chaos, then take the opportunity to enter dreams as "Firefly." Silver Wolf thought the risk was too high and discovered that what Firefly saw didn't match the "surveillance footage."

C: 似乎是因为此处梦境尚未完工，知更鸟无法在筑梦边境继续追踪。知更鸟难以理解，为何有人要在此时对家族和匹诺康尼图谋不轨。
E: Due to this section of the dreamscape being unfinished, Robin couldn't continue tracking in the Dream's Edge. She struggled to understand why someone would plot against The Family and Penacony at a time like this.

C: 流萤希望用自己的「死亡」为你展示梦境的真相，并阻止黄泉拔刀。流萤在大丽花的帮助下从流梦礁返回战场，她以萨姆的身份与黄泉交手，却未能如愿将你带离。
E: Firefly hoped to use her own "Death" to reveal the dreamscape's truth to you and stop Acheron from drawing her blade. With The Dahlia's help, Firefly returned from Dreamflux Reef to the battlefield. She confronted Acheron under Sam's identity but failed to take you away as planned.

C: 在哀歌塞壬「困难」难度中，达成3个挑战目标
E: Complete 3 challenge goals in the Elegy Siren challenge in Hard mode

C: 起身离去。
E: Get up and leave.

C: 【<u>蝶魄</u>】状态下，我方全体消耗的战技点越多，敌方全体受到的伤害越高；每次进入【<u>蝶魄</u>】状态后，首次累计消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>个战技点后，恢复【<u>蝶魄</u>】次数，并使攻击与持续伤害能额外造成真实伤害。
E: While in the "<u>Butterfly Soul</u>" state, the more Skill Points consumed by all allies, the higher the DMG dealt to all enemies. After entering the "<u>Butterfly Soul</u>" state and consuming a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> Skill Points for the first time in that state, recover "<u>Butterfly Soul</u>" count(s) and enable attacks and DoT to deal additional True DMG.

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

C: 周期演算：往日离愁
E: Cyclical Extrapolation: Past Parting Sorrows

C: ●初始获得奇物：#1、#2
E: ● Initial Curios: #1 and #2

C: 目标生命值最多降至1点，同时会将受到的伤害超出当前生命值的部分转化为【负载生命值】，受到治疗时会优先回复【负载生命值】。
E: Target's HP cannot be reduced below 1, and any excess damage beyond an amount of their current HP will be converted to "HP Overload." When receiving healing, prioritizes restoring their "HP Overload."

C: 被【指名祸首】选中过的角色。
E: The character that has been selected by "Name the Culprit."

C: 行动延后，下个回合开始时受到量子属性附加伤害。\n量子角色每攻击一个敌方目标，都会使该附加伤害提高，该效果最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层。
E: Action is delayed and receives Additional Quantum DMG at the start of the next turn.\nFor every enemy target Quantum characters attack, this Additional DMG will increase. This effect can stack up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).

C: 添加冰弱点
E: Implant Ice Weakness

C: 负载生命值
E: HP Overload

C: 她从奈落的最深处脱逃，沿途烧尽一切同她有关的记忆。 我们循着一路的灼痕追至此地，无数忆庭之镜映照出少女孑然一人的身影。 「忆者大丽花，你为何叛离忆庭？」 她用利爪轻叩脸颊，笑容在无数镜面中勾起相同的弧度。 「只是厌倦而已…正如我曾背叛『毁灭』。」 她的目光扫过镜中的万千自己—— 「是啊…我已落入你们的镜中。可这是不是也意味着，当我点燃自己的记忆，所有的镜面也会因我而燃烧？」 她跳起神秘的舞步，一同旋转裙裾的还有万千镜中人…衣摆上的冷焰温柔地舔舐着镜面，随后将它们吞入火中。 在忆庭之镜的映照下，我看见那女人将记忆的花束尽数献给烈火——她的孩童时代被焚烧殆尽，青春岁月化为飞灰，最后，是她的一切往昔…… 一同燃烧的，还有我们的万千镜面。 「感觉浑身燥热吗？那就与我一同步入温柔的火焰吧……」面前的镜中，她对我展露笑靥。 我已听不见那些呐喊…我满怀欣喜地走入镜中，想要追寻那起舞的身影——从亦步亦趋，再到舞步相合，我终于挽住了她的裙裾…… 而她也终于看向我的眼睛。在摇曳的光芒中，她的双手抚过我的裙角，她眼中的蓝色就像温柔的波涛，将我的所有淹没。 ——一位忆者的记忆 「忆者们以为我献上了一切往昔，但谁说，那就是『我』的往昔呢？」 拨弄着魔尾上的火焰，她走向下一段回忆。
E: She escaped from the deepest depths of The Abyss, burning away every memory tied to her existence. Following the trail of scorched marks, we tracked her to this place, where the countless Garden of Recollection's mirrors reflected the silhouette of a lone girl. "Memokeeper Dahlia, why did you betray the Garden of Recollection?" She tapped her cheek with her claws, her smile reflecting the same curve across innumerable mirrors. "I simply grew tired of it... just as I once betrayed the Destruction." Her gaze swept across numerous reflections of herself in the mirrors. "Yes... I have fallen into your mirrors. But doesn't this mean that when I set my memories ablaze, all these mirrors will burn along with me?" She pranced into a strange dance, her skirt twirling simultaneously in thousands of reflections... The cold flames on her dress hem gently licked the mirrors' surfaces, before swallowing them into the fire. In the reflections of the Garden of Recollection's mirrors, I saw that lady offer all her bouquets of memories to the raging flames. Her childhood burned to ashes, her youth turned to dust, and finally, all of her past... And burning along with them, our myriad mirrors. "Feeling hot and restless? Then step into the gentle flames with me..." Through the mirror ahead, she smiled at me. I can no longer hear those cries... With joy in my heart, I step into the mirror, chasing after that dancing figure. As I followed her steps, then matched her rhythm, I finally grasped the hem of her dress... And at last, she met my gaze. In the flickering light, her hands smoothed over the hem of my dress, and the blue of her eyes drowned all of me, like tender waves. — A Memokeeper's memory "The Memokeepers thought I surrendered all my past, but who said those memories were 'mine'?" Toying with the flames on her tail, she walked toward the next memory.

C: 你书写了一段奇迹，继续开拓的日子近在眼前。\n去和大家谈谈接下来的行程吧。
E: You've written down a miracle, and the days of Trailblazing are just ahead.\nGo talk to everyone about the upcoming journey.

C: 奇怪，这位少女身上的确存在一丝杂音，可那位自称治安官的男人却毫无察觉。\n直接跟上去的话，自己很容易被其他人认出来，打草惊蛇，先使用「调律」进行监视吧。
E: That's strange... there is a definite trace of static noise around this girl, yet that man who calls himself a security officer is completely oblivious.\nIf I follow her directly, I'll be recognized and blow my cover. I'll use "tuning" to keep an eye on her for now.

C: 「生命因何而沉睡？」——这是星核猎手此次行动的接头暗号，看来那位真正的合作者就在附近。
E: "Why does life slumber?" This is the passphrase for the Stellaron Hunters' current mission. It means the true collaborator is somewhere close.

C: 她的长梦值得拥有更美好的结局，当遗憾业已存在，它也将弥补的机会永永远远地交到了你的手中。
E: Her long dream deserves a better ending. While the regret already exists, she has forever placed the chance to make things right in your hands.

C: 查看附近的玩偶
E: Check the dolls in the area

C: 「当再次邂逅的那天到来，我想…我会假装我们素未谋面，再重新认识你一次，让一切都从头开始。」
E: "When the day we cross paths again arrives, I think... I'll pretend we've never met, and get to know you anew, as if starting all over."

C: 算了，抓紧时间，星穹列车已经到了。
E: Never mind. Hurry up. The Astral Express has arrived.

C: 第一次「做梦」，还有些不习惯。感觉这里和现实没什么不同。
E: This is my first time "dreaming," so it still feels a little odd. Everything here seems just like the real world.

C: 回头见。
E: See you later.

C: 你们是怎么办事儿的？睁大眼睛瞧瞧，这姑娘是我们要找的偷渡犯吗？
E: What's gotten into you all? Open your eyes and take a good look. Is this lady the stowaway we're looking for?

C: 希望我还有余力做到……
E: I hope I still have the strength to do this...

C: 到这里就无法追踪了。是因为梦境施工还没完成么？
E: Can't navigate any further from here. Is it because the Dreamscape construction isn't complete yet?

C: 你好。
E: Hello.

C: 但我看到了。在它准备行凶的瞬间，它的瞳孔当中，出现了「另一片梦境」的倒影。与十二时刻有些相似，气氛却完全不同。
E: But I saw it. In that instant before it was about to strike, a reflection of another dreamscape appeared in its pupils. It was somewhat similar to the Twelve Hours, yet the atmosphere was completely different.

C: 「永火官邸」启程了，可怜的人们…他们还不知道等待在前方的是什么。
E: The Ever-Flame Mansion has set out on a journey. Those poor people... They have no idea what lies in wait ahead of them.

C: …神情？
E: ...Expression?

C: 好了——运气不错。
E: Alright. Looks like we got lucky.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>拉扎莉娜•简•艾丝黛拉</color>，这位无名客曾经的事业。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Razalina Jane Estella</color>, the former undertaking once belonging to this Nameless.

C: 是吗？那如果…你会在美梦中，迎来三次死亡呢？
E: Oh really? Then what if... you were to die three times in the sweet dream?

C: 就是这里吗…
E: Is this the place...

C: 也或许，是他得到救赎的地方。
E: Or perhaps, it's the place where he'll find redemption.

C: 这个数量…难道歌斐木的计划，已经开始实现了？
E: So many... Could Gopher Wood's plan already be in motion?

C: 我们缘分不浅啊，朋友——看来你也睡得不沉，改天送你些公司的助眠产品。
E: Quite the fateful encounter we have here, friend. Seems you're also a light sleeper. I'll send you some of the IPC's sleep aids one of these days.

C: 「生命」在任何时候都不是笑话，愚者。这个世界上从不存在次要的恶行，它和道德一样，不能被丈量，也不能用来对比。
E: "Life" is never a joke, Fool. There is no such thing as a lesser evil in this world. Evil, just like morality, cannot be measured, nor can it be compared.

C: 在我还小的时候，星核落入了我的故乡，眼前一切顷刻毁败，甚至没有给我们留下任何反应的空间，无论做什么，都为时已晚。
E: A Stellaron fell onto my homeworld when I was young. Everything I knew was instantly destroyed. We didn't even get a chance to react to it. No matter what we did, it was too late.

C: 让所有人得到证明。
E: Everyone will be vindicated.

C: 此处再无神明，造就乐园的，乃是「人之君王」！
E: No more gods will ever stand here again. This paradise shall be forged by the "King of Humankind"!

C: 身为船长，你见识过东方之海上千米高的疯狗浪。和它相比，冥河不过是大点的澡缸。已死但未死的船员们聚在你身边，等候着命令。只要驶向彼岸，落入塞纳托斯的手掌，你们就能迎来真正的死亡。
E: As a captain, you've witnessed thousand-meters-high rogue waves in the Eastern Seas. Compared to those, the River of Souls is just an oversized bathtub. The not-entirely-dead crew gather around you, awaiting orders. Once you sail to the other shore and fall into Thanatos's hands, you'll all find your true death.

C: 又有谁在乎呢？
E: Who even cares anyway?

C: 向星核许愿。
E: Make a wish to the Stellaron.

C: 的确，若不如此，如何证明我有保护大家的能力？
E: Indeed, how else could I prove that I have the ability to protect everyone?

C: 开始奇美拉对战！
E: Time for a chimera battle!

C: 「律令·其二」的回声
E: Echo of "Divine Law (II)"

C: 托付给你的愿望
E: The Wish Entrusted to You

C: 一同「开拓」的同伴
E: Trailblazing Companions

C: 我方设置的防守阵容会展示在活动主界面。
E: Ally Defense Lineup will be displayed on the event main screen.

C: 我来带灰宝回顾下战况吧！
E: Let me help you review the battle situation!

C: 这是我们击败对手的数量。战胜4个对手就赢啦！
E: This shows how many opponents we've beaten. Beat 4 opponents to win!

C: 灰宝有困惑的话，就去看看<color=#f29e38ff>攻略</color>吧。
E: If you're confused, Grayie, check out the <color=#f29e38ff>guide</color>.

C: 将记忆随意剪辑，抑或不由分说地将它们烧尽…我的同僚们往往就是这般俗不可耐。我喜欢等待，等待那些辉煌的事物落入过去，如同层层堆积的花瓣，一点点腐烂，最终爬满哀叹与怨恨的虫迹，再由我在烛光下挑选珍爱之物为它殉葬…光是想象，就令人兴奋……
E: Wantonly editing memories or burning them all up without a second thought... That's how unbelievably banal my colleagues often are. But I like to wait. I wait for glorious things to fall into the past, for them to rot bit by bit like a pile of fallen petals, until they are covered with worms named lament and hatred. Then, under candlelight, I finally pick cherished mementos to be buried with them... The thought alone is intoxicating...

C: 为我，焚身起舞吧。
E: Immolate yourself in my dance!
